这里是炼金术入门的课程，而这门课的内容是关于灵魂本质。我的名字叫阿那克萨戈拉斯，首先我要说的就是，不许用「那刻夏」称呼我。

This is an introductory course in alchemy, and the subject matter deals with the essence of the soul. My name is Anaxagoras, and let me make it clear from the get-go — you are not to refer to me as "Anaxa."
换句话说，如果我们在树庭遇见了，或者你们到研究室来找我，想请教我的学问，我只会回应「阿那克萨戈拉斯」这个名字。
In other words, should we meet at the Grove, or should you seek my wisdom at the lab, I will only respond to the name "Anaxagoras."
…名字的话题就到这吧，那刻夏老师，这两位可一句话都还没说呢——
...Let's rest the topic of names for now, Professor Anaxa. The two of them haven't gotten a word in yet—
叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯老师，风堇。你身为助教，也应作为示范。
Address me as Professor Anaxagoras, Hyacine. As the teaching assistant, you should be setting an example.
另外，在你们问我之前，我先解释，为什么是在这里授课而不是树庭——
And before you ask, allow me to explain why we're teaching here instead of at the Grove—
因为现在树庭的学者们正在气头上，打算把那刻夏老师吊起来。
Because the scholars of the Grove are currently very upset and are planning to hang Professor Anaxa.
*唐突的清嗓*…来这里属于是「政治避难」。
*abruptly clears throat* ...We are here to seek "political asylum."
…真是位特立独行的老师。我叫白厄，这位是遐蝶，我们是……
...What an eccentric professor. My name is Phainon, and this is Castorice. We are—
圣城奥赫玛公派的学生。
Officially sponsored students from the holy city Okhema.
…嗯，原来老师对我们已经有些了解。
...Yes. Looks like you already know about us, Professor.
自然，这是基本中的基本。
Naturally. This is the most fundamental of fundamentals.
不过首先我要声明，这是门复杂的学问，我不会谈论那些你们可能强烈希望听到的*有趣杂谈*，我要讲的是你在别的教授那里听不到的知识。

But first, I must clarify that we're dealing with a complex subject. I will not be discussing any interesting trivia that you want to hear. I am here to share knowledge that you cannot get from any other professor.
这意味着它并不是你们喜欢的课程，现在你们还有时间去选修其他的课程——
Which means this won't be a course you enjoy. Now, you still have time to pick other electives—
那刻…阿那克萨戈拉斯教授，除了「名字」之外，我们还有什么需要注意的规矩呢？
Professor Anaxa... goras. Are there any other rules we should keep in mind apart from the "name" issue?
我的课堂百无禁忌，你们也无需遵守什么繁文缛节。如果听不懂，你们可以随时打断我，不过最好不要随意插话，而是举起手——这就是全部的规矩了。

My classroom is free of restrictions and there's no need for you to abide by formalities. If something confuses you, you are welcome to interrupt me any time. However, I would advise that you raise your hand instead of speaking freely. That's all the rules.
顺带一提，那刻夏老师还负责你们的神话史概要。至于这门课可能会有*问题*嘛，我来说，还是那刻夏老师你自己说……
By the way, Professor Anaxa is also in charge of your History of Mythology course. As for the potential issue in that one... Should I tell them, or will you, Professor Anaxa?
这门课上有被称为「渎神」的内容。如果接受不了，就请你们自闭耳目离开。
This course includes content some might call "blasphemous." If you can't handle it, feel free to cover your ears, shut your eyes, and leave.
当然，我们早就听说了您的名声。
Not a problem for us. We've heard all about your reputation.
很好，你们会理解这些坏名声不无道理。风堇，把教学大纲和读书清单发给他们吧…要学好这门课，课外阅读是必要的。
Good. You'll soon see those rumors aren't baseless. Hyacine, pass out the syllabus and reading list. If you want to excel in this class, extra reading is a must.
我无法教会你们任何事，我只能让你们学会思考，记住了吗？
I can't teach you anything. All I can do is teach you how to think. Got it?
「或许是恐惧造物可能优于造物主，泰坦才吝于为它们增添智慧，却不知那憨钝可爱的个性正铸成了大地兽较之泰坦更为高尚自洽的品格……」

"Perhaps out of fear that their creations might surpass them, the Titans withheld wisdom from their creatures. Little did they know that such simplicity and charm would forge a nobler, more harmonious spirit in the dromas than in the Titans themselves..."
不错，有几分诡辩的气质。
Not bad. It has a touch of sophistry.
Wait, Castorice, how did you do that?
…可能因为我看了不少闲书吧。
...Maybe it's because I've read too many random books.
至于你…白厄，你给了我白卷。
And you, Phainon... You handed me a blank sheet.
What score do you think that deserves?
我无法认同那刻夏老师「论大地兽优于泰坦」的预设观点，而白卷便是我的立场。
I can't agree with your premise that dromas surpasses Titans, and the blank sheet is my stance.
…以沉默彰显立场，也算是我从大地兽身上学到的优点。
...Expressing a stance through silence. That's something I've learned from the dromas.
…观点不错，牙尖嘴利，有些本事。
...Well, well, good point. You do have some solid skills.
作为你的老师，我当然希望你能在充分学习之后赞同我的观点。但是你如果不同意我的观点，你最好有足以反驳我的学识与思考……
As your teacher, I'd love you to agree with me after sufficient study. But if you disagree, you'd better back it up with enough knowledge and reasoning...
换句话说，你若是撰写短文对「论大地兽优于泰坦」的观点批驳一番，我倒是愿意给你个及格的评价…但是一份白卷只能换得一份空白的评价。
In other words, if you write an essay critiquing the idea that dromas surpasses Titans, I'd be willing to give you a passing score. But a blank sheet only gets a blank grade.
...Does this mean I'm going to graduate late?
这取决于你，不取决于我。
That's up to you, not me.
...It's all because the professor's so obsessed with dromas.
…那么，请敬拜学派的辩友复述你们对神性的定义。
...Alright, let's hear the Venerationism's definition of divinity.
神性即为「尽却凡性之陷漏，唯神完整独有之相」。这个定义，我们方才已达成共识。
Divinity is "the absence of mortal flaws, a state of completeness unique to gods." That's the definition we've all agreed on.
我们回到辩题本身——神性完美否？
Let's return to the debate — Is divinity perfect?
对于完美，你们的定义是：「观者无法指出缺漏之状态」。我想请问：刻法勒能否指出神性的缺漏？
Regarding perfection, your definition is "a state where an observer cannot point out flaws." Let me ask you this: Can Kephale identify flaws in divinity?
我们承认全能的刻法勒可能指出其他泰坦的缺漏，但那必然不是凡性的缺漏，而是神性之缺漏——它本身也符合完美的定义。

We acknowledge that the all-powerful Kephale could point out flaws in other Titans, but those would not be mortal flaws. They'd be flaws in divinity itself — which still aligns with the definition of perfection.
敬拜学派著论《百族颂神册》中已提及了诸多泰坦神性的缺漏。最简单者：尼卡多利为诸邦诟病之狠辣、蛮勇，正铸成了纷争的神性，使它完美。

The Venerationism's treatise The Hundred Tribes' Praise of the Gods mentions many flaws in the Titans' divinity. The simplest example: Nikador, notorious for their ruthlessness and reckless bravery, embodies the divine nature of strife, making them perfect.
容我问你一句：刻法勒的神性，比起尼卡多利的神性，会更为完美么？
Let me ask you this: Is Kephale's divinity more perfect than Nikador's?
一种完美是否会比另一种完美更加完美？一个圆形是否会比另一个圆形更加符合圆形的定义？这不过是对方辩友留下的陷阱，我不会回答这样的提问。
Can one form of perfection be more perfect than another? Can one circle be more "circular" than another? This is just a trap set by the opposing team, and I won't answer it.
即便我们承认一座高山比另一座高山更高，那相较之下的更矮一方，它亦是高山。
Even if we admit that one mountain is taller than another, the shorter one is still a mountain.
…能把敬拜学派那群呆子的古董学论讲出生气来，不错。此次模拟辩论，你过关了。我很期待你在第七百四十二届大辩论会上的表现。

...You managed to breathe life into the ancient theories from the tedious Venerationism. Very impressive. You pass this mock debate. I look forward to your performance at the <unbreak>742</unbreak>nd Great Debate.
还得多亏那刻夏老师教学有方。
All thanks to Professor Anaxa's excellent teaching.
朋友啊…留下吧，留在冥界，与我们一同享受这永恒静谧的月光……
My friend... stay here. Remain in the nether realm with us and savor this eternal, serene moonlight together...
战士啊，丢下你的武器…无需再回那喧闹的现世浴血拼杀，那早已不是你的责任……
Warrior, lay down your arms... There's no need to return to the bloody battles of that noisy mortal world. That burden is no longer yours to bear...
王储大人…是你吗？我们还在征伐哀地里亚的路上吗？看哪，雪原被染成了红色，残肢遍地…我们赢了吗？
Crown prince... is that you? Are we still on the march to conquer Aidonia? Look, the snowy plains are stained red, littered with limbs... Did we win?
王储大人，你为何无视我，为何对忠诚赴死的战友们付以沉默？
Crown prince, why do you ignore me? Why do you stay silent before comrades who died loyally for you?
宁战死，毋荣归。吾儿迈德漠斯，你不肯战死，执意回归现世，也配自称悬锋人么？
Valorous death before glorious return. My son, you refused to fall in combat and insisted on returning to the mortal world. Do you still dare call yourself a Kremnoan?
你还有颜面安坐于被你亲手终结之伟大王朝的王座上么？你不配。
Think you still have the right to sit upon the throne of the great kingdom that you destroyed? I don't think so.
悬锋人何时懦弱到为他人做默默无闻的后盾？你与我分明都将纷争与恐惧当作食粮……
Since when did the Kremnoans grow so weak as to become someone else's quiet support? After all, you and I both thrive on strife and fear...
别停下你的脚步，我不记得我曾教予你「软弱」。
Don't stop moving forward. I don't remember ever teaching you to be "weak."
…母亲。可我们…都未曾见过一面……
迈德漠斯，挺起胸膛，让你的步伐动起来！你身上流淌的{RUBY_B#悬锋建城者}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}血脉会指引你还乡……
Mydeimos, stand tall, and let your steps move forward! The bloodline of {RUBY_B#Kremnos Founder}Gorgo{RUBY_E#} flowing within you shall guide you home...
挺起胸…血脉…指引你还乡……
Stand tall... bloodline... guiding you home...
…呼。摇摇欲坠的世界啊，{RUBY_B#万敌之母}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}之子即刻便来——
...Hah. A world on the verge of collapse. {RUBY_B#Mydei's Mother}Gorgo{RUBY_E#}'s son will be here at once—
希望我没有让你们等太久。
Hope I didn't keep you waiting too long.
嗯…大功告成！不过，总觉得还少了些什么……
Hmm... All done! But I feel like something's still missing...
画得真好！是不是还少了缇安之前和我提到的，两位天外朋友呀？
This looks amazing! But isn't it missing those two friends from beyond the sky that you mentioned before?
呀，是呀，差点闹笑话。*我们*想想…就补在画的角落里吧！
Oh, you're right! That was close. Let us think... How about adding them in the corner of the painting?
小小灰和小小丹都是好人，一定不会责怪缇安的，嘿嘿。
Little Gray and Dannie are such good people — they definitely wouldn't blame us, hehe.
在冥界里孤孤单单的，感觉好像忘了很多事…这种感觉真不好！
Being all alone in the nether realm makes it feel like we've forgotten so much... It's such a bad feeling!
幸好有阿姨陪着缇安，给阿姨讲故事的时候，*我们*想起了很多过去的经历。
Luckily, you're here to keep us company. When telling you stories, we recall so many past experiences.
呵…我在这个地方游荡了许久许久，也早已把生前所有事情忘干净了。
Heh... I've wandered this place for so, so long, and I've forgotten literally everything about my life before.
我只记得与最重要的人做了个约定——「明天见」。
The only thing I remember is a promise I made to someone dear to me: "See you tomorrow."
是吗！那可是*我们*最喜欢的告别辞呢。每当说再见的时候，*我们*就会大大方方地说，明天见！
Really? That's our favorite goodbye! Every time we part ways, we would say, "See you tomorrow!"
是啊，明天见，多么美好的祝愿呀……
Yes, "See you tomorrow." What a beautiful wish...
…也许是时候说再见了，小缇安。我想再四处走走…或许能想起更多事情。
...Perhaps it's time to say goodbye, Trianne. I'd like to wander around some more... Guess it'll help me recall more things.
好！缇安就坐在这里，乖乖等着小小蝶。只要看着这幅画，就绝对不会忘记朋友们了。
Alright! We will sit here and wait for Little Cas. While looking at this painting, we won't forget our friends.
再会，可爱的孩子，谢谢你陪了我这么久。
Farewell, Trianne. Thank you for keeping me company for so long.
缇安才要谢谢阿姨呢，你好温柔，让缇安想起了妈妈…明天见——
It's us who should thank you. You're so gentle, reminding us of our mom... See you tomorrow...
愿我们都能在鲜花芬芳的西风彼岸重聚！
May we reunite on the fragrant shores of the western wind!
斯缇科西亚的高塔，破损的墙垣，以及双月泄下的如注月华，以及盛开的「安提灵」。
The tower of Styxia, the crumbling walls, the twin moons pouring down their radiant light, and the blooming Antila.
在{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的奇迹中，此处似乎是空无一人——
Within {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s miracle, this place appears utterly deserted—
…或许，有关此地的回忆不需要借助任何泰坦的神力，它独属于那时的你和她。
...Perhaps the memories of this place require no Titan's power. They belong solely to you and her, from that time.
你记得在此地，她复现了久远的炼金术，将残损的死龙从冥河中召唤出来。
You remember, right here, how she revived ancient alchemy and summoned the broken corpse of Netherwing from the River of Souls.
你记得在此地，她乘上死龙沿着冥河回到冥界，接过{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的权柄，并将你轻轻推回了人间。

You remember her, here, riding Netherwing down the River of Souls, returning to the nether realm to claim the authority of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, and gently pushing you back to the world of the living.
你记得在此地，她从月华之中归来，与你相拥——那时的温度，那时的甜香，那时耳畔的轻语，都历历可数…她得到了她一直想要的拥抱。

You remember her, here, stepping out from the moonlight to embrace you — the warmth, the sweet scent, the whispered words by your ear, all so vivid... She finally got the embrace she had always wanted.
在那之后，她将回到她应去的地方，完成她应行的职责……
After that, she returned to where she belonged, to fulfill the duties she was destined to complete...
她为你留下了一小片花圃，它足以证明那一刻并非短暂的梦境，而是真实的回忆。
She left you a small garden — a testament that moment wasn't a fleeting dream but a true memory.
我要前往的地方，是人们口中的哀伤之地。
The place I'll be going to is what humans call the land of sorrows.
但凭借这一抹心跳，和怀抱的温热……
But with this heartbeat, and the residual heat of this embrace...
我将把冥界变作温柔的归处。
I shall turn the nether realm into a gentle place of rest.
这相拥短短一瞬，却是我「活过」的证明。
This embrace may be brief, but it's the proof that I once "lived."
遐蝶拂动花瓣，动作比最微弱的风更为轻柔。
Castorice brushed against the petals, with motion gentler than the faintest breeze.
The flower swayed ever so slightly.
…告别的时刻，终于要到了吗…阿格莱雅？
...Is it finally time to say goodbye... Aglaea?
我们早已告别过，海瑟音。数百年前，「金织」便已身殒奥赫玛。
We have already bid farewell, Hysilens. The Goldweaver has already met her demise in Okhema a few hundred years ago.
如今贴身陪伴着黄金裔们的，不过是她神性的碎片罢了。
What now accompanies the Chrysos Heirs are just fragments of her divinity.
我已是碎片中存世最久的一枚…因为你不舍让我离去，不是吗？
I am longest in existence among the fragments... it's because you couldn't bear to let me go, isn't it?
…海瑟音，你可还记得我们初遇时的场景？
...Hysilens, do you remember how we first met?
当然记得。你嘲笑我的衣着简陋残破，真是一尾无礼的金鳟。
Of course I do. You mocked my clothing as being simple and tattered. How rude, you golden trout.
呵呵…若我知晓那是你家乡的服饰，一定不会说那样的话。
Hehe... Had I known that was your hometown's garment, I wouldn't have said that.
你向来是一个深陷旧日欢宴的人，尝尽了孤独、习惯了孤独，却又从未摆脱对孤独的恐惧……
You've always been someone deeply entangled in past revelries, having tasted loneliness, grown accustomed to it, yet never escaped the fear of it...
这正是你凭借海洋的权能，将我延续至今的原因吧。
I suppose that's why you kept me in existence using the authority of Ocean.
在我离去后，这冰冷而昏暗的海便仅余你一人了。在那之后，或许又是千年的孤独守望…海瑟音，你会怎么做呢？
After my departure, you will be the only one left in this cold and dark sea. What comes after might be another thousand years of solitude and vigil... What will you do, Hysilens?
忍耐——我已习惯忍耐孤独，它也算是我的老友了。
I shall endure — I've gotten used to persevering loneliness. It's like an old friend at this point.
自离开深海、成为凯撒的剑旗，又接过火种、复归凄暗的洋流…孤独的奏浪者，你所求究竟为何呢？
Since leaving the deep sea and becoming the Gladius of the Imperator, then taking up the Coreflame and returning to the desolate currents... Lonely wavebower, what is it that you truly seek?
当然是泰坦与凯撒允诺我的…欢宴，一场又一场的欢宴。
The revelries promised to me by the Titans and the Imperator, of course... one after another.
那么为何…你的眼中，仍是沉沦与悲疑？
Then why... are your eyes full of despondency and sorrowful uncertainty?
…海瑟音，请聆听无礼的金鳟，最后的祝福吧——
...Hysilens, please heed the final blessings of this rude golden trout.
假如有一天，你在孤寂中难忍倦怠…请为自己举办一场盛宴。
If, one day, you find the loneliness unbearable and grow weary... then hold a grand feast for yourself.
在那场盛宴里，末日的灾厄永不降临，逐火之旅永世延续。你所爱的人都会与你相伴……
In that grand feast, the calamity does not approach, the Flame-Chase Journey continues forever, and all who you cherish will be by your side...
也让我在那场宴会里陪伴你吧，好吗？
Allow me to accompany you in that celebration, will you?
若虫不再言语，金色的光辉在深海中点点消散，如同一触即灭的火光。
The nymph no longer spoke. Golden bits of light disperse in the deep sea like transient firelights.
独守深海千年的歌者曾在此奏唱…奏唱她巡游过的支离岁月。
The singer who kept to the deep sea for a thousand years once sang here... of the fragmented years through which she wandered.
鱼儿游啊游…鱼儿游啊游……
The fish swims and swims... and swims and swims...
离群的它…在海中迷惘，追逐太阳的火光……
Alone it strays... lost in the sea, chasing the blazing light of the sun...
耀眼的火…点亮它的眼睛，也灼伤了它的鳍与鳞……
The dazzling flame... lights up its eyes, but also scorches its fins and scales...
捕猎、杀戮，鱼儿游入血海…起舞、奏唱，换来喧闹的奖赏……
Hunting, killing, the fish swims into a sea of blood... dancing, singing, all for a noisy reward...
鱼儿游啊游…鱼儿游啊游……
The fish swims and swims... and swims and swims...
直到心搁浅在岸上…身落回仄暗的海洋…再也跃不出虚妄……
Until its heart runs aground on the shore... its body falls back into the dim sea... never to leap from illusion again...
熄灭的太阳，快从海中升起呀——
Extinguished sun, rise once more from the sea—
鱼儿将会追逐你，在星间打捞的火光。
The fish will chase after you, the firelight salvaged among the stars.
藿藿大人，咱们开始行动吧？
Captain Huohuo, should we start the ghost hunt now?
大、大人？你还是叫我藿藿吧。
C—Captain? You can just call me Huohuo.
寒鸦小姐让我来带领大家，我也很意外。
I'm really surprised that Madam Hanya asked me to be the leader of the ghost-hunting squad.
尾巴消失以后，我本以为自己会被辞退的。但不知为何……总之，我一定尽力而为，不给大家拖后腿！
After Tail disappeared, I thought for sure the Commission would ask me to resign, but for some reason... A—Anyway, I'll do my best to carry out my duties!
We're all counting on you, Judge Huohuo.
其实，我也不知道现在的我能不能帮上各位的忙……
Actually, I'm not sure if I can be helpful anymore...
尾巴消失以后，我本以为自己会被辞退的。但不知为何…寒鸦小姐让我来带领大家，我也很意外。
After Tail disappeared, I thought for sure the Commission would ask me to resign... but for some reason, Madam Hanya asked me to be the leader of the ghost-hunting squad.
总之，我一定尽力而为，不给大家拖后腿！
A—Anyway, I'll do my best to carry out my duties!
言归正传…除了被镇伏在绥园里的浮烟，洪炉破碎后，还有不少岁阳逃逸在外。
As for our mission... Cirrus was locked up in Fyxestroll Garden, but there were a lot of other heliobi that escaped after the Creation Furnace was broken.
按照十王司对岁阳习性的理解，它们多半会往人居稠密的地带寻找宿主。所到之处一定会有许多不能解释的「灵异事件」。

According to the Ten-Lords Commission's understanding of heliobi behavior, they tend to roam densely populated areas in search of hosts... and wherever they go, there are bound to be reports of "supernatural phenomena."
桂小姐，能否展示一下那个网站？
Little Gui, can you show us the website we'll be using for intel?
因为我刚注册，粉丝还很少。根据我在其他平台的经验，等到粉丝多起来，就会有很多人来贡献各种灵异事件的消息。
Look, I'm a new user, so I only have a few followers on this site... but based on past experience, once you get a following, people start flooding you with stories and news about paranormal activity.
What if all the leads we get turn out to be fake?
装神弄鬼多半都是人为的。
A lot of paranormal activity is just people in costumes.
其实还挺难的。有的信息一眼假，但有的信息嘛…仅凭网上的只言片语恐怕很难分辨。
We have our work cut out for us, that's for sure. Sometimes a lead is obviously fake, but other times... it's hard to tell from just a few words on the Internet.
毕竟有些人为了吸引流量，真是什么瞎话都能编得出来。
After all, some people will make up all kinds of nonsense to attract attention.
所以还是得亲自上前线确认咯？
So we still have to go out and fact-check the leads?
嗯，不止咱们几个，十王司的冥差们也会暗行调查。
Mm. Plus, the spiritfarers from the Ten-Lords Commission will be carrying out their own investigation in secret as well.
吸引关注…小桂子倒是很擅长，她平日里经常用我来表演杂技什么的…但在这灵异爱好者网站上，该怎么涨粉呢？

Speaking of attracting attention... how do we get a following on a paranormal activity website? Sounds like Little Gui's department — she used me in some of her performances just to draw a bigger crowd.
简单，咱们把捉鬼……呃我是说「镇伏岁阳」的过程实录发出去就好了！我们现在可是给十王司当差，谁手上还能有比我们更劲爆的料啊？

That's the easy part — we just post some videos of us ghost hunting... Uh, I mean, subduing heliobi! We're working for the Ten-Lord's Commission after all — we're gonna have the best content out there!
Will the Ten-Lords agree to this?
那位寒鸦小姐同意了呀。我和她说，我打算利用捉岁阳涨粉，再利用粉丝捉岁阳，形成一个正向生态循环…她说没问题。

Madam Hanya has already given us the green light. We'll record our heliobi-hunting expeditions to get more followers, and then use the intel from our followers to find more heliobi. It's like a vicious cycle... W—Wait — a virtuous cycle!
等等，这样一来岂不是违背了隐秘行事的原则？
Wait, aren't we supposed to be operating in secret?
而且岁阳以情绪为食，往往会操纵受害者暴露内心隐藏的一面…

把受害者的信息发到网上，会不会…造成一些二次伤害？我我我绝对没有批评你的意思…只是提出一些担忧。
Wouldn't posting a victim's personal information online... cause even more harm to the victim? I—I'm not trying to pick holes... just raising some concerns.
我的看法是，「隐秘行事」与「曝光灵异」可不冲突，倒不如说，这是同一件事。
The way I see it, "operating in secret" and "exposing the paranormal" go hand-in-hand.
隐去受害人姓名，只留下咱们几个镇伏鬼怪的英姿，拍些激烈战斗的留影，再配个带点刺激性的标题……
We won't reveal the names of any victims. We'll just post some pics and videos of the squad engaging in fierce battles with the supernatural! And then come up with some dramatic titles...
比如什么《阿芬探灵：云骑美少女夜路遇鬼，只用三秒钟她让妖魔后悔》。
Like: "Little Gui Investigates: Ghost Tries to Scare Young Cloud Knight Girl on Creepy Road — Gets Owned..." Y'know?
抓捕岁阳的行动被咱们渲染成一个个抓人眼球的娱乐视频。人们也会对类似的事件半信半疑，恐慌情绪一下子就消失了！
We'll turn the entire heliobi-hunting process into regular uploads. Viewers will see that there's nothing that scary about it, and there won't be any public panic!
没完了是吧，怎么又拐到我这来了！不过，我承认你说的很有道理。
Why are you looking at me? Want a medal or something...? It does kinda sound like a good idea...
当然啦，我知道大家对这个新型捉鬼方式不是很信任…那你们稍等一下啊，我来翻翻情报，咱们几人挑一个先试试。
I feel like some of you aren't convinced by the whole online ghost-hunting thing... How about this — we take a look at the leads we have so far, and pick one to try out as a test run.
你们直接过来看吧，这帖子已经有不少回复了。
Take a look — this post is getting tons of comments.
Don't even ask. I remember it all vividly.
这家酒吧建立的时间并不长，但还是留下了不少回忆。
This lounge hasn't been around for long, but it's already filled with so many memories.
那个虚有其表的闹钟…不提也罢。但要是有人想破坏这里，它绝对会第一个出来阻止。

都是些无聊的事，回想起来还挺有意思的。

我很好相处的，处不好在自己身上找找原因哇！
I'm pretty easygoing. If you don't get along with me, maybe the problem lies with you!
我的情绪很稳定哇，稳定地让你讨厌。这样有什么问题吗？
I'm emotionally stable. So emotionally stable that you'll be annoyed. Is there a problem with that?
汪！倒是你，作为调饮师，却对顾客提出过分的评价，这样很不对的哇！

你不觉得自己更过分吗？
Don't you think you're the one crossing the line here?
汪！你是故意给我调错饮料的吧，但以为这样能让我生气，就大错特错了哇！
Woof! You made the wrong drink for me on purpose, didn't you? If you think that's going to rile me up, you can't be more wrong!
嗝！有点晕乎乎的…和你聊天好开心，我还会来酒吧找你玩的，要记得欢迎我哇！
Burp! I'm feeling a bit dizzy... It's so nice talking to you! I'll come hang out with you some other day. Be sure to welcome me with open arms!
对，它喜欢说些容易引发误会的话，其实自己害羞得不行，每次都要靠冰块来给内部的电路降温。
Yeah, it loves saying things that could cause misunderstandings, but deep down, it's so shy that it has to use ice cubes to cool down its circuits.
它以为把那些小心思隐藏得很好，但大家早就看出来了。
It thought it hid those thoughts well, but everyone saw right through the facade.
You've got it all mixed up.
You've got it all mixed up.

相信他们吧，这可是{NICKNAME}的第一次「开拓」任务，没有点压力和波折，怎么能成为青春的回忆呢？

觉得无聊了吗，瓦尔特？我能理解你的心情…不过我们以后还有很多机会。这一次的冒险回忆就留给他们三个吧～

When I first woke up after being rescued from the ice, I could see clusters of stars in front of me. I reached out for them automatically, but they turned out to be the carriage ceiling lights.
当时列车组所有人都在旁边看着我呢。那场面，可尴尬啦。

哎呀，我还没跟你说过吧？

The whole crew was watching you?
可不是嘛，像是在观察什么奇怪的宇宙生物一样——不过这也不怪他们啦，毕竟大家都不知道我到底是什么来历。
Uh-huh! Like I was some kind of weird alien! I don't really blame them for being curious though — they had no idea where I came from.
你能想象吗？在被列车打捞起来之前，我一直被封在一大块冰里，在宇宙中漂流。
You might not believe it, but before all this, I was stuck in a huge block of ice drifting through space.
姬子姐姐和瓦尔特先生以及…那谁，想了个办法把冰化掉，这才把我救了出来。
Himeko and Mr. Yang and... who was it again? Anyway, they figured out a way to melt the ice and saved me.
谁知道呢？以前的事我全都不记得了。
Who knows? I don't remember anything before that.
被冰冻之前的事，你还记得吗？
Do you remember what happened before you were frozen?
我是谁，原来叫什么，我来自哪里…这些我都忘得一干二净了。连「三月七」这个名字，也只是为了纪念我被唤醒的日期而起的。
Who I am, where I'm from, my name... it's like everything was erased from my mind. "March 7th" was the day they found me, so it stuck.
所以我赖在列车上，跟着它一站一站走下去。指望着哪天能够找到自己的过去……
Ever since then, I've been hanging out on this train and following it to whatever destination it decides to stop at. I'm hoping that one day, I can find my past...
Ugh, what am I talking about this for? Way to get everyone down, huh.
没事，是我自己提起来的嘛。
It's fine. I was the one who brought it up.
开心点，{NICKNAME}。搭乘星穹列车可是非常难得的体验…
Cheer up, {NICKNAME}! It's not every day someone gets to ride on the Astral Express...
列车已经驶出空间站安全范围，预计在十分钟后开启跃迁。
The Express has reached a safe distance from the space station. We'll be jumping in about ten minutes.
请两位乘客坐稳、扶好，小心震动！
Return to your seats please, both of you. Things could get bumpy!
呃…也没必要特地跑来提醒我吧，帕姆？都跃迁过这么多次了~
Uh... thanks, Pom-Pom. But did you really have to come and remind me? I'm not a newbie, you know~
谁叫三月七乘客每次都想挑战自己，然后摔跤？
Well, it wouldn't be necessary, but Miss March 7th likes to challenge herself... and falls over every time.
That's just called never giving up! Hehe~
列车长，能给我一杯果汁吗？谢谢啦～
Conductor, can I get a juice, please? Thank youuuu~
跃迁还有五分钟就要开始了！想喝什么的话，等到结束以后再说吧！
Ugh... We're jumping in five minutes! You can have something to drink when it's over!
噢，你不用担心我。我就想试试能不能站稳了～
Oh, don't worry about me. I just wanna see if I can stay on my feet this time~
Good luck, I'm rooting for you.
谢谢，咱感觉已经抓到诀窍了。
Thanks. I feel like I'm starting to get the hang of it.
关键在于腰腹和大腿正确发力，姿势不重要，重要的是灵活地利用惯性……
The key is using your core, waist, and leg muscles. It's not your stance that matters, but your ability to ride the inertia...
没事的，我结实得很～而且，冰会保护我。
It's fine, I'm sturdier than I look~ Besides, the ice will protect me.
遇到危险的时候，我会下意识地造出冰来托住自己。
When I'm in danger, I instinctively create ice to protect myself.
…虽然有时候摔在冰上，比摔在地上还疼。
...Though sometimes falling on the ice actually hurts more than falling on the ground.
Why do you make things hard for yourself?
Don't be silly — this is fun!
我要是闲下来，就很容易想些有的没的……
I like keeping busy, otherwise I start obsessing over... pointless things.
哎呦，别管我啦，你快找个地方坐下扶好。
Well, don't mind me. Find a place to sit down and buckle up.
我们的下个目的地是颗很小的行星，编号是「雅利洛-Ⅵ」。
Our next stop is a small planet called Jarilo-VI.
列车上一次前往那里是几千年前。根据智库中的记载，那是一个郁郁葱葱，非常美丽的星球。
It's been thousands of years since the last time the Express paid a visit. The data bank shows it was a lush and beautiful place.
不过，漫长的岁月过去了…也许那里已经发生了翻天覆地的变化。
But after all this time, it's possible that dramatic changes have occurred.
跃迁是这样的。第一次看会觉得新奇，以后慢慢就习惯了。
Jumps are like this: They may feel novel the first few times, but you'll slowly get used to them after a few more.
关于它的原理…咳，算了——如果感兴趣的话，下次我找个时间给你细细解释。
As for the mechanism... Well, if you're interested, I'll explain it to you in detail when we have more time.
坐下等吧。记得闭上眼睛，这样可以减轻些眩晕感。
For now, just sit and wait. Remember to close your eyes — it helps with the dizziness.
十分舒适的沙发…坐上去就会感到昏昏欲睡。
A very comfortable sofa... Feels like you'll fall right to sleep after sitting on it.
坐稳扶好，等待跃迁完成。

All passengers, please return to your seats.

没错…想必这次的「开拓」之旅也不会轻松呢。

The complex locality of this world has been... affected somehow. The star rail has been blocked off by something.
拿一般的陆地列车打比方，这就像前进的铁轨突然断裂，底下是坍塌的万丈深渊……

这个时候，也只好紧急刹车了吧？

Indefinitely. Until the anomaly is removed!
拿一般的陆地列车打比方，这就像前进的铁轨突然断裂，底下是坍塌的万丈深渊……

雅利洛-Ⅵ之所以会变成这样一颗冰封的星球…和「星核」的影响脱不开关系。

我们其实是行侠仗义的宇宙侠客！

你终于发现列车组的本质啦？很酷对不对！
Right! You finally get what we're all about. Pretty cool, huh?
{NICKNAME}，这次的「开拓之旅」，我希望交给你、三月七和丹恒。
{NICKNAME}, I'd like to entrust this trailblazing expedition to March, Dan Heng, and you.
旅程的目的也很明确：找到给这个世界带来灾厄、并造成了空间扭曲的「星核」，把它带回列车——后面的事就都交给我们吧。
The objective is clear: Find the Stellaron responsible for the disaster and the spatial distortions, and bring it back to the Express. We'll deal with the rest.
好啊，{NICKNAME}！咱们又能联手出击啦～
Awesome! We get to work as a team again, {NICKNAME}!
列车总得有人留守，不然帕姆会很寂寞的。
Someone has to stay on the train, or Pom-Pom will get lonely.
更何况，我们刚被{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}纳努克{RUBY_E#}瞥了一眼，万一再被反物质军团盯上就糟了。
Not to mention, {RUBY_B#The Destruction}Nanook{RUBY_E#} threw us a glance just now. If we're targeted by the Antimatter Legion, then things could go south fast.
因为你们三个在空间站配合无间，一路化解了诸多难题。我觉得，或许你们之间可以擦出更美妙的火花。
Because you three made a great team back in the space station. My guess is that if you spend even longer together, we'll see something even more impressive.
你就不能表现得积极点嘛！
So it's still not our turn...
我知道你很想去，不过总该让年轻人们单独走走，培养培养感情嘛。
I know you really want to go, but we should give the youngsters a chance to get out there on their own. It'll be a good opportunity for them to bond.
{NICKNAME}，三月，要是你们没什么意见的话，就去找丹恒聊聊吧？
{NICKNAME}, March, if you two are ready, why not go and find Dan Heng?
关于雅利洛-Ⅵ的生态和勘测数据，他大概已经开始整理了吧？开启旅程之前，多掌握些情报总是不会错的。
He's probably already started collating the ecological data and survey results for Jarilo-VI. It's always good to know more about the destination before you start a journey.
每到一站都会有一段激动人心的大冒险！
Each stop brings its own grand and exciting adventure!
Have you been on an adventure before, Pom-Pom?
Have you been to Jarilo-VI before, Pom-Pom?
现在还不能离开这架列车……
Pom-Pom can't leave the train right now...
Pom-Pom's so dejected all of a sudden...
被冰雪覆盖的星球…我想找的答案会在这里吗……
A planet covered in snow and ice... Will I find my answer here...?
WHOA! Don't sneak up on me like that!
你怎么还在这儿，快去找丹恒吧！又有激动人心的大冒险在等着我们呢。
Why are you still here? Go find Dan Heng! Exciting adventures are waiting for us.
自从「毁灭」把星核播种在宇宙间，许多世界都变样了。
Ever since the Destruction sowed Stellarons across the universe, many worlds have changed.
「毁灭」的纳努克、「丰饶」的药师、「终末」的末王…我自问也算见多识广，可有些星神的行为真是难以理解啊。
Nanook the Destruction, Yaoshi the Abundance, Terminus the Finality... I've seen and learned a lot in my time, but I still struggle to understand some of the Aeons' actions.
多亏了你们的精彩表现，空间站才能脱离危机。现在，帮助列车重新启程的重任也要交给各位了。
Thanks to a brilliant performance, you guys saved the space station from a moment of crisis. Now the Express is relying on you to get it moving again.
记住，「探索」、「了解」、「建立」、「连结」——这是我们每到一个世界都要做的四件事。
Remember, there are four things we do when we arrive at a new world: Explore, understand, establish, and connect.
除此之外，你也要跟小三月和丹恒处好关系哦。
And I'm sure you'll get along really well with March and Dan Heng.
Are you doing okay after your first jump?
眩晕或是干呕都是正常的反应，等你习惯就好了。
Dizziness or retching are normal reactions. You'll feel better once you get used to it.
那说明你和列车相性很好，是个好兆头。
So you have high compatibility with the Express. That's good.
你怎么没和大家在一起？
Why aren't you with everyone else?
我不喜欢凑热闹，何况眼下还有更重要的工作要做。
I enjoy being alone, especially when I have important work to do.
我翻阅了列车的资料库，看来雅利洛-Ⅵ的环境在过去的几个世纪里发生了巨变。它原本并非一颗被冰雪覆盖的星球……
I went through the Express' database, and it seems the environment on Jarilo-VI has undergone drastic changes in the past few centuries. It was not a frozen planet to begin with...
瓦尔特说影响是星核造成的。
Welt says it was caused by a Stellaron.
瓦尔特是这么认为的？嗯…考虑到星轨遇到的空间阻塞，可能性确实很大。
He said so? Hmm... considering the spatial obstacles that the star rail has encountered, it's highly possible.
我进行了初步勘测，发现这颗星球的表面有一处的温度相对正常——不过所谓正常，其实也就是人类能勉强生存下去的程度。

I've conducted a preliminary survey and found that there's one area with a relatively normal temperature on the surface of the planet. By "normal," I mean a temperature that just about allows for human survival.
如果需要提前做「开拓之旅」的调查选址，我肯定会选择那片相对温暖的地方。
If I had to choose a site for initial investigation on this trailblazing expedition, that would be it.
姬子想让你我和三月同去。
Himeko wants you, me, and March 7th to go together.
猜到了。你没来之前，三月要去哪里，姬子都会让我和瓦尔特先生跟着。
...As I expected. Before you came, whenever March wanted to go anywhere, Himeko would make Mr. Yang and me go with her.
现在你来了，解放的大概也不会是我。
And even after you arrived, I didn't suppose I'd be the one to be liberated of that duty.
你和三月七两个人去好不好？
我猜，姬子想让你和我们两个同去，对吗？
If I know Himeko, she's not gonna let you stay behind.
你才刚上车，她肯定想让你亲身体验一次「开拓」之旅。
You're new, I'm sure she wants to get you started with some firsthand trailblazing.
不过尽可放心。有三月在，旅行一般不会无聊。
Don't worry. With March around, you are guaranteed an eventful expedition.
所以，这次「开拓」之旅的目标，就是要找到雅利洛-Ⅵ上的「星核」，清除它对星轨的阻塞…对吗？
I assume the trailblazing objective this time is to find the Stellaron on Jarilo-VI and dispel the effect it's exerting on the star rail... right?
我知道了。{NICKNAME}，你先去找三月吧，等我准备好了就去跟你们会合。
I see. {NICKNAME}, you should find March. I'll join you two once I'm ready.
怎么样？你跟丹恒聊过了吗？
Did you talk to Dan Heng? How'd it go?
真的吗？我怎么有点怀疑……
Really? I find that hard to believe...
哎呀，他一直都是那副装酷的样子，你不用太在意啦。
*sigh* That's our Dan Heng — always trying to look cool with his poker face. Don't mind him~
别紧张，{NICKNAME}！我跟丹恒都是「开拓」的老手啦，跟着我们保证有肉吃——呃，前提是那个星球上找得到肉！
Relax, {NICKNAME}! Dan Heng and I are experienced trailblazers! We got your back!
怎么样——准备好出发了吗？
一看到这颗星球，咱就在想——这个世界里都是冰耶，会不会和我的过去有什么关系？这个想法一产生就止不住了。
When I first saw this planet, I thought: A world covered in ice... could it have something to do with my past? Now I can't stop thinking about it.
不过，当时困住我的是一种叫「六相冰」的稀有物质…一般的星球上恐怕很难找到吧？
Still, the ice that trapped me was Six-Phased Ice — a very rare substance. I don't think you can find it on your average planet...
We won't know unless we have a look ourselves.
说不定这就是你的老家。
This might actually be your homeworld.
老实说，我可不希望这是我的家乡啊！看上去就很冷的样子，美少女可是很不抗冻的！
To be honest, I think I'd be kind of annoyed if I found out this was my homeworld. It looks freezing... Pretty girls aren't frost-resistant!
...What? Is there something on my face?
没！我只是在想象，这次咱们仨会遇到什么有趣的事…嘿嘿！
Nah~ I was just imagining all the fun we're gonna have here... hee-hee!
…这个世界还真是多灾多难。先是遇到星核，现在又被你惦记上……
...I feel sorry for this world. First the Stellaron, and now you...
雅利洛-Ⅵ「开拓」小分队，现在出发咯！
Alright! Here comes, the Jarilo-VI Trailblaze Team!
Not long ago, on the Astral Express...
在这儿呆呆站了半个小时了，很少见你这么忧虑呢。
You've been standing here for half an hour. It's rare to see you like this.
记挂那两个孩子的安全吗？有瓦尔特在呢，你可以放松一点啦。
Are you worried about those two? Welt is with them. They should be fine.
姬子，星核猎手的远程通讯，你应该存下来了吧？
Himeko, did you keep a copy of the Stellaron Hunters' transmission?
——而且，在四十五系统时前，一颗星核在罗浮上…爆发了。
Not to mention, <unbreak>45</unbreak> system hours ago... a Stellaron burst occurred on the Luofu.
An unexpected calamity... don't you think?
星核猎手，你们在打什么主意…仙舟联盟可不像我们这么好说话。被「{RUBY_B#岚}巡猎{RUBY_E#}」盯上，你们就不再是猎手，而是猎物了，联盟会追逐你们到宇宙尽头——

What exactly are you Stellaron Hunters trying to do...? The Xianzhou Alliance aren't us — they won't give you time to explain. Once you draw the attention of {RUBY_B#Lan}The Hunt{RUBY_E#}, you become their prey. The Alliance will hunt you to the end of the universe...
有话直说吧。别打机锋了，卡芙卡。
Stop speaking in riddles, Kafka. Say what you have to say.
…很简单，这颗星核与我们无关，但仙舟已经把罪责安在了星核猎手头上；
...It's simple. That Stellaron has nothing to do with us, but the Xianzhou is convinced that we're responsible.
仙舟很危险！…这个人，这个人——
The Xianzhou is in danger! ...This man, he—
如果他在仙舟上，那么所有人——瓦尔特先生，三月七和{NICKNAME}——都有危险！
If he's on the ship, then Welt, March, and {NICKNAME}... everyone is in grave danger!
他和你…要逃离的东西有关，是吗？
Is he... connected to that past you want to escape?
但我…不能放着他们不管。我只怕…是我的负累终于追了上来，把大家都牵扯其中……
I... I can't leave them down there. It's just... I'm afraid my burden has finally caught up with me, and that everyone is about to be drawn in...
谁能没有负累呢？哪怕小三月那样什么都不记得，肩上也有沉甸甸的东西呀。
Is there anyone who doesn't carry around a past burden? She may not remember it, but even a girl as carefree as March has hers.
我们行走在看不见的命途之上。所见所闻，所开拓的一切都是我们的行李，既是背负的重担，也是走下去的力量。
We tread on a Path that is hidden from us. The things we see and the trails we blaze all become our baggage. They weigh us down, but they also give us strength to continue the journey.
Try not to dwell on it, Dan Heng.
按照规矩，列车停靠的时间是七个标准日。在此期间，乘客可以自由支配自己的时间。
The Express spends seven standard days at each stop. Its passengers are allowed to do as they deem fit during that time.
列车上有我和帕姆值守，也够了。
Pom-Pom and I are more than capable of looking after the Express.
想做什么就做吧，总比以后后悔要好。
If there's something you've got to do, do it now. Better than regretting it further down the line.
对了，事情结束后，你会回列车和大家一起旅行的，对吧？
And... you'll come back and travel with us once this is all over, right?
想做什么就做吧，总比以后后悔要好。
If there's something you've got to do, do it now. Better than regretting it further down the line.
丹恒乘客，改变主意打算下车了吗？
You want to disembark, Dan Heng? Changed your mind?
那么，帕姆祝你一路顺风。
Well then, Pom-Pom wishes you the best of luck.
嗯…帕姆明白，许多话不能通过说出口的方式来表达。
Mm... Pom-Pom understands. Not everything needs to be put into words.
乘客下车后，请注意在发车时间之前回到列车。
Make sure you return before the Express departs...
要是能顺便带一点儿当地特产就更好了帕。
...and bring Pom-Pom back some local specialties?
还有什么要跟帕姆说的吗？
待会儿，你看清楚这个人。
记得。人有五名，代价有三个……
I remember. Of five people, three must pay a price...
You are not one of them, Jing Yuan.
Of five people, three must pay a price...
Hold on, I... I'll be there soon.
我就说吧，{NICKNAME}，他肯定在睡懒觉。
What did I tell you, {NICKNAME}? He's definitely sleeping in.
我们列车上这伙人啊，几天不睡都没问题，但一觉就要全睡回来。你啊，早晚也会掌握这技能的。好啦，大好时光别在走廊里耽搁了。
We Trailblazers can go days without sleep, but when we do hit the hay, we have to make up for it. Anyway, no point wasting our time in the corridor.
列车长让咱们来吱一声：航线会议就要开始啦。老地方，别迟到咯～
The conductor wants us to attend a warp navigation meeting. Same old location apparently, and we can't be late~
Let's head over. Oh, by the way...
愿赌服输，{NICKNAME}。这周洗咖啡杯的活儿就由你包啦。
You drew the short straw, {NICKNAME}. It's your turn to wash the coffee cups this week.
And a wonderful morning to you, Himeko.
啊，真不错。很久没听到这么客气的招呼了。
*sigh* I can't remember the last time I got such a polite response.
保持住，这是非常可爱的优点。
Well hang onto it, it's cute.
啊，不要紧，丹恒一向守时，如果迟到了…想必有他的原因。
Ah, no need to worry, Dan Heng's rarely late. I'm sure he must have a good reason...
丹恒的情况比较特殊，我们希望能尽量保护他。
Dan Heng's situation is special — we hope to protect him to the best of our ability.
雅利洛-Ⅵ的开拓暂时告一段落，星穹列车也该启航前往下一颗星球了。
The trailblazing of Jarilo-VI has drawn to a close, and the Astral Express must depart for the next planet.
秘密——先卖个关子，我们在会议上再正式公布，你可以期待一下哦。
Not telling yet... We'll make an official announcement in the meeting, but I'm keeping you in suspense for now~
开拓还真是马不停蹄啊。
Trailblazing really is a full-time job, huh.
宇宙广袤无边，而开拓永不停歇——就算穷尽一生，也没法走遍银河中的每个世界呢，这就是未知的魅力呀。
The universe is boundless, and trailblazing never ends... Even a lifetime isn't enough to explore every world. That's the beauty of the unknown.
Any chance for a little break first?
这不像你呀，{NICKNAME}。你不是很担心身体里的星核，想早点解除它吗？
That hardly sounds like you, {NICKNAME}. What about that Stellaron inside you? Don't you wanna get rid of it?
再等一等，会议就要开始了。
好久不见，星穹列车上的各位。我是卡芙卡。
Long time no see, Astral Express crew. It's Kafka.
啊，时机不错呢，大家都在——似乎都在。
Hm, I came at a good time. You're all here... Every single one.
迷人的自我介绍就大可不必了，星核猎手。
No need for the mysterious introduction, Stellaron Hunter.
很抱歉打断了你们的聚会。但相信听完我的请求，你们会理解我的冒昧。我要请你们——
Apologies for interrupting your little get-together. But I'm sure once you've heard my request you'll forgive me. I'd like you to make a...
「星核猎手」，我见过你，不过是在公司的悬赏令上，那可是天文数字的赏金——而且不论死活。你知道自己的悬赏是多少吗？
I've seen your face before, Stellaron Hunter, even if it was only on a Corporation wanted poster. They were offering quite the bounty... dead or alive. Do you know the figure?
不太关心。公司的悬赏令么，与其说恶名，倒不如说是盛赞。数字越大，赞美越盛。
Doesn't concern me. Then again, a Corporation bounty is a compliment, not an insult, don't you think? The higher the figure, the bigger the compliment.
你们通缉犯想得还挺开……
You wanted criminals sure know how to look on the bright side of things...
…如此说来，黑塔也盛赞过你们：「一个自称能看见命运的{RUBY_B#艾利欧}狂人{RUBY_E#}，带着一群不要命的{RUBY_B#星核猎手}疯子{RUBY_E#}，追逐宇宙中最危险的东西！」——黑塔可是很少夸人的喔。

...I will say, Herta certainly paid you all a compliment: "A {RUBY_B#Elio}maniac{RUBY_E#} that claims he can see destiny, leading a bunch of {RUBY_B#Stellaron Hunters}wild lunatics{RUBY_E#} in pursuit of the most dangerous objects in the universe!" ...And Herta doesn't give out compliments very often.
「追逐宇宙中最危险的东西」吗？…在这点上，你们列车和我是同一类人吧。
In pursuit of the most dangerous objects in the universe, huh? ...In that sense, you Astral Expressers and I are cut from the same cloth.
你来错地方了，卡芙卡。我们不打算接受你的请求，也不打算和星核猎手扯上什么关系。很高兴和你聊天，也许哪天你愿意亲自登门拜访，届时我们可以再谈。

You're in the wrong place, Kafka. We're not about to accept your request, and we're not about to get into bed with a Stellaron Hunter. It was nice talking with you. Perhaps next time you'll be willing to pay us a visit in person and we can continue our little discussion.
Have you guys heard of the Luofu?
…仙舟联盟的六艘巨舰之一，仙舟「罗浮」。我们知道。
...The Xianzhou Luofu? It belongs to the Hexafleet of the Xianzhou Alliance. We've heard of it.
唔，但你不知道的是：这艘仙舟现在离你们很近，是通过两次折跃就能抵达的距离。
Mm. But what you haven't heard is that it's currently very close to you — a couple of warp jumps away, in fact.
而且，在四十五系统时前，一颗星核在罗浮上…爆发了。
Not to mention, <unbreak>45</unbreak> system hours ago... a Stellaron burst occurred on the Luofu.
An unexpected calamity... don't you think?
星核猎手，你们在打什么主意…仙舟联盟可不像我们这么好说话。被「{RUBY_B#岚}巡猎{RUBY_E#}」盯上，你们就不再是猎手，而是猎物了，联盟会追逐你们到宇宙尽头——

What exactly are you Stellaron Hunters trying to do...? The Xianzhou Alliance aren't us — they won't give you time to explain. Once you draw the attention of {RUBY_B#Lan}The Hunt{RUBY_E#}, you become their prey. The Alliance will hunt you to the end of the universe...
有话直说吧。别打机锋了，卡芙卡。
Stop speaking in riddles, Kafka. Say what you have to say.
…很简单，这颗星核与我们无关，但仙舟已经把罪责安在了星核猎手头上；
...It's simple. That Stellaron has nothing to do with us, but the Xianzhou is convinced that we're responsible.
我的同伴刃被云骑军带走了，我要把他带回来，解除这次的星核危机，洗脱我们的嫌疑。
My companion Blade has been taken away by the Cloud Knights. I want to bring him back, resolve this Stellaron crisis, and clear our names.
与你们无关？谁信啊，哪有这么巧的事情，星核刚爆发你就出现了……
Nothing to do with you? Yeah right — sounds like a weird coincidence to me. You just happened to show up after the Stellaron burst...?
再说，你和我们又没什么交情，星核猎手清不清白和咱们有什么关系~
Also, we're not your friends. Why should we care if a Stellaron Hunter is innocent, hmm~?
我们应该封印星核，帮助仙舟。
We should seal the Stellaron and help the Xianzhou.
我们可以卖星核猎手一个人情。
Maybe we can sell our friendship to the Stellaron Hunters.
这么做对我们有什么好处？
Is there anything in this for us?
不要！我才不想听她的——联盟那么厉害，难道还处理不了一颗星核嘛！我们是星穹列车组，又不是星核封印专业户！

No! Why are we listening to her? The Alliance is strong — is a single Stellaron burst really too much for them to handle? We're the crew of the Astral Express, not some squad of Stellaron-sealing super specialists!
你们当然可以置身事外。趁现在星核还没污染这片空域，启动跃迁，你们就可以去下一个世界。但假以时日，这段星轨将再度被阻断。

You could, of course, not get involved. Knowing that the Stellaron hasn't yet affected this region of space, you could make the jump and arrive at the next world. But sooner or later, the star rail here will be more blocked off than it was before.
我可以告诉你们未来会如何：如果你们没有前往「罗浮」，星核最终将污染整艘仙舟，飞船上大约一半的住民将会丧生……
I can tell you what the future holds: If you don't go to the Luofu, the Stellaron will eventually contaminate the entire ship, and over half of the inhabitants will perish.
勇敢无畏的开拓者，天行为善的无名客，想来不会坐视不理。
Oh you brave and fearless Trailblazers, you benevolent Nameless, can you really remain indifferent to that?
…你的那位同伴，叫刃的，也无法幸免，对吗？
...This companion of yours, Blade, he'd perish too, right?
坐标在这里，一切交由你们自己决定。
Here are the coordinates. It's up to you how to proceed.
虽然追求的目标截然不同，但群星的轨道终将彼此交汇。再见。
Our destinations may differ, but the orbits of the stars will eventually converge. See you later.
{NICKNAME}, what do you think about all this?
We should go to the Xianzhou.
