星核猎手一定别有所图，但考虑到他们的名声，和卡芙卡言语的侧重：仙舟里有一颗星核应是不会错的。
The Stellaron Hunters clearly have ulterior motives. However, knowing what they're all about and given the focus of Kafka's words, I have no doubt that the Xianzhou is dealing with a Stellaron.
联盟和列车过去没什么来往，我们的到来并不一定受到欢迎。但开拓者并不图名利，我们要为仙舟提供力所能及的帮助，尽可能地消弭祸端。

The Alliance and the Express haven't had any previous dealings, so our arrival might not receive the warmest welcome. But as Trailblazers, we're not in this for fame or gain — we just need to do everything in our power to assist the Xianzhou and eliminate the source of disaster.
保持住这一本心，贯彻「探索」、「了解」、「建立」、「连结」的开拓之道吧。
Always keep that in mind, and don't forget the way of the trailblaze: Explore, understand, establish, and connect.
再等一等，会议就开始了。
房间里静悄悄，没有回应。
The room is quiet. Nobody answers.
（丹恒看起来心事重重的样子，还是先给他一点独处的时间让他静一静吧。）
(Dan Heng seems perturbed, maybe I should give him some alone time to calm down.)
瞧，跟我说的一样：要是某一天你醒来没见到丹恒，那多半一天都见不到他。
See, it's like I said: If you wake up and Dan Heng's not around, then you probably won't see him the rest of the day either.
Didn't Himeko say not to worry?
不知道耶。老实讲，航线会议的性质大概就跟你常挂在嘴边的团建是一回事吧。参不参加都无所谓，当然姬子姐总是希望大家都来的。
I guess. To be honest, warp navigation meetings are basically just like that "teambuilding" you're always going on about. You don't have to show up, but Himeko might be upset if you don't.
你想啊，管理资料室的是丹恒，下一个目的地的情况他一清二楚。然后这信息姬子姐和杨叔也知道——那不就瞒着我和你两个人嘛！
Think about it, Dan Heng's the one managing the archives — he'll already be clued in to our next destination. Himeko and Welt know already, of course... so it's just me and you in the dark!
Dan Heng sure is a mysterious guy.
嗯…听说他以前干过很了不得的事情，现在还被某个厉害势力通缉在册。我猜是仙舟联盟，流光忆庭也有可能。可以排除公司，公司的通缉名单我见过。

Yeah... I heard he did something incredible once, and now some powerful force has his name on a wanted list. My guess is the Xianzhou Alliance or the Garden of Recollection. In any case, it can't be the IPC — I've seen their wanted list.
唔…多半是流光忆庭了。你没发现他特别热衷和黑塔打交道吗？黑塔和流光忆庭那是出了名的不对付，所谓敌人的敌人就是朋友……

Hmm... I bet it is the Garden of Recollection. Didn't it seem like Dan Heng was super keen on talking to Herta? Everyone knows that Herta and the Garden of Recollection don't get along. They say the enemy of your enemy is your friend...
哈！这才哪到哪啊。要我说你是初来乍到，等你待久了，会发现列车上每个人都怪怪的……
Ha! Shocking? I guess you're still new — you'll find out how strange everyone is around here sooner or later...
别这样看着我，难道我不怪吗？我可是把过去都忘光了，你见过哪个失忆的没点神奇的背景故事？我给自己都编了几十个啦。
What's with the funny look? Am I not strange enough for you? Name me an amnesiac that didn't have some crazy backstory. I already made up a few dozen for myself.
瓦尔特先生这次会一起来吗？
You coming with us this time?
哈哈，当然了。看你们在雅利洛-Ⅵ大展拳脚，我也跃跃欲试哪。
Haha, you better believe it. You guys really put on a show for Jarilo-VI — I'm eager to join in myself.
不瞒你说，好几次我都想去助你们一臂之力；但是姬子说，要让孩子们自己体会一次开拓的不易……
I gotta say, there were more than a few times where I wanted to lend a hand... but Himeko said I should let you youngsters rise to the trailblazing challenges...
瓦尔特先生知道目的地吧？
Do you know what our next destination is?
嗯，我知道，但还不能说。姬子希望给你和三月七保留一点神秘感。
I know alright, but I can't tell you yet. Himeko wants to create a sense of mystery for you and March.
瓦尔特先生希望去什么世界？
What world do you want to go to?
想去的世界嘛？…是故乡吧。但很遗憾，在列车星图未损坏的记录里，没有它的位置。
That I want to go to? ...My home world, I suppose. Sadly, its location doesn't appear on the Express' astral chart records, at least the ones that are undamaged.
我想在回家之前多看看其他的文明，也算是不浪费搭乘星穹列车的这段时光。
In any case, I do want to see some other civilizations before I go home. It'd be a crime to waste this opportunity on the Express.
{NICKNAME}乘客，停靠站点的介绍拿到了吗？期待吗？
Ahem... {NICKNAME}, did you receive the destination overview? Excited?
Himeko's going to announce it in the meeting.
完全没看出期待的样子……
经历了雅利洛-Ⅵ上冰冷、疲惫的旅程，难道不期待下一站是个怎样的星球吗！
After all that cold and exhaustion on Jarilo-VI, you must be looking forward to the next planet!
帕姆很高兴你能享受这趟旅行！
Pom-Pom's thrilled that you're enjoying your journey!
很久很久以前，这辆列车正是这样将无名客带往一个又一个的星球…现在它又像过去一样了。
A long, long time ago, this train would ferry the Nameless from planet to planet... Now it's able to do the same again.
什么时候能抵达裴迦纳呢？
When will we get to Pegana?
裴迦纳吗？它在航线的终点哦，那是阿基维利的故乡……帕姆也想要回去那里，可惜旅途和人生一样，没法一蹴而就帕。
Pegana? That's the final stop — Akivili's home world... Pom-Pom wants to visit again too. Unfortunately, the journey's a lot like life — you don't always get where you're going right away.
千年过去，这些介绍还有用吗？
Are these destination overviews still useful after a thousand years?
…总有些星球没被星核污染啦。
...There are some planets that haven't been affected by Stellarons.
（你从帕姆耳朵的弧度上读出了一丝伤感。）
(You can tell Pom-Pom's a little sad by looking at their ears.)
列车的速度很快，但它开得再快也没法赶上变化帕……
The Express moves at an incredible speed, but change is always faster...
{NICKNAME}乘客，准备好的话，就到车头附近集合吧，会议要开始了！
{NICKNAME}, if you're ready, head over to the front of the train. The meeting is about to start!
{NICKNAME}乘客，准备好的话，就到车头附近集合吧，会议要开始了！
{NICKNAME}, if you're ready, head over to the front of the train. The meeting is about to start!
各位乘客！跃迁航线会议正式开始！
Passengers! The warp navigation meeting has officially begun!
首先，帕姆要感谢各位无名客成功解决了本站点的问题，让列车能继续在星轨上奔驰！
Firstly, Pom-Pom wants to congratulate you, the Nameless, for successfully resolving the problems at this stop. The Express is now able to continue along the star rail!
这可是我们三个的功劳哦，对吧{NICKNAME}！
The three of us actually pulled it off, huh {NICKNAME}!
接下来，本列车长要宣布下一站的名字——
It's time for your conductor — ahem, that's me — to reveal the name of our next stop...
暂时无法离开当前场景，需要完成开拓任务「星间流浪」
Unable to leave the current area, please complete Trailblaze Mission "Drifting Between the Stars"
暂时无法离开当前场景，需要完成开拓任务「激『冻』人心的大冒险」
Unable to leave the current area, please complete Trailblaze Mission "A Grand Cool Adventure"
暂时无法离开当前场景，需要完成开拓任务「静静的星河」
Unable to leave the current area, please complete Trailblaze Mission "Silent Galaxy"
暂时无法离开当前场景，需要完成开拓任务「旅进青霄，不速之邀」
Unable to leave the current area, please complete Trailblaze Mission "An Invitation Without Proffer"
暂时无法离开当前场景，需要完成冒险任务「流光忆彩」
Unable to leave the current area, please complete Adventure Mission "Fleeting Lights"
到家！列车停靠了这么久，姬子和杨叔估计都不耐烦了吧？
Home, sweet home! Mr. Yang and Himeko must be bored given how long our train had to stay here.
下个目的地会是哪里？咱都等不及了，好期待呀！
Where's our next stop? I can't wait!
姬子，杨叔！开拓小分队的第一次任务，这就顺利完成啦！
Himeko, Mr. Yang! Team Trailblaze, back from duty! Mission one: Accomplished!
虽然我俩没有亲身参与这次「开拓之旅」，但光从结果就能看出大家有多努力。恭喜各位——尤其是{NICKNAME}——大家对你的首秀评价很高。

*chuckles* Although Welt and I didn't get the chance to go with you, I can tell you worked hard to bring things back to normal. Well done, everybody. And especially you, {NICKNAME}. I heard a lot of good things about you.
How would you rate my performance?
假如真有这么一套评分系统，我一定会给你最高分。
I'd say it's a solid five stars.
自信是你最强有力的武器。
那我下次能申请休息吗？
Can I skip the next mission and get some rest?
然后错过一趟精彩的大冒险？我不确定你会喜欢那种感觉。
*chuckles* And miss out on a great adventure? I don't think you'd like that.
好好在列车上休息一阵吧，缓解一下在雅利洛-Ⅵ上累积的疲劳感。
Get some rest on the Express. Jarilo-VI was not an easy ride.
帕姆认为我们应该尽早驶离这片间域，避免刚刚有所缓解的空间异常现象出现反复。我和姬子都同意列车长的观点。
Pom-Pom is of the opinion that we should leave as soon as possible to avoid potential resurgences of the anomalies we experienced earlier. Himeko and I agree.
也就是说，我们要尽快决定接下来的目的地了。
...Which means we need to decide where our next destination is, soon.
这就是无名客的命途吧？永远在路上，永远不停下「开拓」的脚步……
That's the path of the Nameless, I presume? Always on the road, always trailblazing...
哎，我可没在抱怨啊！惊喜一个接着一个，这样的旅行节奏正合咱的胃口！
I—I'm not complaining by the way! One adventure after another, that's exactly what I signed up for!
看来小三月已经喜欢上无名客的生活方式了，真好。
Looks like March has fallen in love with the way of the Nameless. That's good to hear.
各位可以先回自己的房间休息，或者在这节车厢稍歇，喝杯咖啡之类的。大家都是熟人了，随意便好。
You can head back to your rooms for some rest, or stay here and make yourselves a cup of coffee, whichever you like.
I'll head back to my room then.
唉…每次我都以为，那家伙能变得更合群些……
*sigh* There I was thinking this guy would gradually open up...
有些事不必强求，三月。我觉得那孩子很珍惜跟你们同行的时光。
*chuckles* We need to give him some time, March. I think he treasures the time spent with you guys.
{NICKNAME}——关于和「大守护者」的最后一战、还有「星核」的情况，我猜你心底还藏着不少疑问吧？
{NICKNAME}, about your battle against the Supreme Guardian and the whole Stellaron situation, you must have a lot of unanswered questions, I suppose?
趁着你们不在的时候，我和瓦尔特先生做了些观测，总结出了些结果。如果你需要解惑的话，不妨跟我们聊聊。
While you were away, Welt and I did some research and came to some interesting conclusions. Let me know if you want to ask about anything.
列车行走在「开拓」的命途之上，走过一个个奇妙的世界，邂逅一群群鲜活的生命，见证一段段美丽的故事。
The Express crew tread upon the Trailblaze. We travel between worlds, like a thread weaved into the life stories of others.
宇宙浩瀚无边——我们能穿越星海擦肩而过，本已是奇迹般的缘分。若有机会能聊上几句、认识彼此，甚至结伴而行…这美妙的概率或许只能用「命运」解释。
The universe is vast beyond our imagination. It's a miracle that our paths converge. The fact that we get to know and travel with each other can only be seen as the design of destiny.
谢谢你选择了成为我们的伙伴，{NICKNAME}。希望我能解答你在旅途中萌生的疑惑。
Thank you for becoming our companion, {NICKNAME}. I'll do my best to answer any questions you may have.
我想聊聊和可可利亚的决战。
I'd like to talk about the battle with Cocolia.
很乐意。所谓当局者迷——也许我能从旁观者的角度帮你找到答案。
Sure. Oftentimes those who are involved in historic events don't have the opportunity to see things from a wider perspective. I hope as an onlooker I may provide some help.
「存护」克里珀是一位淡漠的星神。除非你能始终保持「公司」那种非同一般的狂热…否则恐怕很难分到祂的力量。
Qlipoth the Preservation is known for THEIR... indifference. Unless you become a zealot like those with the Corporation, it's hard to share in the Aeon's power.
借着强烈的「存护」执念，贝洛伯格的筑城者们坚持了数百年的时间。但随着裂界的腐蚀逐渐深入，本就脆弱的信仰也出现了裂痕。
Determined to preserve the world they love, the Architects held on for hundreds of years. But as the Fragmentum continued to advance, their already wavering faith started to show some cracks.
那位大守护者，可可利亚——她恐怕彻底放弃了践行「存护」的命途。和她相反，你在那场战斗中展现出了坚定不移的「存护」意志。
And one particular guardian, Cocolia, abandoned the Path of Preservation altogether. In contrast, you stood your ground and proved your faith in the Amber Lord.
从结果上看，克里珀回应了你强烈的愿望。你能够挥舞大守护者的武器、并操纵那尊巨像，大概也是由于祂那一瞥吧？
Judging by how the battle turned out, Qlipoth responded to your wish. THEIR gaze infused you with the power to wield the weapon of a supreme guardian and to take control of the Colossus.
我想谢谢你提供的支援。
I was meant to thank you for your support during the battle.
小事。虽然我和瓦尔特先生没有参与这次「开拓」，但你们在雅利洛-Ⅵ上的一举一动，我们全都看在眼里。
*chuckles* Don't mention it. Welt and I may have stayed on the Express this whole time, but we've been watching over you the moment you set foot on Jarilo-VI.
同伴就该相互照应，我们「无名客」更是如此。也请时刻记得，哪怕肉身相隔千万里，列车永远是你最坚实的后盾。
Friends look after each other, the same goes for us Nameless. Please remember, no matter where you are in the universe, the Express will always be behind you.
...is a Stellaron, there's no doubt about that.
结合我的分析和猜测，那位大守护者恐怕在早年就遭受了「星核」的精神侵蚀——此后发生的一切悲剧都滥觞于此。
What I've gathered so far suggests it's likely that the supreme guardian was corrupted by the Stellaron at a very young age. All the tragedies that came after can be traced to that point...
可恨之人尚有可怜之处。如果换成你我坐在她的位置上，每天面对逐渐衰落的城市…我们真的能紧握脆弱的信仰，没有丝毫动摇吗？

On the flip side, we can't judge Cocolia too harshly. Imagine if it were you or me who had to sit on the throne and watch the city slowly being brought to its knees... Would we not question what we believed in?
当然可以。我们不缺时间。
Sure, ask away. We've got plenty of time.
雅利洛-Ⅵ还能回到以前吗？
Can Jarilo-VI go back to what it was like before the Stellaron?
这个问题，也许瓦尔特先生能给你更详实的分析解答。不过，既然你想知道我的看法……
Welt may be better equipped to answer that. But if you want my two cents...
…我觉得，很难。并非没有可能，但过程无疑会十分艰辛。
I'd say it's unlikely. I guess it's possible, but it would take a long time.
从你们的报告里我能看出，贝洛伯格的新任大守护者是一位英明、聪颖的年轻人。更加难能可贵的是，她还在这段旅程中抛弃了不必要的天真。

I can tell from your report that the new Supreme Guardian of Belobog is a smart young lady with leadership qualities. What's more important is that she now understands her people after the journey with you.
在她的身边还有一群坚定、正直的支持者，这是大幸。可命运难以捉摸，时常荒谬——就算在他们的有生之年里，雅利洛-Ⅵ能够恢复一定程度的繁荣……

The firm and honest support she gets from people around her will also prove immensely useful. But fate likes to play tricks on people. Even if during their lifetime they managed to make Jarilo-VI prosper again to a certain degree...
但对于潜伏在宇宙中的无数威胁而言，他们依旧脆弱、无助。作为见证者，我们只能在远处为他们祈福。
They will remain vulnerable and helpless to countless threats lurking in the recesses of the universe. We can only give them our best wishes from afar.
想摧毁「星核」几乎是不可能的任务。连黑塔也没能找到彻底破坏「星核」结构的方法，只能创造条件抑制它的能量漫溢。
It's virtually impossible to destroy a Stellaron. No one, not even Herta, has found a way to break its structure. The best we can do at this stage is to prevent its energy from overflowing.
大守护者战败之际，向其导送能量的「星核」也露出了一丝破绽，让我和瓦尔特找到了压制它的时机。
When the supreme guardian was defeated, the Stellaron that had been transmitting energy to her exposed its weakness to us for a brief period of time, allowing Welt and I to contain its power.
列车能对「星核」做的事也仅限于「抑制」而已，这种做法只能解一时之需…
That's about all we can do about a Stellaron. It may be suppressed for now, but it's only a matter of time before it regains power.
…不过，倒是足够让这个星球上的人们喘口气了。
But this brief window should allow the people on this planet to heal and rebuild.
不用客气，{NICKNAME}。好好休息吧，这是你应得的奖赏。
You're most welcome, {NICKNAME}. Have some rest, you've earned it.
你的首次「开拓之旅」顺利结束——感觉如何，{NICKNAME}？
So, your first trailblazing expedition has concluded. How do you feel, {NICKNAME}?
欢欣或痛苦，圆满或遗憾，都是旅途的一体两面。只要行走在「开拓」的命途上，这些感悟就会一路相随，直到成为习惯。
Be it joy or pain, success or regret, it's all part of the journey. Those feelings will accompany you as long as you tread on the Trailblaze, and one day you'll grow used to them.
你似乎有话想问。尽管开口，我也正想找人谈谈心…健谈如姬子，也快跟我把话题耗尽了。
It seems you have something on your mind. Let's hear it. I'd like to hear a fresh perspective myself... Hehe, as talkative as Himeko is, we've pretty much run out of topics.
The Fragmentum and the Eternal Freeze... will they disappear?
如我之前所说，「星核」给雅利洛-Ⅵ造成的影响已经扎根太深。在可预见的未来，贝洛伯格的人们仍将继续与灾祸搏斗。

As I've mentioned before, the Stellaron's influence on Jarilo-VI is more profound than we might think. I don't think Belobog's fight against the lingering effects of the Stellaron will end any time soon.
但，胜利的天平已经在向人类倾斜。究其原因，是因为你们放上了名为「希望」的砝码。
But, the balance of power is tilting ever so slightly towards humanity, the crucial factor being the hope you brought about.
不要低估「希望」。它虽无色无形、不可触及，却蕴含着无限的能量。同为可被播下的种子，在我看来，它远比「星核」更为强大。

As intangible as it may sound, don't underestimate hope because the power it inspires has no limit. Like the Stellaron, it's a seed that may grow into something much bigger. But in my opinion, the fruit that hope bears will have a much bigger impact than that of the Stellaron.
我把你的话告诉了布洛妮娅。
I relayed your view of the Stellaron's effects to Bronya.
原来如此——我觉得你做了正确的事。背负着知识的重量砥砺前行，总好过在无知中盲目乐观地活着。
Is that so? Well, I think you did the right thing. It's better to move forward with the burden of knowledge than to tread a perilous road with blind optimism.
我依稀记得这样一个世界，那里的人们每时每刻都面临着远超常识认知的威胁。但凭借智慧和勇气，人类一次又一次地从危机中拯救了自己的家园。
I remember a distant world where the people were faced with unimaginable danger every single day. But they saved their planet time after time with wisdom and courage.
这就是平凡且伟大的赞歌。但愿雅利洛-Ⅵ的人们也能从自己的经历中参会同样的精神。
This goes to show how much of a difference ordinary people can make. I hope Jarilo-VI sees that too.
有你在的话，旅程会轻松许多。
This mission would've been much easier if you were there.
我原本也希望能和你们共同前往，但姬子坚持要给各位独处的时间。
Hehe... I, too, wished to go with you. But Himeko insisted on letting you and your friends rise to the challenge.
我一直在列车上观测你们三人的行动，期间也不少次手心捏汗。但你们总能交到值得信任的朋友，化解旅途中的困难——仅这一点，我也不得不佩服。

I'd been observing what's happening on the ground from the Express, and I have to admit that I got sweaty palms a couple of times. I was glad to see you three meet friends you could trust and overcome hardships. Well done.
姬子和我不同，她从始至终都表现得十分冷静，还不断劝我要相信年轻人的决断。
Himeko was calm from the very beginning. She kept telling me to trust you youngsters' decisions.
果然，和她相比，我还是少了些放手的魄力。
Hehe... And she was right. I really need to stop worrying so much.
It's been nice chatting with you, Mr. Yang.
和你聊天总能有所收获。注意休息，旅程很快就要重启了。
Likewise. Get some sleep, we'll be heading off again soon.
…嘘！正在进行星轨稳定率检测，请别打岔！
...Shhh! Checking star rail stability, Pom-Pom needs to focus!
空间读数…恢复到正常区间！
Spatial readout... back to the normal bracket!
行驶环境已达到稳定阈值！允许列车启动！
The numbers have stabilized! Dispatch the Express!
…哦，欢迎{NICKNAME}和三月乘客回到列车——「开拓任务」顺利完成，列车组感谢你们做出的贡献！
...Oh, welcome back to the Express. You've accomplished your Trailblaze Mission, the Express appreciates your help!
托你们的福，空间崩裂现象已经逐渐复原，星轨的稳定程度也达到了合格标准…
Thanks to you, the Space Fissure is healing up, and the star rail has become stable enough for us to dispatch the Express...
至于列车本身，帕姆已经做了从头到尾的细节检查，一切设备正常！
As for the coaches, Pom-Pom's checked every nook and cranny and made sure everything is in good order!
坏了，忘带纪念品回来了。
Oops, I forgot to bring you souvenirs.
…算啦！反正雅利洛-Ⅵ上大概也没有什么稀奇的特产。再加上你是第一次执行开拓任务，这次就原谅你啦！
...Don't worry about it! Jarilo-VI probably doesn't have anything worth buying anyway. Plus, it's your first time on a Trailblaze Mission, so Pom-Pom will let it slide this time!
不过，下次你可就没有理由了帕！
停靠站点要等到航线会议再公布。
The destination will be announced at the navigation meeting.
保持激动的好奇心好好等着帕！
For now, get some rest and stay tuned!
Need to get some juice for March.
喏——拿好了，别洒到地板上！
There you go, careful not to spill it!
为防止空间异常现象出现反复，列车将尽快离开当前站点，驶入平稳间域。
To avoid encountering the anomalies again, the Express will dispatch shortly and head to a more stable area.
安全起见，建议各位乘客扶稳坐好，待列车进入匀速行驶阶段后再四处走动！
For your safety, please don't leave your seat until the Express has reached cruising speed!
久等啦，各位乘客！感谢三位开拓者的鼎力协助，裂界活性已经降到最低，星轨各项读数已经恢复至正常区间！

It's about time we hit the road, passengers! Thanks to the three trailblazers, the activity of the Fragmentum has reached the lowest level, and the readings regarding the status of the star rail have returned to normal!
列车即将重新启程，驶离雅利洛-Ⅵ。请大家坐稳扶好，最后再和这颗星球说声再见吧！
Pom-Pom will dispatch the Express shortly and we'll be leaving Jarilo-VI. Please be seated and say your goodbyes to this planet!
欢迎来到「存护」庇佑的贝洛伯格，朋友！愿你的未来像克里珀的琥珀一样金黄剔透！
My friend! Welcome to Belobog, a city protected by Preservation. May your future be as bright and golden as Qlipoth's Amber!
看看你周围吧，这里是可是行政区，永冬之城繁华又美丽的心脏！
Look around you. This is the administrative district, the bustling heart of the Everwinter City!
在这「存护」之力编织而成的清澈蓝天之下，你我早已忘记那风雪和寒冷，向阳而生！
Under the clear blue sky made possible by Preservation, you and I have long forgotten the wind and chill of winter. We live for the sun!
赞美筑城者，赞美贝洛伯格——加入我吧，让我们一起为大守护者献上礼赞的歌声！
Praise the Architects of this city, and praise Belobog! Join me and let's sing a song of praise for the Supreme Guardian!
希望你们的探索有所进展，{NICKNAME}，也希望病痛远离你们的旅程。
I hope your exploration will make progress, {NICKNAME}, and your journey will be free of pain.
当然，就算不小心受了伤也不用慌张，全都交给医生就好了。
Of course, even if you get injured by accident, no need to panic. Just leave it to the doctor.
好羡慕你们喔，帕姆现在还不能离开这辆列车……
Pom-Pom is so jealous of you guys. Pom-Pom still can't leave the train yet...
I'm tired. I need some rest.
What supplies are available on the Express?
I want to use the Synthesizer.
这是太空电梯，你乘坐它来到空间站。至于你如何用言灵术控制电梯保安的故事，这里不再赘述。

This is the space elevator, which you took to arrive at the space station. As for how you used the enchantment of Spirit Whisper on the elevator security staff — there's no need to go over that right now.
太空电梯，它对你已经没用了。
Space elevator? You've no use for that.
空间站的终端，你用不着它。
You don't need any space station terminal.
桌子上散落着写满算式的纸，它的主人离开得很匆忙。
Papers covered in math lie scattered on the table. Their author seems to have left in a hurry.
终端上显示「紧急避难」，负责接待的前台服从了指示。
"Emergency Evacuation" flashed onto the display, and the front-of-house receptionist carried out the instructions.
这就是「星核」——你们星核猎手在宇宙中四处猎捕的东西。不过，它只是个幌子。艾利欧知道，刃知道，你也知道。星核猎手还有更重要的目标。

This is Stellaron — what Stellaron Hunters throughout the universe all hunt for. But in truth, it's all just a front. Elio knows it, Blade knows it, and you know it, too. Stellaron Hunters have another true goal.
为此，这颗被黑塔捕获并封印的星核，将别有它用。当银狼解开封印时，你就要拿走它，把它放进早已为此刻准备多时的「容器」里……

That's why the Stellaron that Herta sealed away will be put to another use. Once Silver Wolf breaks its seal, you'll have to take it and place it inside a kind of "vessel" that's been waiting for just this occasion...
这就是「星核」——某位星神把它散播到银河各处，制造混乱和灾祸。
This is Stellaron — spread throughout the cosmos by a wandering Aeon, sowing chaos and disaster.
这是黑塔女士，或各位更熟知的称号：天才俱乐部#83。她年少时即解开孤波算法难题、斯帕克模型猜想；青年时发现了西格玛重子的转化方法；中年时提出黑塔序列，发表关于返老还童的论文。

This is Madam Herta, or better known as member <unbreak>83</unbreak> of the Genius Society. In her childhood, she solved the solitary waves theory and the Spark model hypothesis. In her adolescence, she found the Sigma Baryons conversion method. In middle-age, she proposed the Herta sequence and published a paper on de-aging.
老年时，她返老还童；年少时再度解开虚数流溢现象的奥秘，捕捉天外星核并将之封印；黑塔女士曾十九次将所在星球从毁灭的危机中拯救，两次拜谒星神。

In her senior years, she managed to reverse her own age via de-aging, and went on to solve the mystery of the imaginary leakage phenomenon, and even captured and sealed a stellaron. Madam Herta has saved the planet she was on from destruction <unbreak>19</unbreak> times and has met the Aeons twice.
这座空间站正是她的财产。
This space station is her property.
你看见空间站的标志，好像一把长枪穿过月亮。
You see the emblem of the space station. It looks like a spear piercing through the moon.
你看见空间站的标志，好像一只橡胶手臂握着吵闹的喇叭。
You see the emblem of the space station. It looks like a rubber arm holding a noisy horn.
你看见空间站的标志，好像一只耳机把鸡蛋砸破了洞。
You see the emblem of the space station. It looks like an earphone that has cracked a hole in an egg.
你看见空间站的标志，好像一只眼睛正在做眼压测试。
You see the emblem of the space station. It looks like an eye undertaking an intraocular pressure test.
你看见空间站的标志，好像一座空间站。
You see the emblem of the space station. It looks like a space station.
呵，以利亚萨拉斯，可爱的老头儿。他是天才俱乐部#56，俱乐部史上唯二的公选部长。感谢他吧！现代宇宙文明的交流基石——联觉信标和超距遥感都是他的创造。

Oh, Elias Salas, such a lovely old fellow. He is Member <unbreak>56</unbreak> of the Genius Society, one of the only two publicly elected Ministers in the Society's history. Be grateful to him! He created the Synesthesia Beacons and over-range remote sensing, the cornerstones of modern cosmic communication.
——虽然他没有公开发明，因此本人在此更正：这两项技术的版权属于「博识学会」。老实说，我不是很瞧得上学会，但她们能复刻以利亚萨拉斯的发明，也算成就斐然。

However, he did not disclose his inventions to the public, so I hereby certify that the rights of these two technologies belong to the Intelligentsia Guild. To be honest, I am not a big fan of the Guild, but it is impressive that they managed to reproduce Elias Salas' inventions.
波尔卡•卡卡目，天才俱乐部#4。一位充满神秘感的女人，俱乐部里有不少人陨于其手。很多年没有她的消息了，但我坚信她还活着。

Polka Kakamond, member #4 of the Genius Society. A woman full of mystery. Many people in the Society died by her hand. I haven't heard anything about her for many years, but I firmly believe she is still alive.
喂，「寂静领主」，如果你来到这里，如果你在听——我是#83黑塔，我想见你。相信你我会有很多共同话题。
Hey, Lord of Silence, if you're here, if you're listening... I'm member <unbreak>83</unbreak>, Herta, and I want to meet you. I believe you and I will have a lot to talk about.
赞达尔•壹•桑原，天才俱乐部#1。我挂上他的画像纯粹为了敬意：若没有他，也就没有我们如今的天才俱乐部。
Zandar One Kuwabara, Genius Society member 1. I hung up his portrait purely out of respect. Without him, there would be no Genius Society today.
说实话，我不知道他有什么成绩。他的著作和发明完全没有流传下来——但总要有个位置留给俱乐部的创始人，不是吗？
Frankly, I don't know what he has achieved. None of his books and inventions have survived, but there's gotta be a place for the founder of the Society, right?
利尔他，天才俱乐部#22。最无私的那一个，最奇怪的那一个。他把一辈子时间都花在帮助别人上，这种乐趣横竖我是感受不到。
This is Aiden, member <unbreak>22</unbreak> of the Genius Society. The most selfless and the strangest one. He spent his whole life helping others. Personally, I don't see the point.
但是拜他所赐，俱乐部才声名远扬。他过世后，星际和平公司一直想找到替代者。他们找了无数个琥珀纪，却没有一个天才愿意屈就…终于找到了我。

But the Society is famous thanks to him. The Interastral Peace Corporation has been trying to find a replacement ever since his death. They searched for many Amber Eras, but no genius was willing to lower their head to the IPC... Until they found me.
天才俱乐部#76螺丝咕姆。我认识他很久了，他是个真正的好人，一位绅士，拥有卓绝的机械头脑，和他的交流让我受益颇多……

Member <unbreak>76</unbreak> of the Genius Society, Screwllum. I have known him for a long time. He is a really good man, a gentleman with an exceptional mechanical mind. I have learned a lot from him.
最近我正和他、阮•梅合作推进一个项目！我希望，这个项目能够帮助我们接近宇宙的最大奥秘……
Recently, I have been working with him and Ruan Mei on a project! I hope this project can help us get closer to the greatest mystery of the universe...
这么年轻吗？我记得上一个琥珀纪她就很有名了，至少一百多岁吧？
She looks so young. She was already famous in the last Amber Era, no? She has to be at least a hundred years old.
她可是「天才俱乐部」的人。「智识」博识尊的令使。长生不老返老还童都不在话下吧。
She's a member of the Genius Society and an Emanator of Nous the Erudition. She can probably age backwards if she wanted.
她可是「天才俱乐部」的人。「智识」博识尊的令使。长生不老返老还童都不在话下吧。
She's a member of the Genius Society and an Emanator of Nous the Erudition. She can probably age backwards if she wanted.
呵，我记得俱乐部历史上八十多号人，大约一半都是寿终正寝的啊。不是还有个只活了十几天的…叫什么来着？
Hah. I seem to recall that over half of the Genius Society's eighty-odd members had a normal death. Wasn't there someone who only lived for a dozen days or so? What was their name...
这没什么奇怪的吧，游戏里那些长生不死的老怪，不总是等着主角来消灭他们吗？长生也不是什么好事。
That's pretty normal. Aren't the immortal bosses in games always waiting for the protagonist to come kill them? Immortality is not always a good thing.
这没什么奇怪的吧，游戏里那些长生不死的老怪，不总是等着主角来消灭他们吗？长生也不是什么好事。
That's pretty normal. Aren't the immortal bosses in games always waiting for the protagonist to come kill them? Immortality is not always a good thing.
黑塔…你见过她吗？我很好奇拿自己的名字命名太空站的人品味如何，是高是低。
Herta... Have you ever met her? I'm curious about the tastes of someone who used their own name for a space station.
没见过真人，画像倒是见了不少次。
Never seen the real one. Saw plenty of her portraits, though.
Who's this old guy with a white beard?
…我知道这个人，她是「寂静领主」，波尔卡•卡卡目。你看，她的面部是空的，这人曾经在全宇宙范围内销毁了自己的画像和雕塑……
...I know this person. She's the Lord of Silence, Polka Kakamond. See? Her face is all blank. She had destroyed all of her own portraits and sculptures in the entire universe...
我没兴趣啦，快去办正事。
I'm not interested. Hurry up with our real business.
我没兴趣啦，快去办正事。
I'm not interested. Hurry up with our real business.
这是赞达尔。赞达尔•壹•桑原，历史上第一位天才。
This is Zandar. Zandar One Kuwabara. The first genius in history.
那个传说中制造了博识尊的人？
The one who supposedly created Nous?
那个传说中制造了博识尊的人？
The one who supposedly created Nous?
是他…如果传说属实，那么他就是创造了星神的男人。
That's him... If the legends are true, then he was a man who created an Aeon.
最好传说不实，我可不想当赞达尔猎手。
Well they better be false. I don't want to be a Zandar hunter.
最好传说不实，我可不想当赞达尔猎手。
Well they better be false. I don't want to be a Zandar hunter.
嘿！银狼，看，是螺丝咕姆！你的老对手！
Hey! Silver Wolf! Look! It's Screwllum, your good old opponent.
哈…我说过了，那时我不知道是他……
Hahhhh... I told you already. I didn't know it was him...
哈…我说过了，那时我不知道是他……
Hahhhh... I told you already. I didn't know it was him...
就是那一战让艾利欧看上了你：宇宙里居然有人能破解螺丝咕姆的程序！…先是螺丝咕姆，再是黑塔，宇宙中怕是没有人在这么短的时间里连续招惹两个天才了，命运使然呢。

Ah, that battle was how Elio got his eyes on you. Imagine, someone actually able to crack Screwllum's code! First Screwllum, then Herta... there's probably no one else in the universe who offended two genii in such quick succession. It must be destiny.
唉…看来我才是「命运的奴隶」。
Urgh... Seems like I'm the real Destiny's Slave here.
唉…看来我才是「命运的奴隶」。
Urgh... Seems like I'm the real Destiny's Slave here.
欢迎来到黑塔空间站，请在此享受知识之海的馈赠——并自负溺亡的风险。
Welcome to Herta Space Station. Here, you can savor the bounty of the ocean of knowledge. Please also beware of the risk of drowning.
这提示一点用处也没有呀。
谁知道追随「智识」的这帮人脑子里在想什么。
Who knows what's in the brains of those following the Erudition?
谁知道追随「智识」的这帮人脑子里在想什么。
Who knows what's in the brains of those following the Erudition?
A galvanized gate blocks the way.
如果您需要帮助，可以前往基座舱段的星语厅。
If you need help, go to the Galaxy Room in the base zone.
本月财务报销提醒通知：请各位科员将本月度的报销材料整理好，汇总到报销单上，时间节点分为两次。（如有加急单据，请单独联络对应科室）

This month's financial reimbursement reminder notice: Researchers, please summarize the reimbursement materials for this month on a single reimbursement form. (Please contact the corresponding section if you have any expedited documents)
黑塔空间站不会以押金、抵扣金等任何名义收取科员费用。如遇自称工作人员的科员向您索要个人信息，请及时报告防卫科。

Herta Space Station does not charge researchers fees for deposits, credits, etc. If someone claiming to be a staff member asks for your personal information, please report it to the Security Department.
部分黑屏的画面倒映出自己的脸，仔细看看还觉得挺有意思的。
The partially black screen reflects your face—you find it quite interesting as you look closer.
黑色的屏幕中倒影出自己的脸，与其他鲜活灵动的画面形成鲜明的对比。
The black screen, which is reflecting your face, contrasts the vibrant and dynamic images.
啊，有时候就是这样的，在沉浸于虚拟的快乐当中的时候，画面突然一黑，倒映出自己的容貌。
Sometimes this is the way it is. Just as you are immersed in virtual bliss, the screen suddenly turns black and reflects your face back at you.
那个瞬间，就像是被某种力量，强行从快乐的虚拟，拽回到悲痛的现实。
At that moment, you are forced to return to sad reality from the wonderful virtual world.
不知道这么凌乱的桌面应该如何快速打开有用的信息。
I have no idea how to quickly find useful information on such a cluttered desktop.
也有可能对于这个空间站的科员而言，有用的信息全都不在电子存储设备里。
Perhaps none of the electronic devices on this space station have useful information for the researchers here.
不知道是哪位科员还在使用受损的屏幕进行工作呢？
I wonder who here has to work with a damaged screen?
他是否遇到了阻碍，是否遇到了压力，是否正遭遇更加惨痛的生活……
Have they encountered any pitfalls? Are they under stress? Are they experiencing an even more miserable life than me...?
想必他的工作就像是这个电子屏一样，已经出现了一定的耗能危机，却还在继续坚持吧。
I bet his work is like this screen... it may be having an energy-consuming crisis yet it is still insisting on working.
你怎么突然眉头紧皱？是想到了什么不好的事情吗？
Why are you suddenly frowning? Do you have something bad on your mind?
不知道是哪位科员还在使用受损的屏幕进行工作呢？
I wonder who here has to work with a damaged screen?
他一定不需要忙碌于复杂的工作吧，不然这个半吊子的屏幕怎么提供硬件支持？
I don't think he is busy with very complicated work, otherwise, how could this broken screen be of much use?
他肯定还是个热爱生活的人吧？不然这块不着调的电子屏幕是无法让人沉浸于愉快的虚拟世界当中的。
He must enjoy real life. There is no way that this unreliable screen could allow a person to be immersed in that pleasant virtual world.
你怎么突然面露微笑？是想到了什么开心的事情吗？
Why are you suddenly smiling? Did you think of something that makes you happy?
如遇外露的电线设施，请勿触碰，及时避行并通知防卫科。有条件的科员可就地设置简易路障，避免他人触碰。

Please do not touch exposed electrical wires. Avoid the route and notify the Security Department. Researchers who are in a position to do so can set up simple barricades around the area to prevent others from approaching.
请各位科员进行特殊放射性实验前，务必检索实验室的隔断功能是否处于开放状态。
Please make sure the isolation function of the lab is on before conducting radioactive experiments.
身份认证更新通知：本次更新支持义体机械ID代码以及虹膜扫描，欢迎各位科员申请办理。（佩戴接触性角膜无法使用虹膜扫描模式）
Identity Update Notice: The update supports prosthetic mechanical ID codes and iris scans. All researchers are welcome to apply. (Iris scan mode is not available for those who wear contact lens)
如果您正在遭遇：心烦意乱、精神涣散、皮肤粗糙——请尽快联系医疗舱室-心理健康科。
If you are experiencing anxiety, lack of motivation, or skin roughness, please contact the medical cabin's Mental Health Department as soon as possible.
如果您正在遭遇：无心工作、实验遇阻、科研受挫——请勿释放负能量影响其他科员。
If you are experiencing: Lack of motivation to work, setbacks in your experiments or frustration in your research, please do not allow your negativity to disturb other researchers.
屏幕旁边贴着一张小小的便利贴……
There's a small sticky note attached to the screen...
屏幕旁边贴着一张小小的告示……
There's a small announcement attached to the screen...
欢迎来到黑塔空间站，你在这里可以享受到知识之海的馈赠——但也有溺亡的风险，请多加小心。
Welcome to Herta Space Station. Here, you can savor the bounty of the ocean of knowledge. However, please also beware of the risk of drowning.
本月度商业保险理赔提醒通知：请于本月<unbreak>21</unbreak>号前提交线上理赔材料。
This month's commercial insurance claim reminder: Please submit your online claim by the <unbreak>21</unbreak>st of this month.
以下情况无法申请理赔：未携带空间站科员身份识别码就诊；未至空间站医务室进行就诊（私人手术室、独立医务室等非官方渠道难辨真伪，请各位科员擦亮眼睛）

Claims cannot be made in the following cases: Not carrying the space station member's identification code for medical treatment; not visiting the space station medical office (private surgeries, independent medical offices, and other unofficial channels are difficult to verify, so please be careful)
如遇自称科研人员的可疑人士邀请您加入他的奇物实验团队，并向您索要奇物研究押金，请务必谨慎，切记：不听不信不转账。

If you encounter a suspicious self-proclaimed researcher inviting you to his Curio research team and asking for an upfront deposit, please be careful and remember these words: Don't listen and don't transfer.
只需将枪口处的眼球对准常见的物体，随后扣动扳机，即可收获定分枪给予的评分。
Simply aim the eyeball located at the muzzle at any everyday object and then pull the trigger to receive a rating from the gun.
暂无法解释其定分逻辑，目前仍在探索其评分的意义。
Rating logic currently unavailble. Significance of the rating cannot be evaluated.
「这个物件可以给人带来未知与具体交融的乐趣，具体来说就是——你永远不知道路过的那个人能得几分。是不是有点像开盲盒呢？」
"This object can give people the pleasure of intermingling with the unknown, more precisely — you'll never know how well that passerby might score. It's a bit like opening a mystery box, isn't it?"
不断讲述遥远笑话的海螺，只需要将耳朵放置于螺口即可听见。
A conch that constantly tells jokes that are a bit out there. They can be heard by simply placing your ear at the mouth of the conch.
警告：请务必发笑，不可忍笑。
Warning: Try to laugh, don't ever hold back your laughter.
「它总能说出我想不到的幽默段子，可谓是居家旅行必备良品。建议压力大的科员都来听听。」
"It can always come up with a joke that's outside my wheelhouse. I think it's a must-have for a family road trip. I'd recommend it to any researcher that's under a lot of stress."
讲了笑话却没有人发笑，确实会很尴尬诶。
Well, telling jokes that no one finds funny is always quite awkward.
已证实该块碎片属于某把大剑的剑身。
This fragment has been confirmed to belong to the body of a certain greatsword.
内里似乎还蕴含着能量，有待进一步研究。
It seems to contain a certain kind of energy. Pending further research.
陈列柜被打碎了，里面已经空空如也。
The display cabinet has been shattered, and the contents emptied.
真没想到这么高端的空间站，奇物的陈列柜就是普通的玻璃，如此易碎。
Who would ever expect a display cabinet used for displaying Curios in such a high-tech space station to be made out of ordinary, fragile glass?
难道说……其实陈列柜本身装着的东西是假象，真正的奇物就是这个柜子？
Could it be that... the Curio inside the cabinet is a distraction, and the real Curio is the actual cabinet?
甚至于……那个奇物其实还在柜子中，并不为人所看见……？！
Or even... the Curio is actually still in the cabinet but it's just that no one can see it...!?
总感觉你盯着这个空柜子的眼神十分灼热。
Regardless, it seems like you're staring at the cabinet with a burning curiosity.
似乎是用于监控特殊死角的屏幕，并没有出现异常状态。
This screen seems to be used to monitor unique blind spots. Nothing abnormal is showing up.
部分监控画面处于黑屏状态，似乎需要输入特定ID才有权限查看对应录像。
Some of the windows are blacked out. It seems you need to enter a specific ID to gain permission to view the corresponding footage.
研究室的工作屏总是十分凌乱的，桌面中堆放着密密麻麻的杂乱文件，以至于壁纸图片都看不清了。
The display screen in the research room is always very messy. The wallpaper is entirely covered by a dense clutter of documents on the desktop.
仔细一看，竟然发现有一个图标酷似普通文档的游戏软件潜藏其中。
A closer look reveals a game software with an icon resembling an ordinary document lurking amongst the clutter.
屏幕进入待机状态，需要输入验证信息才可以使用该屏幕。
The screen is in standby. Verification is required before this screen can be used.
但在屏幕旁边贴着一张小小的便利贴……
But there's a small sticky note attached to the screen...
禁止在研究室外以科员身份对于光锥技术发表评论，禁止在研究室外以任何身份对流光忆庭发表评论。

It is forbidden to comment on Light Cone technology as a researcher outside the research laboratory. It is also forbidden to comment on the Garden of Recollection outside the research room under any identity.
画面不是十分清晰的屏幕，似乎是某些显示元件受到了损伤。
The image on the screen is not very clear. Some components of the display seem to be damaged.
可它依旧坚持不懈地在工作着，投射出短短的几个字母。
It is still working however, projecting a few short words.
如遇紧急情况，请各位科员立刻联系防卫科进行报备。
In case of emergency, all researchers are requested to contact the Security Department immediately.
如有科员因器官肢体受损，无法完成指纹或人脸信息识别，请联系防卫科进行特殊识别处理。
If any researchers cannot complete identification by fingerprint or face recognition due to limb and/or facial damage, please contact the Security Department for special identification.
如果您正在遭遇：失眠多梦、夜半盗汗、脱发头痛、食欲全无或食欲激增——请尽快联系医疗舱室-心理健康科。

If you are experiencing: Insomnia, night sweats, hair loss and headaches, total loss of appetite or a surge in appetite, please contact the medical cabin's Mental Health Department as soon as possible.
虽然是位于监控室的屏幕，但画面上并没有出现监控画面。
Despite this screen being located in the monitoring room, it's not displaying any form of surveillance footage.
反倒是一个文档页面占据了主要屏幕。
Instead, a page of text fills the screen.
综上所述，该监控室已遭到外部星系入侵。如果坚持使用该监控室权限访问内网，将会出现巨大风险。

In summary, this monitoring room has been hacked by invaders from an external star system. There will be a significant risk if you insist on using the extra permissions granted by the monitoring room to access the intranet.
故而本人申请暂停使用本监控室，同时申请本年度未使用带薪年假。
Therefore, I request to suspend the use of this monitoring room. Also, I'd like to go on holiday with the paid annual leave that I have left over this year.
……总感觉这个说法不是很靠谱的样子。
... Something about that notice feels really fishy.
屏幕上布满了方形的监控画面，似乎并没有出现异常情况。
The entire screen is filled with surveillance screens, none of which show anything unusual.
但右下角似乎有什么东西在闪烁，任务栏好像还有个奇怪的图标……
Something is flashing at the bottom right corner and there is a strange icon in the taskbar...
一个聊天窗口界面跳了出来。对方发来了数条消息。
A chat window pops up and several messages appear.
「你怎么挂机了？？？」「开团你人没了几个意思？」「出去就举报你！」
"Are you offline???" "How dare you go offline during an engagement!?" "I'm gonna report you!"
哇，开团挂机，也太过分了吧！
Whoa, going offline during a game. That's unforgivable!
Click the icon on the taskbar
一个巨大的游戏窗口跳了出来，彻底覆盖了监控画面。
A huge game screen pops up, completely obscuring the surveillance images.
硕大的「失败」出现在屏幕正中央，血红色的字体诉说着刚才战斗的惨烈。
A large blood-red font appears in the center of the screen, announcing the tragic results of the battle: "Game Over."
「欢迎来到『黑塔』。」广告机的女声慵懒地说道，你感觉不到欢迎的意思。
"Welcome to Herta Space Station." You don't pick up any sense of welcome from the lazy and careless female voice coming out of the advertising bot.
「家用寻物仪，火热发售中！」广告机的女声慵懒地说道，你没有购买的欲望。
"Home-Use Object Finders, on sale now!" The advertising bot lazily declares, giving you no desire to purchase this.
「卡利白正统，就在卡利百！」广告机的女声慵懒地说道，你不懂两者有什么区别。
"The orthodox Kapo-Kali IS Kali-Kapo!" The advertising bot lazily declares, and you are confused about the differences between the two.
太空植物，你没见过，但很熟悉。
Some space plants. You've never seen them before, but they feel familiar.
这是一种原始色素体生物。
This is a primitive chromosomal-based organism.
这植物旁边的气味不太好闻，它制造的可能不是氧气。
This plant doesn't smell very nice. It may not be an oxygen producer.
一对垃圾桶，分类方式很怪异：诺布莱斯虫能吃的/诺布莱斯虫不能吃的。
A pair of trashcans with an unusual sorting method — whether or not the trash is digestible by Noblesse worms.
人体工学桌椅，可自适配对象包括人类、机械人偶、诺布莱斯虫、狐人、智械、呜呜伯、富翁、海因斯人、心灵感应蜘蛛、巴维鲁人、石头、狗、猫（普通）、猫（布偶）……

Ergonomic desks and benches that can be self-adjusted to cater to humans, robots, Noblesse Worms, foxians, Intellitrons, Wubbaboos, millionaires, Hynes, telepathic spiders, Bavirus, stones, dogs, cats (normal), cats (ragdoll breed)...
Boxes and shelves. Do not approach.
一排绿色植物，纯粹的摆设。
A row of greenery purely for decoration.
从湛蓝星直达黑塔的太空电梯。星核猎手入侵事件之后，这座电梯就封闭了。
The space elevator that goes from The Blue directly to Herta Space Station. It's closed off after the invasion of the Stellaron Hunters.
畸形的黑金色物质在空间站的地面蜿蜒，这是一种被称为「裂界侵蚀」的现象。
Warped material in black and gold meanders along the floor of the space station, a phenomenon known as Fragmentum corrosion.
星核的爆发会引来「裂界」的侵蚀，它的出现与你体内的星核不无关系。
Stellaron bursts can lead to Fragmentum corrosion. These are connected to the Stellaron within you.
这点子有意思，不愧是天才俱乐部的人啊。
Interesting, she's a member of the Genius Society alright.
The Stellaron is up ahead, let's hurry.
有套独立的防护系统…看来对黑塔而言，「星核」不是寻常的藏品呢。
It has its own security system... I guess even for Herta, a Stellaron is no ordinary rarity.
当然，在骇客领域，就算天才黑塔也不是我的对手。
Of course, even the genius Herta can't compete with me when it comes to hacking.
好啊，那载体的准备也拜托你了～
Good, then I'll also count on you with the preparation of the receptacle.
这儿？一个空间站，不重要。
A space station, but that's not important.
可能你没自己想得那么重要？
Maybe you're not as important as you think.
<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：你的脑袋里现在一片混沌。你不清楚自己是谁，为什么在这儿，接下来要做什么；你觉得我很熟悉，却不清楚该不该信任我——

<color=#dbc291ff>Listen</color>: You are in a daze right now. You don't know who you are, why you're here, or what you're going to do next. You think I look familiar, but you're not sure if you should trust me—
——但这都不重要。重要的是我要走了，要把你一个人丢在这个空间站里。所以从现在开始，你不用再思考过去，也不用再怀疑自己。
...None of that matters. All you need to know is that I'm leaving, and you will be left all alone on this space station. From now on, you needn't think about your past or doubt yourself.
<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：接下来你会遇到很多危险，身处可怕的困境；但你也会遇到许多美妙的事情。你会拥有像家人那样的同伴，开始做梦也想象不到的冒险……

<color=#dbc291ff>Listen</color>: In the near future, you will encounter all kinds of perils and hardships, but you will also have many wonderful experiences. You'll meet companions who treat you like family, and embark on surreal adventures with them...
而在旅途的尽头，所有困扰你的谜题都将会解开。
At the end of your journey, all that perplexes you and troubles you will resolve.
这就是艾利欧所预见的以及你将抵达的未来…喜欢么？
This is your future that Elio has foreseen. Do you like it?
<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：记住这一刻的感受。只要心中有方向，你就一定能抵达故事的结局。
<color=#dbc291ff>Listen</color>: Remember what you're feeling in this moment. As long as you know in your heart where you're heading, you are guaranteed to see the ending of your story.
<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：艾利欧能窥见未来，却无法干涉你的选择。
<color=#dbc291ff>Listen</color>: Elio can foresee the future, but he can't make decisions for you.
以自己的意志抵达那个结局，我就是喜欢这样的你。
Use that will of yours to reach the end of your story. That's the you I like.
去下一个地方，为准备好的未来铺路。
The next stop, to pave the way for the future that is written.
这就像织锦一样，你我一次只能编织一条金线，但它最终会变成美丽的图景。
It's like weaving brocade — you and I can only add one gold thread each time, but eventually, we will make a gorgeous pattern.
还要说多久？按照剧本，{RUBY_B#「开拓」的旅行者}星穹列车{RUBY_E#}的人就快到了，我们不该跟他们照上面。
How long do you think you need? According to the script, the {RUBY_B#Trailblazers}Astral Express crew{RUBY_E#} is arriving soon. We should avoid being seen by them.
我知道，银狼。再一会儿，就一会儿。
I know, Silver Wolf. Just give me another minute.
时间快到了，我该走了…<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：很快就会有人找到你，放心跟他们走吧。除我以外，你什么都不记得。
I must leave now. <color=#dbc291ff>Listen</color>: Don't worry. Someone will come and find you very soon, just go with them. You won't remember a thing except me.
当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔……
When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret...
This is also a lovely answer.
这个人的坐标不是由空间站发出的……
Weren't their coordinates sent out from the space station...?
都这时候了还计较啥啊。这个大活人就在我们眼前，总不能是假的吧。
Who cares? They're here and alive. Do they look like a mannequin to you?
…心跳和脉搏很微弱，三月，准备做人工呼吸。
...Weak heartbeat and pulse... March, you better do CPR.
啊？！我…我没什么经验！丹恒你来吧！
Huh!? Hehe... I—I've never done it before! Dan Heng, you do it!
你没事吧，听得清我说话吗？记不记得自己叫什么名字？
Are you all right? Can you hear me? Do you remember your name?
…那可麻烦了，能努力回忆一下吗？你的名字是……
Aw, this isn't good... Can you try harder? I'm sure you can at least remember your name...
{NICKNAME}吗？你好，我是丹恒，这是三月七。
{NICKNAME}? Nice to meet you. My name's Dan Heng, and this is March 7th.
这座空间站遭到了反物质军团的袭击，我们是受艾丝妲站长的委托前来救援的。
This space station was just attacked by the Antimatter Legion. We came to help with the rescue at the request of Lead Researcher Asta.
「毁灭」纳努克的打手。你们运气很好，最危险的{RUBY_B#「毁灭」的令使}绝灭大君{RUBY_E#}不在附近，来的只是一群四处作恶的散兵游勇。
Goons owned by the Destruction. You're lucky that the most dangerous {RUBY_B#Emanator of Destruction}Lord Ravager{RUBY_E#} among them isn't around, just some nasty minions.
我们很快会把入侵者消灭掉的，不用担心。
We'll take those invaders out soon, don't worry.
对呀，粉色头发，个子小小的，很可爱的女孩子。黑塔女士亲自任命的代理站长。
Uh-huh, a petite cutie with pink hair. Madam Herta appointed her to be the acting lead researcher.
…那个孩子也太没威信了，连员工都不知道她名字……
...That girl really needs to step up. I can't believe her own employee doesn't even know her name...
返回主控舱段。艾丝妲站长和及时疏散的研究员都在那里。
Back to the master control zone. Asta and the other researchers have gathered there.
星穹列车也停在那附近！所以不必担心怪物的袭击，我们会解决这次危机的！
Plus that's where we parked the Astral Express! Don't you worry, we'll protect you from the monsters and clear up this mess.
我和丹恒是星穹列车的乘员，请多关照啦！
Dan Heng and I are members of the Astral Express crew~
列车与黑塔女士有些来往，因此我们时不时会在这里稍作停留。
Well the Express has some dealings with Madam Herta, so we come to visit the space station from time to time.
结果撞上这么大的事，正义的列车组可不会袖手旁观！
We just so happened to arrive during this... invasion. Of course, as a — ahem — crew of heroes, we're happy to lend a hand.
嗯，你没见过吗？列车时不时会来到太空站的。
Yeah, you've never seen it? The Express comes here every once in a while.
那是一辆神奇的列车，拥有「开拓」星神的力量，能够在星海中穿行。
It's a unique train that can travel between the stars with the power of the Trailblaze Aeon.
等回到主控舱段，我指给你瞧～
I'll show you once we're back to the master control zone~
You and March go back together.
唔，也行，那你自己小心喔。
Oh, all right. You stay safe.
军团在太空站疯狗似地乱窜，返程的路也不安全，还是带点防身武器为好。
The Legion are rampaging through the space station like a pack of wolves — this trip won't be a walk in the park. It's better if you have something to protect yourself.
只是个建议啦——没事，你有我呢！
Just a suggestion though — you're safe as long as you stick with me~!
这里到处都是稀奇的玩意儿，也就是所谓的「奇物」。黑塔收集这些东西又不用，净搁这儿吃灰，也不知道图啥。
This place is full of fancy little gadgets — Herta's collection. I really don't get why she'd go out of her way to collect them and then leave them here to gather dust...
啊，是反物质军团！这帮疯子流窜过来了，看我上去揍它。
Ah, it's the Antimatter Legion! So these crazy jerks made it all the way here... Watch this!
人不可貌相啊，你还挺习惯战斗的耶……
You're stronger than you look... Seem to be quite the fighter.
待会儿我们坐中间那台电梯下行，去主控舱段。那儿的路你熟吗？
So we'll take that elevator on the central platform to go down to the master control zone. Do you know the way?
呃，说起来你穿的也不是空间站的制服，你真的是这儿的人吗？
Um, I notice that you're not wearing the space station staff uniform. Do you really work here?
…失忆了吗？看来还是受了点伤。
...Memory loss, huh. You must've been injured.
...Never mind. I won't ask if you don't wanna talk about it.
Let's go, I'll take you to the safe zone~
防卫科的阿兰在这附近失去了联系，我得把他带回去。
Arlan from the Security Department lost contact in the vicinity. I need to find him first.
没，电梯好像损坏了，按键都没反应。
Nah, I think the elevator's broken. I pressed all the buttons but nothing happened.
——不是我干的！一定是反物质军团的错！
—But it wasn't me! The Antimatter Legion must've broken it!
要是万能的丹恒老师在就好了，他懂一堆莫名其妙的东西，没准连电梯也会修……
Too bad Dan Heng's not here. He's like a walking encyclopedia... He knows a ton of complicated stuff — maybe even elevator repair...
哇，你怎么在这儿？！…你怎么比我们还快？
Whoa! Why are you here!? ...And how did you get here before us?
我走另一条路，从上面一层绕过来的，正好在监控室看见你们。
I took another route to the upper level, and I saw you guys from up there.
阿兰也在监控室。他受了点伤，但没生命危险。
Arlan is in the control room. He's been injured, but not fatally.
你找到他了啊…阿兰他知道这电梯怎么回事吗？
You found him! Will he know what to do about this elevator?
既然是防卫科的负责人，应该知道吧。
I suppose as the head of the Security Department, he should know.
Then let's go talk to him!
对呀，我和他都是星穹列车的乘员～
Yep, we're from the Astral Express~
噢…是黑塔女士请你们来支援这里的么？
Oh... Did Madam Herta send you to help?
巧合而已。黑塔委托列车寻找的遗器到手了，我们按照协议返回交付…不想正好碰上了遇袭现场。
It's just a coincidence. We came to deliver the rare relic Herta trusted us to find... We didn't expect to arrive during an invasion.
反物质军团为啥会盯上你们啊？我看它们攻击的目标就是空间站，对星球地表毫无兴趣的样子。
Why is the Antimatter Legion targeting you guys? It seems they just ignored the surface of the planet and came straight to the space station.
我也…没什么头绪。军团来得十分蹊跷…站内的防卫系统突然失效，没过多久那些家伙就出现了。
I... have no idea. The Legion came at a very suspicious time — almost right after the security system suddenly failed.
小姐…艾丝妲站长第一时间组织疏散科员，我本该负责掩护所有人撤离，但…没想到最后还是大意了。
Lady... Lead Researcher Asta immediately began to organize the evacuation. I was supposed to cover everyone as they evacuated, but... I didn't expect to end up failing in this task.
不要自责。你伤了腿和惯用手，藏身在这里避开与军团正面交锋，这个判断十分冷静。
Don't be too hard on yourself. Your leg and dominant hand were injured. It was a wise decision to hide here and avoid a head-on encounter with the Legion.
对！大部分科员已经去避难了，当务之急是返回主控舱段，组织反击！所以…你知道电梯怎么用吗？它启动不了了……

Yeah! Most of the staff have been evacuated safely, so right now our highest priority is to return to the master control zone and plan a counterattack! So... do you know how to use the elevator? I couldn't start it...
撤离完成后为了防止军团进攻主控舱段，电梯的权限暂时封锁了。
After the evacuation was complete, the elevators were all shut down to keep the Legion away from the master control zone.
艾丝妲小姐委托你们来找我，应该有给你们解锁的密钥吧？
Since Lady Asta sent you to look for me, I assume she must've given you the encryption key for accessing the elevator system?
Oh, right, she did give me some sort of card...
But where did I put it...
…既然密钥找到了就赶快开始吧，电梯的权限用那边的操作台就能解锁。
...Now that we found the key, we should get going. We can use that console over there to unlock the elevator.
等一下，我只开启了最上层的电梯口，从那里走。
Hold on. I only activated the elevator on the highest floor. We'll have to go there to use it.
绝对不能让军团利用电梯侵入到主控舱段，我必须优先考虑科员们的安全。
Because I mustn't give the Legion any chance to reach the master control zone by the elevator. I must ensure the safety of the station's staff.
烦请各位多绕一点路…有劳了。
So I'll have to trouble you to take a bit of a detour... Apologies.
抱歉…空间站是黑塔女士交给小姐的东西，我必须优先考虑主控舱段和科员们的安全。
Sorry... This space station was entrusted to Lady Asta by Madam Herta. I must do this for the safety of the master control zone and the staff there.
不得不劳烦各位多绕一点路…真的很抱歉。
So I'll have to trouble you to take a bit of a detour... Sincerest apologies.
什么「各位」啊？你不一起来吗？
Huh? You're not coming with us?
我行动不便…会拖累你们。我就留在这里，在你们成功抵达后再次封锁电梯权限。
My leg is injured... I'd only slow you down. I'll stay here and shut down the elevator once you've made it to the master control zone.
你不必担心会拖后腿。封锁电梯权限一事，在主控舱段也可以进行操作吧？
You won't slow us down. And you should be able to shut down the elevators from the master control zone, right?
就是啊，我和{NICKNAME}两个人不也这么过来了，再加一个丹恒，不至于不至于~
Agreed. {NICKNAME} and I made it here safely, and now we've also got Dan Heng. We're more than enough to protect you~
反物质军团就交给我们，阿兰你只要跟着我们，顾好自己就行了。
Let us worry about the Antimatter Legion. You just follow us and keep yourself alive~
You can use me as a crutch.
分拣分析室已经紧急封闭了，那条路走不通。
The Sorting and Analysis Room has been sealed off. We can't go this way.
你对反物质军团入侵这里的目的有什么头绪么，阿兰？
Do you know why the Antimatter Legion would invade the station, Arlan?
无非是冲着黑塔女士的藏品来的吧…但都这样了，为什么还……
They must've come for Madam Herta's collection... But as to why, I still...
珍贵的实验报告被丢得到处都是……
So many precious lab reports scattered about. What a mess...
The repulsion bridge has been shut down?
嗯，这样多多少少可以拖延敌人一会儿。
Yes. To stall the enemy, more or less.
这就到电梯口了？一路上也没遇到多少敌人嘛～
Is that it? We've reached the elevator already? That wasn't too many monsters~
唉，话一出口我就觉得大事不妙……
Oof, probably shouldn't have said that... Might bring bad luck.
这个数量…是不是有点不太妙？
This number... isn't good, is it?
看来还是有好好完成委托呢，欢迎回来。
It looks like you did well completing that task. Welcome back.
嗯，和我们来时的道路一样。
Yes, it's the same as when we came.
我听闻黑塔女士的藏品中有一颗「星核」。
I heard there's something called a Stellaron in Madam Herta's collection.
…那不是我这种身份的人能够接触到的信息。
...That's not the kind of information someone in my position would have access to.
喂，这亮晶晶的是…「光锥」吧？这不是星际和平公司内部才有的稀罕货吗？
Hey, these shiny things... Are these Light Cones? I thought only the Interastral Peace Corporation had rare stuff like this.
不，「光锥」是流光忆庭的技术，由于它能将记忆随身携带，是非常厉害的强化类奇物。据说公司花了大价钱买下了使用权——但黑塔怎么弄到手，就不好说了。

No, Light Cones are Garden of Recollection technology. They allow you to carry memories around — very potent enhancement items. I heard the corporation paid a lot for the usage rights, but I've no idea how Herta managed to get hold of one.
这几张光锥的来路是正当的，我只能说到这里。你们先带上吧，它对战斗很有帮助。
They were acquired legitimately, that's all I can say. Take them, they're very useful in combat.
小三月，丹恒，辛苦你们啦。
March, Dan Heng, you've been through a lot.
姬子～你早点来嘛！最后那票反物质军团和蝗虫似的。咱可是用箭的，打起来多费劲呀。
Whew, Himeko~ What took you so long! That last wave of Antimatter Legion came at us like a swarm of locusts, have you ever tried shooting locusts with a bow?
来得早也没用啊。我的轨道炮倒是能打掉一片，不过黑塔回来看见空间站这模样，非找我们算账不可。
I wouldn't have made a difference. My orbital cannon can deal with a whole bunch of enemies at once, but I couldn't just blow up the space station with it — Herta would NOT like that...
你没事吧，阿兰？艾丝妲很担心你。
Are you alright, Arlan? Asta's been worried about you.
我没什么大碍，伤口包扎下就好。谢谢你们，我先向艾丝妲站长汇报情况去了，再见。
I'm fine, a quick patching up will do. Thanks for asking. I'll report the situation to Lead Researcher Asta immediately. Bye.
嗨，初次见面，我是姬子，星穹列车的领航员。
Hey, nice to meet you. I'm Himeko, navigator of the Astral Express.
也就是说，列车怎么行动都听她的。
In other words, she's in charge of where the Express goes.
这一路过来，小三月没给你添什么麻烦吧？
March hasn't been any trouble for you along the way, has she?
{NICKNAME}, think carefully about how you wanna reply to that.
没见过这么冒失的姑娘。
I've never met a more reckless girl in my life.
——我就是这个性格嘛！这次又没惹祸…习惯就好了…你看，丹恒他就习惯了。
...That's just my charm! And I didn't cause any trouble. You just have to get used to me... Look, Dan Heng agrees, right?
I have the right to remain silent.
没见过这么活泼的姑娘。
I've never met a more lively girl in my life.
嘿，咱是年轻人！就该朝气蓬勃勇往直前嘛！{M#他}{F#她}这个人挺有眼光的，是吧丹恒？
Well, that's the joy of youth! We should take every step forward full of energy! {M#He's}{F#She's} a discerning one, isn't {M#he}{F#she}, Dan Heng?
I have the right to remain silent.
In that case, I'd rather not answer.
…好像队伍里一下子冒出来两个丹恒。
...Oh, looks like we have two Dan Hengs on our team now.
Please leave me out of this.
哈哈，年轻人就是容易打成一片，看来你们已经相当熟络了。
Haha, look at you all, you've already gotten really close.
走吧，艾丝妲可担心你们了。
Come on, Asta has been worried about all of you.
投射雷达跟踪正常，遥测信号频率偏高！必须维持在平均水平！
Projectile radar tracking, normal. Telemetry signal frequency unusually high! Maintain at normal levels!
根据预测，军团即将进行十个波次以上的连续袭击，大家扛住！
Our measurements predict that the Legion is about to unleash over ten waves of continuous attacks. Everyone, brace yourselves!
艾丝妲站长！我们回来啦！
呼，你们平安回来了就好。阿兰刚刚来过了，收容舱段的事他都告诉我了。还有他的伤…多亏你们的帮助。
Whew, I'm glad you're all back safe. Arlan just told me about the situation at the storage zone — and about his injury... thank you, for all your help.
灾难当头时，越发体会到科员才是空间站最珍贵的财富…唉，我们对突发事件的准备实在太少了，忽略了安保和战斗人员的建设。

In times of disaster, I realize more and more that the space station's researchers are its most valuable assets... Alas, we were ill-prepared for such emergencies... we should have built up our security and combat departments.
倒是你们星穹列车的乘员，个个身手不凡……
On the other hand, the entire crew of the Astral Express seems to be extraordinarily skilled.
What is the current situation on the space station?
目前状况还在控制之中。安保系统受到的破坏很轻微，入侵者只改写了少数核心数据，因此很容易修复。
The situation is under control for now. The damage to our security system was minor. The intruder only managed to alter a small amount of data, so it was easy to fix.
潜在的风险在于科员们…他们非常信任黑塔女士，根本没想过空间站会被军团攻破。相较于肉体的伤势，精神上的恐慌更加可怕……

The real problem lies with the researchers... They trust Madam Herta wholeheartedly and never thought that the space station would be breached by the Legion. A broken spirit is far worse than a broken body.
我们去和科员们聊聊吧。这种时候，大家都不希望空间站的内部再出现意外。你试过联系黑塔了吗？
Let's go speak with the researchers. Right now, the space station can't afford any more unexpected turns, especially from within. Have you tried contacting Herta?
我发了很多封信件，全都石沉大海。姬子小姐了解她的，空间站就是她收容追随者和奇物的仓库，完全没放在心上。
I sent multiple letters, all met with silence. You know her, Himeko, the space station is but a mere warehouse for followers and rare items. She doesn't really care about it.
我就知道…没关系，我也会向黑塔发信，说她要的奇物我们带来了。至少这个对她还有点吸引力。
I knew it... No matter. I'll also send a letter to Herta and tell her that we've brought the rare item she seeks. At least that might get her attention.
That would be of great help.
科员的安抚就拜托你们了。
I'll leave the reassurance of the researchers in your hands.
如果有其他疑问，也欢迎来找我和姬子。
If you have any other questions, you are welcome to come to Himeko and me.
你好。你是…{NICKNAME}，对吗？有什么想知道的？
Hello, you must be... {NICKNAME}, right? How can I help you?
I'd like to learn about the space station.
这是空间站「黑塔」，其所有权么，当然归属于尊敬的黑塔女士本人。
This is Herta Space Station. As you might tell from its name, it belongs to the distinguished Madam Herta herself.
「黑塔」原本只是作为奇物和遗器仓库而造的，但黑塔女士允许她的追随者们参与管理和研究，这里就逐渐变成了一座科研基地。

Herta Space Station was originally built as a warehouse for rare items and relics, but Madam Herta also allowed her followers to oversee tasks and conduct research. It then gradually turned into a scientific research base.
你们经过的收容舱段收藏着诸多「奇物」和「遗器」，是最核心的研究场所。
The storage zone you passed through contains all our inventory, and is the main research center.
我们现在所在的主控舱段，则是空间站的控制中枢。
The master control zone where we are now is the control center of the whole space station.
据说空间站里还藏着黑塔女士的私人密室，里面封印着最珍贵，最稀有和最危险的藏品…就她的性格来说，这很有可能……

It is said that the space station also contains Madam Herta's private chamber where her most precious, rare, and dangerous collections are sealed... And for someone like her, it's not out of the realm of possibility.
很多事她都没告诉我这个「站长」。
Even from me, the lead researcher, there are many things she keeps secret.
I'd like to learn about you.
我是空间站「黑塔」的站长，但…其实不过是替黑塔女士代为打理的管家罢了。
I'm lead researcher of Herta Space Station. But honestly... I'm more like Madam Herta's "housekeeper" of this place.
黑塔女士是个天才，不过如何管理各抒己见的科员，如何直接又不失礼貌地代表空间站回复博识学会的种种刁难，这些超出了她的能力范围，但恰好我能处理这一块儿。

Madam Herta is a genius, but managing disparate staff, tactfully representing the space station before the Intelligentsia Guild... these are all things beyond her abilities. But as it turns out they are my forte.
嘿嘿，学者们可比家里那些蜩螗沸羹的老家伙好对付多啦。
Hehe, scholars are a lot easier to deal with than those vociferous old geezers back at home.
他们再怎么念叨「天文学只是观测的学问，并不能创造经济价值」，见到黑塔女士还不是大气不敢出？
No matter how much they drone on about "Astronomy is just about looking at things, it doesn't bring any real value," they all fall silent in front of Madam Herta.
不管什么难题，只要说这是黑塔女士的意思就行。毕竟黑塔本人，就是「智慧」价值的象征。
No matter the problem, you just needed to say that it was Madam Herta's wishes and all would be fine. After all, Herta herself is a symbol of wisdom.
哎，多亏了她，我才能数着星星睡觉。不然就得回去继承家业了，光想想就觉得可怕极啦。
Hey, thanks to her, I can count the stars to sleep. Otherwise, I would've had to take over the family fortune. Just thinking about it terrifies me.
I'd like to learn about Arlan.
阿兰去休息区包扎了。他很有自知之明…要是他还硬撑，我肯定要好好骂他一顿。
Arlan went to dress his wounds at the rest area. He knows himself well... but if he insists on pushing his limits, I'll give him a good earful.
我真的很生气诶，明明所有科员都完成避难了，他还不服从命令，非要再次搜查收容舱段。
I'm very upset he didn't obey my orders and insisted on searching the storage zone even though everyone had already evacuated.
我知道他是不想放弃任何一名科员…防卫科对他来说不仅仅是一份工作。
I know he didn't want to leave any researchers behind... The Security Department is more than just a job to him.
阿兰那家伙根本不在乎受伤，他只在乎自己能不能保护别人，只有这样他才会…感到自己获得了认可。
But Arlan doesn't care about getting hurt, he only cares about protecting others. It's the only way he feels... fulfilled.
我也不是不理解他的心情，但还是希望他更重视自己啊！
And it's not that I don't understand where he's coming from. I just want him to look out for himself, too!
I'd like to learn about Herta.
黑塔女士么…她是「天才俱乐部」的会员，得到「智识」星神青睐的天之骄子。{RUBY_B#「智识」的星神}博识尊{RUBY_E#}诞生以来，这样的人总共也才<unbreak>84</unbreak>个。

Herta... she's a member of the Genius Society. One of the proud favorites of the Aeon of Erudition. Ever since the birth of {RUBY_B#Aeon of Erudition}Nous{RUBY_E#}, there have only been <unbreak>84</unbreak> people admitted into the Genius Society.
所以，黑塔女士超级任性的…她只做自己感兴趣的事，一旦失去兴趣就立刻走人，这座空间站就是这样的产物……

That is why Madam Herta is extremely... headstrong... She only pursues what interests her and as soon as that interest is lost, she abandons it and moves on. The space station was one such abandoned interest...
前不久，我借出了一份她的手稿作为资料参考，应该还在主控舱段里，你有兴趣的话也可以看看。
Anyway, I lent out one of her manuscripts as a resource reference not long ago. It should still be in the master control zone. You can take a look if you wish.
I don't have any more questions.
哈哈，和你聊天，我的心情似乎也平静了一些。果然多和人交流，心情就会变好。
Huh, chatting with you seems to have lightened my mood. It seems like talking can really raise one's spirits.
怎么了？{NICKNAME}，你好像很好奇哦？
What's the matter, {NICKNAME}? You seem to have something on your mind.
I'd like to learn about the Astral Express.
是一辆在宇宙中行驶的列车。如果要进一步解释，我会说：「星穹列车」是「开拓」星神阿基维利曾搭乘的列车。
Basically speaking, it's a train that travels through space. But more specifically, the Astral Express was a creation of the Aeon, Akivili the Trailblazer.
至于开拓、星神、阿基维利分别是什么，等这里的事端平息了再聊——你也不想突然被一大堆名词怼在脸上吧？
As for what the Trailblaze, the Aeons, and Akivili are all about, let's talk about it when things have calmed down a little. I don't wanna overwhelm you now, do I?
I'd like to learn about Light Cones.
「光锥」是流光忆庭的发明，这群「{RUBY_B#浮黎}记忆{RUBY_E#}」星神的追随者通过提炼记忆片段，制成「光锥」，让记忆得以留存。
Light Cones were created by the Garden of Recollection. These followers of the Aeon of {RUBY_B#Fuli}Remembrance{RUBY_E#} refined memory fragments to create Light Cones, which preserve memories.
你一定想到了吧？「光锥」既然能保存记忆，也就能保存经验和能力。所以「光锥」是非常珍贵的奇物，在{RUBY_B#银河垄断经济体}星际和平公司{RUBY_E#}是二级管制流通商品。

But you've already realized it, haven't you? Since Light Cones can preserve memories, they can also preserve experiences and abilities. That's why Light Cones are extremely precious rare items under level-2 restriction by the {RUBY_B#Galactic Monopoly}Interastral Peace Corporation{RUBY_E#}.
据我所知，只有星际和平公司获得了流光忆庭授权的光锥化技术。不知道黑塔和流光忆庭做了什么交易，根据她的性格，多半不是走正规途径弄来的……

As far as I know, only the IPC possesses Light Cone technology authorized by the Garden of Recollection. I couldn't say what deal Herta made with the Garden, but knowing her, it was likely off the books...
珍惜每一片「光锥」吧。它们对于原主人来说，是非常重要的记忆。
You should cherish every Light Cone. They are all precious memories of their original owners.
Do you... know who I am?
唔，我对你的身份一无所知，但我很熟悉你的…气息。
Who exactly you are escapes me, but you seem familiar to me.
对你嘛，我有些许猜想，但一切都无从佐证，因此先保留这个小小的秘密。
I have a couple of hunches, but I can't prove any at this point. So, they'll be my little secrets for now.
你很在意自己的过去吗？我倒觉得你是比起过去，更在意未来的人…可能因为我是这样的人吧。
Are you concerned about your past? You seem like someone who prefers to look forward rather than back... Or maybe I'm just describing myself.
I don't have any more questions.
Come to me anytime if you have more questions.
…如果我能早点发现反物质军团……
...If only I'd caught the Antimatter Legion sooner...
我没事，这点疼痛真的不算什么，我早就习惯了。况且为了保护大家而受伤，本来就是一件值得自豪的事。
I'm fine, this pain is nothing, really. I'm used to it. In fact, I should be proud of it. It's a reminder of being able to protect everyone.
咳，我刚刚说的那些话，你别告诉艾丝妲站长。
Ahem, but don't tell Lead Researcher Asta what I just said.
还是有个别科员遭遇了不幸…
There were a few researchers who didn't make it...
其他大部分科员只是受了轻伤，但我担心的是他们的精神状态。
The rest are fine, mostly minor injuries. But I'm worried about their mental states.
大多数人都是仰慕黑塔女士来到空间站的，现在联系不上她，也没有余地让他们联系家人，只希望他们能挺过这次危机。
Most of them came to the space station because they admired Madam Herta. But now they can't reach her or even their own families. I just hope they can all survive this crisis.
我认识艾丝妲站长的时候，她是个大集团的富家小姐。
My first impression was that she was the daughter of a rich family — owners of a big company.
她对我有恩，所以她去空间站的时候，我也跟来了。
She was kind to me though. When she went to the space station, I followed her.
我不是很懂科研，但能保护珍视研究的人们顺利完成他们的研究，就足够了。
I don't know much about science, but I'm glad to be able to protect people in pursuit of their research.
谢谢，帮大忙了。伤口如果还在渗血，就不能放心抱佩佩了。
Thank you, I appreciate it. I wouldn't be able to hold Peppy properly if these wounds kept bleeding.
佩佩是我们的家人，毛茸茸的小狗，就像个白色小雪球。
Oh, Peppy's a fluffy little puppy, like a white snowball. He's family.
还好灾难发生的时候，它已经躲进自己的小睡眠舱了。
Luckily, he'd already hidden in his little sleeping pod when the disaster struck.
有空让你见见，你也会喜欢它的。
Y'know, I'll introduce you when you have the time. You're gonna love him.
I'm more of a cat person.
Alright, I'll leave you to get some rest.
希望这场风波尽快过去。
I hope all this chaos will end soon.
我要走，我要逃，我要离开这里……
I need to leave, I need to run from this forsaken...
不，我逃不掉的，逃得过昨天，逃得过今天，也逃不过明天……
No, it's impossible. I can run from yesterday, I can run from today, but tomorrow will always be one step ahead of me...

我们的预调试有三个步骤，打开频谱仪，再是衰耗器，最后把信号输出到滤波器上。

而我，「黑塔•银河法政科」的优秀科员卢卡奇，有责任叫醒那些装睡的人！

我们空间站，历来收藏着银河数不胜数的奇物宝贝。但不是所有人都知道，在这藏品之中，也包含着一些活生生的生命！

This conch makes a strange sound. It is unlike laughter, but is nevertheless quite humorous.
黑色的羽翼在气流中轻旋，保持着飞翔的样子，长度与一人同高。你想象一位冒险者的身影，挥舞双翼，乘风而起。

A pair of black feathered wings hovers in the air at about the height of a grown human, maintaining the appearance of flight. You imagine the figure of an adventurer flapping those wings and rising with the wind.
你感受到了风，和煦的风迎面而来，吹动发梢，盈满全身。风送着你飞越高山，远渡诸海，身后是风车转动，牧歌隽永，远方是流星划落，白雪皑皑……

You feel the wind — A warm and welcoming wind blows into your face, plays with the ends of your hair, and fills your body. The wind sends you to fly beyond mountain ranges and vast oceans. Behind you, windmills turn and pastoral hymns chime. Before you, shooting stars stream down and snow glitters...
<unbreak>40</unbreak>张纸牌以精密的布置叠成尖塔的形状。轻轻抽走任何一张，这座纸牌塔便会轰然倒塌。
<unbreak>40</unbreak> cards are stacked in a precise arrangement to form a spire. Pull away even a single card, and it will collapse into a ruinous heap.
或许世间因果也是如此，选择众多，结局却只有一种。但你相信，偶然寓于必然之中，终有一日，你会找到命定之外的解答。

Perhaps this is how causality works. We have thousands of choices, but there is only one outcome. And yet, you believe that happenstances are etched in inevitability. One day, you'll find the answer beyond your guaranteed destiny.
几块深红的碎片悬浮在空中，被一股看不见的力量牵引着，勾勒出断刃的轮廓。斑驳的表面像是烈火燃尽的荒原，诉说着它的曾经。
A few crimson fragments float in the air. Drawn by an invisible force, they trace the shape of a broken blade. The rusted surface looks like a barren field scorched by flames as it narrates its past.
你仔细端详这些碎片，空气中忽然传来一阵微热，拂过脸颊，在你的耳畔驻足停步。
You closely examine these fragments. A gust of heat suddenly arrives through the air. It touches your cheeks and pauses next to your ear.
你听见有谁在啜泣，有谁在喧嚣，有谁留下无言的哀悼。最后，你听见一声低语——
You hear someone sobbing, someone yelling, and someone mourning wordlessly. Finally, someone whispers...
「奇物编号<unbreak>2691</unbreak>：热量黑洞。能吸收热量，但不包括食物。」
"Curio No. <unbreak>2691</unbreak>: Energy Black Hole. It can absorb energy, but not food."
金属外壳上有可疑的油光，看来奇物简介里的后半句是最近才添加上去的。
There is a suspiciously oily sheen over the metal casing. It seems like the part about food in the Curio introduction was added recently.
「奇物编号<unbreak>021</unbreak>：勘星钎。这款是原型，再强调一遍，原型。」
"Curio No. <unbreak>021</unbreak>: Astro Rod. This is the PROTOTYPE. I repeat, PROTOTYPE."
量产后变得平平无奇的勘星钎。
Astro Rods have become so common after being mass-produced.
「奇物编号<unbreak>458</unbreak>：不可承受之重。约特伍德体皇族的桂冠，用来传承知识。」
"Curio No. <unbreak>458</unbreak>: Unbearable Weight. It is the crown of the Tottonid royal family, used to pass on knowledge."
你试着佩戴这顶王冠，戴上后只感觉头大——因为它实在太重了，看来知识的分量可不轻。
You try on the crown, and you feel as though your head has grown several times bigger. The crown is far too heavy. Looks like knowledge is pretty dense.
「奇物编号<unbreak>269</unbreak>：分装快乐。立方体内的便携装置，可以用来识别并收集『快乐』类情绪。」
"Curio No. <unbreak>269</unbreak>: Joy Filtration Set. The portable device inside the cube can be used to identify and collect joyous emotions."
你认真数了一遍储存便携装置的立方体，发现一共有二十一个。你又数了几次，但每次的数量都不一样。
You carefully count the cubes that store the portable devices and find there are <unbreak>21</unbreak> in total. You count a few more times, but end up with a different figure each time.
立方体中的便携装置有被取走的痕迹，看来需要「快乐」的人真的很多。
There are signs that the portable devices have been removed from the cubes. It seems like there is a high demand for joy.
每个生命体都应当拥有一套完整的「分装快乐」，快乐永不嫌多。
Every living being should own a complete Joy Filtration Set. One can never have too much joy.
"Curio No. <unbreak>1381</unbreak>: Total Eclipse of the Heart."

A warning notice affixed next to it reads, "Do not activate this without written permission from the space station."
这是用来分解空间站废弃物品的装置，对气味敏感的人或许需要屏住呼吸。
This is a device used to decompose rubbish from the space station. Those sensitive to odors may need to hold their breath.
「军团」入侵留下的影响尚未消除，这里并未展出空间站所收容的全部奇物。
As the after-effects of the Legion's invasion have not been completely removed, not all Curios in the space station are displayed here.
应物科才收容回来的奇物，你甚至查询不到它的奇物档案。
A Curio that has just been contained by the Department of Implement Arts. Even its archival information is not yet available.
存放着奇物的展柜，星体上的奇物已被其他科员借走。
A display cabinet used to store Curios. The Curios on the planetary body have been borrowed by other researchers.

You open your eyes and wake from your imagination. The black feathered wings fly still, as if recounting a story, as if singing a whole world.
空气中忽然传来一阵微热，拂过脸颊，在你的耳畔驻足停步。

军团拥有星神{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}纳努克{RUBY_E#}的赐福。它们有备而来，这里的人是守不住的。
Either way, the Legion has the blessing of the Aeon, {RUBY_B#The Destruction}Nanook{RUBY_E#}. They came prepared and everyone here is not.
所以我们才必须离开——而且要带上{NICKNAME}一起走。
That's why we have to leave and take {NICKNAME} with us.
{M#他}{F#她}是破局之人——当然，我也可能弄错。
{M#He's}{F#She's} the one who can help us turn the tides... Of course, I may be wrong.
星穹列车的行车仪上即时记录我们的行迹。空间站的动静这么大，瓦尔特先生不可能注意不到。
The Astral Express tracks our coordinates in real time... And with such a huge change in the space station's movements, there's no way Mr. Yang wouldn't have noticed.
嗯，我敢保证，你们的杨叔正在赶来的路上。
Hmm, I can almost guarantee that your Mr. Yang is already on his way.
现在的话，只是末日兽姑且还能应付，但如果「毁灭」的令使也来了……
Right now, we might be able to handle things if it's just the Doomsday Beast. But, if the Destruction's Emanator were to appear...
总觉得事情没那么顺利。
I still feel that things won't be going as planned.
先抓紧离开这里吧，之后会跟你好好解释的。
Let's hurry up and get out of here. I'll explain later.
出口在那边…怎么过去呢？
The exit's over there... how do we get to it?
{NICKNAME}, use the control device to switch the repulsion bridge.
不会是列车吧？看来它会比我们先到月台耶。
Could it be the Express? It looks like it'll get to the platform before us.
保不准就在附近！我视力好，先去瞅瞅。
It has to be nearby! Let me go take a peek with my sharp eyes.
…既如此。好吧，接下来该怎么做？
...As you say so. Alright, what should we do next?
这里是检修科员工作的支援舱段，能通往最近的月台。我们去那儿，和瓦尔特会合。
This is the supply zone where the maintenance crew works. There's a path here that leads to the nearest railway platform. Let's head over there and meet up with Welt.
杨叔？杨叔也来了？他不是留在车上了吗？
Mr. Yang? Mr. Yang's here too? Didn't he stay on the Express?
朝最近的月台移动吧，与列车会合是当务之急。
Head to the nearest platform. Getting to the Express is our top priority.
支援舱段部分的防护罩也撑不了多久，你们尽快……
The supply zone's defense shield won't hold much longer. You all need to hurry...
这、这也太大了…喂，我叫你下来你就下来啊？！
I—It's bigger than I thought... Hey you, I was just joking! Leave us alone, shoo!
这种力量的流动，不太寻常。
This energy flow... it's up to something.
那个右手上似乎附着什么糟糕的东西，都打起精神来！
There's something on its right hand, stay alert!
趴着吧您嘞！看见没，这就是挑衅本姑娘的下场！
Gotcha! See, that's what you get for annoying me!
不对，军团的对星体兵器，不应该这么简单。
No, the Legion's weapon shouldn't go down so easily.
麻烦的事一会儿再想。先集火，以免夜长梦多。
Let's worry about that later. We need to focus fire — fast.
不打了不打了，这大家伙彻底炸毛啦！
I'm out, I'm out! It's gone bananas!
这破坏力…看来，它终于要动真格了。
Not good... It's ready to throw everything at us.
喂喂喂，感觉…它是不是在憋什么大招？
Hey! Is it trying to pull a charged attack?
这还用感觉？力量在汇聚，大的要来了！
I don't see any other possibilities. Here we go, brace yourselves!
你醒了。我让小三月他们留在列车附近照看一下。
You're awake. I had March and Dan Heng stay by the Express to keep an eye on things.
时间差不多，我等的人应该快到了。
It's almost time. She should be arriving any moment now.
我才走了几个月啊？嗯？空间站就搞成了这个德性？
I've only been gone, what? A few months? And the space station is already in this state?
这位就是空间站真正的主人，「天才俱乐部」#83，黑塔。
This is the true master of the space station — Genius Society number <unbreak>83</unbreak>, Herta.
介绍我就好好介绍，提什么俱乐部？我那么多非凡成就，哪个不比#83好听？
At least give me a proper introduction! Genius Society number <unbreak>83</unbreak>... Of all my outstanding achievements, that's what you want to mention?
对啊，你现在才反应过来？你们搞得天翻地覆的地方，是我的私人财产。
Yeah, up to speed yet? That place you all turned upside down? That's my property.
你看见的这个是我做的人偶，我操纵她和你们对话。
What you're seeing here is one of my puppets. I'm using her to talk to you.
想笑就笑吧，赞达尔那老鬼起的名字，你当我喜欢吗？
Alright, laugh it up. That old Zandar came up with the name. You think I like it?
现在「星核」是这个小鬼了？
So this little twerp has the Stellaron now? Huh.
哼哼，真是神了，为了拘束这颗未启动的星核，让湛蓝星免于灾祸，我造了一整座太空站……
Hmm, truly amazing! I built a whole space station just to contain this unactivated Stellaron and keep The Blue from disaster...
有人却返璞归真，用这小鬼一具身体就搞定了——怎么做到的？
Yet someone was able to achieve that with this little twerp's body. How did they do it?
而且「星核」在{NICKNAME}体内还很稳定……
Moreover, the Stellaron is still very stable in {NICKNAME}'s body.
是啊，这小家伙的体质真奇怪……
You're right. This little one's body truly is strange...
哈，跟我比，你不就是小家伙？你才几岁啊？
Hah! Compared to me, you are. How old are you even?
人不可貌相啊，黑塔，你这具身体看着比{NICKNAME}小多了。
Don't judge a book by its cover, Herta. Case in point, that puppet body of yours is actually much smaller than {NICKNAME}.
我不一样…咦，这家伙该不会和你们那个三月七一个类型吧？那……
That's... beside the point. Hey is this one the same kind as that March 7th? If that were true...
行，{NICKNAME}，我知道了。不过我还是会叫你小鬼，我的大脑太宝贵了，没空存别人的名字。
Alright, {NICKNAME}. I got it. But I'm still gonna call you little twerp. The space in my brain is too valuable to store peoples' names.
Oh! Well, thanks for remembering my name then.
那不一样，你我有商业往来——你叫什么来着？
That's different. We have business with each other. Umm, what was your name again?
算了，说回这个体内能存星核的小家伙……
Forget it, let's focus on the one who can store a Stellaron in their body...
你们非得当面讨论我吗？
Must you two discuss this right in front of me?
你可以走开啊。我在和——你叫什么来着？姬子？——讨论科学。科学是客观存在的，没什么好避讳。
You can leave. I'm discussing science with what's her face... Himeko? Science exists in objectivity, there's nothing to be secretive about.
就你的处境而言，我觉得你在场听听是件好事。毕竟我有一大堆和你有关的计划，说到这里，姬子……
But as far as you're concerned, I think it would be better for you to listen in. After all, I have a lot of plans ahead involving you. Speaking of which, Himeko...
我能拿{M#他}{F#她}做点研究吗？
Can I bring {M#him}{F#her} in for some research?
这我可不能做主，你得问{NICKNAME}自己……
That's not up to me to decide. You can ask {NICKNAME} yourself...
这小鬼，脾气还挺大。放心，不会让你受一丁点伤害。凭我的本事，抽血都伤不着你的血管。
This little twerp really has a temper. Don't worry, I won't hurt a hair on your head. With my skills, even surgery would be painless!
你就不担心自己身体里藏着颗炸弹会怎么样吗？让我来帮你吧，也就是现在我对你还有点兴趣，等我失去热情了，你求我我都不研究你咯。
Aren't you worried about that bomb inside of you? Let me help you while I'm still interested. Once I'm not, I won't do any studies even if you beg me.
研究你啊——你身体里有颗星核，跟藏着颗炸弹也没区别了。谁知道它有什么危害？以后会不会突然爆发，坑你一把？
Study you of course. Your body contains a Stellaron, which, in some sense, is no different than storing a bomb. Who knows what might happen? Maybe it'll blow you to bits someday.
现在本天才愿意出手相助，你就谢恩吧！也就是现在我对你还有点兴趣，等我失去热情了，你求我我都不研究你咯。
You should be grateful that this genius is willing to help you out. I still have some interest now, but once that's gone, I'm not studying you even if you beg me.
这小鬼还挺有经济头脑，我蛮中意的。
This little twerp's pretty financially motivated. I like it.
Alright, give the poor child a break, Herta.
我现在感兴趣，什么都愿意迁就。身体里有颗星核哎，多有意思！谢恩吧！我出手帮你，这可是星际和平公司花钱都请不着的服务。

I'm very interested now, so there's almost nothing I won't accommodate. A Stellaron in your body, how interesting is that! Be grateful that I'm offering to help you out. This is a service even the IPC can't buy.
明白了吗，{NICKNAME}，黑塔想让你留在她的空间站呢。
You understand now, {NICKNAME}? Herta wants you to stay in her space station.
别，要严谨：只留一阵子——我做完研究，或者做到一半没兴趣了，这小鬼就得走人。
Well, I'm going to have to modify your wording here: This little twerp can only stay temporarily until the research is done. Or maybe I'll lose interest halfway through and they can just beat it.
{NICKNAME}…你知道你还有另一个选择，月台上停着一辆星穹列车。如果你愿意，可以跟我们一起走。
{NICKNAME}... You also have another option — the Astral Express. If you want, you can leave with us.
列车和「星核」没少打交道。你所担忧的，也是我们在寻求的答案。再者说……
The Express has its fair share of experiences with Stellarons. The thing you're worried about, and the answers we're looking for are one and the same. Besides...
我们随时可以回来让黑塔做研究呀，她现在兴趣满满呢。
We can come back any time to let Herta conduct her research. She's absolutely fascinated now.
这倒不错，还多少能保持点新鲜感。用不着这小鬼的时候，我也不用操这个心。
Hm, works for me, keeps this subject fresh, too. And that way I won't need to keep worrying about this little twerp all the time. Perfect!
Get on the Express, or stay behind...
我是建议你上列车啦。你留下对我有那么一点好处，但总得来说没什么帮助。
My advice would be to get on. You're not doing me that big of a favor by staying anyway.
你真是我见过最自私的人。
You really are the most self-centered person I've ever met.
那你真该见见天才俱乐部的其他几位，有的卖了你你还得说声谢谢。而我至少想什么就说什么。
You should meet the others of the Genius Society. Some of them will trick you into thanking them after they milk you dry. At least I have my honesty going for me.
Yes, give it some good thought.
走了记得常回来看看～提前预个约，找艾丝妲或者阿兰就行，我好把时间空下来研究你。
Just remember to come back often. Make an appointment in advance with Asta or Arlan so I can make time to study you.
别急，黑塔，艾丝妲也在主控舱段，让{NICKNAME}也和艾丝妲聊聊，好好考虑一下。
There's no need to rush into this, Herta. Asta's in the master control zone. Let's let {NICKNAME} have a talk with Asta first and decide for {M#himself}{F#herself}.
我在月台等你，{NICKNAME}。你还有事情想做，有人想见吧？不用着急。
{NICKNAME}, I'll be waiting for you on the platform. It's no hurry if you still have things to do or someone to see.
Come find me when you've made your decision.
Hmm, I'll have to take a good look.
还有疑惑？好啊，我对你有兴趣，愿意回答你的问题。
Still haven't made up your mind? Fine. Since I'm interested in you, I'll answer any questions you have.
You're the master of the space station?
我是法律上的主人，实质上这个地方我不管。我造好它，往里面放东西，塞人，然后让人自己管理。
On paper, yes. But I don't really care about this place. I built it, put some stuff in, left some people here, and let them just manage themselves.
空间站的站长是艾丝妲，严格来说她才是主人。我拒绝「拥有」这个概念，因为我不想负任何责任。
Asta's the lead researcher of the space station, so for all intents and purposes, she's the master. I reject the concept of ownership because I don't want the responsibilities that come with it.
You really are a terrible person.
无所谓，我在乎别人喜欢我吗？答案是不在乎。性格烂又怎么样，只要我有价值，就能心想事成。
It doesn't matter. Who cares if others don't like me? I know I don't care. As long as I have my own value, I can do whatever I want.
你的性格倒是挺好的，有什么价值吗？——别误会，我不是在嘲讽你。这是个疑问句，就是说，它可能真的有价值，只是我不知道。
While you may have good character, do you have any value? Don't take that the wrong way, I'm genuinely asking you. You might have some value, I just don't know about it.
What do you actually look like?
人类，女性，年轻，貌美，可爱。
和你现在看见的这具身体差不多，我按小时候的样子造的，也许不是很还原，但总有七八分相像吧。

Not much different from what you're seeing now. I modeled it after how I looked, back when I was a kid. It might not be identical, but I'd say maybe <unbreak>70</unbreak>, <unbreak>80</unbreak> percent there?
唉，那时候的我已经过分早熟了，就知道解孤波难题，忽略了宝贵的童真时代……
Oh, I was so precocious — all I cared about back then was solving the solitary wave problem, ignoring my precious childhood...
根据我的研究，它是一种生命体；一种具有特殊机制，连通某条命途或某个星神力量的特殊物质。
According to my research, it's a type of lifeform with a special property that tethers it to a certain Path or Aeon's power.
它会回应所在世界擢升文明的欲望，但实现愿望的形式总是某种灾祸。其机制很可能与「毁灭」的纳努克有关。

Wherever it's located, it responds to that world's desires to advance its civilization. But, this comes at the cost of some form of disaster. The mechanism behind it is likely related to Nanook the Destruction.
Do you know about the Stellaron Hunters?
噢，一群怪人。我得到一颗星核就满足了，他们在宇宙中搜刮了好几颗仍不满足，不知道他们的真实意图是什么。
Oh, that weird bunch. I'm satisfied with just one Stellaron, but they've scoured the universe, obtained several, and still aren't satisfied. I don't know what their true intentions are.
俱乐部的{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#76}螺丝咕姆{RUBY_E#}曾经和他们对过一局，听说有个成员的骇客水平非常高，能跟螺丝咕姆的差分机球打个平手。
