{RUBY_B#Genius Society #76}Screwllum{RUBY_E#} went up against the Stellaron Hunters before. I heard there was a member whose hacking skills were on par with Screwllum.
能媲美螺丝咕姆——那在宇宙里也是数一数二了！真厉害啊，我不行，在计算机领域不算很出色。
Being on the same level as Screwllum — who's probably the best in the universe — is nothing short of spectacular. It's beyond my abilities, computers are not my forte.
Why am I able to host the Stellaron?
不知道啊，我正摩拳擦掌，要解开这个谜呢。
Ha... That I don't know. Which is why I'm gearing up to solve this mystery.
外形？就是辆列车啊。内在嘛……
You mean how it looks? Like a train. Well...
有阵子我对列车很感兴趣，写了不少研究报告，忘记丢哪儿了，现在什么都不记得了。
I was very interested in the Express for a while, and wrote a lot of papers, but forgot where I left them. Now I can't remember anything about it.
Do you trust the Astral Express?
We've been business partners for a long time.
我经常委托他们在其他星球帮我弄点东西，他们也经常来找我解决点难题。
Every once in a while, I'll need them to get me things from other planets, and they often come to me to help them solve problems.
Can I return to the space station?
当然能呀，我还等着你呢——噢，你说的「回」是——噢，倒也不是不行。
Of course, I'll still be here waiting for you, eh... and the space station will be waiting for you. Returning... it's not impossible.
你愿意在这儿当个普通科员的话，可以问问艾丝妲，她同意我就没意见。
If you wanna be a researcher here, you can just ask Asta. If she's fine with it, I have no complaints.
不，等下——你身体有颗星核啊——你还是走吧，偶尔回来瞧瞧，久住还是太危险了。
No, hold on — you have a Stellaron within you. I think it's better if you left and came back occasionally. It might be dangerous if you stay for too long...
So I should board the Express?
从绝对理性的角度分析判断，星穹列车是你最好的去处。
Well, from an objective standpoint, that's the most rational place for you to be.
首先有地方住；其次有人保护；再其次路途遥远，救命的机会比较多；最后，就算星核真炸了也害不了太多人。

First of all, you have somewhere to live. And you'd be under their protection. Also, it'll be a long trip, so you'll have more opportunities to find a way to save yourself from the Stellaron. Lastly, if the Stellaron really explodes, you won't harm too many people around you.
Do I have any other choice?
这我怎么知道！看你咯，选择总是很多的，你也可以找个没人的地方打开舱门跳出去；或者钻进裂界，看看怪物会不会把你当神膜拜起来。
Oh, how should I know! It's up to you, you have so many options to choose from. Maybe jump out a hatch, or hop into the Fragmentum and see if any monsters start worshiping you?
可惜还没好好聊上几句，列车却要出发了，你还有什么想和我说的吗？
It's a pity that we haven't had the chance to talk much, and now the Express is about to leave. Do you have any questions?
Is the damage to the space station serious?
黑塔女士给了我代码——据说是她在来的路上写的，我刚刚试了下，防护罩的修复速度比之前快了三倍。
Madam Herta gave me a piece of code, which she apparently wrote on the way here. I just tried it out and the defense shield's regenerating three times faster than before.
托她的福，外面的反物质军团算不上什么威胁，空间站的修复重建工作也可以顺利启动，只是内部……
Thanks to her, the Antimatter Legion outside is not much of a threat anymore. The space station's repairs and reconstruction can also begin smoothly, but internally...
「星核」被取出的一瞬间，虽然只有一瞬间，还是侵蚀了空间站，形成一种被称作「裂界」的新空间。
When the Stellaron was extracted, even for that brief moment, it corroded the space station and formed a new space — what we now call the Fragmentum.
被侵蚀的部分不可逆转，因此空间站恐怕会一直处于半「裂界」化的状态……
The part that was corroded is irreversible, so the space station will always be in a state of quasi-Fragmentum.
What are the effects of the Fragmentum?
各个世界的「裂界」彼此相通，因此怪物会通过「裂界」来到空间站内。
All existing Fragmentums are connected, so there will be monsters that will enter the space station through its Fragmentum.
Will I also be corroded by the Fragmentum?
哎，我也想知道这个问题的答案。
Ahh, I'd like to know the answer to that as well.
各个世界的「裂界」彼此相通，因此怪物会通过「裂界」来到空间站内。但没东西从你身体里钻出来，所以……
All existing Fragmentums are connected, so monsters will be able to enter the space station through the Fragmentum here. But it shouldn't allow anything to exit your body, so...
我和阿兰聊过了，这事儿目前没有解决的好法子，只能增加安保人员，提高巡逻密度，保障科员的研究。
I talked with Arlan and there's no easy solution to this problem at the moment. We can only increase the security and patrol frequency to protect the ongoing research.
Can I stay at the space station?
我挺中意你的，但…你身体里有一颗「星核」。
I like you, but... you have a Stellaron in your body.
如果你只是在这随便走走逛逛，或者同意被封在实验舱里，那没什么问题。
If you were just wandering around, or if you agreed to be sealed away in an experiment pod, that would be fine.
但如果你要在空间站工作，长期居住，「星核」可能会让空间站的「裂界」化更加严重…作为站长，我不能冒这个险。
But if you're going to work in the space station long-term, the Stellaron may have some serious effects on the station's Fragmentum. As the lead researcher, that's a risk I cannot take.
我也能感受到你对空间站的热情啦，不过还是得狠心拒绝你。
I can sense your enthusiasm for the space station, but I'm afraid I have to turn you away.
Is there really no way I can help?
你想回来帮忙，我当然不会拒绝。丹恒帮我们重新清点了奇物，三月七说她会在力所能及的范围内帮忙，于是在电力室接了五十多根电线…哎，列车的人都这么好心……

If you wanted to come back and help, of course, I wouldn't refuse you. Dan Heng helped inventory our rare items, March 7th said that she would help out as much as she can and connected over <unbreak>50</unbreak> wires in the electrical room. Everyone from the Express is so obliging...
就「多管闲事」这一点，你也很有潜质啊，{NICKNAME}。
And I think you're pretty good at "meddling" too, {NICKNAME}.
我？谈论自己是最无意义的行为。
Me? Hmm, well, Talking about oneself is as pointless as it gets.
列车的事，你不问姬子，倒来问我？
The Express? Shouldn't you be asking Himeko instead?
Make sure you don't burn yourself out.
这阵忙完，一定得和黑塔女士申请好好休假！我已经想好了，要包个飞行器，把湛蓝星看个够。
After all this is over, I'm putting my vacation time in with Madam Herta. I've got it all planned. I'll hop on an airship and give The Blue a good look.
You can see it from the space station, you know?
就算景色一样，休假时看和工作时看，当然是两种心情啦。
Be that as it may, taking it in while on vacation and observing it during work are not the same thing.
Will Madam Herta let you take a vacation?
应该会吧？但我来空间站后好像还没申请过休假……
I guess so? I haven't taken leave once since I joined the space station...
如果有一段完整的假期，我可以慢慢收集观测数据和写完论文了。
And if I have an actual, full vacation, I can take my time to collect observational data and finish writing my paper.
湛蓝星的资料当然要多少有多少，但我还是想自己研究一下。虽然听着和工作内容差不多，但这真的是兴趣，没有任何指标——而且，我自费的嘛。

Of course, there's already a lot of published research on The Blue, but I want to study it myself. It might sound a lot like work, but it's really just a hobby — there are no deadlines or quotas to meet, and I don't get paid.
Stellarons, huh? Ask away, I'm listening.
Uh, what decision? You're gonna have to be more specific.
嗨，{NICKNAME}，我都听说了。你要和我们一起上列车，对吧？
Hey, {NICKNAME}! I heard the news. You're coming with us on the Express, right?
唉呀，你打心底就是这么想的——在我面前就别装了，我都看得出来。
Oh come on, you know that's what you want deep down inside. I can see it on your face.
Do you want me to come along?
那还用说么？这一路过来，咱俩很合得来，还是同龄人。光这两点，就够不容易了。
Do I even need to say it? I think we're becoming fast friends... isn't that enough?
不过你看起来还有什么烦恼，来，你说，我听着。
But you look like you've got something on your mind... come on, out with it!
…不过，回忆起在收容舱段的时候，我还在想这孩子晕过去一定是身体很虚弱啦，所以得好好照顾你，没想到你捡了根棒球棍就生龙活虎起来了。
Y'know, when you were passed out, all I thought was I had to look after you. And then you picked up the bat! Just incredible!
再一眨眼，你就把那大家伙给打进杨叔的黑洞里，还救了我…我还没向你好好道谢……
In the blink of an eye, you knocked that big fella into Mr. Yang's black hole and saved me... I still haven't thanked you properly yet...
唉，不会就要在这儿分开了吧……
Nah, we're not splitting up here...
How did you join the Express?
这问题我可有发言权啦，因为我一醒来，就在车上啦。
I'd like to know too, because I was already on the Express when I woke up.
我在宇宙中漂流，然后就被列车捞了上来，神奇吧？
I was just drifting out there in space and got picked up by the Express. Amazing, right?
Does that kind of thing happen often?
比如去沙漠里捉一种名为「沙鱼」的动物，或者是矫正重力场，把一座上下颠倒的城堡恢复原貌，以及为了避开在路间睡觉的驯鹿，差点被一个从天而降的方铅矿球砸中脑袋——

For example, going to the desert to catch something called a "sandfish," correcting a gravitational field to flip an upside-down castle, or almost getting my head cracked open by a galena ball falling from the sky while trying to avoid a sleeping reindeer on the road—
唔…现在想想，好像也挺惊险的哦…可能因为和大家在一起，所以有任何问题基本都不是什么问题啦。
Huh... looking back now, it all seems quite dangerous... But I had the crew there with me, so the problems didn't seem all that bad.
I'm thinking about if I should get on the Express...
Of course you should! Why wouldn't you?
咱们现在只有四个人，再加一个帕姆，一节车厢睡一个人都管够，你忍心看着车厢空空荡荡么？
There's only four of us now, plus Pom-Pom. Each of us can have our own carriage to sleep in! You wouldn't have the heart to leave your carriage unmanned, would you?
这个问题得你们自己解决。
That sounds more like a problem for you guys.
加入我们，{NICKNAME}，这个问题马上就能解决。
Join us, {NICKNAME}. Then it wouldn't be a problem anymore.
我不知道车厢是什么样的。
I don't know what the carriage is like.
那就来看呀，上车就知道了。
Then come aboard and take a look for yourself.
是你啊，{NICKNAME}…你似乎有话要说？
Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}... Do you have something on your mind?
You're really good at taking care of others.
You're always the first one to charge into battle.
是这样么？我是列车的护卫，本能罢了。
Is that so? Well, I am the train's guard. I suppose it's just instinct.
时刻注意观察，进而谨慎地选择有效事项进行思考而已，你也能做得到。
It's about being observant at all times and carefully making the best choice for the situation. You can do it too.
I think you're not bad yourself, {NICKNAME}.
I didn't think you approved of me.
如果指的是对你乘上星穹列车的看法…你想多了。
If you're referring to what I think about you joining the Astral Express... You're overthinking it.
我的态度很简单：无所谓。建议你也不用考虑我的想法，做你自己想要的选择。
My position is simple: It doesn't matter to me. I suggest you ignore my opinions and make your own choice.
你不像是喜欢旅行的人。
You don't seem like someone who likes to travel.
坐上列车并不完全等同于「旅行」或者「冒险」…星穹列车代表的是「开拓」，知道吗？
Being on the Express isn't exactly the same as "traveling" or "adventuring..." The Astral Express symbolizes "trailblazing" you understand?
「开拓」往往意味着「未知」，无论是未知的风险，还是未知的乐趣。
Trailblazing implies the unknown, be it unknown risks or unknown rewards.
在我看来，「未知」并不比「已知」可怖，「未知」…往往也表示尚能掌控与改变。
In my opinion, the unknown is no more terrifying than the known... In fact, the unknown signifies something we can control and change.
别把犹豫当作借口。犹豫的时间久了，你原本的想法也会随之消失。
Don't use hesitation as an excuse. If you hesitate for too long, your original way of thinking will eventually cease to exist.
丹恒微微颔首，他的视线转向别处。
Dan Heng gives a slight nod and shifts his gaze elsewhere.
So, have you thought things through?
I want to join the Express.
不用那么正式啊，你也帮我们打败了那个大家伙，要是咱们还要讲客套话，聊到天黑都说不完了。
There's no need to be so formal. You helped us defeat that big fella, anyway. Plus, If we keep speaking pleasantries, we'll waste a whole day.
你帮了我一个大忙：让空间站免于反物质军团的毒手。黑塔虽然不会自认欠我一份人情，但之后我有什么请求，她也不会拒绝我——

You've done me a huge favor by defending the space station from the Antimatter Legion. And know that while Herta may not admit it, she owes me one. And she will not refuse me if I ask for a favor in return...
从空间站里要一件奇物，大概也没问题吧……
And it's probably not too much to ask for a rare item from the space station, right?
要不现在就上车聊聊，我给你泡杯咖啡——独门手艺。
How about we continue talking on the Express? I'll make you a cup of coffee, my special blend.
What's the next stop for the Express?
一如既往，追随阿基维利的足迹。
As always, to follow in the footsteps of Akivili.
过去，我们已经停靠了好几个世界，将来，我们也会如此继续——银河里有数不清的下一站。
Sometimes, we stop on other worlds and we'll continue to do so. There are countless "next stops" in the galaxy.
星辰大海不仅是我的梦想，也是列车的心愿，我渴望探索新世界，而列车希望重回它过去的航路。
I love the vast reaches of space, and the Express does too. I want to seek out new worlds, and the Express wants to return to its former path.
因为你和其他人不一样。
「星核」是首要原因，但也不是唯一的原因。
While that might be the biggest reason, it's not the only one.
嗯，身体里有颗「星核」这件事，不是人人都能办到的。
Well, the fact that you have a Stellaron in your body is not something most people can boast about.
我觉得你需要一个机会，去发现自己与其他人相比有哪些不同之处。大家都告诉你你是多么的独特，你体内有颗「星核」……
I think you need a chance. A chance to discover just how different you really are from everyone else. Everybody keeps telling you about how special you are, and how you have a Stellaron inside you...
但你自己清楚地认识到这一点，和别人告诉你——不管这说法是来自我还是黑塔，不管这说法看上去有多么可信——这两者是完全不同的。
But that's already plain as day to you. And no matter who tells you — be it me, or Herta, or anybody — it's not the same thing as feeling it yourself.
你得经历得够多，才能知道你是否因「星核」获得了什么，又失去了什么，以及你自己到底是谁…学会如何掌控这颗「星核」，才能掌控自己的命运。

You have to experience enough to know if you've gained or lost anything because of the Stellaron, and to know who you really are... Learn to control the Stellaron and then you can control your destiny.
「星核」对你而言或许还是未知，但在你身体内这件事已是既定事实，你得牢牢地抓住这一点，才能走向更遥远的未来。
The Stellaron might still be an enigma, but the fact of the matter is — it's a part of you. And you have to embrace this before you can move forward into the future.
I don't have any more questions.
I still have something to talk to you about, Himeko.
I need some time to think...
这么惊险的情况毕竟是少数啦，我也差点吓坏了。
Crazy stuff like that? Not too often. It sure freaked me out.
不过我跟着列车碰到的事都很千奇百怪啦。
But every encounter I've had since coming aboard the Express has been strange to say the least.
Have you taken care of everything you need?
哈哈，早就打点完了。我已经来过这儿好多回了，对我来说，这本来只是一场普通的旅途而已。
Haha, I was ready ages ago. *sigh* I've been here so many times before, it should've been just an ordinary trip for me.
但现在，一切已经没那么普通了。
But everything's not so ordinary anymore, is it?
即使是重走已有的航路，仍旧会有新的收获，这就是「开拓」的意义吧。
Walking the same path over and over will never be the same, there will always be something new. That's the meaning of trailblazing.
Hm? Go ahead, speak your mind.
打得真不错，要是自己不昏倒就更帅啦。但多亏了你，末日兽一声不吭就没了，一点脾气都没有。
Not bad. It would've been even better if you didn't faint. But thanks to you, the Doomsday Beast was as tame as a kitten. It had no temper at all.
对呀，你是最大的功臣呢～
Yes, and you are the hero.
强如末日兽，也不过手下败…
Even the Doomsday Beast, is no match...
行了行了，刚夸你一句而已就喘上啦。不过嘛，你确实是最大的功臣没错。
Alright, alright. I just gave you a compliment, don't let it go to your head. However, you are indeed the hero this time.
Who am I, where am I...
呃，你是开玩笑还是认真的……
没事了就起来吧，姬子姐让你醒了就去找她。我还有别的事，就不陪你去啦。
Get up when you feel better. Himeko wants you to go find her. I have something to do, so I won't go with you, alright?
对了，交换下信标吧——要是迷路了什么的，随时发短信给我。
By the way, we should exchange beacons. If you get lost or something, feel free to text me.
你和三月七交换了手机号码。
You exchanged your cell phone number with March 7th.
你没事就好。军团的威胁已经解除，你可以放心了。
It's good that you've made it through in one piece. You can rest easy now that the threat from the Legion has been neutralized.
嗯，这次的入侵似乎只是零星不成气候的骚扰。末日兽倒下后，军团就撤退了。
Well, this invasion seems to be nothing more than a random provocation. As soon as the Doomsday Beast fell, the Legion retreated.
强如末日兽，也不过手下败…
Even the Doomsday Beast, is no match...
可以这么说，但劝你不要把这事挂在嘴上——引来不必要的关注可不好。
You're not wrong, but be careful about blurting things out loud — it could attract unwanted attention.
Who am I, where am I...
你是{NICKNAME}，这里是黑塔空间站。
Well, this is the Herta Space Station.
歇一会儿吧，不打扰你了。对了，把你的信标地址给我——有什么事，好联系上你。
I guess I'll leave you to rest up a bit for the time being. By the way, what's your beacon address? That way if anything happens, I can contact you.
你和丹恒交换了手机号码。
You and Dan Heng exchanged phone numbers.
方便的话去见一下姬子，她说有事找你。
Go see Himeko when you have the time. She said she had something to discuss with you.
Can I still return to the space station?
当然能呀，我还等着你呢——噢，你说的「回」是——噢，倒也不是不行。
Of course, I'll still be here waiting for you, eh... and the space station will be waiting for you. Returning... it's not impossible.
你愿意在这儿当个普通科员的话，可以问问艾丝妲，她同意我就没意见。
If you wanna be a researcher here, you can just ask Asta. If she's fine with it, I have no complaints.
不，等下——你身体有颗星核啊——你还是走吧，偶尔回来瞧瞧，久住还是太危险了。
No, hold on — you have a Stellaron within you. I think it's better if you left and came back occasionally. It might be dangerous if you stay for too long...
Can I stay at the space station?
不可以，你太危险了。虽然我不在乎，但总得替艾丝妲她们想想。
No. You're way too dangerous. I don't mind personally, but I don't want Asta and others to take the risk.
你也不想因为自己身体里埋了颗星核，祸害空间站那么多人吧？
You wouldn't want the Stellaron in you to hurt all the people in the space station either, right?
偶尔回来看看就好，空间站永远欢迎你——尽量别待太久。
Just come back once in a while. You will always be welcome at the space station — just don't stay for too long.
我真的很想留在空间站。
…你真的很怪哎。这个地方有什么好的？我都不怎么乐意待在这儿……
...You really are weird. What's so good about this place? Even I don't like staying here...
行吧。说实话，区区星核，真要封住，我也有得是办法——就是你可能不大自由而已。
Ugh. Fine. To be honest with you, I have plenty of ways to seal a mere Stellaron — You just might end up not having a lot of personal freedom.
既然你一心想留下来…好吧，我不反对。你找艾丝妲吧，她是站长，她说了算。
If you're so keen to stay... Fine. I'm okay with it. Go speak to Asta. She's the lead researcher. She's in charge.
Can I stay at the space station?
不是回答过了嘛！你问艾丝妲！她是站长，她说了算。
As I've said, talk to Asta! She's the lead researcher. She's in charge. Go, go, go.
既然她都表态了…我也没有反对的理由啦。不过我要提醒你，{NICKNAME}，如果黑塔女士要对你做什么的话……
In that case... I have nothing against it either. Mind you, if Madam Herta was to do something to you, {NICKNAME}...
她可是不太在乎你的想法喔。
She's not going to care a lot about what you think.
I've made up my mind. I'll stay.
黑塔和艾丝妲都同意了。
Herta and Asta both gave me the green light.
这样啊…那么，我也尊重你的选择。
Is that so... Well, I respect your choice.
要好好保重哦，{NICKNAME}，我们会经常回来看你的。
Take care, {NICKNAME}. We'll come back now and then to see you.
I need some more time to think...
经过慎重考虑，你决定谢绝姬子的邀请。汽笛嗡鸣，星穹列车即将启航，萍水相逢的友人们向你挥手致意。离别正如相遇一般突然而坚定。

After careful deliberation, you decide to decline Himeko's invitation. With a long whistle, the Astral Express prepares to go ahead on its journey. The friends you just made wave goodbye to you, and your farewell is as sudden and final as your meeting.
星穹列车离去后，空间站如火如荼地启动重建工作，而你与黑塔则开始了对星核的研究。但很快，黑塔就对你和星核都失去了兴趣。在艾丝妲的安排下，你成为空间站的一名科员。

After the departure of the Express, the station begins to eagerly rebuild. Meanwhile, Herta and you get busy while researching the Stellaron. However, it doesn't take long before Herta loses interest in you and the Stellaron, and Asta arranges for you to become a researcher at the space station.
在「黑塔」，你度过了平静的一生。星穹列车返回数次，就再也没有了消息。从来往空间站的旅行者口中，你听说了星穹列车与星核猎手那震动寰宇的结局。有时，你不禁思忖如果自己踏上那辆列车，他们的未来会否有所不同。

You spend a peaceful life on the space station. The Express visits a few times before disappearing for good. From the occasional visitors on the station, you hear stories about how the final end of the Express and the Stellaron Hunters shakes the universe to its very core. Sometimes you wonder whether their destiny would have changed, had you stepped onto that train.
不过，那已经与你无关了。
But those stories are no longer for you.

主演
 丹恒  饰  丹恒
？？？ 饰  三月七
 姬子  饰  姬子
 约阿希姆•诺基安维塔宁  饰  瓦尔特•杨

Starring
Dan Heng  as  DAN HENG
???  as  MARCH 7TH
Himeko  as  HIMEKO
Joachim Nokianvirtanen  as  WELT YANG
友情出演\n卡芙卡  银狼\n艾丝妲  阿兰
With cameo appearances by\nKafka  Silver Wolf\nAsta  Arlan
特别鸣谢\n黑塔\n反物质军团
Special thanks expressed to\nHerta\nthe Antimatter Legion
May this journey lead us starward.
看起来傻头傻脑的。没错，叫的就是你。
Hey, you over there looking dumbfounded. Yes, Pom-Pom's talking to you.
具体情况我已经从姬子那儿听说了。听好了新人，重要的事情我只说一遍。
Himeko told Pom-Pom about your situation. Now listen up, Pom-Pom will only say this once.
最近应该有不少人都会这么跟你说：「你是特殊的」。但这里是星穹列车，车上的乘客多少都沾点不能说的秘密。
Pom-Pom's sure there have been lots of people telling you how special you are lately, but this is the Astral Express, and everyone on here has their secrets.
既然选择了上车，就得遵守这里的规矩。特殊的并不只你一个，这点你可给我记好了。
Since you chose to board, you can abide by the rules. You're not the only special one here. You'd best remember that.
我是这儿的列车长帕姆，在车上遇到任何问题你都尽管来找我吧。
I'm Pom-Pom, the conductor. Just come find me if you have any trouble.
Oh, it's you. How do you feel?
那就好，看来你的体质真的很特别。
Great. Looks like your stamina is really quite special.
我本以为还要在空间站多盘桓些时日，看来你的体质的确有特殊之处。
I thought I'd have to stay in the space station a few more days, but there does seem something special about you.
...I'll check you out in a minute.
你的身体被星核猎手动过手脚，也许是留下了什么后遗症。
Your body has been tampered with by the Stellaron Hunters. Perhaps that left behind some aftereffects.
品位…啊，你说这辆列车？我是在问你的身体状况。
Tasteful... Oh, you mean the train? I was asking how you felt physically.
不过的确，从内饰来看，「开拓」的品位还挺不错的。
You are right, though. Looking at the interior decoration, you can tell that trailblazers have quite good taste.
总之，谢谢你救了小三月一回。
In any case, I have to thank you for saving March.
唔，其实也只是让你体内的东西暂时安静下来……
Heh, all I did was calm that thing inside you down temporarily...
不是想吓唬你，但说实话：只要它还在你体内，就谈不上获救。
...I don't want to frighten you, but the truth is you won't ever be in the clear while it is still inside your body.
I couldn't just stand by and watch.
你能这么想，这很好。拥有这样的想法并付诸行动的人，是真正意义上的英雄。
It's good that you think so. Someone with that mindset and the actions to back it up — that is the true meaning of the word "hero."
I didn't think too much about it...
不假思索地做出善举——这是英雄最重要的资质。
Helping others without a second thought — that is the most important quality of a hero.
但是，只要「星核」还在你身体里，就要小心行事。我和姬子没有把握每次都能恰好压制住它。
However, as long as the Stellaron is still in your body, you should be careful what you do. I don't know if Himeko and I can suppress it again.
沉闷的话题就聊到这里吧。空间站里发生的变故太多，想必你也累了。
But I won't bore you any longer. So much happened at the space station, you must be tired.
距离列车跃迁应该还有一些时间，随意走走熟悉一下环境吧。
There should be some time until the next warp jump, so feel free to walk around and familiarize yourself with the environment.
准备好前往下一个星球了吗？
Are you ready to move on to the next planet?
What's the next stop for the Express?
感觉如何？和你想象中的星穹列车有什么区别么？
What do you think? Does the Astral Express look the same as you imagined?
As I expected, it looks like a train.
每个来到列车的人，都是这里的乘客。
Everyone on the Express is a passenger.
大家向未知的终点奔赴，就像是在旅行一样。
We're all heading towards an unknown destination, like we are traveling together.
可能正是因为如此，「开拓」才选择了这样的外观吧？
Maybe that's why the Trailblaze chose such a look.
I feel like it's missing something...
小三月最开始也这么说过。
March said something like that at first, too.
看来年轻人的口味，就是要相似些。
Seems like you young people have similar tastes.
对了，三月和丹恒现在应该待在自己的房间里。
Oh right — March and Dan Heng should both be in their rooms right now.
你可以去找他们哦，年轻人融洽相处吧。
You can go look for them. You youngsters should get along well.
咳，这个，年轻人嘛，房间自然都比较有个性一点。
Ah, you know, young people! Their rooms always reflect their personality.
You can go and... have a look around?
这里是我们平时集会的所在，后面的车厢才是用来休息的私人空间。
We usually meet up here, but our personal cabins are in the next carriage.
对了，别看帕姆那副样子，列车很久没有新乘客了，它对你还是很感兴趣的。
Also, don't mind Pom-Pom's antics. They're actually pretty interested in you. It's just that we haven't had new passengers on the Express for a long while.
我就不越俎代庖啦。有什么想问的，尽管去麻烦它这个列车长好了。
I won't steal Pom-Pom's thunder. If you have any questions, just go ask our conductor.
这么快就来了？我就是客气客气帕…有什么事嘛？
Here already? I was just engaging in pleasantries. How can I help?
嗯？你这么关心她的房间干什么？
Oh? Why are you interested in her room?
啊，我听姬子说之前是你救了三月七乘客？
Ah, Pom-Pom remembers Himeko saying that you saved her...
唔呣，勇气可嘉，就是有点太鲁莽了。但这倒的确是有点开拓者该有的样子。
Mmm, very brave! Very foolhardy! But that is what a Trailblazer should be like.
三月七乘客的房间就在客车车厢。不过她总喜欢到处乱跑，不一定在就是了。
March 7th's room is in the Express Sleeper Compartment. She's always running around, so she might not be there.
丹恒乘客的房间？哦，你说的是资料室帕。
Dan Heng's room? Oh, you mean the archives.
他只是…单纯地赖在里边不走罢了，我也懒得管他。
He's just... sort of living in there, I guess. I can't be bothered getting him out.
三月七乘客的房间就在资料室的隔壁，你顺路倒是可以去看看他。
March 7th's room is right next to the Archives. You can visit him on the way.
姬子总喜欢在各种地方捡些奇奇怪怪的破烂玩意儿回来修理。
Himeko always likes to bring back weird junk and try to fix it.
那一件好像还被做了点改装。
That also got modified a bit.
「星际和平公司」的售货机在哪儿看见都没什么好奇怪的帕？
Shouldn't be a surprise to see the IPC's vending machine anywhere...
虽然不想承认，但他们的商品种类确实齐全。
Pom-Pom doesn't wanna admit it, but they really do have everything you may need on sale.
有这么个东西，或许能给旅途带来些许调剂。
This thing might add some nice flavor to the trip.
今天暂时就问到这里了。
That's all my questions for today.
列车跃迁还有些准备工作要做。我暂时抽不开身，你就自己到处走走吧。
Pom-Pom still needs to prepare for the Express' warp jump. You can look around the place yourself.
放心，在这个列车上，你的一举一动，都逃不过帕姆的眼睛。
No matter where you go on this train, Pom-Pom will always have my eyes on you.
姬子很喜欢听留声机，说能播放来自过去的旋律。
Himeko likes using the Phonograph a lot. She says it can play melodies from the past.
瓦尔特很喜欢收集这些黑不溜秋的圆盘，似乎是古董货。你要能带几张回来，他应该会很高兴的。
Welt likes collecting these jet-black discs. It seems like they could be antiques. He'd be very happy if you could bring a few back.
「星际和平公司」的售后部还是很周全的帕，自动售货机里的商品种类不仅丰富还会定期上新。
The Interastral Peace Corporation's after-sales service is very comprehensive. The vending machine has a wide range of products that are regularly refreshed.
超距传输很贵的，不过这台机子是从黑塔女士那儿弄来的，商品全都包邮帕。
Hyper-distant delivery costs an arm and a leg, but we got this machine from Madam Herta, all the products inside come free of shipping charges.
喂！你、你还真就一点问题都没有想问我的吗？！
Hey! Y—You don't have any questions to ask Pom-Pom!?
难道是嫌我啰嗦吗？还、还是说觉得和我这个年龄段的聊天已经有代沟了？！
Is it because you think Pom-Pom talks too much? Or is it Pom-Pom's age? You youngsters gotta learn to bridge that generation gap.
你怎么刚走就又回来了？！
You just left. Why are you back again!?
快去快去，我这儿忙着呢，可没那么多闲工夫陪你。
Go, go. I'm busy here and I don't have time for you.
（似乎能听到电子仪器的声音……）
(There seems to be the sound of electronic equipment...)
...Oh, it's you. The door's not locked. Come in.
被人破门而入的次数多了，自然就会感知气息了。
I learned to sense incoming visitors after people kept barging in so frequently.
随意，这里对列车上的所有人开放。
Feel free. This is open to everyone on the Express.
I came to visit your pad.
这不是我家，只是睡觉的地方。
This is not my pad, it's just where I sleep.
它是资料室，星穹列车从初次发车到现在，全部的行车记录都存在这个房间里。
These are the Archives. It has the records of all the Astral Express's trips since its first journey.
Are you sorting out the data?
除了整理已有数据，我也会保存本次旅行的档案。
Aside from the existing data, I also recorded this trip to the archives.
你自己去看吧，我不清楚你对「好玩」的定义。
Go look them up yourself. I don't know your definition of "fun."
看见自己的名字也别吃惊，我会保存本次旅行的档案。
If you see your own name, don't be surprised, I also recorded this trip to the archives.
虽然很多数据损坏了，但残存的零星片段也有难以消化的庞大信息量，我正在尝试整理。
A lot of the data is corrupted, but even the residual pieces contain huge amounts of information that we're struggling to process. I'm trying to sort them out.
即便阿基维利的旅途大多已不可考，至少作为列车现在的乘客，将我们的见闻记录下来是有其意义的。
While many of the roads that Akivili traveled along no longer exist, I think it's still meaningful to record our adventures as current passengers of the Express.
所以我把收集到的资料输入资料室的「智库」，并将列车所过之地的人文生态、地质特征等等逐一整理录入并与过去的数据比对印证。
I enter the collected data into the archives' data bank. I try to catalog the people and places the Express encounters, and compare and contrast them with the existing records.
看见那边的终端了么？它能连接智库调阅目前已知的情报，你可以试试。
Do you see the terminal over there? It can be used to view information already stored in the data bank. Do give it a go.
之后旅行中的见闻，我也会收录整合进去，你可以时常来看看。我们的终端设备上也有快捷入口。
I'll be entering any new information we encounter on future journeys, so drop by anytime to check it out. We also have a shortcut on the terminal device.
I didn't take you to be a scholar.
你对我的误解还挺深。算了，我知道是谁干的。
Seems like you have some deep misunderstandings about me. *sigh* Ah, well, I think I know who caused that.
没想到你电脑修得这么好。
I didn't know you could fix computers so well.
I have matters to attend to, feel free.
So, if you're headed next door...
...Is it time to warp jump? You go ahead.
整齐码放在书架上的纸质资料，如丹恒所言内容非常冗杂，甚至有许多手写稿件。
Paperback documents are placed tidily on the shelf. Like Dan Heng said, the content is very dense, and some of it is even handwritten.
其中有一些文字难以解读，图画也晦涩难懂，想要深入理解看来非一朝一夕能够解读……
Some of the words are barely legible, and illustrations faded beyond recognition. It would take many moons for one to decipher their contents.
被褥只有薄薄一层，但看上去柔软暖和。被包围在资料书刊之中，意外地有安全感。
There is only one thin quilt, but it looks very warm. Being surrounded by all the books and records provides a surprising sense of security.
（不过这么硬的床…真的可以好好休息吗？）
(But... can he really sleep on such a hard bed?)
硬床板对脊椎有好处，床铺太过柔软反而不好。
A hard bed is good for your spine. A bed that's too soft will end up hurting you.
（他怎么知道的…难道是眼神出卖了我？！）
(How did he know... Did my gaze betray me!?)
随意搭在椅子上的衣服，给这间资料室增添了些许生活的气息。
Clothes casually flung on the chair add a touch of life to this database room.
（不知道他是不是只有这一种款式的衣服……）
(I wonder if this is the only style of clothes he owns...)
你敲敲门，里边没什么反应。
（门没有锁，要不要进去看看呢……）
(The door is unlocked. Should I go in?)
（只是稍微看一看的话…应该没有问题吧？）
(Just one look should be fine, right?)
（还是等房间主人回来再说吧。）
(Better to wait till the room's owner comes back.)
（甚至连之前空间站的照片都有……）
(There are even pictures of the space station...)
做出不让自己后悔的选择…抵达未来……
Make a choice I won't regret... reach the future...
总感觉在很短的时间里，发生了很多的事。
(So much has happened in such a short time...)
来到这里…真的是正确的选择么？
Coming on board the Express... Was it really the right decision?
（喂——喂喂——）各位乘客请注意，各位乘客请注意。
Ahem, hi, hello~ Attention all passengers. Attention all passengers.
列车跃迁在即，请各位速至列车大厅集合。
The Express is about to conduct a warp jump. All passengers, please gather at the main hall.
重复一遍。列车跃迁在即，请各位速至列车大厅集合。
I repeat. The Express is about to conduct a warp jump. All passengers, please gather at the main hall.
门被锁住，但是门内隐约透出一缕奇特的咖啡清香。
The door is locked, but there's a peculiar scent of coffee coming out of the room.
门像是和这个空间固定在了一起，纹丝不动。
The door doesn't even move an inch, as if it is glued in space.
（不知道培育的是什么植物，下次问问看三月七好了。）
(I can't tell what plant this is. Maybe I'll ask March 7th next time.)
（这么大的玩偶放在床上，晚上睡觉真的不会觉得拥挤吗？）
(With such a huge doll on the bed, wouldn't it feel really cramped at night?)
（应该是列车旅程中的纪念品…吧？应该是这样的吧。）
(This looks like a souvenir from the journeys... right? Probably.)
你来啦！马上就要前往下一站了，是不是感觉很兴奋？
对哦，这还是你第一次的旅行，那…应该是双倍的兴奋？
Wait, this is your first trip! So that should be double the excitement, right?
我准备好了，我准备好了！
I'm ready, I'm ready to go!
嘿嘿，我第一次经历跃迁的时候，也很激动。但现在我可就稳重多啦！
Hehe, I was excited the first time I experienced a warp jump, too. But I'm used to it now.
放心，很快你就会习惯起来，变成和我一样成熟靠谱的乘客的。嗯。
Don't worry, you'll get used to it too, and before you know it you'll be a mature and dependable passenger just like me.
但对未来…还是稍微有点担心。
But... I'm still a little worried about what lies ahead.
哎哟，你怎么像杨叔一样，成天担心一些还没有发生的事情？
Ah! You're just like Mr. Yang, always worrying about things that haven't even happened yet.
年轻人就是要有活力嘛！来来来，和我一起做一下放松运动。
Young people should be energetic! Here, let's do some relaxation exercises.
第一步，捏住你的焦虑根源。
The first step is to grab a hold of the root cause of your anxiety.
那种东西根本捏不住吧！
You can't just grab something like that!
哎呀，是有点抽象，但是你用心理解一下就好啦。
Well, it is a little abstract, but basically you just need to pinpoint what's bothering you.
第二步，集中精神，把你的焦虑都集中到捏住的那个点上去。
The second step is to focus all your anxiety on that point.
这是什么意识的交互魔术？
Is this some sort of mumbo jumbo about transferring consciousness?
这可是很科学的！不要分心，集中注意力！
This is science! Don't get distracted! *deep breath* Focus.
Okay, I'm ready for step three.
看来你还挺有天赋，要悟到这一步可是很复杂的。
Seems like you're a natural. It's not easy to reach this level of enlightenment.
第三步，用力——把焦虑都拽出来，扔掉！
Now for step three: Yank out that anxiety and cast it away with all your might!
Come on, that's just using psychological suggestion!
心理暗示哪里不好！能消除担心和不安，就是好方法。
That doesn't mean it won't work! The best method for relieving anxiety is the one that works, right?
Okay, well I've cast out all the anxiety now.
真的假的？我自己一次都还没有成功过呢！
Really? I've never been able to do it successfully myself!
现在感觉怎么样？是不是轻松多了？
What does it feel like? Like all your worries have been swept away?
来得太慢了！不过这下人总算到齐了。
You took long enough! But at least everyone's here now.
他不会来啦，咱们不用管他。
He won't be here, so just leave him be.
列车长给乘客的一点点小小的福利，你就当作是对你未来成长的投资帕。
Just a little gift from the conductor to the passenger. Think of it as an investment in your future growth.
好了好了，赶紧找个地方坐下来，不要像三月七乘客一样在列车里乱跑。
Okay everyone, hurry up and find a place to sit down. Try not to be like March, always running around the Express like a headless chicken.
跃迁前最后的准备工作要开始了。
Pom-Pom's going to start the final preparations for the jump.
怎么了？一副欲言又止的样子。
What's wrong? You look like you were about to say something.
啊，我大概猜到你想要问的是什么了。那你的确是找对人了。
Oh, I think I know what you were going to ask. You've come to the right person.
你想了解这辆列车？我很高兴，它是我们很重要的同伴。
Ohh, you want to know more about the Express? I'm glad. After all, it's an important companion of ours.
About the history of the Express...
星穹列车是「开拓」阿基维利制造的工具，用于承载祂与无名客进行星际旅行。据传这样的载具不止一台，但列车里没有其它的纪录。

The Astral Express was a tool created by Akivili the Trailblaze, who used it to transport THEMSELF and the Nameless across the galaxy. It is rumored that there are other vehicles like it, but the Express has no such records.
我发现列车时，它的记忆体已经损坏，丢失了很多宝贵的资料。只知道：列车确实是阿基维利的造物；列车确实曾与阿基维利一同旅行。

When I found the Express, its memory had been severely damaged, with much of its valuable information lost. All I know is that the Express is an Aspect of Creation built by Akivili themself, and used to travel the cosmos.
至于它的制造过程，和停留的原因，都已不得而知了。
As for how it was built and how it was damaged, I do not have an answer.
About where the Express is headed...
列车正沿着「开拓」曾经的旅线行驶。部分站点的名称因记忆体的损坏而丢失了，但首站和末站的名字都是「裴迦纳」——阿基维利的故乡。
The Express is traveling on a route that the Trailblaze once embarked on. The names of some destinations have been lost, but the first and final stops were both at Pegana — Akivili's home world.
我们推测星穹列车是从裴迦纳出发，沿途停靠，并最终回到起点，再开启下一段旅程。但是由于星核的出现，每一站都发生了延误。

We speculate the Astral Express started its journey from Pegana, stopping at each destination along the way before returning there for its next journey. However, the appearance of the Stellarons has caused a delay at each stop.
About the Express' source of power...
银河里流传着一个说法：列车的核心是星神阿基维利的心脏，它提供了星穹列车穿越诸界的能力。但我在列车上没有找到对应的证据。

There is a legend in the galaxy: The heart of Akivili themself lies in the core of the Astral Express, providing it with the power to travel between worlds. But I found no evidence of that aboard the Express.
何况，「开拓」尚未陨落时列车就存在了，总不能有两颗心脏对吧？但，这辆列车很可能拥有某种机制，使它可以从开拓命途搬运力量。

Besides, the Express existed before the Trailblaze fell. There's no way they could have had two hearts, right? However, it is likely that the Express possesses some sort of mechanism to transfer power from the Trailblaze.
普通的命途行者可做不到这一点。
It wouldn't be possible with a normal Pathstrider.
陨落的星神，逝去的「开拓」——祂的离开是一个谜，但在所有已知的星神里，阿基维利是最接近人类的一位。
The fallen Aeon, deceased Trailblaze — THEIR passing is still a mystery, but of all the known Aeons, Akivili was the closest to mankind.
在列车智库的纪录里，祂和凡人一同行走，一同冒险，一同战斗，一同欢庆。作为被「原动力」束缚的神明，阿基维利拥有几近凡人的自由。

In the databank aboard the Express, it is recorded that THEY walked among the mortals — adventuring, fighting, and celebrating with THEM. Although THEY were an Aeon restrained by the "Primum Mobile," Akivili enjoyed a freedom similar to us mortals.
祂是如此与众不同……祂的陨落也突如其来，传说某位星神杀死了祂，可是我不相信。
THEY were different from most... But THEIR passing came so suddenly that it was thought THEY were killed by another Aeon. I don't believe that to be the case.
银河是很广大的啊。你突然这么问我，我也不知从何说起……
The galaxy is endlessly vast. I wouldn't know where to begin, especially if you ask me that so suddenly...
即使去过了那么多星球，我对银河还是所知甚少，因为它太广袤啦。关于银河的实质众说纷纭，倒是有几个假说可以和你分享。
I've been to many different worlds, yet I still know very little about the galaxy, simply because it's too vast. As for its nature, there are a few theories that I can share with you.
拥趸最多的是「宇宙之树」说。提出者是「智识」的令使：天才俱乐部第一位会员赞达尔。他认为银河是一棵虚数巨木，被阻隔的星系则是一片片树叶。

The most popular is probably the Cosmos Tree theory, proposed by Zandar, Emanator of Erudition and the first member of the Genius Society. He compared the galaxy to an enormous imaginary tree, with its leaves being individual universes.
因此，只有直接从虚数中获取能量的星神以及被星神赐福的令使能够穿过被虚数能量填充的空域，进行星际旅行。也因此，每个诞生文明的星球才如此相似。

Therefore, only Aeons, who draw their energy from the imaginary, and Emanators, who are blessed by Aeons, can travel through the spaces filled with imaginary energy. That's why planets where civilizations exist are so similar.
但这个假说也存在很多问题。俱乐部#56会员以利亚萨拉斯发明了超距遥感，证伪了虚数的唯一性，一下子动摇了宇宙之树说的根基。

However, the theory has its flaws. Elias Salas, the <unbreak>56</unbreak>th member of the Genius Society, invented remote detection, disproving that the imaginary is unique. This shook the foundation of the "Cosmos Tree" theory.
除此之外还有很多假说：「伸缩」论，「热炬」论，「平行成像」论……等等。「谜语人」派系宣称银河只是一场梦境，据我所知，Ⅸ的崇拜者很喜欢这个说法。

There are other theories as well: The "Stretching" theory, the "Heat Torch" theory, and the "Parallel Imaging" theory... The Riddlers claim the galaxy is just a dream and IX's followers seem to like that claim.
星神是银河里最神秘的存在。我们只知道祂是从智慧生物升格而成，但条件是什么，原理是什么，就连俱乐部的天才们也一无所知。

Aeons are the most mysterious beings in the galaxy. All we know is that THEY ascended from the form of intelligent beings. As for the how and why, even the geniuses over at the Genius Society haven't the slightest clue.
当一个生物跃升成为星神后，祂就会拥有「命途」的执掌权；祂可以任意搬运该命途中的虚数能量，同时也被「原动力」所束缚。
Upon ascending to Aeon-hood, that being gains power over the Paths, free to choose the allocation of imaginary energy however THEY wish, while suffering the restrictions of the "Primum Mobile."
「毁灭」的星神只有湮灭宇宙的念头，「智识」的星神一心求解万物的答案；「存护」的星神无休止地铸造着墙壁，「神秘」的星神致力于让确凿无疑的信息变得混沌不清……

The Aeon of Destruction seeks only to destroy the universe, while the Aeon of Erudition wants to find the answer for all that exists. Meanwhile, the Aeon of Preservation continues to forge walls, and the Aeon of Enigmata devotes themself to obscuring all that is known...
星神身上的谜团实在太多了，据说黑塔女士拉上了几位会员，正想办法攻克祂们的未解之谜。
A cloud of mystery shrouds the Aeons. I heard Madam Herta recruited a team to try and solve the mysteries about THEM.
相较于星神，派系就要好懂很多了：一群凡人为了共同的目的聚集在一起，践行自身对「星神」和「命途」的理解，即是派系。
Compared to the Aeons, the factions are much easier to understand. Mortals with the same objective gather together to practice their understanding of Aeons and the Paths.
星神大多遥不可及，派系却和我们密切相关；阿基维利开拓银河之后，人们开始意识到不同世界的存在，于是越来越多的人们试图利用星神之力进行星际旅行。

Many Aeons are unreachable, but the factions are close to us. After Akivili trailblazed across the galaxy, people became aware of the existence of other worlds. Gradually, more people started trying to use the power of the Aeons to travel between worlds.
比如「星际和平公司」：他们崇拜「存护」克里珀，却阴差阳错成了银河最大的经济体；
The Interastral Peace Corporation is a good example: They worship Qlipoth, the Aeon of Preservation, but somehow became the largest economic entity in the galaxy;
又比如「天才俱乐部」：他们在「智识」的护佑下致力于科研，但其中也不乏黑塔女士那样的怪人。
Another example is the Genius Society: There is no shortage of eccentrics like Madam Herta who dedicate themselves to scientific research under the protection of the Erudition.
这些派系拥有和我们一样的星际跃迁能力。想要在银河中顺利旅行，很难不与他们打交道。
These factions possess the same power as us to voyage between worlds. It would be hard to travel through the galaxy without them.
每位星神的诞生都意味着一道「命途」的开启；命途的本质仍是个谜，我们只好用凡人能理解的方式进行类比：就是某种哲学「概念」。
The birth of an Aeon gives rise to a Path. The nature of the Paths remains a mystery, leaving us to draw an analogy in a way that mortals can understand: It's a philosophical concept of sorts.
当一个人的意志与命途发生重叠时，就可视为其行走在命途之上；如果他的意念足够强大，便可从命途中汲取少许力量。这样的人被称作「命途行者」。

A person is considered to be on a Path when their will overlaps with that Path. If the person has a strong enough will, they can draw power from that Path. Those who can do so are called Pathstriders.
命途行者的力量超越凡人，但仍很弱小；比起完全执掌命途的星神，就像在汪洋大海中的一滴水一样。偶尔，星神会将命途的力量直接赐给凡人，让他们成为「令使」。

Pathstriders possess extraordinary power, but are still insignificant compared to the Aeons, like a drop of water in a vast ocean. Sometimes, Aeons will bestow a mortal with their power, making them an "Emanator" of that Aeon.
顺带一提，命途一旦开启，就无法关闭。即使执掌的星神陨落了，命途仍然开放。这就是我们在阿基维利陨落后仍能穿越星际的原因。
I should mention that once a Path is open, it cannot be closed, even with the fall of its Aeon. That is how we are still able to travel across the stars, despite Akivili's passing.
「开拓」是我们的使命，也是列车在银河间往来的力量之来源。
"Trailblaze" is our mission and the source of strength that powers the Express to travel across the galaxy.
「探索」未知的世界，不断拓宽前方的旅道。
Explore the unknown world to continue our journey ahead.
「了解」当地的人文生态，融入其中。
Understand the local culture and immerse ourselves within it.
「建立」与新世界之间的联系，为其喜乐，共其忧虑。
Establish a connection with the new world — rejoice with it and share in its fears.
「连结」世界与世界，踏出永不断绝的道路。
Connect worlds together, carving an endless path.
I don't have any more questions.
你第一次经历跃迁，会感到不安也是难免的。
This is your first time experiencing the warp jump, so a little discomfort is unavoidable.
实在紧张的话，我可以陪你聊聊。
If you're really anxious about it, I can stay here and have a chat with you.
列车组的大家吗？好啊，你想问谁？
About everyone on the Express? Who would you like to know about?
哈哈，她是这辆列车的主人——虽说我们管帕姆叫列车长，但大家都知道，姬子才是星穹列车的所有者。
Haha, she's the owner of the Express. We joke around calling Pom-Pom the conductor, but everyone knows Himeko is the boss.
一切的故事都从她遇见星穹列车开始，从那以后，他们几乎没有分开过。
It all started with her encounter with the Astral Express, and they haven't been apart since then.
她是那种…极具热情的人；她的热情就像一颗剧烈燃烧的太阳。多数时候，她很神秘；但偶尔，你会觉得她在燃烧自己，朝着梦想飞驰而去。
She's... extremely passionate, like a burning sun. However, she remains mysterious most of the time. Once in a while, you feel that she's burning herself out trying to accomplish her dream.
只有像她那样的人才配得上星穹列车——我是这么想的——姬子一定有个非常重要的梦想，构成了她整个人生的愿景。
Only someone like her is worthy of the Astral Express. I think Himeko's vision of her whole life revolves around... a very important dream.
说实话，我不记得帕姆什么时候出现了…好像在我来到列车之前？不，好像之后才出现的…奇怪。
To be honest, I don't know when Pom-Pom appeared... I think it was before I came to the Express? No wait, maybe it was after...
帕姆就像星穹列车上的小精灵。不管什么时候，只要列车上的人需要帮助，它都会立刻出现。但可不要因此而小觑它。
Pom-Pom is like the spirit of the Astral Express. Whenever anyone on the Express needs help, they will appear immediately. It would be ill-advised to underestimate them.
帕姆生气的模样可是非常可怕的…对，非常可怕……
Pom-Pom is terrifying when they get angry... Yes, terrifying...
丹恒是个孤独的孩子。他看着冷冰冰的，但内心不坏，可能是长期的逃亡生活把他塑造成现在这个模样，有时他会让我想起自己年轻的时候……

Dan Heng is a lonely child. He may appear distant and cold, but his heart is kind. Perhaps, he's the way he is today because he spent so much time on the run. Sometimes, he reminds me of myself when I was young...
我们不知道他在逃避什么。有一次他跟我说：他也不知道，只是有什么在追逐他，让他不得不逃亡；他曾经待过仙舟，有阵子为公司工作。
We don't know what he's running from. He once told me that he didn't know either. All he knew was that something was chasing him and that he had to run away — first from the Xianzhou, then the IPC.
但是直觉警告他，要他快走，于是他搭上「悲悼伶人」的船，逃离了公司，几经辗转来到列车。这是他待得最久的地方。
So he boarded the ship of a troupe called the "Mourning Actors" and escaped the IPC. After a while he made his way to the Express, and he's stayed here longer than anywhere else.
不管是谁想要伤害丹恒，我们是不会答应的。丹恒是列车组的一员，敢招惹星穹列车的人，就要准备好承受我和姬子的怒火。
Don't worry, no matter who or what wants to hurt Dan Heng, we won't let them. Those who dare attack members of the Astral Express should be prepared to suffer the wrath of me and Himeko.
小三月的事情你听姬子说过了吗？她被封在一块宇宙浮冰里，我们无意中发现，才把她救了出来。
Did Himeko tell you about March 7th? She was trapped in ice, floating through space. We happened upon her and rescued her.
那是一种非常特殊的冰块，叫做「六相冰」，是遵循虚数法则的造物，不会因外界干扰而转变形态。
It was a unique type of ice known as Six-Phased Ice — a substance that adheres to Imaginary Law, meaning that external forces cannot change its form.
把她封进六相冰里的人…不论是谁…要么是为了保护小三月，要么就是为了放逐她。我觉得，那块冰在宇宙中漂流的时间应该很久了。
Whoever sealed her inside the Six-Phased Ice... No matter who it is... did so either to protect or banish her. I believe she had been floating through space for some time.
虽然无法追溯到这个现象最初诞生的时候，但是当它被人类所观测——或者说是对现实世界造成影响的时候，它已经无法挽回。
It's impossible to trace the origin of this phenomenon. When it's observed by humans — or I should say once it begins to affect the physical world — it's already too late to reverse.
就像是原本风平浪静的海面之上，突然刮起了可怕的风暴那样，这个现象的出现使原本通畅的星际旅途变得危机四伏。
It's like a sudden storm that appears on a calm ocean. This phenomenon causes the smooth journey through the expanse to be filled with dangers.
而这种畸变侵蚀现象传播的形式，则是「星核」。
The mechanism whereby this mutation and corrosion spreads is the Stellarons.
它就像是癌细胞一样疯狂扩散，所以星际和平公司也称之为「万界之癌」。
It promulgated rapidly like cancer cells, so the Interastral Peace Corporation named it the Cancer of All Worlds.
它们是「毁灭」的星神纳努克所统领的军团。
They are an army ruled by the Aeon of Destruction, Nanook.
作为纳努克的信徒，它们执行着「毁灭」的意志，站在生命与文明的对立面，传播混乱与灾厄。
As Nanook's followers, they stand against all life and civilization and execute the will of Destruction, disseminating chaos and calamity.
它们的行为无法用「为什么」来解释，因为执行「毁灭」的信念，就是它们唯一的动机。
Their actions cannot be explained by reason, because their only motivation and purpose is to destroy.
The Fragmentums are a phenomenon of corrosion.
目前有一种较为主流的观点认为，是「星核」催生了「裂界」。
The mainstream school of thought is that Stellarons catalyzed the appearance of Fragmentums.
接触到「裂界」的事物与时空，都会遭到转变，从而成为特殊的「裂界造物」。
All matter and space that comes into contact with the Fragmentum will be turned into Fragmentum creations.
不过你也不用太有负担，至少「星核」目前在你体内的状态是十分稳定的，不会对外部造成畸变。
However, you don't have to feel too burdened. At the very least, the current state of the Stellaron in your body is very stable and will not cause distortion to the outside.
I don't have any other questions.
这是一面羞涩的穿衣镜，任你怎么摆弄，它都不为所动。
This is a shy, full-length mirror. No matter how much you fiddle with it, it won't move.
这面镜子照不出你的模样，也许它有认主的恶习。
This mirror doesn't reflect your appearance. Maybe it only wants to show March 7th's.
这是一面使用雾玻璃的穿衣镜，它可能别有玄机。
This is a full-length mirror with frosted glass. It may have some kind of hidden meaning.
你不是很理解三月七买这面镜子的目的。
You don't quite understand why exactly March 7th has bought this mirror.
这面墙上的照片交替闪烁，满满都是你们冒险的回忆。
The photos on this wall flash and blink, filled with memories of your adventures.
盯着它看了一会儿，你发现这面墙上不仅有「你们」冒险的回忆。
After staring at it for a while, you realize that the memories on this wall aren't just "your" adventures.
有点诡异，伙计，有些角度的照片是怎么拍出来的？
This is kinda creepy, man. How did you manage to shoot some of these angles?
你很确定墙上某些照片的拍摄现场没有照相机。
You're pretty sure some of the pictures on this wall have been captured without a camera.
真是一面神秘的照片墙啊。
温馨的休憩区，与隔壁丹恒的地铺形成了鲜明且残酷的对比。
This cozy rest area is in stark contrast to Dan Heng's sparse floor bed next door.
放着软软坐垫的绒毯，摸上去很舒适，坐上去也一样，睡上去不好说。
This velvet blanket is soft to the touch and feels comfortable. Sitting on it feels just as comfortable; not sure about sleeping on it, though.
兔子形状的躺椅上放着小熊，这画面就像它的主人一样三心二意。
There's a bunny-shaped lounge chair with a teddy bear sitting in it. A fitting metaphor for their conflicted owner.
列车长帕姆的玩偶，光着身子。
A doll in the form of Conductor Pom-Pom. It doesn't have any clothes.
列车长帕姆的玩偶，有点掉色。
A doll in the form of Conductor Pom-Pom. Its colors are a bit faded.
列车长帕姆的玩偶，看着它，你觉得很不好意思。
A doll in the form of Conductor Pom-Pom. Looking at it makes you feel embarrassed.
列车长帕姆的玩偶，不知道从哪里弄来的。
A doll in the form of Conductor Pom-Pom. You have no idea where they've found it.
列车长帕姆的玩偶，它不穿衣服原来长这个样子。
A doll in the form of Conductor Pom-Pom. So that's what they look like without clothes.
三月七的床，不是很整洁。
March 7th's bed. It's not very tidy.
三月七的床，放着兔子和熊的抱枕。
March 7th's bed. There's a rabbit pillow and a bear pillow.
三月七的床，几张照片随便地躺在被子上边。
March 7th's bed. Several photos are casually strewn on the duvet.
三月七的床，一半叠得很整齐，另一半没有。
March 7th's bed. Half of it is neatly made, and the other half, not.
三月七的床，直觉上应该比丹恒的地铺舒服。
March 7th's bed. Intuition tells you that should be comfier than Dan Heng's.
三月七的桌子，摆着各种各样的小玩意儿。
March 7th's desk. All kinds of gizmos are strewn about it.
桌子上的一体机预安装了星际和平网络的「爱多」操作系统，是正版。
The computer station on the table comes pre-installed with the IPC's "Eidor" operating system. It's a genuine copy.
桌子上的一体机预安装了星际和平网络的「爱多」操作系统，这份操作系统的价格可能超过了一体机本身。
The computer station on the table comes preinstalled with the IPC's "Eidor" operating system. This OS might just cost more than the whole computer system.
三月七的桌子，比她的床看上去要整洁。
March 7th's desk looks neater than her bed does.
三月七的桌子，没有找到像日记的东西。
March 7th's desk. You fail to see anything that resembles a diary.
How did you get here so soon?
我就没动过。你看见的这具身体是我做的远程遥控人偶，空间站里多得是。哪里需要我就转接哪里。
I haven't moved. What you're seeing is one of my remote-controlled puppets. They're all over the station. I just connect to one wherever I am needed.
Sorry if I kept you waiting.
谁有空等你？我一直在忙活。这具身体是我做的远程遥控人偶，空间站里多得是。哪里需要我就转接哪里。
Who's waiting for you? I've been busy. What you're seeing is one of my remote-controlled puppets. They're all over the station. I just connect to one wherever I am needed.
不绕圈子了，{NICKNAME}——我和几个同事正在搞个大项目，如果成功了，就能一举攻克困扰我们几千琥珀纪的终极难题：「星神」的奥秘。

Enough chit-chat, {NICKNAME} — I am working on a big project with a few colleagues. If we succeed, it will answer the ultimate question that's been puzzling us for thousands of Amber Eras: The truth about Aeons.
「星神」——想想看，多么神奇的存在！有些星神曾经和你我一样，都是普通人类，但不知怎的，祂们就得到超越我们想象的力量！祂们诡秘、强大、沉默、可怕！关于祂们的谜团，三言两语根本说不清楚。

Aeons... think about it. What mystical existences! Some Aeons used to be ordinary humans like you and me, but somehow THEY managed to obtain power beyond our imagination! THEY are mysterious, powerful, silent and terrifying! It's hard to explain all the mysteries surrounding THEM.
祂们是怎么诞生的？祂们为什么会诞生？祂们诞生是为了什么？…我问你{NICKNAME}，你有想过这些问题吗？
How were THEY created? Why were THEY created? What were THEY created for? {NICKNAME}, have you ever thought about these questions?
妙哉，求知就是科学的基础。而现在，我们不仅仅「想」，更要「行动」。我想给你个机会参与这个项目，我们一起行动。
Great. Curiosity is the foundation of science. Now, we can't just think about it. We should also act. I want to give you the chance to participate in this project. Let's work together.
What's this got to do with me?
唔，确实不关你的事，但我们需要你。给我点耐心，{NICKNAME}！我会给你好处的。
Well indeed, it's got nothing to do with you, but we need you. Give me some time, {NICKNAME}, I'll make this worthwhile for you too.
什么四十二，你到底有没有听我说话——我们想弄清楚「星神」的奥秘！现在想让你参与这个项目！
<unbreak>42</unbreak> what? Are you even listening to me? We want to solve the mystery behind the Aeons! Right now I want you to participate in this project!
俱乐部的四位天才联手编写了一个程序，看见办公室里那台大机器了没有？机器有一个宇宙：它就像我们身处的世界一样，只不过更精简，更定制化……

The four geniuses of the society wrote a program together. You see the big machine in the office? That machine contains a universe, just like the universe we live in, but it's more streamlined and customized.
Seriously? Don't ride that hype train.
是吗？合伙人们也这么说，其实我还挺中意的…不过我黑塔从善如流，那就叫它「模拟宇宙」吧。
Oh really? That's what my partners said as well. Fine, I am a team player. Then let's call it the "Simulated Universe."
现在去体验一次吧，我会在「模拟宇宙」里指导你，保证你不会有任何损失！我还会付给你一大笔酬劳～
Now go and experience it for yourself. I will guide you in the Simulated Universe to make sure nothing happens to you! I'll even give you a substantial reward.
怎么了？我只回答「模拟宇宙」相关的问题喔。
What's up? I'll only answer questions about the Simulated Universe.
它要怎么解开「星神」的奥秘？
How is it going to answer the mystery of the Aeons?
哦，说来简单，就是模拟星神并向祂们发问。
Oh, in layman's terms, it will simulate the Aeons THEMSELVES. Then we can ask THEM questions.
俱乐部动用了大量资源和关系来做这件事情…我们现在模拟出的虚假星神与本质具有联系，因此你可以理解为我们创造出了不具有力量的迷你神明。

The society has pulled a lot of strings and diverted a lot of resources to make this project happen... The false Aeons we have simulated are connected with real ones, so you can say we have basically created a bunch of powerless mini Aeons.
当然，往深了说，没那么简单…这个项目现在也遇到了很多问题，并不顺利……
Of course, if you want to get to the nitty-gritty, it's not that simple... This project has encountered plenty of hiccups along the way. It wasn't all smooth sailing.
You said there are other partners?
嗯，四位俱乐部会员联合发起了这个项目。有阮•梅：创生领域的大师，模拟星神的原体就是她培育的；大名鼎鼎的机械贵族螺丝咕姆，他负责编写程序的底层逻辑并演算银河……

Well, the project was jointly launched by four members of our society. There's Ruan Mei, a master in the field of creation. She cultivated the protoplasm simulating the Aeons. There's Screwllum, the famous mechanical aristocrat, who is responsible for writing the underlying logic of the program and the algorithm for the galaxy.
有我黑塔，负责提供场地、人手、资源并添加一些有趣的系统；还有斯蒂芬——噢，他想保密，所以你把他忘了吧。

There's me, Herta, who is responsible for providing the venue, personnel, resources, and adding some interesting systems to the project. There's also Stephen— oh, um, he wants to keep it a secret, so... forget about him.
唔，因为你比较特殊…你身体里有颗星核，走在「开拓」命途的同时还被纳努克瞥了一眼。因此你可能更容易被星神承认一些。
Well, because you're special... You have a Stellaron in your body. You're living the life of a trailblazer, and even Nanook took a glance at you. So the Aeons may be more willing to accept you.
要知道，星神毫无自由意志，除了命途之外别无所想。因此我们提问的时候，祂们根本不予理睬…即使螺丝咕姆给每个星神都做了份虚拟人格，还把社交倾向拉满了也没用。

You know, the Aeons have no concept of free will at all. THEY think about nothing but the destined Path. So, when we asked THEM questions, THEY simply ignored us, even when Screwllum gave THEM each a simulated personality and maxed out THEIR social tendency stat.
所以我们打算另辟蹊径…就找到了你。
So we decided a different approach... with you.
按螺丝咕姆的设计，模拟的是整个「宇宙」。不过现在这台终端机只开放部分场景，这就够用了。螺丝咕姆经常设计些大而无当的东西，那家伙有一整颗星球，所以毫无顾虑……

It is a simulation of the entire universe according to Screwllum's design. But right now, only limited locations are open for access in this terminal. It's enough for us. Screwllum likes to design big useless things. He has a whole planet to himself, so he doesn't care about spatial limitations...
Why is combat a part of the design?
因为战斗是最能展示命途倾向的行为。只有通过与命途的连接，才能把我们设计好的虚拟「星神」召唤出来。这些家伙虽然没什么本事，麻烦程度上却一点不比本尊逊色……

Because combat is the best way to connect with one's Path. Only then can we summon those simulated Aeons. Those guys don't have any special talents, but they are as much a real pain in the butt as the actual gods...
当然！为了你的安全，我要确保你见到的景色是熟悉可控的。我可不想你被一台虚拟设备弄到发疯！
Of course! For your safety, I want to ensure that everything you see is manageable. I don't want you to lose your mind in the simulation!
我就知道你要问这个，说吧。
I knew you'd ask about this. Go on.
测试「模拟宇宙」有什么好处？
What do I get for testing the Simulated Universe?
从虚拟「星神」那儿弄到的所有情报都是你的——这还不够吗？你知道有人为了被星神瞥一眼都出卖过什么？而你甚至能和祂们面对面说话！
You can keep all the information you get from the simulated Aeons. Isn't that enough? Some people would sell their firstborn just to see an Aeon! And you will get to speak with THEM face to face!
你说的酬劳应该是真金白银吧？
I thought you were talking about a financial reward?
呃，这个嘛……我的信用点多到花不完，你真的想要也行，但说实话，那玩意不过是公司随手打的一串数字而已。
Oh, well... If you want, I am sure I can arrange something. I have more credits than I know what to do with. But honestly, it's just a bunch of numbers the IPC typed up.
我想给你点更务实的东西，能够对你有帮助，你确实用得上的东西。所以形式上可能和你想象的不一样……
I want to give you something more practical and realistic, something that can really help you. So, it may be different from how you imagined...
别忘了测试我的「模拟宇宙」！
Don't forget to test my Simulated Universe!
...Hey, it feels like it got a bit warmer!
…因为你们身处贝洛伯格，人类最后的堡垒。
...That's because you're in Belobog, the last bastion of humanity.
七百年前，来自天外的{RUBY_B#反物质军团}怪物{RUBY_E#}点燃了星球。彼时的大地成了焦土，到处是燃烧的熔火和沸腾的乌烟。

Seven hundred years ago, {RUBY_B#Antimatter Legion}monsters{RUBY_E#} from beyond the sky set the world ablaze. The land was turned to scorched earth, with raging infernos and billowing towers of smoke stretching beyond the horizon.
生死存亡之际，寒潮忽然降临——席卷的狂风毫无预兆，入侵的军团被暴雪掩埋，留存的唯有贝洛伯格——
In the midst of the conflict, the Eternal Freeze descended without warning. Suddenly, sweeping winds brought blizzards which buried the invading Legion. Belobog was all that remained.
坚定的「筑城者」们建立了这座城市。在「{RUBY_B#星神}存护{RUBY_E#}」克里珀的护佑下，贝洛伯格虽受风雪侵凌，却永远温暖。
The steadfast Architects built this city. Under the protection of Qlipoth {RUBY_B#Aeon}the Preservation{RUBY_E#}, Belobog remains forever warm in the face of unrelenting cold.
（那不是他之前的语调，他应该是在引用某段典籍。）
(A marked change in tone. It sounds like he's quoting from a historical record.)
（噢，那他干嘛要跟我们说这些啊？）
(Uh-huh, so why is he telling us all this?)
这就是克里珀堡，贝洛伯格的心脏，筑城者的总部。
This is Qlipoth Fort, the heart of Belobog and headquarters of the Architects.
{RUBY_B#星神}克里珀{RUBY_E#}是「存护」的象征。筑城者们在祂的感召下建立起了贝洛伯格，从天灾和寒潮之中保护了文明的火种。

{RUBY_B#Aeon}Qlipoth{RUBY_E#} is the symbol of Preservation. Under Qlipoth's impulsion, the Architects constructed Belobog, thus protecting the spark of civilization from disaster and the Eternal Freeze.
为示尊崇，我们以那位星神为这座堡垒命名。受克里珀庇护的筑城者们也一直引领着这座城市前进，对抗来自外界的种种灾难。
To show our reverence, we named this fortress after the Aeon themself. The Architects, under the protection of Qlipoth, have continued to lead this city forward, repelling all manner of disasters.
他们是人类的救星。早在寒潮到来之前，筑城者们顶着世人的不解和讥笑，坚持在此地建造城池，历史证明他们的选择是正确的。

The saviors of humanity. Long before the arrival of the Eternal Freeze, the Architects braved the doubts and derision of the people, never wavering from their construction of its defenses. History has proven that their decision was the correct one.
筑城者以「存护」的星神克里珀为这座堡垒命名。在他们的引领下，人类抵御了外敌的攻势，挡住了寒潮，如今也在对抗来自裂隙的侵蚀。

The Architects named this fortress after Qlipoth, Aeon of Preservation. Under their direction, humanity has withstood external enemy attacks and held off the Eternal Freeze. Even today, we resist the Fragmentum's corrosion.
这座堡垒也是「大守护者」的住处。
This fortress is also the residence of the supreme guardian.
就是由筑城者推举任命的贝洛伯格领袖，她们世代守望这座城市，为人民提供庇护。
The leader of Belobog, elected and appointed by the Architects. The supreme guardians have watched over this city for generations, sheltering the people from harm.
现任的守护者是可可利亚•兰德大人，城市内的一切重大决策都由她颁布。
The current guardian is Madam Cocolia Rand. Every major strategic decision is issued by her.
喔…听上去真是位大人物啊。
Whoa... she sounds like a big deal.
我这就带你们去参见可可利亚大人，各位可以预先组织一下语言。她的时间宝贵，所以偏好言简意赅的汇报。
I will now bring you to see Madam Cocolia. Please have your words at the ready. Her time is precious, so she prefers concise communication.
咦、咦？！这么快就要去见她了吗？我能先找个地方梳洗一下吗？
Uhh... We're gonna see her right now? Can I at least find a place to freshen up first?
别浪费时间了，没人会注意到的。
Let's not waste time. No one will notice.
不过是沾了点雪，没人会注意到的。
You've got some snow in your hair, but no one will notice.
有什么需要注意的礼节吗？
Is there any etiquette we need to observe?
不必感到拘束，守护者大人并不在意那些繁文缛节。何况你们初来乍到，不熟悉贝洛伯格的礼数也再正常不过。
Rest easy, the Madam Guardian doesn't care about formalities. Not to mention, you've only just arrived, it would be unexpected if you were familiar with Belobog customs.
我派使者提前传了话，可可利亚大人应该已经知道你们的来头了。跟我走吧。
I've dispatched a messenger to send word, Madam Cocolia will be aware of your arrival. Come with me.
…但是，这样的牺牲毫无意义，您不可以——
...But that's a meaningless sacrifice, how can you—
你可以退下了，布洛妮娅，访客到了。
Ahem... You may leave, Bronya. Visitors have arrived.
守护者大人——我带三位「{RUBY_B#星际旅行者}外来者{RUBY_E#}」前来参见。
Madam Guardian, I have brought three {RUBY_B#Interstellar Travelers}outsiders{RUBY_E#} to see you.
使者已经把情况告诉我了。做得很好，杰帕德，你也可以退下了。
The messenger informed me. Well done, Gepard. You may leave.
欢迎，从寒潮之外…不，从天外而来的访客，对么？
Welcome, visitors from beyond the Eternal Freeze. Or perhaps I should say: From beyond the sky... no?
我是可可利亚•兰德，贝洛伯格的守护者。在此聆听各位的来意。
I am Cocolia Rand, Belobog's supreme guardian. I would be grateful if you could tell me why you have come.
So you don't doubt our identity?
So you believe we come from beyond the sky?
难道你很希望我怀疑吗？对自己声称的身份，就这么没有自信？不，我不怀疑。我看得出你们并非这个世界的人。
Do you wish me to doubt it? Or perhaps you're not confident in that identity yourself? Haha... No, I do not doubt it. I can see that you are not from this world.
「筑城者」牢记历史，方能坚定己心；我知道在遥远的过去，在寒潮降临，在「军团」入侵之前，这个世界曾经无比繁荣……

The Architects remember the history well, else we should forget it. I know that in the distant past, before the Eternal Freeze descended or the Legion invaded, this world was once prosperous beyond measure...
星神将我们的星球与其它世界相连，我们得知了浩瀚银河中的无数可能，也听说了「琥珀王」克里珀——在祂的注视下，我们开始筑建城墙。

An Aeon connected our planet to other worlds, and we discovered the endless possibilities of the boundless universe. We also came to know of Qlipoth, the Amber Lord. Under THEIR attentive gaze, we built the city walls.
…所以，不用惊讶。尽管七百年来「筑城者」再未得到过来自星空的消息，但我知道你们的存在。说出来意吧，我听着。
...So, do not be surprised. For seven hundred years, the Architects have received no further communication from the stars... but I knew of your existence. Tell me why you have come.
We've come to trailblaze this planet.
...Do you think anyone's gonna know what you're talking about?
我们来此，是为了一颗叫做「星核」的东西。
We came here for something known as a Stellaron.
那是一种突然降落在各个世界的物质，它的出现就意味着灾祸。我们途经的许多星球都遭受了星核的毒害。
Objects that fell from the blue on separate worlds. Their appearance spelled disaster. Many of the planets we've visited have suffered their effects.
您刚刚提到了「反物质军团」入侵；它们到来后不久，这颗星球就出现了「寒潮」；而寒潮诞生时，被称为「裂界」的空间侵蚀现象就发生了，是吗？

You mentioned invasion by the Antimatter Legion. Soon after their arrival, this planet suffered the Eternal Freeze. At the same time, the phenomenon known as Fragmentum space corrosion began to occur. Correct?
The Stellarons were cast by the Aeon of Destruction.
所以反物质军团经常与星核一同出现！被种下星核的世界就会诞生裂界，至于寒潮嘛…应该是星核根据你们星球的情况创造的灾祸。

Which is why the Antimatter Legion and Stellarons often show up together! Worlds seeded with Stellarons give birth to Fragmentums. As for the Eternal Freeze... it must have been a product of the Stellaron — unique to the environment of your world.
The Eternal Freeze is a product of the Stellaron.
星核在每个星球上制造的灾祸都不一样，但每个被种下星核的世界都会诞生裂界。
Stellarons bring about different disasters on different worlds. But every world seeded with a Stellaron will give birth to Fragmentums.
Fragmentums are a product of the Stellaron.
你可以把我们当作进行星际旅行的热心肠人士，专门向被星核困扰的世界伸出援手！
You can see us as... kindhearted interstellar public servants, lending a helping hand to any world affected by a Stellaron!
你们把当前的情况分析得很清楚。没错，我们的确遭遇了这些灾祸，有些至今仍是我们的麻烦…但那与各位有什么干系？
Your analysis of our current circumstances is clear. We have indeed suffered the disasters you speak of, some of which prove vexatious to us even today... but why should you care?
即使真的有这么一颗「星核」…它引来了灾厄，我也看不出这与各位的关联。我不相信有人会大费周折帮助一个与自己不相干的世界，还毫无所图。

Even if this Stellaron you speak of did bring about disaster, I fail to see its connection to you. I don't believe that anyone would go to such lengths to help a world unrelated to them... unless they had something to gain.
你说的没错，我们之所以会来寻求合作，归根结底是因为大家的利益一致——如果不封印「星核」，我们也无法离开这个星球。
You're right. Our reason for coming here is not purely selfless. If we don't seal the Stellaron, we cannot leave this planet.
请让我们助您一臂之力。
Please help us locate the Stellaron.
只要干掉星核，你们的世界也会更安全！
If we can get rid of it, your world will be safer too!
你们…有办法封印那个叫「星核」的东西？
You... know how to seal the "Stellaron"?
好，我相信你们。如果现状真的和这所谓星核有关，各位的到来将是贝洛伯格等待了七百年的希望。我愿意提供一切可能的援助，帮各位找到星核。

Very well, I believe you. If our present situation is truly the result of this so-called Stellaron, then your arrival is the hope that Belobog has waited seven hundred years for. I am willing to assist you in any way possible to help you locate the Stellaron.
时候不早了，各位也累了吧。我安排你们入住城中最舒适的旅店休息，好好睡上一觉。明天中午我会派人邀请各位，我们好好地商议这件要事。

It's getting late, and you must be tired. I will arrange for you to stay in our most comfortable hotel. Rest there, and get a good night's sleep. Tomorrow, at noon, I will dispatch someone to escort you here, and we can discuss this urgent matter in greater detail.
应是我谢谢你们，来自天外的客人。
It should be me thanking you, visitors from beyond the sky.
We'd like to take a look around.
没问题，你们是贝洛伯格的贵客，拥有最高的权限。
But of course. You are Belobog's honored guests, and have the highest privileges afforded to you.
我也需要点时间，调查一下所有可能与「星核」有关的记载…恕不远送。
I too need some time. I will go over our records for anything that may be connected to Stellarons... Please excuse me for not escorting you further.
Do not worry, I have a way.
「大守护者」似乎对你们青睐有加。我得到命令，不必再限制你们的行动。
It seems that the supreme guardian holds you in high regard. I have received orders that your movements are no longer to be restricted.
毕竟是一城之主嘛！领袖派头十足！真酷啊。
She's the big shot! Definitely got that "queen of the castle" vibe going on. Aww, so cool.
说实话，我都没想到会这么顺利。
Y'know, I didn't think things were gonna go that smoothly.
哈哈，我还有公务在身，马上就要返回驻区。希望你们在贝洛伯格愉快。
Haha. I'm afraid I still have duties to attend to. I must return to my post. I hope you enjoy your stay in Belobog.
等一下，能推荐些景点给我们吗？时间还早，咱还想在这儿多逛逛。
Wait! Can you recommend some sights? It's not that late, we wanna take a look around.
要说值得一瞧的地方，应是黄金歌剧院和历史博物馆。不过博物馆是需要凭证件进入的……
Well, I'd say that Golden Theater and the History Museum are both worth a look. However, you'd need a pass to get into the museum.
我建议你们先去参观永冬铭碑，它是贝洛伯格最具象征意义的地标。
I recommend you visit Everwinter Monument first — it's Belobog's most symbolic landmark.
要是你们对音乐感兴趣，可以去「永动」机械屋，那里偶尔会有露天演出。演出者…唔，你们自己看吧。
And if you enjoy music, you could head to Neverwinter Workshop. You can sometimes catch an outdoor performance there. The artist is... *sigh* You'll see.
还有，要入住歌德宾馆的话，请务必记得绕开它旁边那条铁卫驻扎的巷子。那里近期受到了裂界侵蚀的影响，已经被封锁了。

Oh, and if you're staying at Goethe Hotel, please avoid the alley that runs next to it — the one with Silvermane Guards stationed there. It started to be affected by corrosion recently, so it's been sealed off.
侵蚀已经接近城市内部了吗…情况很严峻啊。
So the corrosion is inside the city... that's a grave situation.
嗯，我们正在与之对抗…告辞了，祝你们一切顺利。
Yes, we're mounting a resistance as we speak. I must leave now, I hope all goes well for you.
「永动」机械屋到啦——哎，杰帕德不是说这里有演出吗？
Neverwinter Workshop... Hey! Didn't Gepard say there'd be a show here?
他的原话是「偶尔会有演出」，你把最关键的两个字给屏蔽了。
He said "you can sometimes catch an outdoor performance..." "Sometimes" being the operative word.
Darn, I wanted to see one...
对了，你们看那边，刚才我就想吐槽了——这个城市好怪哦，为什么要把加热器堆在屋子外面呀？
Oh — I've been wondering — you see that heater over there? Why do they keep it outdoors? This city is so weird...
正常来说，供暖用的设备不是都该装在室内才对嘛？
Normally you'd want a heater INSIDE a building, right?
是想靠这玩意抵御寒潮吗？
Is this how they repel the Eternal Freeze?
…照你这么说，这群「筑城者」还挺天真的嘛。
...If so, I'm not sure "mighty" is the right word for these Architects.
Maybe they have indoor heaters too.
倒也有可能，只是感觉有点儿浪费能源。
Maybe, but the ones outside just seem like a waste of energy.
说不定那群「筑城者」是想靠这些加热器抵御寒潮呢！
*gasp* Maybe this is how the Architects repel the Eternal Freeze!
星核带来的灾害，小小的加热器怕是无能为力。
Tiny heaters are no use against a Stellaron disaster.
哈，你们对着坏掉的加热器，还能聊这么久呢？
Hah, you guys sure have a lot to say about that broken heater.
你好啊。我叫希露瓦，是这家机械屋的主人。
Hi there. The name's Serval, I'm the owner of this workshop.
对啊，你们摸摸看就知道了。冰冰凉的，我正打算动手修理呢。
Yep, touch it and find out — ice cold. I was just about to fix it up.
忘了自我介绍了，我叫希露瓦，是这家机械屋的主人。
I forgot to introduce myself. The name's Serval, I'm the owner of this workshop.
有什么坏掉的设备可以找我，但我不保证有兴趣修喔。
If you got any broken equipment lying around you can always come find me, though I can't guarantee I'll be interested in fixing it.
没有没有，我只是有点好奇这个加热器……
Oh, we're okay, I was just curious about the heater...
加热器…好奇？这不就是个普通的地髓供暖器吗，行政区里到处都是。
Curious? About the heater? It's just a standard Geomarrow radiator — you can find them anywhere in the Administrative District.
我们初来乍到，看什么都新鲜。
We only just got here — everything's new to us.
机械屋放台坏机器，是负面宣传。
Standing broken machines outside a workshop is bad advertising.
哈？这有什么，人人都知道我这家机械屋是什么风格……
Huh? What's wrong with that? Everyone around here knows the way I work...
啊，我知道了！听一个嘴巴不严实的铁卫说，有几位「外来者」跟可可利亚见了一面——就是你们吧？
Ah! I've figured it out! I heard a loudmouthed guard say that a group of outsiders had met with Cocolia... You must be them?
这可真是稀客！来来来，加热器也好什么也好，姐姐都跟你们好好聊聊～
What an honor! Where are my manners — we can talk about heaters all day if you like. Let's have a chat~
哇噢！好明亮的大堂！今晚有软和的床垫和弹弹的枕头啦！
Wow, what a beautiful lobby! It's gonna be soft mattresses and cushiony pillows tonight!
晚上要不要打枕头大战？要不要要不要？我觉得这酒店的枕头一定是鹅毛绒的～
Wanna have a pillow fight later? Huh? Huh? I bet they're stuffed with goose feathers, haha!
停！我知道你要说啥：「三月啊，你当时的话太多了」「三月啊，你不该跟不信任的人透露我们的目的」…我知道啦，谁叫你们两个绕着圈打机锋，不好好说话。

Stop! I know what you're gonna say: "March, you said too much back there — March, you shouldn't reveal our goal to people we don't trust..." Meanwhile you guys were beating around the bush and speaking in riddles.
但是你看呀，现在结果不是很好嘛？我们得到了贵宾待遇，超～豪华的酒店，还有当地势力的全力支持！看来这次的开拓任务也很顺利！

But check it out — seems like we landed with a pretty sweet deal, right? We get the royal treatment, rooms in a beauuuutiful hotel, and the full support of the locals! As far as trailblazing goes, this is smooth as heck!
...That's... not what I was going to say.
当时在克里珀堡——你注意过那位「{RUBY_B#可可利亚}大守护者{RUBY_E#}」吗？
Earlier in Qlipoth Fort... were you paying attention to the {RUBY_B#Cocolia}Supreme Guardian{RUBY_E#}?
那当然啦，跟你们冒险这么久，我的观察力被打磨得，嘿，那可不是一般的凌厉～
Uhh, yeah, of course — this isn't my first expedition y'know. My powers of perception are sharper than the sharpest blade~
没，挺正常的一位女士啊。一开始有点难说话，讲完道理后还挺温柔的。
Nope, she seemed normal to me. She was kinda harsh at first, but she turned out to be a nice, reasonable lady.
I knew there was something up with her!
哪里不对劲？挺正常的一位女士啊。一开始有点难说话，讲完道理后还挺温柔的。
Something up with her? She seemed normal to me. She was kinda harsh at first, but she turned out to be a nice, reasonable lady.
只有我什么都没发现吗…
...Am I the only one that didn't notice anything?
你不是一个人，我也没发现什么异样。她一开始有点难说话，讲完道理后还挺温柔的。
Nope, she seemed normal to me too. She was kinda harsh at first, but she turned out to be a nice, reasonable lady.
只是…觉得她的眼神有种穿透力——就是，虽然她在和我们说话，但眼睛却好像在盯着远处的某样东西……
Although... it felt like she was looking through me. As in, I know she was speaking to us, but it seemed like her gaze was fixed on something far away...
嗯，我也有类似的感觉。就像那个房间里不只有我们几个一样。
Hmm, I had a similar feeling. Almost as if we weren't the only people in the room.
嗐，被你这么一说，感觉有点吓人……
*gasp* Do you have to put it like that? That's scary...
It must've been the invisible man.
那不可能逃过丹恒的眼睛啦。
Well, there's no way he'd get past Dan Heng's sharp eyes.
唔，有可能吧。毕竟是那么重要的大人物，没准房间里埋伏着十几个刀斧手呢。
Hmm, maybe. She's an important person after all — maybe there were armed bodyguards lying in ambush.
可能是我太敏感了…她承诺要帮助我们，希望她不会食言……
Perhaps I'm too sensitive... She did promise to help us. I just hope she keeps her word...
早点休息吧，为明天的谈判养足精神。
Let's get some rest, we need to save our energy for the discussions tomorrow.
咦，你是…昨天在克里珀堡的……
Huh? It's you... you were there at the Fort...
我是布洛妮娅•兰德，代行银鬃铁卫统领。以尊贵无上的{RUBY_B#克里珀}琥珀王{RUBY_E#}之名，奉大守护者可可利亚•兰德之命，前来捉拿意图掀起叛乱的渗透者。

I am Bronya Rand, acting commander of the Silvermane Guards. In the name of the {RUBY_B#Qlipoth}Amber Lord{RUBY_E#} in the highest, and under order of Supreme Guardian Cocolia Rand, I hereby arrest the suspected infiltrators under the charge of plotting to incite rebellion.
在此，我以大守护者代理的身份，暂时剥夺各位行动及发言的自主权；当裁判团对你们进行审判时，你们会得到辩解的机会。

As agent of the supreme guardian, I herewith temporarily strip you of your freedom of action and speech. When you are tried by the adjudication panel, you will be given the opportunity to defend yourselves against the accusations.
放弃无谓的抵抗，跟我走吧。
Resistance will prove futile. You must come with me.
又要沦为阶下囚了…我发现每三个世界，这种情况就要来上一次。
Looks like we've been downgraded to accomplices... again. Seems like it's every third planet this happens.
那是因为你总是头脑一热就行动，完全没有计划。
That's because you always act without thinking — you never have a plan.
我也会成长的啦！现在我就在想计划…计划…有了！
Hey, I'm improving! I'm coming up with a plan right now... aaaand... got one!
那里因为裂界的侵蚀而被封锁——我知道了，这的确是个可行的计划。
The one that's been sealed off... Hmm, it's possible.
{NICKNAME}, March, be ready to make an escape.
咦，真的可以吗？我随便说说的……
Huh? Really? I just wanted to say something...
We should probably go with them...
I guess we are a strange trio...
嘘！这是列车团的老暗号了，数到一的时候，你就跟我们一起跑！
Shh! It's an old Astral Express escape signal. Do you play cards?
喂，嘀咕什么呢？快跟我们走！
Hey, what are you whispering? Let's get going!
等、等一下！这跟说好的可不一样啊，她明明说要邀请我们一起商议要事……
W—Wait a minute! This isn't what we agreed! She said we were gonna be escorted to discuss an urgent matter!
…这是计划好的背叛，毫无疑问。
…居然自己冲进了裂界，也不知道是过度自信还是自取灭亡。看来母亲的判断是正确的……
...Escaping into a Fragmentum. I don't know if they're overconfident or just eager for death. It would seem that mother's judgment was correct...
要回报他们已经失踪或死亡吗？
Should we report them as missing or deceased?
不行，大守护者的命令是捉拿犯人，不能因为他们逃进封锁区就拒绝追击。不管是死是活，我都得亲见为证。
The supreme guardian's order was to arrest them. We cannot abandon our pursuit just because they fled into a sealed off area. I must ascertain their fate with my own eyes.
我现在还能做到的事…就是斩除威胁贝洛伯格的恶徒。
Eradicate all threats to Belobog's security... that is what I must do.
哈…真累呀，我现在只想躺在软软的床上昏睡过去……
*yawn* ...So tired. I just wanna put my head on a pillow and drift off...
好像咱们每次的开拓之旅，第一天都会折腾得不轻呢。是吧丹恒？
Seems like the first day of our trailblazing expeditions is always pretty eventful, huh Dan Heng.
Heh, that's because you've got too much energy.
还有没做完的事吗？明天白天就要和守护者会面，没时间逛街了。
Is there anything left to do? We're meeting the guardian tomorrow. There won't be any time for sightseeing.
That's enough fun for today. Time to rest.
这一天可真漫长呀～咱要好好洗个热水澡，再美美地睡一觉～
It was a long day today. All I need is a hot shower and a good night's sleep.
Well don't talk about it then!
早点睡吧，保存精力，能预见未来几天都会很辛苦。
Let's get to bed early and save our energy. I sense the next few days could be tiring.
那我回房间啦。列车熄灯了！
Well, I'm off to my room then. Express lights off!
旅店门口来了一群银鬃铁卫，但似乎来者不善。
There's a group of Silvermane Guards at the entrance... and I don't think they're here to say hi.
如果说是来迎接我们的，那气氛也过分凝重了。
If this is our escort, it's less friendly than I was expecting.
从那种头盔怎么看出凝重的？
You guys are assuming a lot. All I can see is their helmets.
工作时候怎么欢快得起来呢？
You can't always be friendly on the job, you know.
你以前到底经历了什么啊？
Huh, you must've had some miserable jobs.
没准不是来接咱们的呢？
Maybe they're not here to escort us?
这倒确实是个思维盲区…
I guess we'll have to find out...
先去会一会他们吧，在这里瞎猜也无济于事。
Let's go and meet them. We won't know until we're down there.
我们在城外见到了奇怪的生物…它们来自被侵蚀的空间「裂界」，对吗？
We saw strange creatures outside the city... They must have come from a tear in corroded space. A Fragmentum, correct?
你们居然知道…是的。寒潮以外还有许多威胁，你们见到的怪物就是其中之一。
How do you... That's right. Out there in the blizzard, there are still many threats... including the monsters you saw.
那种生物很少走出裂界，这说明你们星球遭到的侵蚀已经很严重了。
Monsters of that type rarely venture outside the Fragmentum... meaning the corrosion affecting your planet is already very serious.
银鬃铁卫一直在与之作战，但局势并不乐观…待面见大守护者后，我希望能就此事询问你们的意见。我们缺少情报。

The Silvermane Guards are continuously engaged with the enemy, but I'm afraid the situation is bleak... After your meeting with the supreme guardian, I would like to consult you on this matter. *sigh* We're lacking in intel.
你们知道裂界和侵蚀，那听说过「星核」这种东西吗？
If you know about corrosion and the Fragmentum, then you must have heard of Stellarons, right?
没有，那东西与怪物有关吗？也许守护者大人知道什么。
No. Does that have to do with the monsters? Perhaps the Madam Guardian will be familiar.
这大长队一动不动，到底还得等多久啊……
This queue isn't moving, how long are we gonna be here...
喂？之前跟你们说话的军官，是杰帕德•朗道大人吗？
Say, the officer that you were speaking to... was that Gepard Landau?
哎，我就说是他，没敢去打招呼！要是刚才把他叫住就好了。
Argh, I knew it was him — I wasn't brave enough to go over. I should've tried to stop him.
杰帕德大人那么英明果决，而且还出身高贵…他肯定会帮我的。
Captain Gepard is wise and decisive, and of noble birth... I'm sure he'd help me.
What do you make of him?
杰帕德大人？他可是出身高贵的银鬃铁卫戍卫官，那个出名的朗道家的公子！
What do I make of him? Why, he's a captain of the Silvermane Guards — not to mention of noble birth! I mean, he's a Landau!
要是能把我的情况告诉他，他肯定会帮我的。
If I could just find a way to tell him about my situation, I'm sure he'd help me.
唉，想那么多也没用，机会已经错过了…还是接着排队吧。
*sigh* I'm getting ahead of myself, I already missed my chance... back to the queue I guess.
怎么了，有事吗？要请愿就到后面排队去，别想着插队。
Hey, you got a problem? If you wanna petition then start queuing. Don't even think about pushing in.
怎么办，只有守护者大人能帮我了……
What am I gonna do? Only the Madam Guardian can help me...
（跑太远的话，卫兵肯定会起疑心…还是跟上杰帕德吧。）
(The guards will notice if we stray too far off... We should stick close to Gepard.)
你们！布洛妮娅统领在下面等着你们。快去见她，别想耍花招！
Hey! Commander Bronya is waiting for you all down below. Hurry up and go see her. And no tricks!
咱们…不会摊上什么大事了吧？
Are we... in a lot of trouble?
在希露瓦的指导下修好了发热装置……
You fix the heater with Serval's help...
看啊，是杰帕德大人回来了！
真威风呀…我以后也想成为和他一样强壮的银鬃铁卫！
So impressive... I want to become as strong a Silvermane Guard as him!
列车组想办法解开了大门的机关……
The Crew figures out the mechanism for the gate...
发生什么了？怎么这么大阵仗……
跟在戍卫官后面那几个人是谁？快看他们的打扮啊，真稀奇……
Who are those guys behind the captain? Look at their attire, so strange...
嫌疑人，不许乱跑！去见布洛妮娅统领！
Suspects! Stop running around and go see Commander Bronya!
我们是盟友…世代陪伴守护者的盟友。
We are allies... allies of the guardians through generations.
To help you... achieve your wish.
你们在外面看见的，是贝洛伯格最常见的地髓供暖器，别看外观不起眼，它可是人们的生命保障。
The heater you saw is just a standard Geomarrow radiator. They may not look like much, but they're a real lifeline to the people.
外面的风雪这么厉害，要是没有靠谱的供暖手段，贝洛伯格上下早就变成一座死城了。
The blizzards here are brutal. If we didn't have a reliable way of keeping warm, Belobog would long since have become a dead city — both above and below the surface.
是我们这儿特产的矿石能源，大到城市供暖，小到手里的计数器，全都是用地髓供能的。
It's an ore — a special energy resource. Whether it's keeping the city warm or keeping our counters ticking, everything runs on Geomarrow.
地髓长在这颗星球的地表之下，由下层区的专业矿队开采，然后通过输运管线送到地上。相对的，上层区会通过同样的管线，把地表才有的支援物资送到地下去。

Geomarrow grows beneath the surface of the planet, and specialist Underworld mining teams are there to extract it. Transport lines shuttle it up to the surface. In the Overworld, we use the same lines to ship surface goods and aid down to the Underworld.
你们不知道吗？贝洛伯格这座城市的结构，就像连接在一起的两个大圆盘，上层区负责行政跟贸易，下层区负责能源供给和资源开采。

You didn't know? Belobog is structured like two big connected discs. The Overworld is responsible for administration and trade, while the Underworld is responsible for energy supply and resource extraction.
不过，因为多年前的一条命令，上下层区已经很多年没有人员往来了……
However, due to an order that was given many years ago, nobody has moved between the Overworld and the Underworld in a long time.
…嗐，说这些干嘛？全当我在自言自语吧。
...Ah! I shouldn't be talking about this. Pretend I never said anything.
这就跟生火做饭一个道理啊？如果房子是口烧菜的大锅，加热器就是锅外面的灶火。
Isn't it just like cooking food over an open flame? If the house is a pot, then the heater is the stove it rests on.
听她这么形容，我居然一下想不出槽点在哪……
When she puts it like that, it actually starts to make sense...
小事小事，你们第一次来贝洛伯格作客，能让你们感受到这座城市的热情就好。
No sweat. This is your first time in Belobog — I just want you to feel some of the warmth the city has to offer.
对了，看你们也挺闲的，要不要来帮我修这台机器？就当成手工活动好了，很有趣的。
Hey, seeing as there's nothing on your plate just now, wanna help me fix up this machine? Just a bit of manual labor — you might find it interesting.
很好！那我先给你们做个示范。
Great! Then let me give you a demonstration first.
不错不错，手脚挺麻利呀，悟性很高！要不要考虑当我的助手？报酬可能一般，但其它方面绝对不会亏待你的。
Nice! You guys are pretty handy — you picked that up in no time. Wanna be my assistants? Average pay, but I'm a good boss.
哈？你也太经不住诱惑了吧！
Hah — do you just say yes to everything?
哈哈哈，开个玩笑而已，别当真。
Hahaha, I was only kidding — just a joke.
我得接着忙了，你们再到别处去逛逛吧。机械屋随时欢迎你们光临…当然也随时欢迎你们来消费哦。
Well, I'd better carry on here, why not have a better look around? My workshop will always be open to you... and your wallets, of course.
Move back! This is your final warning!
可是，可是…我的财产证明都在里面啊，我什么都没……
But... B—But my proof of property is inside. I don't have any—
裂界已经侵蚀了街区！你可以向筑城者提交物资夺还申请，但非铁卫成员禁止入内！
The Fragmentum has already corroded this block! You can make a property retrieval request to the Architects, but only Silvermane Guards are permitted to enter here!
裂界侵蚀都蔓延到城市里了呀…怪不得那条巷道里全是士兵。
I can't believe Fragmentum corrosion has spread into the city... No wonder there are so many soldiers stationed there.
这个世界真是多灾多难。
This world really is in dire straits.
可不是嘛…不过好在我们来了，封印星核后，他们就不用遭这么多罪啦。
It sure is... but at least we're here. Once we seal the Stellaron, they can get back to the good life.
士兵能阻止裂界入侵吗？
Can soldiers really hold back the Fragmentum?
不可能的，只要星核还在活动，侵蚀就会不断扩大。
No. As long as the Stellaron is active, the corrosion will continue to spread.
士兵只能暂时清空裂界中的怪物，但怪物会不断诞生和增殖。
The soldiers can only periodically clear the Fragmentum of monsters. But the monsters will continue to emerge and multiply.
老伯，你还是死了这条心吧。边缘通路现在很危险，我们这也是为了你的安全考虑。
Please try to understand, sir. Backwater Pass has become very dangerous. We're just here for your safety.
要是拿不到财产证明，我跟死了有什么区别喔！你们让开，让我进去……
If I can't get my proof of property, it doesn't matter how safe I am! Out of my way — let me pass...
啊，那边就是杰帕德说的，被裂界污染的巷子吧？
Ah, that's the alley that Gepard mentioned — the one contaminated by the Fragmentum, right?
居然是在离城市中心这么近的地方……
I can't believe how close it is to the city center...
要是放任不管的话，这附近的商铺和旅店用不了多久就要关门大吉了吧？
