If they hadn't identified it, I bet all the shops and hotels in the vicinity would have had to close down by now.
退后！封锁区域，非铁卫成员禁止入内！
Stand back! This area is off limits — only Silvermane Guards are permitted to enter here!
Are the Guards able to control the situation?
还好，这里刚刚遭到侵蚀，怪物还不是很多。请相信银鬃铁卫能够应付。
We're optimistic — this area has only recently been corroded, so monsters are few and far between. Please, have faith in the Guards.
要不是大部队都被调去前线了，这种小阵仗算什么！现在连攻打的兵力都没有。
If it weren't for most of our forces being deployed to the front line, situations like this wouldn't amount to anything! We can't even go on the offensive.
原本是候车广场…但现在已经被封闭了。
It used to be a transport hub... but it's been closed down.
This must be a hard job.
这是我们应该做的，银鬃铁卫必须对市民的生命安全负责。
Well, this is our duty as Silvermane Guards. We are responsible for the safety of the citizenry.
唉，负责是必须要负责的！上面肯定有他们的用意！我就是想起地下那些乡亲了，他们现在……
Duty is duty — we trust in the higher-ups! But I worry about our compatriots below ground. They must be—
别说了，守护者严禁讨论下层区的事……
That's enough, the guardian has strictly forbidden discussion of Underworld affairs...
嗨，我就是个急性子，不说了不说了！
Right! I'm such a hothead. I'll zip it!
I don't have any more questions.
离这儿远一点吧，我们还在执行公务，被人看见闲聊就不好了。
Please keep a safe distance, this is a live situation. Plus, we need to look busy.
让我进去！我不怕死！什么都没了…都没了……
Let me pass! I'm not afraid to die! I've lost everything... everything...
看，那座冰雕的外形真奇特呀！感觉跟这座城市莫名地搭调呢。
Wow, look at the carved ice! It feels perfect for this city, somehow.
不管它是什么材质，反正肯定不是冰雕。
Whatever it's made of, it can't be ice.
说的也是，这城里其实还挺暖和的。欸，那边好像还围了很多小孩子，咱们走近点看看吧？
I guess you're right, it's actually pretty warm in the city... Hey, what's with all the children over there? Should we go and take a look?
身着银鬃铁卫制服的女性
小朋友们，不要到处乱跑啦。到这边集合……
Alright children, no running around, okay? Let's gather over here...
身着银鬃铁卫制服的女性
自我介绍一下，我是银鬃铁卫的情报官，也是「贝洛伯格历史之旅」的临时向导，佩拉格娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜。
So, let me introduce myself. I'm the Intelligence Officer for the Silvermane Guards, and a temporary guide for the "A Journey Through Belobog's History" program. My name is Pelageya Sergeyevna.
But you can call me Pela.
…请个别大人不要若无其事地模仿小孩子！
...And perhaps the grownups among us could refrain from acting like children?
…请个别大人旁听就好，这是针对孩子的历史之旅……
...And perhaps the grownups among us could remain silent? This is a children's program...
好，小朋友们请看：这就是「永冬铭碑」，它是为了纪念伟大的筑城者而竖立的。
Okay guys, take a look over here: This is Everwinter Monument. It was erected to commemorate the mighty Architects.
筑城者是星神克里珀的追随者。是他们预见了危机，并筑起高墙，建立贝洛伯格，存护了人类文明的火种。直到如今，他们依然在管理着这座城市。

The Architects are followers of the Aeon Qlipoth. It was they that foresaw crisis, built up our walls, and established Belobog — preserving the spark of human civilization. Even today, they are still tending to the city.
永冬铭碑的碑体由两部分构成：象征知识与工业力量的齿轮，以及象征寒潮的巨大冰晶。这两个符号紧密嵌合，齿轮束缚住了冰霜，代表着筑城者们不屈服于蛮荒自然的精神。

Everwinter Monument is made up of two parts: A gear that symbolizes knowledge and industrial strength, and huge ice crystals that symbolize the Eternal Freeze. These two symbols are bound together — the gear restricting the ice. It represents the unyielding spirit of the Architects in the face of nature's barbarity.
纪念碑有什么象征含义吗？
Does the monument have any symbolic meaning?
纪念碑的碑体由两部分构成：象征知识与工业力量的齿轮，以及象征寒潮的巨大冰晶。这两个符号紧密嵌合，齿轮束缚住了冰霜，代表着筑城者们不屈服于蛮荒自然的精神。

The monument is made up of two parts: A gear that symbolizes knowledge and industrial strength, and huge ice crystals that symbolize the Eternal Freeze. These two symbols are bound together — the gear restricting the ice. It represents the unyielding spirit of the Architects in the face of nature's barbarity.
你是问材料吗？那是改变了颜色的地髓。地髓的颜色跟加工时的环境温度有关。
You mean, what are they made of? It's Geomarrow that's undergone a change in color. The color of Geomarrow is related to the environmental temperature during its refinement.
筑城者们是星神克里珀的追随者。是他们预见了危机，并筑起高墙，建立贝洛伯格，存护了人类文明的火种。
The Architects are followers of the Aeon Qlipoth. It was they that foresaw the crisis, built up our walls, and established Belobog — preserving the spark of human civilization.
换句话来说，筑城者们既是贝洛伯格的奠基人，也是贝洛伯格的救世主。现如今，他们依然在管理着这座城市。
Or to put it another way, the Architects are Belobog's founders and saviors. Even today, they are still tending to the city.
How did the Eternal Freeze occur?
这个问题应该去问科研部的专家，虽然他们可能也没法给出准确的答案。
That's a question for the Scientific Research Division, though they may not be able to give you a definitive answer.
寒潮似乎并非简单的自然灾害，百年前的气象学记录也无法解释它的成因。简单来说，这是困扰了贝洛伯格科学家们好几个世纪的难题。

The Eternal Freeze is no ordinary natural disaster — meteorological records from hundreds of years ago cannot explain the cause. To put it simply, it's a problem that has plagued Belobog scientists for centuries.
I don't have any more questions.
小朋友们还有什么想问的吗？慢慢来，时间还有很多。
And what about you guys? Take your time, we're not in a rush.
啊，终于回来啦！我都忘了新鲜空气是啥味道了……
Ah, we're finally back! ...I forgot what fresh air tasted like... Nom, nom, nom.
你再等等，让我再体验一下……体验完了，走吧。
Wait! I haven't finished yet... Alright, let's go.
自由的味道…寒冷的味道…有点冷了，还是走吧。
...Freedom... Cold... Mainly cold actually. Let's go.
咱们接着去哪？先找个落脚的地方比较好，但我可不敢再去歌德宾馆了……
Where's our next stop? We should find somewhere to put our feet up, as long as it's not Goethe Hotel again...
桑博那家伙，大概是猜到我们会问他要藏身处，一回到行政区就溜没影了。真不能指望他。
Classic unreliable Sampo — he probably guessed we'd ask where his hiding place was. No sooner are we back in the Administrative District than he sneaks off.
最危险的地方也最安全，宾馆！
We should hide in plain sight. To the hotel!
不行啦！歌德老板认识我们，铁卫的驻扎点就在旁边一百米不到，你这是送货上门啊！
No way! The boss will recognize us, plus Silvermane Guards are stationed nearby. We'd be offering ourselves up on a silver platter!
在家靠父母出门靠朋友，朗道！
A friend in need is a friend indeed. Let's find Landau!
哪个朗道，姐姐还是弟弟？杰帕德的话，还是谨慎点为好…他可是铁卫高层啊，我们在他看来，没准就是会走路的军功章……
The bro or the sis? If you're talking about Gepard, we should be careful... He's a top Silvermane Guard — he'd probably get a medal for every one of us he brought in.
青山不改绿水长流，回列车！
Home is where the heart is. Back to the Express!
你这家伙真不讲义气！但我居然有点心动……
Where's your sense of loyalty!? Uh, that would be nice though...
Dan Heng, what do you think?
依我之见，先拜访希露瓦•朗道比较好。
I think it'd be best to pay a visit to Serval Landau.
果然，你也觉得不该现在去见杰帕德吧？
So you think we should avoid Gepard for the time being, right?
他是银鬃铁卫的高阶军官，想接触他恐怕没那么容易。而且…万一他没有被布洛妮娅的手书说动，我们等于是羊入虎口。
He's an elite officer of the Silvermane Guards. It wouldn't be easy to get to him. Besides... if he hasn't been persuaded by Bronya's letter, we'd be walking right into the lion's den.
那听你的？先去机械屋找希露瓦吧。
Hmm, makes sense... Guess we better head over to Serval's workshop then?
嗯。行动低调点，我们现在仍是被通缉的状态。
Mm. But... we must keep a low profile — we're still wanted fugitives.
Nothing, it's just a little... new.
上次来到地上时，我还是个小孩子。现在眼前的这些，我完全没有印象。
The last time I was on the surface, I was still a child. I have no memory of any of this.
上下层被隔绝实在太久了…太久了。
The Overworld and the Underworld... We've... We've been cut off for so long.
巡逻的铁卫好多，平时也这样吗？
There are so many Silvermane Guards on patrol. Is it usually like this?
不，记得此前城里的戒备还没这么森严…如果这不是常态，也许与我们有关。
No, I don't remember the security being this tight last time... It might have something to do with us.
大守护者应该已经知道了我们的到来，布洛妮娅……
The supreme guardian has probably learned of our arrival already. Bronya...
...Well, now we have to help him keep his mouth shut.
Tsk, don't stand in our way!
入、入侵者！得、得去通知警卫官——
Intruders! I must inform the security captain...
He's gonna raise the alarm, stop him!
谁呀？今天不营业，明天再来吧！
Who is it? Shop's closed today, you'll have to come back tomorrow!
是我们呀，帮你修过东西的。
来大客户咯，可以长期合作！
It's a big customer with bigger pockets!
没兴趣，我缺时间不缺钱！
Ha, not interested — I need time, not money!
希露瓦！我们是之前路过你这儿的，还帮你修过东西——记得嘛？
Serval! We came past here before and helped you fix a few things, remember?
啊，我想起来了！从贝洛伯格外面来的那三个！哎呀，你们怎么还在城里乱跑，不知道铁卫正满大街找你们吗？
Ah, I remember! The three outsiders! Wait — why are you still strolling around the city? Do you know the Silvermane Guards are looking all over for you?
快，快点进来。动作自然点，别被人盯上！
Quick, act natural and get inside. Don't get spotted!
行了，到我这儿你们就安全了。我这机械屋隔音还行，平时也没人会来。
Alright, you'll be safe here. My workshop has pretty good soundproofing, and barely anyone comes in.
你们到底犯了什么事儿啊，铁卫破天荒从前线调回一批，满城巡逻搜捕你们，整个上层区都人心惶惶的。
Just what crime did you commit exactly? They recalled a bunch of Guards from the front line to track you down — it's unprecedented. Now they're patrolling the whole city and everyone's in a panic.
布洛妮娅说，我们可以完全信任你。
Bronya said we could trust you completely.
你这话里有话啊。强调布洛妮娅信任我，意思就是你还没信任我啰？
You mean to say that you don't trust me completely?
不错啊，够机警的！放心吧，我跟可可利亚说不上话，当年把我赶出筑城者的就是她，我犯不着站在她那边。
Good! That's smart of you. But you needn't worry, Cocolia and I aren't even on speaking terms. It was her that ejected me from the Architects — I refuse to stand with her.
除非筑城者公开确凿的证据，证明你们罪有应得——否则我不觉得你们会干坏事。而且以我对筑城者的了解，要有证据他们早就公布了。

I don't believe you guys would do anything bad, and the Architects are gonna need conclusive and publicly available evidence for me to think otherwise. Besides, I know the Architects, and if they did have any evidence, they would've released it by now.
这套我熟悉…可可利亚嘛，她办事就是这个风格，先让大家都忙活起来再说。
I know Cocolia's style — get everyone into a frenzy first.
——毕竟忙起来后，还有心思琢磨细节的人就不多了。
...Most people in a frenzy don't stop to ponder the details.
岂止是熟，呵呵…我们曾经是形影不离的好姐妹。当然了，那是在她当上大守护者之前的事了……
Hehe, you could say that... We were like sisters once — inseparable. Of course, that was all before she became the supreme guardian...
So what details have you been pondering?
我？当然没有。可可利亚跟筑城者想做什么不关我事，我的时间这么宝贵，琢磨那个干嘛。
Me? None. What Cocolia and the Architects get up to has nothing to do with me. My time is too precious for pondering.
讨厌？我们曾经可是形影不离的好姐妹。当然了，那是在她当上大守护者之前的事了……
Dislike? We were like sisters once — inseparable. Of course, that was all before she became the supreme guardian...
现在的我嘛，就窝在这机械屋里修修破烂，玩玩音乐，过得挺自在的。
These days I just spend my time fixing things in this workshop and playing music. It's a pretty carefree existence.
哎呀，我可没打算跟你们聊不堪回首的过去，还是说回你们吧。消失好久的布洛妮娅让你们来找我，一定有很重要的事吧？

*sigh* If I'm not careful I'll start boring you all with sob stories from the past. Let's get back to you guys. If long-lost Bronya told you to come here, you must have something important to tell me?
你们可以信任我，虽然只有一面之缘，但直觉告诉我你们不是恶人。哈，我的直觉可是很准的喔。
You can trust me. I know our paths have only crossed once before, but my intuition tells me you guys are good people. And I've got good intuition by the way, haha.
一五一十，事无巨细地讲吧。
We may as well tell the long and short of it from start to finish.
Ooh! I'm the best storyteller — let me! Let me!
长话短说，言简意赅地讲吧。
We may as well cut to the chase and make a long story short.
Ooh! I'm the best storyteller — let me! Let me!
…还是我来吧，你怕不是要讲到明天。
...Perhaps I should do it, or we'll still be here tomorrow.
将在下层区的见闻和有关「星核」的信息告诉了希露瓦，并转交了布洛妮娅的信件……
Telling Serval about your time in the Underworld and what you know about the Stellaron, and showing her Bronya's letter...
怪不得最近都没有布洛妮娅的消息，原来还有这么段故事。下层区啊，封闭好多年了，很久没人上来过，没想到是这样……

So that's what's been happening — no wonder we hadn't heard from Bronya recently. *sigh* After all these years in isolation and without a single word from below, this is what's become of the Underworld...
我相信你们的经历，这么曲折离奇，自己可编不出来，何况还有这位希儿小姐现身作证。「星核」…呵，我知道布洛妮娅为什么要你们找我了。

I believe you, there's no way you could have invented all those twists and turns. What's more, we have Miss Seele here as living proof. As for the Stellaron... heh, I know why Bronya got you to find me.
…我还是筑城者的一员、在科研部工作的时候，研究的就是「星核」。
...When I was still one of the Architects working in the Scientific Research Division, I was researching the Stellaron.
不曾想被逐出了筑城者，还会再听到这个词…来吧，我把知道的都告诉你们。
I never thought I'd hear that word again after being expelled by the Architects... Come on, I'll tell you everything.
「星核」的存在，贝洛伯格没几个人知道；就算知道有这么个东西，也不会把它跟裂界和寒潮的源头扯到一起。
Only a very few people in Belobog know of the existence of the Stellaron. Those that do would never associate it with the Fragmentum or Eternal Freeze.
但根据那个机器人「史瓦罗」存储的数据…筑城者其实早就挖掘出了真相，只是研究结果被刻意藏了起来，确保不被外界知晓。

But according to the data recorded in that robot, Svarog... the Architects dug out the truth long ago. The research results were purposely hidden away to ensure that the outside world would never know of them.
是我运气不好呀…那么多选题，我偏偏选了「星核」。看来，任何想要触碰「星核」真相的人，都会被驱逐和处理掉吧。

Just my luck... Out of all the research topics I could've chosen, I insisted on the Stellaron. It's clear now that anyone who wanted to get closer to the truth would have been expelled or "abandoned."
或许我还要感谢可可利亚，她只是赶走了我，没有采取更一劳永逸的手段……
Maybe I should be thanking Cocolia. All she did was push me out... She could've decided to take a more permanent measure.
How much do you know about the Stellaron?
我算出了「星核」与「裂界」有关，离真相已经很近了。可惜还没有证明「星核」是裂界的起源，就被逐出了筑城者。

I figured out that the Stellaron and the Fragmentum were linked, so I was already close to the truth. It's a shame that the Architects ejected me before I could discover that the source of the Fragmentum was the Stellaron itself.
被革职之前，我正在申请现场勘测「星核」。虽然它是我的课题，但我从没亲眼见过它。所有研究都基于历史资料，和在实验室里搭建的模拟场景。

Before I lost my position, I was applying for permission to survey the Stellaron directly. It was my research topic, but I'd never even set eyes on it. My research was all based on historical data and lab simulations.
初步的研究报告和申请提交后不多久，我的处分就下来了。很明显，有人不希望研究继续。
Not long after I submitted my preliminary report and application, I received my punishment. It was obvious that somebody didn't want my research to continue.
知道可可利亚的目的吗？
Do you know what Cocolia's end goal is?
可可利亚…我们已经好多年没说过话了。曾经我和她是很好的朋友，彼此之间无话不谈。
Cocolia... It's been so many years since we last spoke. We were great friends once — there was nothing we wouldn't share.
但从坐上大守护者的位置开始，她就完全变了一个人。她以前秉持的信念，还有身上那股热情…就好像被某种力量抽出了躯壳。
She became a completely different person when she took on the supreme guardianship. The convictions she once held, her enthusiasm... it was like they were drawn out of her by some mysterious force.
她亲自下达驱逐我的命令，一面都不肯见我…她后来的行为，我不是很了解，早就放弃用正常的逻辑揣摩她了。
She gave the order to expel me herself and refused to see me... I never understood that behavior, and I gave up trying to use logic to work it out a long time ago.
有些时候，我甚至怀疑她其实是另一个人…有没有这种可能呢？说不定守护者是代代相传的意识，真正的可可利亚已经消失了。

Sometimes I even wonder whether she really did become a different person... is that possible? Perhaps there's a single guardian's consciousness that gets handed down from generation to generation... and the real Cocolia has already vanished.
是一代又一代的大守护者驱使她做出那些难以理解的决策？不知道，或许可以用这个点子写一首歌。
Is she being compelled by previous generations of guardians to make such baffling decisions? Who knows... but this might make for good songwriting material.
我们能和杰帕德谈谈吗？
杰帕德？可别…他人很正直，但可是出了名的一根筋。
Gepard? Not a chance... He's a decent guy, but also famously uncompromising.
我老弟把命令看得比什么都重要，就算你把布洛妮娅的信怼到脸上，他也不会动摇的。
For my brother, orders are more important than anything. Even if you stuck Bronya's letter to his forehead, he wouldn't be swayed.
跟他说话得靠技巧，要说服他，恐怕还得我出马才行——不过我现在还没想好策略。
You need to choose your words carefully if you want to persuade him of something. It might be best if I talk to him... though I'd need a strategy first.
Do you know where the Stellaron is?
知道啊。虽然没亲眼见过，但我利用模拟实验和外派勘测做了粗略的定位。
Yes. I never observed it directly, but I used lab simulations and outbound surveys to establish a rough location.
根据勘测结果，「星核」大概位于贝洛伯格的北方——也就是茫茫雪原的某处。
According to the survey results, the Stellaron is likely to the north of Belobog... somewhere in the vast Snow Plains.
我们必须找到星核，而且越快越好——最好在可可利亚有所行动之前。你能给我们指个方向吗？
We must locate it as soon as possible — ideally before Cocolia takes action. Can you tell us the way?
没问题，我正这么打算呢！但是，这条路可不是嘴上说说那么简单啊。
Not a problem, I was thinking the same thing! But I'm afraid telling you might not be enough.
贝洛伯格以北几乎被裂界完全吞没了。要前往北部雪原，首先得穿过银鬃铁卫的前线禁区。

The area to the north of Belobog has been more or less swallowed up by the Fragmentum. If you want to get to the northern Snow Plains, you'll need to get past the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone on the front lines first.
就算平安穿过铁卫禁区——还有一大片裂界挡在前边。
Even if you get past the restricted zone in one piece... you'll have a whole heap of Fragmentum to deal with.
对。那是银鬃铁卫主力部队的驻扎地，他们在那里整顿部队，抵抗裂界的入侵。
Yes. That's where the main force of the Silvermane Guards is stationed. They've consolidated their position there in order to resist the encroaching Fragmentum.
对。而且跟你们描述的地下小镇可不一样，是真正支离破碎、毫无生息的裂界。
Correct. And it's different from the underground towns you described. The Fragmentum there has quite literally torn everything to pieces — there's no sign of life, despite the monsters.
听上去…就我们仨加上希儿，不大够啊。要不要回去地下，让「地火」这就跟我们会合？
It sounds like... The three of us and Seele might not be enough. Why don't we go back underground and get Wildfire to come with us?
I fear we may not have the time.
嗐，也别这么悲观！我干公职的时候常在北边转悠，跟前线的士兵军官混得可熟了。
Hey, enough pessimism! Back in my "official capacity" days, I spent a lot of time in the north — I got to know the soldiers and officers on the front line very well.
硬攻不成，不妨智取。这样吧，我亲自带你们过去，如何？
This calls for brainwaves, not "brawnwaves." How about I take you over myself?
真的吗？好耶！有熟人带路，一下心里就有底了！
Really? Great! Phew, it's less scary if someone you know is leading the way!
哈哈，毕竟我也想亲眼看看「星核」啊——那可是我研究了十多年的课题，人这一辈子才有几个十年呀？
Haha, I wanna see the Stellaron too, y'know — it was my research topic for over a decade. You don't get that many decades in life.
那就这么定了！事不宜迟，准备好了咱们就出发。
That's settled then! There's no time to lose — we should head out as soon as you're ready.
糟、糟了！我忘了老弟说今天会来……
D—Darn it! I forgot my brother said he'd be around today...
你们快找地方躲起来——我来应付他！
Find somewhere to hide — quick — I'll handle him!
杰、杰帕德——你来了啊！我还以为前线这么紧张，你没空过来呢，哈哈……
G—Gepard, it's you! I didn't think you'd have the time to visit with things so tense on the front line, hehe...
还好，这阵子怪物的攻势有所缓和，我先回城里处理点事务，晚些再返回前线…之前不是告诉你了吗？
Things are manageable, the latest wave of monster attacks has slowed. I'm back in the city to take care of a few matters, but I'll be back on the front line later... I thought I told you?
…姐，你气色不太对，发生什么了吗？
...Sis, you look a bit pale. Did something happen?
没、没有的事，你从哪儿看出来的？
N—No, why would anything have happened?
You don't normally use my full name.
哎呀，你不是一直很反感我当众叫你「老弟」嘛！我觉得你说得对，平时还是用名字称呼你比较好，对吧老弟。
*sigh* You said you hate it when I call you "bro" in public! Well I agree. It'd sound better if I started using your full name. Right, broseph?
…想怎么叫随便你吧。姐姐，今天我是为公事来的。「壁垒」装置出了故障，部队里的工程师无从下手。还是得找你看看。

...You can call me whatever you like. Look Serval, I'm here on official business today. There's something wrong with the Barrier Generator Device and the engineers in our unit don't know how to fix it. I need you to take a look.
那帮人思维都僵硬了，当然看不懂我的设计。嗐，我还以为是什么大事，放这儿吧，我来修。
Those guys can't think outside the box. Of course they can't wrap their heads around my design. *sigh* I thought it was something big. Leave it here. I'll take a look.
跟我客气什么？对了，城里突然戒严，是出什么事了吗？
Why are you being so polite? Oh, and why's the city under curfew all of a sudden? Has something happened?
这…我收到的指令是对外保密……
I... I've been instructed to keep it quiet.
小杰杰，翅膀硬了啊…看不起我这个庶民姐姐了……
Lil' Geppie... So grown up now... Looking down on his civilian sister...
你别这样…唉，算了。反正我不说，佩拉也会告诉你的吧……
Don't say that... *sigh* Forget it. If I don't tell you, Pela will...
昨晚，布洛妮娅小姐突然出现，进入克里珀堡，没跟任何人打招呼。
Last night, Lady Bronya suddenly appeared. She entered Qlipoth Fort without saying anything to anyone.
大守护者怀疑之前的三个「入侵者」没有落入裂界，而是尾随布洛妮娅返回行政区。她下令全城戒严，逮捕行迹可疑的人。

The Supreme Guardian is worried that the three intruders may have followed Bronya out of the Fragmentum and back into the Administrative District. She issued a curfew for the entire city, and ordered us to pursue and capture any suspicious individuals.
啊，原来如此，我说布洛妮娅之前怎么没消息呢…她现在怎么样了？
Ah! So that's how it is, no wonder I haven't heard from Bronya... Is she alright?
不清楚。她没离开克里珀堡，大守护者只说她回来了，没提别的。
I'm not sure. She hasn't left Qlipoth Fort. The supreme guardian just said she'd returned. Nothing more.
好吧，我还挺担心她的…她不见之后，佩拉说自己的工作量翻了一倍，连出门都没空了。
Well, I was sure worried about her... After she disappeared, Pela's workload doubled — she said she barely had time to go out.
她还真什么都跟你说啊…啊，对了，上次我把歌德宾馆的年庆限量水壶落在这了，我带走了啊。
She really does tell you everything... Oh, by the way, I left my Goethe Hotel limited-edition flask behind last time I was here. Let me have a look for it. I think I left it over...
怎么了？姐，你今天真的很不正常……
What is it? You seem pretty off today, Serval...
那边…哦，对了！你之前不是养死了好几盆花么？我清理屋子的时候把它们都堆到那边了，味道特别大！你不要过去！
It's, um... right! You remember how you neglected all those flowers to death? I piled them all over there during a bit of spring cleaning, and now they smell terrible! So... don't go over there!
…先不说这是什么奇怪的理由——你真的清理过屋子吗？不会又在搞什么被禁止的研究吧……
...Seems like a strange reason not to take a look... plus, am I supposed to believe you were spring cleaning? You must be up to more forbidden research...
才没有呢——你这家伙，老姐在你眼里到底是什么形象？
Am not — how dare you! What do you take your sister for?
唉…算了，我的确不该侵犯你的私人空间。公务在身，我先走了。
*sigh* Never mind. This is your space, and I shouldn't intrude. I've got business to take care of. Bye for now.
哎！先别走——那个…那些「入侵者」，我就是想问问，他们犯了什么罪？
Hey! Wait a sec — uh... Those intruders, I wanted to ask. What crime have they committed?
蓄谋颠覆筑城者，阴谋破坏贝洛伯格。
They're plotting to overthrow the Architects and bring harm to the city.
嘿…和处分我的理由差不多啊。可可利亚的手段一点没变。
Huh... reminds me of the accusations against me. Cocolia's methods haven't changed.
不要这么说，姐姐。我知道你对大守护者心怀不满，但这开不得玩笑。
Don't say that, Serval. I know that you're still nursing a grievance against the supreme guardian, but this isn't a joking matter.
…又被你教训了。行吧老弟，你慢点走，下次来听我跟佩拉排练。
...You're telling me off again. Fine, whatever bro. You better be going, come listen to Pela and my next rehearsal.
I will... if I have the time.
出来吧，现在应该安全了。
The coast is clear. You can come out now.
呼…憋死我了！这什么电视剧的桥段……
Phew...I nearly suffocated! What kind of plot device was that...
老弟去拿水壶的时候，我才是真的提心吊胆啊……
I almost lost my cool when he went for his flask...
…布洛妮娅有危险，不行，我们得去救她。
...This is bad. Bronya's in danger. We have to go save her.
就我们这几个人去闯克里珀堡？还是打消这个念头吧，希儿姑娘，你本事再大，我也不能放任你去送死啊。
Attempting to storm Qlipoth Fort by ourselves? Forget it, Seele. I don't care how skilled you are. I'm not sending you on a suicide mission.
放心，可可利亚她…她不会对布洛妮娅怎么样的。就算人心善变，至少这点我有信心。
Rest assured, Cocolia may have changed over the years... but she'd never hurt Bronya. I'm certain of that.
…布洛妮娅也说过类似的话，真不明白为什么，你们反对那个可可利亚，某方面又特别相信她。
...You sound like Bronya herself. I don't get it — you guys are against Cocolia, and yet in some ways, you seem to trust her completely.
想到说服杰帕德的办法吗？
Have you thought of a way to persuade Gepard?
刚才试探过了，结果你看到啦？没有铁证拍在脸上，老弟绝不会质疑可可利亚的命令。你们要是先去找了他，计划铁定完蛋。

杰帕德会去铁卫禁区吗？
Is Gepard going to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone?
刚才他都说啦，要先在城里待上一阵。只要我们动作够快，应该就能跟他错开。
Didn't you hear him? He said he needs to take care of a few matters in the city first. If we're fast enough, we can stay out of his way.
走，我们去铁卫禁区。只要抢先一步找到「星核」，可可利亚就拿你们没办法了。
Come on, let's go to the restricted zone. If we can get ahead of the curve and find the Stellaron, Cocolia will be out of options.
布洛妮娅，她真的会平安无事吗？
这么关心她，你们是很要好的朋友吗？
You care about her, huh. You must have become close friends.

Close is... a bit much. But I made her a promise...
放心吧，她是我见过最坚强的姑娘。
Relax, she's the strongest girl I've ever seen.
你听，希露瓦小姐。如果轻轻摇动这个盒子的话，还能听见咣当咣当的水声——
Listen, Miss Serval. If you shake the box lightly, you can still hear the clanging sound of water —
这八成是销毁莎草纸的醋呢。就是那种，呃…如果强行打开，就会自动销毁文件的小机关。
It is probably some kind of vinegar that is used to dissolve papyrus. It's sorta like those kinds of mechanisms where the file would be automatically destroyed if it were forcibly opened.
嗯…那确实不能拆——或者说，拆起来比较麻烦。先让我仔细研究一下……
Hmm... Looks like it shouldn't just be taken apart, or should I say, it'd be hard to non-destructively take it apart. This can be quite the hassle. Let me take a closer look.
所以，我是说，不要再打拆开它的主意啦！
What I'm trying to say is that we shouldn't even try to take it apart!
哟，{NICKNAME}，你怎么来了？有什么东西要修的话就先放那里，等我研究清楚怎么把茉莉小姐的传家宝铁盒拆开再……

Yo, {NICKNAME}, to what do I owe the pleasure? If you have something that needs fixing, just leave it there. I'll have a look after I first figure out how to take apart Miss Molly's heirloom tin box...
啊！我、我只是，有点着急…我不是故意的，希露瓦小姐！无意冒犯！
Oh! I—I'm just, a little anxious... I didn't mean to, Miss Serval! Sorry!
哈哈哈，我只是开个玩笑，别放在心上。
Hahaha, I'm just joking. Rest assured I won't damage it.
你不用回去上班吗，茉莉？
Don't you have to go back to work, Molly?
是这样的——上次的事情之后，我请了个长假。我觉得自己需要别的事转移一下注意力……
The thing is... after what happened last time, I took a long vacation. I feel like I need to switch my mind to something else...
毕竟军队里现在只剩烦心事儿了，我还惹上了不该惹的大人物——我也不知道该不该继续待在技术部…唉。

I mean, there's nothing but chores left for me in the military right now, and also, I messed with some big-wigs that I shouldn't have. I don't know if I should stay in the Technology Division anymore... ugh.
佩拉已经把那件事摆平啦，不用怕。不过我理解你的心情，你就在我的机械屋好好整理一下头绪，想待多久都可以。
Don't worry. Pela has sorted it all out. But I do understand your concerns. You can think this over in my workshop, and stay as long as you want.
你今天不开张吗，希露瓦？
Is the shop not opening today, Serval?
当然开张啦。不过最近都没什么生意呢，我就一直在陪这位茉莉小姐研究她的传家宝。
Of course it's open. But I haven't had much business recently, so I've been helping Miss Molly here with her family heirloom.
不得不说，就算以现在的眼光来看，这小盒子的工艺也十分高级啊——对于这种有趣的东西，我可不能视而不见呢。
I have to say, even by today's standards, the craftsmanship of this little box is highly advanced. I can't just ignore an item this interesting.
见鬼，你们都不用上班吗…
Don't you two have work to do?
哈哈，机械屋可是还在营业呢。只是最近都没生意……
Haha, the workshop is still open. It's just that there's been no business recently...
在上次那件事之后，我请了个长假。我觉得自己需要别的事转移一下注意力。
After that incident last time, I took a long vacation. I feel like I need to switch my mind to something else.
毕竟军队里现在只剩烦心事儿了，我还惹上了不该惹的大人物——我也不知道该不该继续待在技术部…唉。

I mean, there's nothing but chores left for me in the military right now, and also, I messed with some big-wigs that I shouldn't have. I don't know if I should stay in the Technology Division anymore... ugh.
佩拉已经把那件事摆平啦，不用怕。不过我理解你的心情，你就在我的机械屋好好整理一下头绪，想待多久都可以。
Don't worry. Pela has sorted it all out. But I do understand your concerns. You can think this over in my workshop, and stay as long as you want.
总之，如你所见，我和希露瓦小姐正一起研究我的传家宝呢。就是上次事件结束时我们找回来的那个——
Anyway, as you can see, Miss Serval and I are trying to figure out the mystery about my family heirloom together. The one we brought back from the last incident—
我记得父亲曾经和我说过，「这是祖辈们为我们留下的『保险』——被逼入绝境的时候就想办法打开这个铁盒吧。」
I remember my father telling me, "This is the 'insurance' left for us by our ancestors... When there is no other way, find a way to open this iron box."
不过，我们除了发现了一道刻在盒子上的谜题外，就没有任何进展了。我是想直接拆开它，但茉莉一直不同意……
But we haven't made any progress other than finding a puzzle engraved on the box. I wanted to just take it apart, but Molly wouldn't let me...
唉，真是…走投无路的人哪还有心思玩解谜游戏啊，这根本就是在给祖孙后代添堵嘛！
Ugh... What were my ancestors thinking? Why would anyone in dire need have the time to solve puzzles? Way to mess with their children!
So what does the puzzle say?
这就是问题所在——我们现在甚至连谜面都看不懂。对我们来说，这就只是一串没见过的字母罢了。
That's the problem. We can't even read the puzzle. To us, it's just a bunch of letters that we've never seen before.
祖先没留下打开盒子的钥匙吗？
Don't they leave a key as well?
这一点我们也想到了——按理来说，这样的盒子制作出来后，就只能用对应的钥匙才能打开。
We thought about that. Logically speaking, a box like this can only be opened with the corresponding key.
但这盒子用的根本不是普通的弹子锁，而且锁孔形状非常奇怪。与其说是钥匙，不如说像是螺丝、或者钻头一类的东西……
But this box doesn't use a pin tumbler lock mechanism at all, and the shape of the keyhole is so odd. Seems like what it needs is not so much a key, but something like a screw or a drill...
茉莉小姐的祖先显然没给我们留下这种奇形怪状的钥匙，导致我们现在就只能硬着头皮解谜。但无论如何，都得先把谜面解读出来才行。
Apparently, Miss Molly's ancestors didn't leave us any such oddly shaped key, so we have to bite the bullet and solve the puzzle. But in any case, we have to decipher what the puzzle is first.
解读、解读…对啊！希露瓦小姐，{NICKNAME}，你们说，这会不会是铁卫的加密技术？毕竟我们家世世代代都在技术部任职，会用到铁卫的密码也很正常吧？

Decipher... Oh, yes! Miss Serval, {NICKNAME}, could this be the Silvermane Guards encryption technology? After all, our family has worked in the Technology Division for generations, so it won't be a stretch to presume that my ancestors used codes from the Guard, right?
有道理。但我早就被铁卫开除了，这种东西我完全没有印象……

啊，我只是听情报部的同事聊到过这个，具体内容我也不清楚。毕竟我只是基层员工，平时工作里也遇不到这些东西。

Oh, I only once heard my colleagues from the Intelligence Department talking about this. I don't know the specifics. After all, I am just an entry-level employee, and I don't usually encounter these things at work.

Silvermane Guards... Should we ask Captain Gepard for help?

Haha, you wanna ask my brother for help? It'd be much easier to steal the Silvermane Guards' master cipher codebook. My brother wouldn't know a thing about encryption. He usually just leaves this kind of work to Pela...
情报部的同事…要不问问佩拉？
Intelligence Department. Maybe ask Pela for help?
希露瓦，拆铁盒就拜托你了…
So, Serval, please dismantle the tin box...
No! I told you, we're not gonna take it apart...
哈哈，{M#他}{F#她}应该是开玩笑的啦。这时候要是佩拉在就好了，她脑子转得快……
Haha, {M#he}{F#she} is only joking. If only Pela were here. She's always clever with these sorta things...
对啊，佩拉！我怎么把她忘了呢——她不就是情报专家嘛！
You are right, Pela! How could I forget. She's an intelligence expert!
啊，佩拉小姐上午出门前好像说了，她要去买新刊……
Oh, I believe Miss Pela mentioned that she would get a new magazine just before she left this morning.
新刊？哼哼，那我明白了…她休息日经常一整天都泡在书商那里。走，我们找她去。
New magazine, huh? I see... She often spends her off days at the bookstore. Come on, let's go find her.

要不…咱就直接把它拆开呗？
Or... we could just dismantle it?
不行不行！这样会把内容物毁掉的……
No no! That will destroy the contents inside...
嗯…我觉得还是有办法安全拆开它的。你看这里的结构……
Well... I think there's still a way to non-destructively take it apart. You see the structure here...
嗨，菲丝！最近生意怎么样？
呀，这不是希露瓦嘛。生意嘛，还是马马虎虎…不过能像这样填饱肚子之后悠闲地读书，倒也无所谓啦。
Aha, if it isn't Serval. Business? Same old... But it's a nice way to earn a living. Every now and then, I can read leisurely like this.
啊，你是来取那本书的吧？不好意思呢，出版社那边似乎出了点问题，我还没收到货呢。
Ah, are you here to pick up that book? Sorry, there seems to be something wrong with the publisher. I haven't received it yet.
嘿嘿，我的事不急，慢慢来吧。我来找佩拉，她之前来过了吗？
Well, no worries. It's not like I need the book right away. I actually came to see Pela. Was she here earlier today?
佩拉小姐？啊～她刚回去取钱啦，应该就快回来了吧。
Miss Pela? Ah! She just went back to get money. She should be back soon.
Are books sold here that expensive?
她居然也有没带够钱的时候…
Can't believe that she didn't bring enough money...
是这样的——佩拉小姐不知道这次的新刊还有会场限定附刊，所以只带了买普通版的钱……
Here is what happened. Miss Pela wasn't aware that this new magazine has a venue-limited edition, and she only brought enough money for the regular edition...
那个…这到底是什么杂志？会场又是什么？

我猜又是那什么…《雪国冒险奇谭》粉丝们搞的二次创作吧，小说和连环画都有，就是写点小说人物之间的，呃…爱恨情仇。
I am guessing it's fan fiction of that... Tale of the Winterlands. They have both novels and comics. They write about the... relationship... between the characters from the original novels.
不过这些内容都是粉丝们幻想出来的，有的甚至和原著基本上没关系了。他们好像定期会举办交流会，用来交流心得感悟。
But they are all created by fans, and some of them are completely unrelated to the original works. I think they have meetings on a regular basis to share their ideas.

Pela is an important member of the Tale of the Winterlands fan club. They all call her... um, what was it...
没想到佩拉还擅长这种事情…

怎么说呢…厉害的人，果然不管做什么都很厉害啊。

铁卫的生活真是丰富多彩啊。
The Guards really live interesting lives
唉，可能铁卫全军里只有我一个人整天和同事怄气了。
*sigh* Maybe I'm the only one in the Guards who spends all day sulking.
Oh, Artem, you are so gentle...
嘿，看来你和佩拉很有共同语言啊，{NICKNAME}。
Hey, looks like you and Pela have a lot in common, {NICKNAME}.
啊，正好，佩拉小姐回来了！
Ah, right on time, Miss Pela is back!
菲丝，实在不好意思，那本限定场刊先帮我留着吧…我之后再回来拿——那个…你刚刚没让他们看到新刊内容吧？

So, Fizz... Um... This is kinda embarrassing, but could you do me a favor and reserve that limited edition for me... Seems like I'll have to buy it a bit later. Also... You didn't let them see the new edition, did you?
那就好。谢谢你，菲丝，我身为情报官的威严保住了……
Oh, good. Thank you, Fizz. My dignity as an intelligence officer has been saved...
所以你们跑到这里是来做什么的？不要和我说是来买书的，我不信。
So what are you guys doing here? Don't tell me you're here to buy books 'cuz I won't believe it.
我们想请你帮忙破译密码。
We need your help to decipher something.
是的，我和希露瓦小姐在我的传家宝铁盒上发现了一串密码。请问佩拉小姐可以帮忙看看吗？
Yep. You see, Miss Serval and I found a line of code on my heirloom tin box. Can you take a look, Miss Pela?
我想拜读佩拉小姐的大作…
I wanna read Miss Pela's masterpiece...
Yes? How can I help, Miss Pela~
今天这件事，我们回了机械屋再算总账……
Serval, you big mouth! I'll sort you out once we get back to the workshop...
啊，那个…！其实是我和希露瓦小姐在我的传家宝铁盒上发现了一串密码，请问佩拉小姐可以帮忙看看吗？
Um... Actually, Miss Serval and I found a line of code on my heirloom tin box. Miss Pela, can you please take a look?
可以是可以…那我们回机械屋详细说吧。
I mean, I could... Let's go back to the workshop and talk about it in detail.
咦，佩拉小姐不在这里吗？
我们去找菲丝问问看吧。
你就是技术部的茉莉小姐吧？情况还好吗？
You must be Molly from the Technology Division. How are things going?
欸？原来是佩拉长官…对不起，我、我遇到了一些突发状况…万分抱歉！
Huh? Oh, you're Officer Pela... I'm sorry, I—I'm in the middle of an emergency... I am very sorry!
啊，你也来了…那些残次品机器人，都处理好了吗？
Ah, you're here as well, I see... Have those defective robots been dealt with?
All done. No one was hurt.
不对，关我什么事？我根本就是在帮那帮人擦屁股…替他们操心那么多干什么？又不是我的错！
No, wait. Why should it have anything to do with me? All I ended up doing was just cleaning up the mess left behind by those guys... Why should I worry so much for them? It's not like it's my fault!
Did anyone in your family get hurt?
…算了，那群人的死活和我有什么关系。
... Forget it. Why do I care whether they live or die?
家？…哦，原来两位是为这件事来的啊。还好，我一个人住，没有牵连别人受伤。
Family? Oh, is this what you two are here for? Fortunately, I live alone, and no one else got hurt.
我刚才正在军火仓库等你的消息，结果就被那帮人找上门了。他们说，我这次做得太过火了，所以要给我一个警告…我立马意识到事情不对，就拼命跑回家——

I was waiting for your update at the arsenal just now, and those people came to me. They said that I went too far this time, so they gave me a warning... I realized something was wrong, so I ran home as fast as I could —
结果，等我赶回家里的时候…整个屋子已经被他们翻了个底朝天了！所有值钱的、不值钱的…全都、全都被他们抢走了啊！
By the time I got home, the whole house had been turned upside down by them! All the valuables, and even the worthless stuff are gone... Everything. Gone. They took everything!
他们甚至还蹬鼻子上脸，在门窗墙壁上写满了侮辱我的话——
They even wrote insults all over the doors, windows, and walls —
——可我一点办法都没有！难道就只能放任他们胡作非为吗…就没有人能治治他们吗？
But I can't do anything about it! Am I supposed to just let them get away with it... Can't anyone hold them accountable for their actions?
到底为什么…我只是想做好自己的本职工作啊！凭什么我就一定得受这样的羞辱？我到底做错了什么？！
Why... I was just doing my job! Why do I have to be humiliated? What did I do wrong!?
可恶！这世道已经没有正义可言了吗？呜……
Darn it! Is there no justice in this world? *sobbing*...
我们去帮你拿回属于你的东西。
We'll help you take back what is rightfully yours.
这事因我而起，你没必要做到这份上…我只是需要发泄一下……
This happened all because of me. You don't have to do that... I just need to blow off some steam...
别怕，茉莉小姐…这件事并不是你的错，交给我们处理就好——铁卫上层现在已经介入这起事故了。更何况你刚遭到报复，还是别和那帮恶棍硬碰硬为好。

Don't be afraid, Miss Molly... This isn't your fault. Just let us handle this from now on. We the Silvermane Guards are now officially on this case. For now, it's best for you not to directly confront those thugs since they've just shown they are not shy about using violence.
另外，铁卫绝对不会坐视你无家可归的。你可以…呃…先到「永动」机械屋寻求暂时庇护。
Oh, another thing, you can rest assured that we the Silvermane Guards will never let you go homeless. You can... um... seek temporary shelter in the Neverwinter workshop for now.
机械屋的主人，她有能力确保你的安全。见面之后报我的名字就好。
The owner of the workshop can ensure your safety. Just say my name when you meet her.
…可我想和你们一起去！我想亲眼看到那帮恶棍被绳之以法……
... But I want to go with you! I want to see those gang of thugs brought to justice with my own eyes...
…这太危险了，我们要优先考虑你的人身安全。晚些时候，我会协调人员对你的住处进行修缮，现在还请你专注于保护自己，免遭进一步迫害。
...It's just too risky. Your security must be our top priority. I'll arrange to have your house fixed later. For the time being, please just focus on protecting yourself in case of further reprisals.
（她好像还是一副气不过的样子…）
{NICKNAME}，这次事件的犯人我已经心里有数了…他们的名字都在我的记录册上，一个也跑不了。
{NICKNAME}, I already know the people responsible for this... their names are all in my records. They won't get away.
我们走吧，回铁卫禁区一趟，好好会会这群腐败到骨子里的家伙。
Now, let's go back to the Restricted Zone and give those filthy thugs a proper "greeting."
佩拉，你看过之后有什么头绪了吗？
So, Pela, now that you had a look, what do you think?
嗯…你们的思路应该是对的——这种不成文的乱序字母确实很像加密后的结果。不过，既然这是六七百年前的东西，那大概用不到我们现在通行的算法。

Well, I think you guys are probably on the right track. These disorganized letters certainly resemble cryptography. However, given that this was created <unbreak>600</unbreak> or <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago, it most likely uses a completely different encryption algorithm.
啊…那六七百年前的加密算法是什么样的呢？
So, what encryption algorithm did they use then?
我想想…我记得《银鬃铁卫密码学》第七版第二章第四节是这么写的：「建军初期，情报官兼技术部总负责人理查德•巴拉金在全军推广了最早的加密文法——」

Let me think... I remember that in Chapter 2, Section 4 of the 7th Edition of the Silvermane Guards Cryptology, it says, "In the early days of the Guards, Richard Balakin, the intelligence officer and chief of the Technology Division, popularized the earliest encryption method within the force."
「明文的所有字母都在字母表上向后偏移四位，依此法即可得到密文；反之亦可用于解密。」
"All the letters are shifted four places backward in the alphabet, and the ciphertext can be obtained this way; the reverse can also be used for decryption."
How do you remember that so clearly...
这可是身为情报官的基本素养，可不要小瞧我哦。
That's just one of the basic skills of an intelligence officer. So don't underestimate me.
那么，按照这个方法的话…有了——「关键」…「在群山的隘口」…「等候」，「彼处为」…「大守护者」…「运筹之地」？另外，落款是「理查德•巴拉金」。

So, according to this method...it should be... I got it! Here it is: "The key"... "At the mountain pass"... "Waiting," "That place is"... "The Supreme Guardian"... "The place of operation"? In addition, the inscription is "Richard Balakin."
看姓氏，这位理查德确实是我的祖辈——等等，这不就是刚刚佩拉小姐提到的那个人吗？而且他到底在说什么谜语？
Based on the surname, this Richard is indeed my ancestor. Wait, isn't this the guy Miss Pela just mentioned? And what on earth does this mean anyway?
难道是下一条线索的位置？
Could it be the location of the next clue?
你说得对！这句话中提到了两个地点……
You are right! There are two locations mentioned in this sentence...
「群山的隘口」、「大守护者运筹之地」，我猜这指的是那座被裂界侵蚀的边堡要塞？
"The mountain pass," "the place of operation of The Supreme Guardian," I'm guessing it's referring to the fortress that was eroded by the Fragmentum?
而「关键」指的应该就是打开盒子的钥匙。也就是说，这位祖辈把传家宝铁盒的钥匙藏在了残响回廊里。
And the "key" must be referring to the key that opens the box. In other words, this ancestor hid the key of the heirloom tin box in the Corridor of Fading Echoes.
完了…别说普通市民了，就算是铁卫也很难踏足那片裂界，更别说到里面去找东西了。
Uh oh... Even for the Guards, it is difficult to set foot in the Fragmentum, let alone ordinary citizens like us, especially if you want to go searching around inside.
怎么办？好不容易找到了线索，却只能在这一步放弃了吗……
What do we do? We've finally found a clue. Do we have to give up after all?
We can help you find it.
虽然听说你经常在裂界里往来，但那个地方肯定危机四伏吧……
Even for a seasoned traveler like you, the Fragmentum must be too perilous to go into, or so I've heard.
I visit the Fragmentum like it's my home...
那你家可能有点不太宜居……
Then your home must be quite the hell hole...
你真的打算去帮我找「钥匙」吗？太感谢了…不过记得不要勉强，生命安全第一！
Are you really going to help me find the key? Thank you so much! But I don't wanna pressure you into this. Safety should always be the number one priority!
没关系，我会好好看着这家伙的。茉莉小姐，你和希露瓦一起在机械屋等着就好。
Don't worry. I'll look after {M#him}{F#her}. Miss Molly, just wait in the workshop with Serval.
事不宜迟，我们现在就出发吧。你准备好了吗，{NICKNAME} ？
Without further ado, let's go now. Are you ready, {NICKNAME}?
那你准备好了就和我说一声。我就在这里等你。
Then let me know when you're ready. I'll wait for you right here.
没事，等你准备好再说，我就在这里等你。
It's okay. I'll wait for you here when you're ready.
看，{F#她们}{M#他们}俩这不是回来了嘛。
哎？你回来了！怎么样，没遇到危险吧？
Hey? You're back! How was it? Did you run into any danger?
那就好！要是你们因为我的事情出了什么意外……
That's good! If something happens to you because of me...
不说晦气话了，快告诉我发生了什么吧。
Anyway, enough ifs. Please tell me what happened.
欸，真的假的？要是你们因为我的事出了什么意外，我肯定会……
What, for real? If anything happens to you because of me, I'll definitely...
算了，不说晦气话了！快告诉我发生了什么吧。
Never mind, enough ifs. Please tell me what happened.
从老巴拉金的谜题，到有惊无险的栈桥事故，再到奇妙的钻头饰品，你和佩拉一五一十地向二人汇报了此次裂界之旅的见闻。
From old Balakin's puzzles, to the gear bridge incident, to the strange drill ornaments, you and Pela tell them everything you experienced on this trip to Fragmentum.
还真是有趣的冒险经历呢，可惜我没跟着你们去。干脆下次找个机会去调查一下那些机关，把它们都拆开看看好了～
What an interesting adventure. Such a pity I didn't go with you. We should find a chance to investigate those mechanisms and dismantle them next time.
那你首先得过杰帕德这关……
Well, you have to get Gepard's approval first...
总之，两位能平安归来就好，真的非常感谢各位。另外，我也很在意你在那边捡到的东西…快让我看看吧！
Anyway, I'm glad to see you two back safely. I very much appreciate your help. Plus, I'm also very interested in what you've found over there... Let me take a look!
啊！这位巴拉金先辈，年轻的时候还真是…古怪呢。
Ah! This Balakin was really... eccentric when he was young.
嗯？他制服上的这枚勋章，我好像有印象——这应该是「『造物引擎』计划功勋奖章」。
Hmm? I seem to remember that medal on his uniform — it must be the medal of honor from the Engine of Creation Project.
而且，根据勋章的造型来看，这位理查德•巴拉金十有八九是『造物引擎』计划的首席工程师之一。
Also, according to the shape of the medal, this Richard Balakin was probably one of the chief engineers of the Engine of Creation project.
「造物引擎」？那是什么？我好像只在技术部的档案里瞟到过一眼……
Engine of Creation? What is that? I think I may have once seen it in the Technology Division's archives...
据我所知…目前铁卫能接触到的官方记录里，相关记载也寥寥无几。我只知道这是阿丽萨•兰德时期打造的巨型地质改造单元，而且已经全部遗失了。

To the best of my knowledge, there are very few relevant records, even in the official documents the Guards have access to. All I know is that this is a giant geological transformation unit built during the Alisa Rand era, and it's all lost now.
原来如此！感觉这位前辈真是不得了，而且还怪喜欢折腾人的…天才的脑回路都是这么神奇吗？
So I see. This guy was really incredible, and it's also strange that he liked messing with people... Are all geniuses so eccentric?
不管怎么样——谢谢你，{NICKNAME}！这张有趣的照片，我一定会好好珍藏的。
Anyway, thank you, {NICKNAME}! I will definitely treasure this interesting photo.
啊，就是这个！让我看看，这个钻头样的小玩意应该可以完美嵌入铁盒的钥匙孔……
Oh, this is it! Let me see, this drill-like gadget should fit perfectly into the keyhole of this tin box...
我的手都开始抖了，{NICKNAME}——但愿没有让你白跑一趟……
My hands are trembling now, {NICKNAME}. I hope your effort won't be wasted...
... What's this? A piece of paper?
我…好像明白了。我从小就脾气差，其他孩子都不愿意跟我玩在一块。工作了以后，我也经常因为一些看不过眼的小事跟别人发生争执。

I... I think I get it now. I've always had a bad temper, ever since I was little, and all the other kids shunned me. Things didn't get better even after I got a job. I've gotten into quite a few fights with people over some very trivial things.
其实我根本不用试图改变别人…这样只会分散我的注意力，凭空消耗我的热情。
The truth is, I shouldn't even try to change people at all... It's all just a distraction that keeps draining my passion for life itself.
或许…就像祖辈说的：我需要的只是一把扳钳，一枚钻头。
It's just like what my ancestors said — all I ever need is a wrench and a drill.
…我想明白了。我不能再这样下去了。我要辞掉在技术部的工作，找个地方重新开始——这次自立门户。
...I have figured it out. I can't go on like this anymore. I'm quitting my job in the Technology Division to start my own thing. This time, I'll make it on my own.
如果我不在乎外界的干扰，只专注于手上的工作，我就能握住自己的未来。或许…或许有一天还能改变这座城市。
I'll be able to decide my own fate if I ignore the noise from the outside world and just focus on the work I have at hand. One day... maybe... just maybe... I'll be able to bring change to this city.
我的目标就是成为希露瓦小姐这样的人——天不怕地不怕，一心只扑在自己热爱的事业上，还能由此为他人创造价值……
My goal in life is to be like Miss Serval, who has no fear and pursues her work with such passion, while simultaneously creating value for others.
原来茉莉是这样看待希露瓦的啊…没想到她还有被当成正面典型的一天呢。
So this is how Molly sees Serval... Never thought she could be a role model for somebody.
当然啦。虽然在本人面前有点难以启齿，但希露瓦小姐其实一直是我的…偶像。可惜不管是天才般的头脑，还是显赫的家世，这些我一样都没有。

Well, it'd be a bit embarrassing to say it out loud in front of her. Even though I don't have the brain of a genius, nor was I born into an influential family, Miss Serval has always been my role model.
Total independence is hard to achieve.
…你说得对。假如失去了公务身份的保护，我说不定会遭到更可怕的报复。
...You are right. If I were to lose my privilege as a public worker, I might face even more horrific retaliation.
啊，要是我能像希露瓦小姐一样就好啦。有朗道家族作后盾的话，也不至于这样束手束脚了……
Oh, if only I could be like Miss Serval, supported by a family like the Landaus. Then I wouldn't be in so much trouble...
不、不过我一定会努力的！反正我一个人都是这么过来的……
But... but I will try my best! After all, I've already gone through so much on my own.
说什么呢，茉莉？这话我可不爱听了啊。
What are you talking about, Molly? I don't like the sound of that.
... Eh? Did I say something wrong? Sorry!
嗯…倒也不能算说错话，只是我必须指出你这番话中的两个问题——
Well, it's not wrong per se, but I have to point out two inaccuracies in what you said —
第一，我虽然名义上是朗道家的大小姐，但实际上早就被赶出家门了。什么显赫的家室呀，早就是过去式了。

Firstly, even though I am the eldest daughter of the Landau family, I was actually kicked out of the family a long time ago. All that stuff about prestigious family... it's long been a distant memory.
第二，茉莉——你和我其实没有什么区别。你看，咱俩的经历不是很类似吗？都是在军队里混不下去的天才技术人员，都被逼着逃出来自立门户……

Secondly, you and I are really not that different. You see, we actually have similar life experiences. We are both genius technicians who can't fit in with the military, and we are both forced to get out and work on our own...
「天才」？不不，我跟希露瓦小姐不一样，根本算不上什么「天才」……
Genius? No, no, I'm not like you, Serval. I'm no genius...
你怎么还谦虚上了？听{NICKNAME}说，你以前可不是这样哦。
Why are you being so modest now? I heard from {NICKNAME} that you weren't like this before.
请你…请你收我做助手吧！
Please... please take me in as your assistant!
这才对嘛，这才是年轻有为的机械师该有的精气神！我就等你这句话呢！
That's right, that's the spirit of a young and promising mechanic! I've been waiting for you to say this!
为了庆祝希露瓦机械屋迎来第一位助手——就由我来给各位演奏一曲吧！来，佩拉，把你的架子鼓搬出来——
To celebrate the first assistant of Serval's Workshop, let me play a song for everyone! Come on, Pela, get your drum set up here.
好吧好吧…真拿你没办法。不过先让我去菲丝那里一趟，我心心念念的限定场刊还没拿到手呢……
Alright alright... Seems like I can't get out of this one. But let me go to Fizz's place first. I have yet to get my hands on that limited edition magazine yet...
Okay. I want a front-row seat!
其实我对佩拉的场刊很感兴趣…
I'm actually very interested in Pela's magazine.
…别以为我不知道你在打什么算盘！你们——尤其是你，{NICKNAME}——不许跟过来！绝对不许！
... Don't think I don't know what you're up to! You guys — especially you, {NICKNAME} — you are not allowed to follow me! Absolutely not!
怎么还没回来？不会出事了吧……
Why aren't they back yet? Nothing bad happened to them, right?
放心吧，有佩拉在呢，{F#她们}{M#他们}俩肯定没问题。
Don't worry. I trust Pela is capable of handling anything. They will be fine.
啊，是杰帕德！他来迎接我们啦？
Ah, it's Gepard! Is he here to meet us?
还能执行公务，看来他的伤势不算太重。
He's still on duty. Huh, he must have recovered quickly.
走吧，过去跟他打个招呼。
Welcome back to the Administrative District, Trailblazers.
「开拓者」…在这星球上还是第一次被这么称呼欸！
Trailblazers... first time anyone's called us that on this planet!
筑城者们认为，有必要以更符合礼节的方式称呼各位。「外来者」这几个字，听上去终究有些疏远。
The Architects think it's only right that we should address you properly. "Outsiders" is hardly fitting anymore.
…此前在禁区发生的事，请允许我再次向各位致以歉意。你们并非用心险恶之人…我理应更加相信希露瓦的判断才对。
...Please allow me to apologize again for what happened in the restricted zone. You were only trying to help... I should've trusted Serval's judgment.
你只是在履行应尽的职责。
You were just doing your job.
谢谢你的提醒，我会好好考虑的。
I'll keep that in mind, thanks.
Ha! Didn't expect to get wrecked, huh?
你们的实力确实令人钦佩。若非知道你们有要事在身，我很希望你们能协助铁卫训练。
You are excellent fighters. I'd love to have you provide training for the Guards, but I know you have places to be.
布洛妮娅大人的上任宣讲很快就要开始了。我正是受她之托，特地前来告知各位的。
Lady Bronya's inaugural address will begin soon. She asked me to pass on her invitation to you.
咦…这么快就准备好了嘛？她的身体状况……
Huh? That's sooner than I expected. Is she well enough to...
不是很好…但布洛妮娅大人坚持要尽快完成宣讲，给城中的人民一个交代。
Not really... But Lady Bronya insisted on delivering the speech as soon as possible. She wants the people to understand what happened.
宣讲将在永冬铭碑前举行。届时，希望三位都能到场见证。
The address will be held at Everwinter Monument. I hope the three of you can find time to attend.
看！那边聚集了好多市民呀，宣讲快开始了吗？
Look! There's a crowd gathering over there. Is the address starting soon?
嗯，但布洛妮娅似乎还没到场。先找个地方歇息片刻吧。
Looks like it. Bronya hasn't arrived yet, though. Let's find somewhere to wait.
布洛妮娅•兰德大人的上任宣讲即将开始——请各位市民保持安静，协助维持现场秩序！
Citizens of Belobog, I kindly ask for your attention! Lady Bronya Rand's inaugural address will begin shortly. Please remain orderly!
贝洛伯格的市民们，请听我说——
我们今天之所以能聚在这里，共同庆祝这个时刻…是因为一位伟大的「守护者」牺牲了自己，将七百年来一直荼毒这座城市的祸种逐出了我们的家园。

Today we gather here to celebrate our victory... but it was a sacrifice made by a mighty guardian that delivered us this opportunity. She dispelled an evil that cost us <unbreak>700</unbreak> years of suffering... and in the process, she paid the ultimate price.
可可利亚•兰德的牺牲为我们翻开了历史的新篇章。城墙外的风雪将会逐渐平息，裂界的扩张也必将被铁卫的攻势抑制。
The sacrifice of Cocolia Rand ushers in a new chapter. The blizzard beyond the walls will die away and the offensives of our Silvermane Guards will begin to contain the Fragmentum's advance.
在极北之地，我亲眼见证了前任大守护者与不可名状的力量展开的抗争。在生命的最后，她也向我倾诉了自己最大的遗憾……

In the far north, I witnessed with my own eyes the struggle between the late supreme guardian and the evil power that sought to destroy us. In her last moments, the supreme guardian told me her greatest regret...
…那就是隔绝了上下层区十余年的封锁令。随着时间的推移，她开始认识到自己的决策带来的严重后果…她虽心存愧疚，却早已无法回头。

...The order to seal off the Underworld from the Overworld. With the passage of time, she gradually came to realize the consequences of that decision... Although tortured with guilt, she could not undo the damage.
因此，她在临终前留下嘱托…在「星核」的影响消散之际，她希望贝洛伯格能够重归完整。她希望上下层区的人民能共同迎接黎明。
In her final moments, she wanted us to mark the Stellaron's end by reuniting Belobog. Overworlders and Underworlders must embrace the dawn of a new age... together.
下层区的各位——我无法奢求你们的原谅，因为亲身的经历已经告诉我，这十余载的岁月给你们留下了太多伤疤。
People of the Underworld, I dare not ask for your forgiveness — I now know the reality of your decade of suffering...
…但我渴求你们的合作。因为我们都十分清楚…缺少了你们的坚毅和汗水，贝洛伯格的复兴将无从谈起…文明的存续也将无从谈起。
But I want us to work together. We know that without your perseverance and hard work, Belobog will not recover its former glory... and the seed of civilization will not be preserved.
另外…我还想借此机会，向贝洛伯格的几位客人表示感谢。
...And on that note, I'd like to extend my heartfelt gratitude to a few guests of the city.
你们中的大多数并不知晓他们的存在…但正是他们的到来，为这个濒临枯萎的世界浇灌了希望。
Most of you were not aware of their arrival... but it is thanks to them that our world now flourishes with hope.
也正是他们的到来让我意识到，在着眼于「存护」脚下这片土地的同时，我们也不该忘记仰望天空。
They made me realize that while we remain focused on "preserving" the ground beneath our feet, we should not forget to look up into the sky.
我坚定不移地相信，在你我共同的努力下，我们的世界——被「开拓者」们称之为「雅利洛-Ⅵ」的这个世界——必将重新投身星辰的怀抱。
I firmly believe that with the determination of everyone, our world, the world the Trailblazers call "Jarilo-VI," will no longer be alone among the stars.
但在完成这个目标之前，请允许我暂时以谦卑的身份引领大家前进……
But before we accomplish that goal, I humbly ask you to follow me into the future...
我，布洛妮娅•兰德，贝洛伯格第十九任「守护者」，在此宣誓——
I, Bronya Rand, the nineteenth guardian of Belobog, hereby take my oath...
布洛妮娅大人！布洛妮娅大人！贝洛伯格，永屹不倒！
Lady Bronya! Lady Bronya! Long live Belobog!
又回到这间办公室了…想起上一次来到这里，仿佛就是上次。
Back in this office again... The last time I was here was... the last time I was here.
这回感觉不到奇怪的视线啦！
No more unnerving gaze this time! Hehe...
三月，丹恒，还有{NICKNAME}——你们能赶上宣讲真是太好了。
March, Dan Heng, {NICKNAME}... it's wonderful you made it to the address.
抱歉，我知道日程安排得过于紧密…但我不想让市民们等太久。无端的猜疑越多，局面就越容易失去控制。

Sorry, I know the invitation was very last minute... but I needed to get the news out as soon as possible. The longer people waited, the more rumors started to swirl. The situation risked spinning out of control.
Yes, I'm fine now. Don't worry.
那个时候…母亲尝试着将「星核」的声音也植入我的脑海。那种感受…是撕心裂肺般的折磨。幸好你们及时赶到。
My mother... she tried to force the voice of the Stellaron into my head... It was a terrible feeling. I don't know what would've happened if you hadn't shown up.
宣讲的时候好像没看到希儿。
Was Seele not there for the address?
她在现场，只是待在你们注意不到的地方。
She was there. She just made sure no one could see her.
希儿才刚刚离开那种闭塞的环境，不习惯这种场面也很正常…我会带她慢慢适应的。
Seele is still new to the vastness of the Overworld — she feels uncomfortable in a big crowd... I'll help her adjust to life here.
布洛妮娅的讲话还真是振奋人心呀！换成我的话，肯定紧张得站都站不稳啦。
That was some speech, Bronya! If I had to talk like that in front of a huge crowd, I'd be shaking head to toe!
不过是在用表面美好的话术编织谎言而已。希望你永远不用经历这些，三月。
It was all just a bunch of palatable lies. I hope you never have a similar experience, March.
重振文明的决心是真的。
The part about preserving the seed of civilization was real.
It's what you do as a leader that matters.
善意的谎言也是必须的。
Sometimes people need to hear white lies.
嗯。我想永远对民众保持诚实…但我更想「存护」住他们的希望。
Mm... I'd prefer to be honest with the people... but I also want to preserve their hope.
…丹恒，那个…杨叔的结论现在要说吗？
...Dan Heng, wanna... talk about Mr. Yang's findings?
将瓦尔特的观测结果转述给了布洛妮娅……
也就是说，裂界的影响已经扎根过深，就算现在封印了星核，也没法即刻逆转……
...Which means the Fragmentum has already taken root by this point. Even though the Stellaron is sealed, we won't be able to reverse the damage immediately...
星核就是这么可怕的东西。
我明白。前人如果不是面对毁灭的威胁，也不会冒险使用它。
I know. Our ancestors wouldn't have risked using one if they'd had other ways of avoiding calamity.
为了让这个世界免受劫难，各位已经倾注了所有努力，{NICKNAME}甚至险些为了它牺牲性命——我无权要求你们付出更多。
You've gone out of your way to save this world. {NICKNAME}, you nearly lost your life. I have no right to ask for more.
而且，那位瓦尔特先生的话我很赞同呀。贝洛伯格的命运，最终还是得由她的子民掌握……
Besides, I agree with Mr. Yang. Ultimately, the fate of Belobog is in the hands of its own people...
我们会找到根除裂界的方法。
We will find a way to root out the Fragmentum.
列车组会尽可能帮助你们。
The Astral Express will do everything within our power to help.
那…作为「领袖」，我也必须给出与之对等的承诺才行。
In that case... as a leader, I must give you a promise of the same weight.
我们一定会尽全部的努力，坚持到「开拓者」返航的那天。就算要再花上七百个年头…雅利洛-Ⅵ的孩子也会一直仰望星空，心怀希望。

We will hold out with everything we have until the day you Trailblazers return. Even if it takes another <unbreak>700</unbreak> years, the children of Jarilo-VI will look up to the sky with hope in their hearts.
再见了，朋友们。愿星空「存护」你们的旅途。
So long, my friends. May the Preservation bless your journey.
{NICKNAME}，恭喜呀！你的第一次「开拓之旅」，到此就顺利结束啦！
Congrats, {NICKNAME}! That was one heck of a first trailblazing expedition!
从一到五，给这次旅程打分…
On a scale from 1 to 5, how would you rate this journey...
…什么啊，居然连及格分都没有吗？
我的评判标准和你不同。
My scoring criteria are different from yours.
嘁！还是采访一下{NICKNAME}吧——有什么获奖感言吗？
Ugh! Anyway, we should be asking {NICKNAME}... Any thoughts you want to share?
什么什么？那可不行，眼看咱都要离开了，我连像样的照片都没拍过几张呢。
Wait, what? No way — we're about to leave and I've hardly got any decent photos.
走吧，我们再去行政区溜达一圈！
Come on, let's go back to the Administrative District and hang out for a bit longer!
I feel like I could fight a hundred more monsters!
真精神呀，要的就是这股劲！走吧——回列车之前，我还得多拍几张纪念照才行。
That's the spirit! Come on, we should take some more photos before we head back to the Express.
出发，再去行政区溜达一圈！
Let's go! One more round in the Administrative District!
What will the next adventure be like?
肯定也会很难忘吧，哎呀，现在别想那么远，珍惜当下！
Equally unforgettable, I'm sure. Anyway, don't worry about the future — live in the moment!
走吧，我们再去行政区溜达一圈！我还想多拍几张纪念照呢。
Let's go for one more round in the Administrative District! I wanna take more photos!
I never thought that I would...
...be able to survive up till now.
Is the cable car station operating?
布洛妮娅说，愿意为了我们再等上七百年……
Bronya said she's willing to wait <unbreak>700</unbreak> years for us...
唔…丹恒，最长寿的人类能活到多少岁呀？
Hmm... Dan Heng, how long can humans live for?
…无穷无尽。但，那已经不能称之为人类了。
...Forever. But in that scenario, they can't be considered human anymore.
我就问问，你别突然这么严肃啊……
Yikes! So serious! I was just curious.
呵…照片拍完了，街也逛累了，接下来……
*yawn* ... That's enough sightseeing and photo-taking to last me a while...
…接下来，就该去歌德宾馆好好睡上一觉了！
...Time to head back to the Goethe Hotel for a good night's sleep!
...We can sleep when we're back on the Express.
什么啊，之前都住进豪华客房了，却被那个坏女人给算计了一把…你们不觉得不甘心吗？
Not so fast! Last time we were here, that evil Madam Guardian interrupted us before we'd gotten the most out of our luxury suites... Don't you think we should make up for it?
走啦走啦，才一晚而已——姬子和杨叔都是成熟的大人，很有耐心的！
Come onnnn! Himeko and Mr. Yang are grown-ups — I'm sure they'll cope without us for one night.
造物引擎、可可利亚、虚幻的宇宙空间、「存护」的视线——与那场决战相关的画面不断闪回交错，最终拼凑成了一段模糊且不真实的记忆胶片。
The Engine of Creation, Cocolia, an ethereal outer space, the gaze of Preservation... your fragmented memory of the battle forms a blurry and surreal montage.
画面的最后一帧定格在了星核随可可利亚消散前的一秒。那短暂的一瞬，似乎有某个陌生的声音贴近了你的耳边…然后低语……
In the midst of this frantic tapestry of events, you see the moment Cocolia perished with the Stellaron. A strange voice speaks to you in a hushed tone...
但那声音稍纵即逝。你尝试着回溯到记忆的前一帧，却发现手中的胶片已经被切断了，切口干净利落，不留任何痕迹。
But the voice passes rapidly. You try to recall what you saw in those fleeting moments, but find no trace.
然后，你又一次听到了女人的声音……
All of a sudden, you hear it again... a female voice in your ear...
「在旅途的尽头，所有困扰你的谜题都将会解开。」
"At the end of your journey, all that perplexes you and troubles you will resolve."
——对啊，当时可真是千钧一发！好在我桑博灵机一动：嘿！我又没必要去担任那个主角，是不是？咱们当好戴面具的丑角就对了嘛。
Aw, it was a close thing alright! Good thing it dawned on me: Hey, Sampo doesn't have to be a protagonist, right? The likes of us are better suited to... shadowy comic relief, huh?
事实证明，星穹列车这伙人比我想得还要有趣！你很喜欢？当真？哈哈哈，真是杰作啊。
Turns out the Astral Express crew is more fun than I expected! You liked it? Really? Haha, told you so!
…不不，我还不想离开这儿。什么，艾普瑟隆？那种纸醉金迷的地方有什么乐子好找？「越能体现人性尊严的快乐，越是高级的快乐」——这才有趣！

...No no, I'm in no hurry to leave. What? Oh, Epsilon? Pff. What fun can you get out of a giant vanity fair like that? "True happiness always entails the manifestation of the dignity of mankind..." Now that's a quote I live by.
好，拜啦。替我向酒馆的兄弟姐妹们问好，别忘了告诉他们——就说敬请期待我老桑博的下一场戏！现在我要谢幕啦。
Well, bye for now. Send my regards to the guys and girls in the tavern. Oh, and don't forget to say that Sampo Koski will catch them for the next one. Time to make my curtain call.
这个故事敬献给您，亲爱的看官——不知您是否从中得到了少许欢愉？
To you, my dear audience, I dedicate my performance... I wonder, did I bring a little more joy into your lives?
——如果您说没有，啊，桑博会很伤心喔。
...You don't have to answer that — but if the answer is no, then you'll break my heart.
（该回列车了，去找三月和丹恒吧。）
We should be getting back to the Express. Time to find March and Dan Heng.
早上好呀，{NICKNAME}！睡得怎么样？我现在可是精神满满！
Morning, {NICKNAME}! How did you sleep? I'm full of energy myself!
…我明白了，又开始复读了是吧。
...Copycatitis still has no cure I see.
噫，真晦气！我去翻翻黄历，没准今天不宜出行。
You poor thing! I'll go check the lunar calendar — today might be unlucky.
真舍不得这宾馆的床呀…好松好软好舒服！
*sigh* But the beds here are so nice!
收到姬子的信息了吧？该回去了。若是延误了发车，列车长又该唠叨了。
Did you get Himeko's message? It's time to go. The conductor will nag us again if we put the Express behind schedule.
收到了收到了——带好行李和纪念品，我们回家！
Yeah, yeah. Well, pack your souvenirs and stuff. Back home we go!
Leave Jarilo-VI and return to the Express.
还想再看这个世界几眼…
I want to have one last look at this world...
…「优先级」？什么意思？难道在你看来，下层区城镇的重建工作不够重要吗？
...Priorities? What do you mean? Are you saying rebuilding the Underworld isn't one of your "priorities"?
不！当然不是这个意思——只是我们当下可调用的资源有限，必须重新规划。
Of course not! I'm just saying we have limited assets, and we need new parameters.
资源…规划…你现在怎么就爱往我脸上甩这种词？
Assets... parameters... You sure love your fancy words.
算了，这事你别管了。看来还得我自己下去…啊——
Ugh, forget it. Leave it to me. I'll go down myself...
…不要意气用事，希儿！我不会放你——
...Come on, Seele! I won't leave you to—
他们这一路上…肯定还会遇到不少困难吧？
There'll be plenty of difficulties waiting for them, right?
嗯…也许会比我们面临的未来更加艰险。
Yes... their future is filled with even more uncertainty than ours.
但我们一定会战胜困难。哪怕这意味着，类似这样的争执要一直持续下去……
But we will prevail here... Even if it means arguments like this go on forever...
...Hmph, they won't go on forever if I win them.
到啦，永冬铭碑！拍照拍照！
Here we are, Everwinter Monument! Photo time!
咦，佩拉和虎克也在？怎么说，要不要把她俩也拍进去？
Oh, Pela and Hook are here too? Let's make sure we get them in the background!
不必了，我追求画面纯净。
Maybe we could try for a cleaner composition for this one...
好主意，拍完也给她们看看。
Good idea. Let's show them the photos once we're done.
对了，咱们回来以后还没见着希露瓦呢！去机械屋看看吧。
Oh, we haven't seen Serval since we got back! Let's head to the workshop.
——谁啊？不敲门就闯进来，知不知道……
Who's there? Didn't your parents tell you to knock before—
哎呀，原来是你们仨！快来快来，我跟克拉拉刚才还聊起你们了呢。
Ha, it's you three! Come on in! I was just talking to Clara about you.
又见面了，{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}——希露瓦姐姐的小屋真的好神奇，什么宝贝都有…克拉拉很喜欢这里！
How have you been, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}? Miss Serval's workshop is amazing — there are all kinds of things... I like it here a lot!
克拉拉这孩子…真是太懂事了！哪像那群筑城者家的熊孩子，张口就是「阿姨」、「阿姨」……
"Miss Serval..." Clara is such a well-mannered kid! Meanwhile, the Architects' children are still calling me "auntie" and making me feel old...
Still looking to hire assistants for the workshop?
不对不对，才不是这句台词！我们是来拍照留念的。
Hey, that's not your line! We're here to take a photo, remember?
拍照？我还以为只有粉丝见面会才有这个环节呢——看在你们仨的面子上，我可以帮你们免费签名哦！
Photo? ...This feels like one of my fan meet-ups, haha. Anyway, for you guys, I'd do autographs for free.
「拍照」…啊，克拉拉想起来了——我还小的时候，史瓦罗先生也给克拉拉「拍照」过……
"Photo..." Oh! I remember. When I was little, Mr. Svarog took a photo for me...
来，克拉拉！站过来点儿，姐姐教你几个拍照的最佳角度……
Over here, Clara! Wanna learn some cool poses?
拍完了吗？快，给我们看看！
哎呀，真不错！我演唱会前排的摄影师要是有你一半的功力就好了！
Wow, that's pretty great! I wish the photographers at my shows had your skills!
咦…克拉拉原来这么矮吗？我还以为……
Huh...? Am I really that short? I thought...
没事没事，只要营养跟上了，克拉拉也一定能长到和丹恒一样高的！
Don't worry! If you eat like Dan Heng, you'll be as tall as him one day! *stifled laughter*
这张照片就送给你们吧，就当作是列车组的临别礼物。
Here, keep it... a little farewell gift from the Astral Express.
这…你这完全就是拍了个寂寞嘛！
...There's gotta be a better shot than this one!
唔…明明克拉拉费了很大力气才没有眨眼……
Um... I was trying really hard not to blink...
唉…咱就不该相信业余摄影师……
*sigh* We shouldn't have trusted an amateur...
呃，算了，怎么说也算有点纪念意义…这张照片就送给你们吧，就当作是列车组的临别礼物。
Never mind, at least it's memorable... A little farewell gift from the Astral Express.
啊…你们这么快就要走了吗？
我明白了，那这张照片我可得好好保管。晚点我也会帮你复制一份的，克拉拉。
*sigh* I understand. Well, this photo will always be close to my heart. I'll make a copy for you too, Clara.
谢、谢谢希露瓦姐姐！{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，三月姐姐，还有丹恒哥哥…感谢你们此前的照顾，希望你们这一路上能平平安安的。
Th—Thanks Miss Serval! {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother} {NICKNAME}, March, Dan Heng... Thanks for taking care of me. Safe travels.
有时间的话…请一定要再来看克拉拉和史瓦罗先生呀。
If you have time... please come back and visit me and Mr. Svarog.
呵…照片拍完了，街也逛累了，接下来……
*yawn* ... That's enough sightseeing and photo-taking to last me a while...
…接下来，就该去歌德宾馆好好睡上一觉了！
...Time to head back to the Goethe Hotel for a good night's sleep!
...We can sleep when we're back on the Express.
什么啊，之前都住进豪华客房了，却被那个坏女人给算计了一把…你们不觉得不甘心吗？
Not so fast! Last time we were here, that evil Madam Guardian interrupted us before we'd gotten the most out of our luxury suites... Don't you think we should make up for it?
走啦走啦，才一晚而已——姬子和杨叔都是成熟的大人，很有耐心的！
Come onnnn! Himeko and Mr. Yang are grown-ups — I'm sure they'll cope without us for one night.
再说了，贝洛伯格难得变得这么热闹，你们就不想再多找人聊聊天吗？我反正还没待够呢！
Besides, don't you want to chit-chat with the locals now that Belobog is full of life again? I know I do!
终于到了这个时候…唉，道别真是令人伤感呀……
Here we are at last... *sigh* It's sad to say goodbye.
天下没有不散的宴席。等回到列车上，你的伤感就该消失得差不多了。
Nothing lasts forever. You'll stop feeling sad the moment you set foot on the Express.
在你眼里我就这么没心没肺吗……
Hey, I'm not that heartless y'know...
潮水般的倦意向你袭来……
You're overwhelmed by a sea of weariness...
喔…喔…！好大的冰块呀！但是这里明明很温暖…上层区人就不怕冰块化掉嘛？
Whoaaaa! So much ice! But it's warm here... aren't you Overworlders worried it'll melt?
不会哦。虽然颜色跟冰块很接近，但你们眼前看到的其实是用地髓结晶雕刻成的纪念碑。
Not at all. It may look like ice, but it's actually a monument carved out of Geomarrow crystal.
啊，地髓！可惜老爹不在，否则肯定能把它卖出个好价钱！
Ah, Geomarrow! It's a shame daddy isn't here — He'd find a buyer for it and sell it for big bucks!
呃…怎么说呢？只有这块地髓是绝对的「非卖品」……
Uh... How do I explain... This particular piece of Geomarrow is definitely not for sale...
Have a look! I took a photo of everyone.
照片？那是啥，快给虎克看看！
A "photo?" What's that? Hook wants to see it!
我必须提醒你，未经他人同意就进行拍摄，是违反贝洛伯格治安……
I must remind you that taking photos of others without gaining their permission violates Belobog public security ordinance number...
…欸？你的拍照技术…还挺不错的嘛。而且…画面居然这么清晰？
...Wait, that's a nice picture! And... it's crystal clear.
哇，这张「照片」…太厉害啦！可以送给虎克吗？
Wow! Photos are awesome! ...Can Hook have it?
嘿嘿，喜欢吧？拿去拿去，就当是姐姐送你的临别礼物啦！
Hee-hee, you like it? It's yours. A farewell gift from us.
那个，请问…请问您是奥列格兵长吗？
U—Uh, excuse me... are you Captain Oleg?
…哦？没想到啊，过去这么长时间，居然还有人记着我的名字呢？
...Huh? I didn't think anyone would still remember my name after all this time.
当然听过！您从前的英勇战绩，每个年轻铁卫都耳熟能详！
Of course we remember! Every young guard knows about your courageous exploits!
是吗？那你们都听说什么了？是只用三发子弹就解决了失控徘徊者的那回，还是连续六天不吃不喝，死守被怪物围攻哨站的那回？
Oh? Which ones might they be? The time I finished off that rampaging prowler with just three bullets? Or when I defended the outpost from monsters for six days straight without food or water?
您说的这两件事，我都没听过…请、请务必仔细给我讲讲！
I haven't heard of either of them actually... But I'd love to hear all about them!
哈哈哈，好！那我也不去别处闲逛了，就趁这个机会跟你好好说道说道……
Hahaha, sure! In which case, I'll cut my walk short and tell you all the grisly details...
喔哦！克拉拉，你看到了嘛？刚才有一头超大——超大的铁皮怪兽跑过去啦！
Wow! Did you see that, Clara? A super suuuper big steel monster just ran past!
那应该不是怪兽…史瓦罗先生的资料里有相关的记录，它叫…唔 ，一下子想不起来了。
I don't think that's a monster... Mr. Svarog's database has information about it. It's called... hmm, I can't remember.
没关系，名字没那么重要啦！最关键的是，我看到了哦——那个怪兽，它的胃口超级大，把很多人都吞进去了！
Don't worry about the name! The important thing is I saw what it can do — it has a huuuuge appetite and swallows people whole!
嘿嘿，鼹鼠党的下个目标已经定啦…打倒铁皮怪物，解救被吃掉的倒霉蛋们！
And it just so happens to be The Moles' next target, hehe... We'll defeat the iron monster and save the people in its tummy!
唔…克拉拉觉得，事情应该不是这样的……
Um... I don't think that's how it works...
Sasha! My Sasha, is that you?
爸爸——琥珀王在上，我还以为自己这辈子都见不到你了！
Dad! — by the Amber Lord, I thought I was never going to see you again!
赞美存护，孩子，赞美祂的宽宏…这个小家伙是…？
Praise the Preservation, my child. Praise THEIR leniency... And who's this little one?
Here, Barry... say hello to grandpa!
我的孙子…这是我的小孙子？呜……
My grandson... Is this my grandson? *sob*
抱歉，爸爸，本来应该让你也见自己女婿一面的。但他在杂志社的工作实在太忙，脱不开身。
Sorry Dad, I wanted to introduce you to my husband too, but he can't get away from the publisher today.
没关系的，女儿，我们以后有的是机会…等会儿，你刚才说「杂志社」？
That's okay, my child, we've got all the time in the... did you say "publisher"?
{NICKNAME}，你有过类似的感受吗？偶尔停下脚步，回想自己曾经做过的事…你会感叹自己一路以来居然战胜了那么多的困难，感叹自己曾经坚强得难以置信……
I don't know if you've ever had that feeling, {NICKNAME}... When you stop and look back on the things you've done, and wonder at all the obstacles you've overcome, the strength you've displayed...
然后你会陷入自我怀疑。怀疑你已经失去了当初的那份能量…怀疑如果一切再重来一次，你会无法复制那个勇敢的自己。
And then you start to doubt yourself, and wonder if you've lost that drive... If everything were to happen again, would you still stand strong?
你能理解？太好了…我的意思是，知道这世界上有人能和自己感同身受，真是再好不过的事了。
You do? Good... I mean, it's good to know someone in this world feels the same way as me.
我还不太能理解你的感受。
I don't quite understand what you mean.
的确，你和大多数人都不一样——你全身上下，无时无刻不散发着自信。
And that's not surprising — you're different from others. You seem to radiate a confidence most people don't have.
封锁的这十几年里，我的精神没有一秒不处于紧绷的状态。倘若我有丝毫松懈，「地火」的根基就有可能动摇…下层区就有可能陷入万劫不复的境地。
I haven't been able to sit back once over the past ten years — a moment's negligence could have brought Wildfire crashing down... and the Underworld would've been beyond saving.
最难的不是时刻保持警醒，而是看不到坚持的尽头…不知道自己何时才能放松下来。
Staying vigilant wasn't the issue... it was the not knowing whether I'd ever be able to let my guard down again...
不管别人怎么想——在我心里，你们的到来就是对我漫长守候的奖赏。谢谢你，「开拓者」。
No matter what anyone says, I believe your arrival was the reward for my long vigil. Thank you, Trailblazer.
假如一直低着头行走，每一步都害怕陷进泥潭…我们的脚步一定会越发沉重，士气也会变得低迷。
If you walk with your head down and your heart full of fear, your steps will grow heavier and your spirit will suffer.
如果我们找到了某样值得仰望的东西…满怀希望地上路，步子都会变得轻盈，就算被绊倒了也能很快振作起来，重新出发。
But if you find something to look up to and move forward with hope, then your steps will grow lighter... and if you should fall, you'll be on your feet before you know it.
——谢谢你们教会了我这些，开拓者。
...Thank you for teaching me this, Trailblazers.
上任仪式进行得很顺利。我是没想到，居然会有那么多下层区居民跑来听宣讲。
The inauguration ceremony went very smoothly. I didn't expect so many Underworlders to come and listen to the address.
而且大家也都表现出了支持。看来布洛妮娅给他们留下的印象还不错。
Everyone seemed supportive, too. Seems like Bronya made a pretty good impression on them.
兴许是两位首领美言了几句。
Maybe Natasha and Oleg helped promote her a little.
的确有可能，他们一向想得周到。
只要他们俩都认可布洛妮娅的为人，那追随「地火」的大家也就不会质疑了。
If those two approve of Bronya, then everyone following Wildfire won't question her either.
你在现场吗？我没看到你。
Were you there? I don't think I saw you.
当然在，我只是混在人群里。你们没注意到我，就证明我的目标达到了——我想用自己的方式保证布洛妮娅的安全。
Of course I was! I was just hidden in the crowd. I'm glad you didn't notice me — means I'm doing something right. I want to protect Bronya in my own way.
她原本希望我能站在她身边，但我觉得这样更好。更何况…我也不太习惯被那么多双眼睛盯着。
She wanted me to stand next to her, but I'm glad I stuck to my guns. Besides, I'm not sure I could handle that many people staring at me.
她会成为一位杰出的领袖。
She will be an outstanding leader.
那是当然。还在下层区的时候，我就看出来了。
No doubt. I figured that out back in the Underworld.
我们马上要离开贝洛伯格了。
离开…？这么快？我以为你们还能再多待几天，至少等到情况稳定下来……
Leave...? So soon? I thought you'd stay for a few more days — at least until everything had calmed down...
啊…我明白了。还有人在等着你们回去，然后才好继续旅行，对吧？
Ahh... I get it. People are waiting for you to go back so you can keep traveling, right?
可惜，我本来以为咱们还有时间…还能好好聊聊那些我丁点儿都不懂的话题。看来只有等下次了。
Shame, I thought we'd have more time to discuss all the crazy things you guys like to talk about. Looks like that'll have to wait till next time.
…可别否定我。我坚信，咱们一定会再见面的。
...And before you say anything, there will be a next time. I know we'll meet again.
上任仪式开始之前，我收到了布洛妮娅的消息——她把在贝洛伯格北方发生的事都告诉我了。关于「星核」，还有可可利亚的牺牲……
I received Bronya's message before the inauguration ceremony. She told me everything that happened north of Belobog — about the Stellaron, and Cocolia's sacrifice...
呃…听布洛妮娅的就对了。
老实说，我觉得那姑娘在对我掩饰什么。以我对可可利亚的了解…她才不是那种会突然转变心意的家伙。
...Honestly, I feel that girl is hiding something from me. I knew Cocolia well, and she was never one to suddenly change her mind.
不过放心吧，我不会深究的。布洛妮娅既然选择了这套说辞，证明她肯定已经充分考虑过了。
*sigh* Don't worry, I won't dig too deep. I know Bronya must have thought long and hard before deciding what to make public.
只是对我来说，缺少了「星核」这个曾经疯狂追逐的课题…心里难免有点空落落的。
I just... feel a bit empty now that we've lost the Stellaron — I spent a long time pursuing it, after all...
至于可可利亚…至少她能以伟人的身份被大多数人记住。这样也好……
As for Cocolia, the best side of her will live on in people's memory. That's not all bad...
希露瓦姐姐…很酷，很厉害，而且还很开朗……
Miss Serval is cool, strong, and... carefree...
克拉拉一定也要成为像她一样的大人，这样才能保护好大家——也能保护史瓦罗先生！
I want to be like her when I grow up so I can protect everyone... and protect Mr. Svarog!
这一晃就是十好几年…真高兴还能在宾馆大堂见到你，大哥。
It's been more than a decade... I'm so glad to see you in the hotel lobby again, Mr. Goethe.
不可思议…上次带你参观宾馆就好像是昨天发生的事。我年纪大了，很多事都记不清了…但只有这件事的画面一天比一天清晰。
Unbelievable... feels like it was just yesterday that I was showing you around the hotel all those years ago. I'm too old to remember a lot of things... but that day I remember clearly as ever.
既然上下层的联系又被打通了，咱们两家也该多交流交流待客经验了。
Since the passage between the Overworld and Underworld has opened up again, it's about time we shared some tips with each other, hotel manager to hotel manager.
当然，当然！我之前还一直担心，没了上层区的客源，老妹你的生意会不会做不下去…没成想你的饭店还活的好好的，多亏了你经营有方！

Of course, of course! I was worried before that after losing customers from the Overworld you would go out of business... but your establishment is still alive and well, all thanks to your superb management!
过奖了，歌德大哥！我家店面正好在装修，等我忙活完了，一定请你再来参观一次。
You flatter me, Goethe! My hotel is getting refurbished. I'll be sure to invite you to visit again when the work is all done.
All requires the signature of the Supreme Guardian.
How could there be so many?
That girl was always paranoid since she was little...
After all, you are very dignified in your speech.
My mother lived here as a child, you know.
So can Alina stay here too?
Yes, let me check with mother about the price...
Mr. Goethe! Long time no see!
——哟，真是说什么来什么！我正想着你什么时候会到呢，嘿。
Ah, speak of the devil! I was just wondering when you might show up, hehe.
I never say no to a free afternoon tea...
放心，饮料甜点都管够！今天我请客，想喝什么随便点。
Don't worry, there's enough to go around! On the house — order whatever you like.
这么着急啊…我都没准备呢。
Didn't realize you were in such a hurry... I'm not ready yet.
咱俩谁跟谁呀，有什么好准备的～敞开肚子喝就是啦。
Ready? My stomach's always ready for food and drink!
Have you placed my orders yet?
噢，原来我没开消息提醒……
Oops, forgot to check my messages...
抱歉抱歉，是我不好…不过现在点也来得及，想喝什么随便点！
Sorry, my bad... but it's not too late! You can order anything you want!
毕竟…今天可能要找你咨询挺多事的，只好用这种方法弥补啦。
There's something I need your help with — I had to make it up to you somehow.
不过，今天来喝下午茶的人可真够多的。恐怕我们俩得站着聊了。
...Looks like we're not the only ones who wanted afternoon tea today though. We'll have to stand up for the time being.
Well, I'll help myself to the tea then.
哈哈，也别喝太多啦，小心晚上睡不着。
Haha, don't drink too much, or you won't be able to sleep tonight.
不过嘛，话说回来…其实我约你这趟出来，是有点事想拜托你。
Anyway... about the something I needed your help with.
有事直说呗，咱俩谁跟谁呀。
No need for the formalities. Let's hear it!
不愧是见过大世面的人，真大方！弄得我怪不好意思的……
Well, you're clearly better traveled than I am, and I know how generous you are... I feel embarrassed to ask now...
行吧，看在你请客的份上…
You have my attention... as long as the afternoon tea keeps flowing.
你先别急着答应啊，这事可能比你想的要复杂……
Ha, don't get ahead of yourself, this might be more complicated than you think...
欸，别跑！别紧张呀，我只是想问你点事……
Wait, don't go! Take it easy, I just wanted to ask you a question...
呃，我的意图就这么明显吗？大意了呀……
*sigh* Was it that obvious? I'm out of practice...
有事直说呗，咱俩谁跟谁呀。
No need for the formalities. Let's hear it!
不愧是见过大世面的人，真大方！弄得我怪不好意思的……
Well, you're clearly better traveled than I am, and I know how generous you are... I feel embarrassed to ask now...
行吧，看在你请客的份上…
You have my attention... as long as the afternoon tea keeps flowing.
你先别急着答应啊，这事可能比你想的要复杂……
Ha, don't get ahead of yourself, this might be more complicated than you think...
This is the price you pay for cleaning.
哎，让我想想该怎么开口……
Uh, how can I put this...
没记错的话，你、三月还有丹恒，你们是坐那个什么——对了，「星穹列车」——来到贝洛伯格的，对吧？
If I remember correctly, you, March, and Dan Heng came here on that train — the "Astral Express" — right?
其实，我是想问问你…你们这趟列车，还欢迎新乘客吗？
I was wondering... is the train accepting new passengers?
Why are you asking this all of a sudden?
嗐，这不是…尘埃落定了嘛。星核的问题也解决了，可可利亚她也……
Well, i—it's just... the dust has settled now. The Stellaron problem has been resolved, and Cocolia...
…哎，算了算了，没什么！刚才那句话你当我没说。
...Forget it, it's nothing! Forget I said anything.
呃…需要通过上车测验才行。
Um... You need to pass the Boarding Exam first.
上车测验…是考试的意思？这个我在行！原来你们的规矩跟贝洛伯格的学校也差不多嘛。
Boarding Exam? Like a test? I can do that! That sounds like the admission system that schools in Belobog use!
我就在想，你们会不会禁止——呃…我这种「外星人」——上车？
I'm wondering though, are there any restrictions against, uh... "aliens" like me from boarding the train?
这我说了不算，得帮你问问。
Such matters aren't up to me, I'm afraid I'll have to ask around first.
你看，我留在这儿也没什么事可做。无非就是继续待在「机械屋」，修修设备、练练琴…演出的氛围是不错，不过听众来来回回也就那么几个。
You see, there's not much left for me here except to carry on repairing equipment in the workshop... I like practicing the guitar, and performances are fun, but the crowds are pretty small.
再说了，我可是搞科研出身…探索新世界的大好机会就摆在眼前，怎么能不心动？贝洛伯格这小地方，任谁住上个把年也会觉得腻了吧？
Besides, I'm a researcher... how could I not get excited about the chance to explore new worlds up close? Everyone gets tired of living in small places like Belobog after a few years, right?
I understand how you feel. Welcome aboard!
真的吗，你就这么答应了？
Really? You're gonna say yes just like that?
...But I'll still have to ask the others for their input first.
理解理解。那这件事就拜托你啦。
I understand. I'm counting on you!
我可以帮你咨询一下专家意见…
I can consult an expert opinion on your behalf...
行啊行啊，那这件事就拜托你了！
Okay, okay, I—I'm counting on you!
我也知道，这个要求实在太突然、太任性了…先提前给你道个歉啦。
I know this is a lot to ask out of the blue, so apologies in advance.
Not a problem, just leave it to me.
哈～托你办事，我能放一百个心！
Haha, I knew I could count on you!
歌德先生，麻烦再加一碟曲奇——
Mr. Goethe, one plate of cookies, please...
不用这么郑重…这不像你。
Not like you to be so serious...
哎，我这不是有求于你嘛～
Hehe, this is a pretty big ask⁓
歌德先生，麻烦再加一碟曲奇——
Mr. Goethe, one plate of cookies, please...
比起道歉，我更喜欢行动…
行动？哦～懂了，我等会儿再给你加碟小零食吧！
...Actions? Ohhhh, I get you! Another plate of delicious snacks, coming right up!
歌德先生，麻烦再加一碟曲奇——
Mr. Goethe, one plate of cookies, please...
（希露瓦回去了…发短信找姬子小姐问问希露瓦的请求吧。）
(There goes Serval... I better send Himeko a text and ask about the request...)
（…大概也可以问问杨叔和帕姆？）
(...or I guess I could ask Mr. Yang — or Pom-Pom?)
(Hmm, who's the best one to ask...?)
(Let's send a message to Mr. Yang...)
这是布洛妮娅大人的请求……
姐姐，你就去和布洛妮娅大人聊聊吧。这毕竟是她亲自发出的邀请……
You should go and talk to Lady Bronya, Serval. It was her personal invite, after all...
唉…知道啦知道啦，你让我考虑一下……
Ugh... I know, I know. Let me think about it...
What are you guys chatting about?
哦？{NICKNAME}你来得正好！已经有消息了吗？
Huh? {NICKNAME}, you're just in time! Any news yet?
我是不是来得不是时候？
欸？没这回事，你来得正好！快快快，来帮我解个围……
Oh! No, not at all! I could do with a hand, actually...
嗯？{NICKNAME}，你来得正好——请你也帮忙劝劝她吧。
Perfect timing, {NICKNAME} — please talk some sense into her.
So, am I supposed to be the good cop here?
你们的家务事，我不想掺和…
I try to stay out of family squabbles...
太对了——这事让我们姐弟俩自己解决就行……
Y'know what, you're right — we should work these things out on our own...
我还没搞清楚情况，我不站边。
I'm not taking sides — I don't even know what the deal is.
That's just it — there is no deal...
…希露瓦，我理解你不愿意再重回铁卫编制的想法。
...Serval, I understand your reluctance to rejoin the Silvermane Guards.
但布洛妮娅大人很看重你的才能，她觉得你能为贝洛伯格的复兴贡献许多力量…所以我来找你聊这件事。
But Lady Bronya values your talent, and she sees how much you could contribute to the rejuvenation of Belobog... so I came to talk to you about it.
不管怎么说，你至少该去见她一面吧。
In any case, you should at least pay her a visit.
好吧…我明白了。那我就跑克里珀堡一趟，把真实想法全都告诉布洛妮娅。
Okay... I get it. I'll make a trip to Qlipoth Fort and tell Bronya what I really think.
不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}——我先失陪一会儿。等我回来以后，再把你那边的情况给我讲讲吧。
Sorry, {NICKNAME} — I need to get this over with. Let me know what they said when I get back.
呵…姐姐她一直是这种性格。
啊，抱歉——刚才只顾着和希露瓦说话，忘了向你解释事情的原委。
Ah, sorry, my head's still in the argument. It's like this.
听你的意思，她也给你摆出过难题？
Is she creating trouble for you too?
啊，抱歉——刚才只顾着和姐姐说话，忘了向你解释事情的原委。
Ah, sorry, my head's still in the argument. It's like this.
她想走这事惊动布洛妮娅了？
Was Bronya caught off guard by her desire to join the Astral Express?
原来如此…怪不得希露瓦的神情那么慌张。原来她心里是这么盘算的……
I see... no wonder she seemed so flustered. So that's what's on her mind...
啊，抱歉——刚才只顾着和姐姐说话，忘了向你解释事情的原委。
Ah, sorry, my head's still in the argument. It's like this.
你应该知道，姐姐曾经是银鬃铁卫技术部的研究组长之一——「星核」是她的主攻课题。
As you know, my sister used to be one of the research team leads in the Silvermane Guards Technology Division. Stellarons were her main area of research.
但希露瓦的专精远不止于对「星核」的研究，她在机械工程等其它领域也有很深的造诣。
But her expertise went far beyond Stellarons. She was and still is well versed in mechanical engineering and other fields.
布洛妮娅大人继任之后，立刻就想到了姐姐的才能。大守护者希望召回她，让她重新拾起技术研究工作，为振兴贝洛伯格的事业发光发热。

Immediately after her succession, Lady Bronya set her sights on Serval's talents. The supreme guardian wants her to resume her technological research and be a shining light for the revitalization of Belobog.
不过，你也看到她的态度了…我怕她此行前去也聊不出什么令人满意的结果，指不定还会闹出些不愉快。
However... you saw her attitude just now. I doubt her meeting with Lady Bronya will change anything — it'll probably just leave them both feeling dejected.
也许她只是想看看外面的世界。
Maybe she just wants to see the outside world.
我也受不了坐办公室的工作…
I couldn't stand an office job either...
嗯…个中原因或许没有那么简单。
Mm... I think there's more than one element to it.
直觉告诉我，这多半与可可利亚大人的离开有关。
My intuition tells me this is mostly linked to Madam Cocolia's passing.
I thought they became enemies a long time ago?
听起来好像很有故事…细说。
