我们迫于环境压力结成暂时同盟，一起帮下层区的居民解决了些…生存难题。
Because of the difficult situation we were in, we formed a temporary alliance to help the residents of the Underworld resolve a few... issues of survival.
我们还打败了名为史瓦罗的远古机器，了解到了一些真相…有关「星核」的真相。
We also defeated an ancient robot known as "Svarog," and learned some truths... about the Stellaron.
可可利亚大人，我以人格担保，那些「天外来客」绝非我们此前所设想的恶党。
Madam Cocolia, it is my firm belief that the visitors from beyond the sky are not the villains we had imagined before.
我看到他们为了公义拔枪，为了他人的理想拼上性命。我可以确认，他们的确是为了「星核」而来，为了解除它给贝洛伯格带来的灾难。

I witnessed them take up arms in the name of justice, and risk their lives for the sake of others. I can also ascertain that they did come for the Stellaron, but only to relieve the disaster it has brought upon Belobog.
母亲大人…您一直都清楚「星核」的真相，对吗？我总有一天也会接触到那些知识。成为「守护者」所需要付出的代价之一，就是永远背负这些秘密。

Mother... you've always known the truth about the Stellaron, haven't you? The responsibility of bearing that truth will fall upon me one day. Such is the burden of being guardian — to carry these secrets for eternity.
所以…原谅我的冒犯，我认为下令剿杀外来者是错误的选择。为了解决「星核」带来的问题，筑城者已经等了几百年，而他们几个可能就是——

So... I ask you to forgive my defiance, but I believe that the order to dispatch the outsiders was a mistake. To solve the problems brought on by the Stellaron, the Architects waited hundreds of years, and those outsiders may be the... the—
傲慢，无知…你令我失望，布洛妮娅。
Arrogant, ignorant... Oh you disappoint me, Bronya.
你不过窥到了雪山的一角，就以为自己看清了真相。只是在下层溅了一身泥渣，居然就敢质疑我的命令？
You merely glimpsed the tip of the iceberg and now you think you know everything. You spend a short time with that Underworld scum, and suddenly you have the audacity to question my orders?
我的身世，那些你从来没告诉过我的事…我现在都已经记起来了。我不会再逃避了，守护者大人！请别再用含糊其辞的理由搪塞我了。
My entire life, everything you ever kept from me... I remember it clearly now. This time... this time I'm standing my ground, Madam Guardian! And please, stop dismissing me with vague excuses.
把你看到的东西告诉我吧，你到底在隐藏些什么…为什么要把铁卫派到裂界里去送死，为什么要放弃下层区的人民——为什么要在那个关头转变心意？

Tell me what you have seen. What exactly it is you are hiding... Why do you send the Silvermane Guards to die in the Fragmentum? Why have you abandoned the people of the Underworld? And why... why did you have that sudden change of mind?
这个时刻迟早会来…我只是没想到会来得这么快。
I knew this moment would come sooner or later... I just didn't expect it would be so soon.
你想知道是什么原因驱使我下达了那些命令…对吗？你觉得自己已经准备好触碰真相了？
You want to know why I gave those orders... is that right? Do you believe you are ready to learn the truth?
那就跟我来吧，布洛妮娅。
这个濒死的世界…该让你听听她的声音了。
It is time you heard it... the voice of this dying world.
一股倦意涌上心头…提醒你已经很久没有休息过了。你坚信，这一次无论多么糟糕的梦境都不可能把你唤醒。
A wave of tiredness comes over you... reminding you that you haven't rested in a long time. Even the most terrible dream won't wake you up this time.
I suppose it would be good to get some sleep...
Actually, I still have a lot of energy.
(I should go meet up with March and Dan Heng.)
你们回来啦？听「地火」说，你们帮忙解决了史瓦罗那边的麻烦，可真了不起！
You're back! I've heard from Wildfire that you helped resolve that whole situation with Svarog. Amazing!
经历了这么多事，是不是累坏了？快吃点东西，然后好好休息一晚吧。
It must have been exhausting. Please, have some food and get a good night's rest.
We would like to have a rest.
啊，鼹鼠党的荣誉队员！听我说！
Ah, honorary member of The Moles! Listen up!
怎么了，漆黑的虎克大人？
What is it, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great?
没礼貌！你应该叫我漆黑的…算了算了，不说这个了！
How rude! You should have called me Pitch-Dark... Ugh, never mind...
上次找探测器的事，多谢你啦！现在虎克还有另外一件事想找你帮忙！
Thank you for helping Hook find the detector, but now Hook needs to ask you another favor...
虎克还没说是什么事呢！不过你干劲很足嘛，不愧是我看中的荣誉队员！
Haha, I haven't even mentioned what this is about! But that's the spirit. You truly are an honorary member of The Moles!
虎克和老爹的生日就快到了！每年这个时候，虎克和老爹会为对方准备好礼物，一起庆祝生日。
Hook and daddy's birthday is approaching! Every year at this time, we exchange gifts and celebrate our birthday together.
你们生日是同一天？这么巧？
You two share a birthday? What a coincidence!
自从来到磐岩镇以后，老爹的工作就更辛苦了，每天都要很晚才回家。所以，虎克不想再用老爹给的零花钱买礼物了！
Daddy's job has been more difficult since moving to Boulder Town. He gets home really late every day. I don't want to use his hard-earned money to buy a gift!
找娜塔莎要零花钱怎么样？
Why not ask Natasha for some money?
虎克打碎了很多诊所的东西，有点不好意思向老巫婆开口……
...Oh, I've broken a thing or two in the clinic, you see... I'm too embarrassed to ask for help from the old witch...
其实，虎克还有一些值钱的宝贝落在铆钉镇里了。它们被丢弃在那里也很可惜，要是带回来再卖个好价钱，那么虎克给老爹买礼物就不用求任何人了。

Actually, I still have some valuable treasure of my own in Rivet Town. It's a shame I left it there. If I go bring it back and sell it for a decent price, I can buy a gift for daddy without begging anyone for money.
虎克知道，铆钉镇现在很危险！所以我想请你当虎克的保镖！
I know that Rivet Town is super dangerous right now! That's why I'd like to enlist you as my bodyguard!
这样就算事后被老巫婆发现，她也不会只批评虎克一个人了——嘿嘿！
That way, even if the old witch finds out later, I won't be the only one getting a scolding, hehe!
So you're begging me to help?
什、什么话！这是来自鼹鼠党老大的命令，对，命令！
Wh—What nonsense! This is an order from the boss of The Moles. An order!
而且虎克还是个小孩子！你不会想让我一个人进到裂界里去吧！
And I'm still a kid! You wouldn't let me go inside the Fragmentum by myself, would you?
那就这么约好了，我们在铆钉镇里见！虎克会到安全的地方等你的，可不许不来哦！
Then it's settled, let's meet in Rivet Town! I'll be waiting for you in a safe spot. You're not allowed to not come!
虎克有些值钱的宝贝落在铆钉镇里了……
I've got to get back to my treasure!
既然约好了，我们在铆钉镇里见！虎克会到安全的地方等你的，可不许不来哦！
Let's agree to meet in Rivet Town! I'll be waiting for you in a safe spot. You're not allowed to not come!
你这高高在上的语气是怎么回事呀！
你怎么比虎克还没有礼貌，至少听完之后再拒绝嘛！
Hmph, at least hear me out first before you refuse.
娜、娜塔莎姐姐！「菌菌」坏掉了，我想请你帮忙修好……
N—Natasha! Junjun's in bad shape. Can you help me fix him...?
我记得它，这好像是我以前给你的？你是从哪把它找回来的？
I remember giving you Junjun. I haven't seen this fella in years. Where did you find him?
刮、刮大风，它被大风吹回来了……
The... the wind brought him back to me...
…是{NICKNAME}帮我一起，从铆钉镇的孤儿院找出来的。
...{NICKNAME} helped me find him in the Rivet Town orphanage.
就为了这个玩偶，你就让{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}带着你到裂界里去冒险？虎克，我跟你说过多少次……
You had {NICKNAME} take you to the Fragmentum just for this teddy bear? Hook, how many times have I told you...?
——求求你了，娜塔莎姐姐！请你帮虎克修好「菌菌」吧，虎克愿意帮你打扫一个月的诊所！
Natasha, please! Please help me fix Junjun. I'll clean the clinic for you for a whole month!
*sigh* You say that every time, and then...
我、我先跑了！{NICKNAME}，「菌菌」就交给你了！
G—Great, seeya soon! {NICKNAME}, I'll leave Junjun with you!
...What am I going to do with that girl.
你也不要太溺爱她了，外来者。我知道想拒绝虎克是一件难事，但人还是得学会说「不」才行呢。
You shouldn't indulge her, outsider. Uh-uh, I know it's difficult to tell Hook "no," but sometimes it just has to be done.
「菌菌」…原来她还给这玩具熊起了名字吗？呵……
Junjun... so she gave her bear a name, huh?
我感觉这玩偶好像平平无奇。
It seems like a regular teddy bear to me.
没什么特别的，只是我做过的诸多玩偶之一。不过，虎克真的很喜欢它。
Yeah, I've lost count of all the dolls I've made. Still, Hook clearly likes this one a lot.
虎克好像挺喜欢这个玩偶的？
Hook seems really fond of this bear.
这不过是我做过的诸多玩偶之一。说实话，我也没想到她会这么喜欢它。
I've lost count of all the dolls I've made. To be honest, I wasn't expecting her to like this one so much.
还在铆钉镇的时候，这是我奖励给「好孩子」的奖品。孤儿院难管教的孩子实在太多，你能想象那场面有多混乱吗？我总得想点办法让那些熊孩子乖乖听话。

It was an award I used to give the kids in Rivet Town for "good behavior." Can you imagine what an orphanage is like with so many difficult children? I had to come up with a solution to get them to behave.
为了得到「菌菌」，虎克努力装了一个月的「乖宝宝」——按时吃饭，按时睡觉，也没有跟别的小朋友打架……
Hook pretended to be well-behaved for a month in order to get Junjun. She ate on time, slept on time — even stopped fighting with the other kids...
就算是演的，也很辛苦吧？
That must have been some difficult pretending...
确实，等她拿到奖品以后，那家伙立马就回归本性了。
Of course, as soon as she got her award, she went straight back to her old self.
说不定平时的样子才是装的…
Maybe she's actually a well-behaved kid pretending to be naughty...
你怕是不知道她那个月过得有多痛苦。
I'm afraid you have no idea how much she suffered that month.
虎克那孩子，总能把人们团结到自己身边，不管对方是大人还是小孩。这是一种天分——强迫她当个「乖孩子」，就是在扼杀这种天分。
Hook has an uncanny ability to rally people to her cause — both adults and children. It's a skill alright, and forcing her to be well-behaved puts a lid on it.
…嗯，还真是一团糟呢。别着急，我会帮虎克修好「菌菌」的。也许我需要重新找些填充物……
...Well, this teddy bear has sure been through the wars. Don't worry, I'll help Hook repair Junjun, but I'll need to find some stuffing...
这是…黑宝石？奇怪，当时我把它缝进玩具熊的时候，难道没发现吗……
They must be... erebus? Strange, I didn't notice when I sewed them on...
我不是鉴定专家，但这两颗石头的成色…看上去相当不错呢。
I'm no appraiser, but these two gems look to be high quality.
我当时是得有多不小心，才会把这么值钱的石头缝到玩具熊身上？真是……
I think I must have been — it's not every day you sew precious gems into a teddy bear. Honestly...
...Did the old witch yell at you?
唔，你明明是为了帮虎克…对不起，荣誉队员！
*sigh* But you were only there to help Hook... I'm sorry, honorary member!
什么？凭什么只有虎克挨批评了呀！
What? Why did she only yell at Hook!?
先不说这个了，你没有把虎克真正的目的说出去吧？
Never mind that. You didn't tell her what I was really up to, did you?
Absolutely not, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great.
很好，不愧是忠诚的鼹鼠党荣誉队员！
Great! Your loyalty as an honorary member of The Moles is acknowledged.
娜塔莎的直觉可是很敏锐的。
…虎克知道！我只是…不想惹她生气！
...I'm aware of that! I just... didn't want to upset her!
怎么了，你怎么还傻站在这儿，有什么要向鼹鼠党的老大报告吗？
Anyway, why are you still standing here, silly? Do you have something to report to the boss of The Moles?
其实「菌菌」的眼睛是宝石。
宝、宝石！是很值钱的意思吗？
G—Gems!? Does that mean he's worth a lot of money?
卖掉，当然要卖掉！如果宝石能卖个好价钱，那虎克就能给老爹准备更豪华的生日礼物啦！
Of course I'll sell him! If the gems are expensive, Hook can buy a better birthday gift for daddy!
You don't want to sell him all of a sudden?
你在说什么呢，当然要卖掉！如果宝石能卖个好价钱，那虎克就能给老爹准备更豪华的生日礼物啦！
What are you talking about? Of course, I do! If the gems are expensive, Hook can buy a better birthday gift for daddy!
虎克不想单独把「菌菌」的眼睛留下来。如果拿到「菌菌」的小朋友发现他没有眼睛，肯定会很伤心吧？
I don't want to keep Junjun's eyes. If some kid gets a Junjun with no eyes, they'll be sad, right?
总之这是非常有用的情报！要不是你加入的时间太短，我都想把你提拔成鼹鼠党的三把手啦！
Anyhow, this is super useful intel! If you'd been with The Moles a bit longer, I'd be promoting you to third-in-command right now!
等娜塔莎姐姐把「菌菌」修好，我还会来找你帮忙的！你要随时响应漆黑的虎克大人的召唤哦！
I'll need your help again after Natasha fixes Junjun! Always be prepared to answer the call of Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!
还有什么事之后再说吧，你快去找找虎克，她应该还没有跑远。
Let's talk later. Go and find Hook, she can't have gone too far...
这孩子真是的，多说了她两句就跑得没影儿了。
*sigh* That girl... I'd barely gotten two sentences out.
被叫作「菌菌」的大熊玩偶
请把这样的意外叫作「生活的惊喜」。
There's no shortage of surprises in life.
总之，这个玩偶一下就变成了昂贵的玩偶了，真是有些让人惊讶。
Well, our war torn bear here just became a priceless doll. Not bad, Junjun.
是你啊，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。我原本也想给你们送行，不过你们也看到了——这下层的破事，刚处理完一件，就又会冒出三件。
Ah, young {F#lady}{M#lad}. I wanted to see you off, but you know how things are around here in the underground. Solve one problem and three more take its place.
Hm, something you wanted to ask?
娜塔莎信任我。在她看来，我这个前军官比她一个医生更适合做组织的领袖。
Natasha trusts me. In her eyes, an ex-military officer was more suited to be the leader of the organization than a doctor.
但我清楚真正的领袖应该具备什么。强大的内心，还有能团结众人的个人魅力——论这些素养，下层没人比得过她。
But the most important thing a leader needs is a strong heart. An ability to unite everyone toward a common cause. In that respect, no one in the underground comes close to her.
I heard you came from the Overworld.
我以前其实也是银鬃铁卫的军官。负伤退伍以后，我跟着家里那口子来到下层，计划在这儿过上退休生活。
I was actually once an officer of the Silvermane Guards. After being discharged due to an injury, I followed my old lady here to the Underworld, where I planned to retire.
结果你也看见了，我现在每天琐事缠身，比在部队里的时候还更忙了。
But as things would have it, I ended up busier than ever.
没什么好后悔的！下层的生活固然辛苦，但周围的人们态度都很亲切，大家相处都像自家人一样融洽。
There is nothing to regret! Life in the Underworld is hard, but people here are kind and everyone is close like one big family.
Do you miss the old days in the Overworld?
怀念？如果你指的是老战友之间的交情，那的确有不少值得怀念的地方。至于其它东西，我不觉得下层比上面差到哪儿去。
Do I miss it? If you're talking about the time with my comrades-in-arms, of course. But other than that, I don't really prefer it over life in the Underworld.
「地火」已经撑过了最艰难的时候。有娜塔莎的领导，我们有信心带领下层民众走向更好的未来。
Wildfire has already made it through its darkest days. With Natasha's leadership, we have the confidence to lead the Underworlders to a brighter future.
And much of that is thanks to all of you.
I don't have any more questions.
幸好史瓦罗那确实藏着对你们有用的信息——差使你们忙前忙后这么久，最后要是还一无所获，那我可真要愧疚一阵了。哈哈哈！
Fortunately, Svarog turned out to have some useful information for you. After all your hard work, I'd feel quite guilty if you left empty-handed. Hahaha!
虽说你们的旅途远在天边，但我敢断言，咱们的道路总有一天会再交汇的。后会有期，「地火」的朋友！
While you still have a long journey ahead, I have no doubt our paths will cross again one day. Till we meet again, friends of Wildfire!
准备好了吗？要是再磨磨蹭蹭的话，我可就自己上去，不管你们了。
You ready yet? If you want to keep wasting time, I'll just go on ahead by myself.
怎么，还有什么话想说？那就快点。
What, still something you want to talk about? Alright, let's make it quick.
布洛妮娅有和你说什么吗？
Did Bronya say anything to you?
没说什么，就随便聊了几句。
Not much. We just chatted a bit.
我答应她，要帮助她重建上下层之间的联系。就这样。
I promised her that I would help her rebuild the connection between the Overworld and the Underworld, that's all.
I can tell something's weighing on your mind...
我答应布洛妮娅，万一她出了什么事…我一定会亲自把她救出来。
I made a promise to Bronya that if something were to happen to her, I'd rescue her myself.
哼…没仔细想过。不过，跟你们一块旅行，的确常有意想不到的情况发生。
Hmm... I didn't really give it much thought. But traveling with you bunch does always lead to unexpected surprises.
酣畅的战斗和刺激的冒险…很不错，我不讨厌。
Hearty combat and exciting adventures... Not bad, I certainly don't hate it.
Have you said goodbye to everyone?
当然。你是没看到约书亚的表情，那家伙差点就哭出来了。
Of course... Heh, you didn't see the look on Joshua's face. He could barely hold back his tears.
奥列格头儿…他没跟我说太多，但我知道他把担忧都藏在心里。
Chief Oleg... He didn't say much, but I know he's not the kind to wear his heart on his sleeve.
是我自己选择要上去的，娜塔莎也支持这个决定。你们肯定也需要个能打的帮手，不是吗？
It was my choice to go up, and Natasha supported my decision. Besides, you could use another person who can fight, right?
那就别磨蹭了，快点出发吧。
Alright, then let's cut the chat and move out!
有点好奇拳手们的实力。
I'm curious to see how strong the boxers are.
哼，好奇就自己来买票看，看不出来就别怪自己没眼力劲儿。
Hmph, if you're curious, then buy a ticket and see for yourself. If you still can't tell how strong they are, don't blame me.
不服？不服气就自己上擂台试试，打几场就知道了。
Not convinced? Then enter the ring and fight a few bouts yourself, and then you'll see.
欺负弱者不算真正的拳击。
I'm way above beating up weaklings.
哈，说得冠冕堂皇的，你该不会是怂了吧？
Ha! You talk cocky, but is that just because you're scared you'll lose?
连上去打拳都不敢，还说什么「真正的拳击」，装得一副很懂的样子，吓唬谁呢？
You don't dare enter the ring, and then you talk all high-and-mighty about my boxers being "weaklings." Am I supposed to feel intimidated?
Are you trying to trick me into free labor?
哼！现在的年轻人，一点亏都吃不得…以后的路还长，你这样斤斤计较，以后可是走不远的。
Hmph! Young people these days. If it's not to their benefit, count them out... Life is a long journey. You won't make it far if you're this fussy about everything.
找什么借口，说到底不就是没那个胆吗？
Excuse after excuse. Really, you just don't have the courage, huh?
我只是不想和普通人打。
I just don't want to fight against ordinary people.
我这儿的拳手可不是什么普通人，没点名气都踏不进俱乐部的大门。
My boxers here aren't just "ordinary people." Only reputed fighters are allowed to step into this club.
I don't want to get my hands dirty.
你去打听打听，看看我这「搏击俱乐部」为什么在这地下远近闻名——观众买票进来可不是为了看什么无名小卒！
Ask anyone and you'll learn why my Fight Club is known far and wide across the underground. People don't buy tickets to come watch some unknown amateurs!
你既然这么自信，那正好，现在俱乐部里恰巧有几个拳手在训练。
You're so confident, huh? It just so happens that we have a few boxers in the club right now who are all eager for some hands-on practice.
只要你能打败他们，我就给你一笔奖金，算是添个彩头。
I'll give you a nice little reward if you can beat them, just in case you needed any extra incentive.
What do you think? Bold enough to fight a round?
还要怎么考虑？照你的话说，这对你不是小菜一碟吗？
Think about it? According to you, wouldn't they be a piece of cake for you?
I'm in a hurry. I'll make quick work of them.
哼，像你这种过度自信的年轻人，我可见得太多了。
Hmph. I've seen a lot of overconfident young people like yourself.
嘿！你准备好打一场漂亮的比赛了吗？
Hey! Ready for a good one now?
备受瞩目的新秀出现了——
Coming up— a much anticipated high profile rookie!
是…天赋异禀，领跑俱乐部排名的全新赛季？
Is {M#he}{F#she}... a gifted new talent ready to rock the club's new seasonal rankings?
还是…自不量力，除了徒增新伤之外白跑一趟？
Or is {M#he}{F#she}... going beyond {M#his}{F#her} depth just to get some new scars for a show?
让我们拭目以待，看看这位超级新秀今天能交出怎样的答卷！有请——{NICKNAME}！
Let's wait and see what the new rookie has in store for us today! Please welcome— {NICKNAME}!
这流畅的战斗…令人窒息的压迫感…甚至让我感觉历代拳王也不过如此！了不起，实在是了不起！
The smoothness of the battle... the suffocating sense of oppression... even the old champs can't do much better! Impressive, most impressive!
欢呼声在哪里？你们都没吃饭吗？再响点，再来一轮！掌声和欢呼声送给史考特俱乐部冉冉升起的超级新星——{NICKNAME}！
Where are your cheers? Did you not eat? Louder, encore! Applause and cheers to Scott Club's newest rising superstar— {NICKNAME}!
（…该去找史考特了，不知道他准备了多少奖金……）
(... Time to find Scott, I wonder how much is in the prize...)
哈哈哈，我没看错，不愧是「外来者」！我看你年纪不大，身手倒是不同凡响，比那几个只会按固定套路出拳的土鳖强多了。
Hahaha, I was right about you, you're quite a fighter! Green but extraordinary, much better than those boring old farts with fixed routines.
至于奖励…放心好了，肯定会给你的，不过……
As for the prize money... don't worry, you'll definitely get some, but...
没什么，只是流程上会可能有一点麻烦，不是什么大事。
It's nothing. It's just that there may be a little trouble in the process of securing the funds. No biggie.
Cut to the chase. Where's my money?
急什么？没看到我这么大个人站在你面前吗？我又不会跑，催什么催。
What's the hurry? Can't you see I'm right here? I ain't going nowhere, don't rush me.
最近…呃，拳馆的利润水平不是特别理想。我现在只能给你发一部分，至于尾款……
It's just that lately... the boxing gym hasn't exactly been printing money. I can give you some now, but the rest...
你先帮我个忙，我现在得找一位特别的「拳手」，之后我再把尾款补上。放心，这事对你来说轻松得很，我保证！
How about you do me a favor first? I'm now in need of a special boxer. If you can find one, I'll give you the rest of the money. Easy eh? I promise!
你有那么多拳手还不够？
Don't you have enough boxers already?
你见过那群土鳖吗？整天就知道埋头训练，个个搞得灰头土脸…他们根本不懂观众想看的是什么。
Have you seen those knuckleheads? All they know is to bury their heads and train, getting all dirty and sweaty... They don't know what the audience wants to see.
观众想要的是刺激，懂吗？刺激！感官上的冲击，视觉上的刺激，我得找一帮懂观众喜好的拳手才行！
Audiences want excitement. Excitement! Sensory feast, visual stimuli. I need someone who can stand in the ring and knows what the audience wants!
你以为我是在故意针对你？是，我是签了不少拳手，但那帮家伙除了按训练里学到的套路出拳以外，啥也不会！稍有点品位的观众早就看腻那群小丑了。

You think it's about you? Nah. Yes, I may have signed a few boxers, but they know nothing but cliched routines from their training! Any audience with a bit of taste would've already been sick of these clowns.
这种拳手，要来何用？所以我上个月就给他们发了降薪通知书…要么自愿降薪，要么乖乖滚蛋！
So what's the point of keeping them around? That's why I sent a message to everyone last month... They can either take a pay cut voluntarily or kiss their sweet butts goodbye.
你是不知道养这群无耻的寄生虫有多难，吃我的用我的，哼……
You don't know what's it like to raise these shameless parasites, everything they eat and use is mine... hmph...
拳手们也有自己的追求。
别跟我提什么个人追求，观众们会在乎你的「个人追求」吗？大家之所以会来这儿，就是想得到最直观的感官冲击，懂吗？
Don't talk about dreams with me. You think audiences care about your dreams? They're just here for a visceral sensory experience, capeesh?
哼…如果不能引领潮流，就注定会被时代淘汰…是时候了！我要探索全新的商业模式……
Hmph... In this world, you either lead or die... so it's time for me to start exploring a completely new business model...
对了，我知道你去过裂界，那你肯定见过那种怪物吧？有着人的身形，穿着特别的盔甲……
By the way, I know you've been to the Fragmentum, so you must've seen those monsters, right? Shaped like a human, wearing special armor...
这事对你来说肯定轻而易举——只要你能带回一套怪物的盔甲，我就把奖金的尾款发给你。
I'm sure it's easy for you — just get me a set of that armor and I'll give you the rest of your prize money.
还愣着干嘛？快去快回，你晚回来一天，拳馆就要养这群寄生虫一天，再这么下去我可就亏大了！
So what are you waiting for? Get moving, the longer you take, the longer I need to feed those parasites. What a filthy waste of money!
就是它，就是它！这质感没得说！
That's it, that's it! Wow, that texture!
你这家伙，虽然态度让人不爽，但是办事效率确实没的说…我没看错人，嚯哈哈！
You had an annoying attitude but you still got the job done... I was right about you, ah—haha!
拿着，之前答应给你的奖金尾款，我史考特说到做到。以后有机会了，可以来找我谈谈生意，咱们互惠互利——嚯哈哈哈！
Here's the rest of your money like promised. Scott is always true to his word. If we can get a chance in the future, then come and talk business with me. We can help each other out— muhahaha!
这怪物的盔甲到底拿来做什么？
What do you plan to do with the monster armor?
拿来穿呗，不然呢？难不成就放在门口做摆设吗？
To wear it of course, or what? Leave it around as house decor?
难道你有收集盔甲的爱好？
Do you have a hobby of collecting armor?
嗐，我只有赚钱这一个爱好。
Hey, I only have a hobby of making money.
哎，你既然帮了我的忙，我就直接告诉你吧——我打算找个拳手，让他打扮成怪物的样子上擂台打拳。
Hey, since you helped me, I'll let you in on my plan. I'm going to have a boxer dress up as a monster to fight in the ring.
名字我都想好了，就叫「怪物盔甲」，到时候门票肯定大卖，拳赛场场都爆满！
I've already thought up a name: "Monster Armor." Tickets will definitely be sold out by then, and the boxing arena will be full!
嚯哈哈哈，怎么样？这么好的点子，全下层只有我史考特想得出来！
Hahaha, what do you think? In all of the Underworld, only Scott can come up with such an ingenious idea!
Isn't it unsuitable for people to wear, though?
怪物身上的东西不嫌脏吗？
Isn't it disgusting to wear stuff ripped off monsters?
行了行了，你货都交了，就别啰嗦了，奖金拿好！这么磨叽无非就是想找我多要点好处，你那点小心思我还不知道？
Hey hey, you've done your part of the job, so shut up and take your money! All this jibber-jabber is just you trying to squeeze me for more. Don't think I don't know what's on your mind!
这套盔甲就是拿来穿的，只要有人穿了它，我就能赚钱。
Armor is supposed to be worn. As long as someone's wearing it, then I can make money.
用来拍特摄的话差条腰带。
It'll need a belt to serve as a Tokusatsu costume.
这套盔甲就是拿来给人穿的。
This armor is to be worn.
有什么不合适的？哦，你说这盔甲的尺寸？看上去的确大了点，拿去给铁匠随便改改就行了。
What's unsuitable? Oh, you mean the size of this armor? It does look a little big, so just take it to the blacksmith and get it resized.
又不是我自己穿，要那么干净做什么呢？
It's not like I'm gonna wear it myself, so why does it need to be clean?
感觉这不是人应该穿的。
I still don't think people should wear it.
你说的有道理，但是关我屁事。
You're right, but it's none of my business.
我史考特也不是黑心老板，看在你确实帮了我个忙，而且也有点实力的份上，我额外送你个「特殊礼遇」。
Scott is no cruel boss, you know. Since you've really helped me, and proven yourself capable, I'll give you a little extra "house special."
以后你来拳馆，要是你看到「掘掘博士」也在里面，可以找他帮你清点下人员，安排个拳馆挑战赛什么的，就不用再排队买票了。
Next time you come around, if you see Dr. Dig here, get him to do a head count and squeeze you into a challenge round or something like that. That way, you won't need to line up for tickets.
这下你该满意了吧？别再来烦我了，拿着奖金回去歇着吧！嗯…接下来…该让哪个废物试试这套盔甲呢……
Are we good now? Now get out of my face with your money! Hmmmm... so now... which poor fool should try this armor on...
拳手们还在休息，看比赛或者想打挑战赛的请稍后再来排队。
The boxers are still resting. If you are watching the match or want to play in a challenge match, please come back later to wait in line.
Scott said I don't have to queue...
哟，原来是大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}啊，刚才忙晕了没仔细看，失敬失敬！
Oh! It's the famous {NICKNAME}! Sorry I didn't recognize you right away.
老板和我说过了，「特殊礼遇」其实就是贵宾级待遇嘛，您来了就不用排队，哪个拳手有空就给您安排哪位。
Boss already told me that the house special is for VIPs, so of course I won't keep you waiting. I'll get you the next available boxer.
您有空的话多来啊，不用客气。老板说了，您来打挑战赛就等于免费给拳手们指导业务，我们巴不得您多来喂喂招儿。
And please make yourself at home. Boss said you coming to challenges is like free training for these boxers. We are very grateful for your visits.
{NICKNAME}，又是一场毫无悬念的胜利！王者般的实力恐怖如斯！
{NICKNAME}, another victory! What a majestic performance!
你还有想亲自指导的拳手吗？没有的话也可以在拳馆里到处转转，别见外！老板嘱咐过了，无任欢迎！
Is there any other boxer you'd like to challenge? If not, feel free to look around! Boss said you are always welcomed here.
No, I'll have a look around.
Don't come to me if something goes wrong.
我对我手下那帮人的状况门儿清，能有什么事。
I know my men. What could go wrong?
Hey, if you don't wanna listen, that's fine...
我手下的人什么样儿我还不清楚？你说的这些纯属瞎操心，别费这个劲了。
Hey, I know my boys, no need for you to get all worked up for nothing.
别在我耳边叽叽歪歪了，听着烦死了。
All that whining is hard on the ears.
（那边穿着盔甲的…史考特这么快就安排好了拳手？）
(The one in armor over there... Scott found a boxer for that already?)
你哪位？找我有什么事吗？
Who are you? What do you want?
So you're the one Scott picked?
算是吧，史考特老板找了我们这帮拳手来试盔甲，我刚好最合适。
More or less. Scott got a whole bunch of boxers to try out the armor and I was the best fit.
史考特跟你说过盔甲的事吗？
Did Scott tell you about the armor?
有说过一些，比如要我穿上盔甲装成裂界里的怪物什么的。
A little, like asking me to put on the armor and become a monster from the Fragmentum or something.
还有别的事吗？如果没什么急事，请不要打扰我，我还在适应这套盔甲……
Anything else? Don't bother me if it's nothing urgent, I'm still getting used to this armor...
盔甲是裂界产物，谨慎点用。
It's from the Fragmentum. Be careful.
…裂界里的东西，就没有一样是不危险的，我早就习惯了。
...Everything in the Fragmentum is dangerous. I'm used to it.
只要合身，能让我工作下去就行，目前好像也没什么大问题。
As long as it fits and pays, no biggie right now.
How long have you been wearing this armor?
没多久，也就打了一两场吧。
Not long, a game or two.
还挺多的，现在反响还挺好，观众们都是图个新鲜，很正常。
Quite a lot actually, at least for now. Audiences are just looking for something new, as is typical.
Any adverse reactions after wearing it?
不良反应？好像没有，就是穿起来不太透气，在擂台上行走不太方便。
Adverse reactions? Don't think so. It's just not very breathable and not easy to walk around with in the ring.
手臂这里的甲板好像有点松了，算了，我还是自己调整一下吧……
The arm plates seem to be a little loose. Forget it, I'll just fix it myself...
你也是来看「怪物盔甲」的吗？哎，有他在的场次，票可真难抢。
Did you come to see Monster Armor too? It's so hard to get tickets for his matches.
你是来看「怪物盔甲」的吗？
呃…说不上专门来看他，但听说他挺有看头，呃，怎么说呢。
Errrr, not specifically, but I heard he's quite something... Errr... I don't know.
大家来拳馆不都是图一乐吗，不会有人真的喜欢上「怪物盔甲」了吧？
People are just here for some fun. Nobody will actually like Monster Armor, right?
说起来…「怪物盔甲」后天还有几场比赛来着？怎么这票价越来越高了……
By the way... How many matches are there for Monster Armor after this? Why is the price getting higher and higher...
你看了上一场比赛吗？如何评价前任拳王全程黑脸，被「怪物盔甲」暴揍？
Did you watch the last match? What did you think about Monster Armor knocking the brains out of the ex-champ?
「怪物盔甲」才赢了几场而已，看你激动成这样，差不多得了！
Monster Armor's only got a few wins. Look at you all worked up!
你们是来看「怪物盔甲」的吗？
Are you here to see Monster Armor?
这不废话嘛，我可是「怪物盔甲」的粉丝！我觉得他出拳的风格大开大合，很有气势，最近战绩也很好，未来可期！
Heck yeah, I'm a Monster Armor fan! I think his style is very wild and imposing, and he's been on a roll lately. That boy's got a future!
算了吧，虽然「怪物盔甲」上一场打得很不错，但也别瞎吹什么未来可期。
Come on, just because he did alright in the last game, that doesn't make him a future rock star.
你什么意思？「怪物盔甲」什么实力大家都有目共睹，比以前那几个又菜又装的家伙可强太多了。
What do you mean? Monster Armor obviously has what it takes. He's far better than those pretentious and useless old farts from before.
下一把的对手可是五冠王，懂不懂冠军的含金量？
The next opponent is a five-time champion. Do you know what it means to be a champ?
什么狗屁五冠王，「怪物盔甲」来了，其他人都得跪着求饶。
Yeah five-time champ my butt. He'll be kneeling to Monster Armor and begging for mercy.
别急，等拳王把伤养好了，就让你知道什么叫残忍。
Just you wait till the champ has recovered, you'll know what real brutality looks like.
我这就去把后面几场的票定了，等着看我「怪物盔甲」大佬夺冠吧！
I'm going to get the tickets for the next few games, and wait to see my Monster Armor win the championship!
别吵别吵，我正在回忆去年卫冕冠军赛的细节，这下都被你给吵没了！
Shush, I'm trying to remember the details of the last championship, but you're disrupting my train of thought!
你谁啊？我已经买了季票了，不想听票贩子推销。
I've already bought a season pass so that I don't have to deal with scalpers.
你是「怪物盔甲」的粉丝吗？
Are you a fan of Monster Armor?
粉丝？什么粉丝？拳赛只是消遣而已，我劝各位还是不要带入太多感情……
Fan? What fan? It's just games, don't drag yourself too deep into it...
不过我得承认，看这「怪物」打拳属实有点意思，也难怪有这么多人追捧那家伙。
But I have to admit, it's quite interesting to watch this monster punch, and it's no wonder this many people are cheering for him.
还好我早早地买了季票，可以直接去二楼贵宾席，不用跟这群家伙抢票……
Good thing I bought the season pass early, and I can go directly to the VIP seat on the second floor without having to fight for tickets with these guys...
还行吧，火过一段时间以后，现在已经有点过气了…但这可难不倒我。
He's alright, he's off the peak now but that's nothing to worry about.
接下来，我准备安排他去跟机器人打两场，把拳赛的话题度再炒起来。
I'll get him to fight a robot a few times next, just to heat things up again.
我担心盔甲的污染会影响他…
I'm worried about contamination by the armor...
污染？别逗了，盔甲能有什么污染，我看那家伙健壮得离谱，徒手就能把机器人给拆干净。
Contamination? Don't be ridiculous, what kind of contamination can the armor have? I think that guy is ridiculously strong. He can smash the robot with his bare hands.
我去看看他的身体情况…
I'll go and check on him.
我签拳手是为了挣钱，不是给自己请了个祖宗！他的身体哪有那么娇贵！
I sign boxers to make money, not to treat them like babies! He's not that delicate!
与其可怜那家伙，不如来可怜可怜花了一大笔冤枉钱的我！
Instead of pitying that guy, you should feel sorry for me, who wasted all that money!
Oh yeah? I don't believe you.
不信拉倒！相信我，这些个拳手老粗根本不懂什么叫感恩，不值得你浪费时间。
Believe it or not, these boxer scums know nothing about being grateful. He's not worth your time.
哎——他今天正好有比赛，人就在里面。有什么你自己跟他说去吧，别烦我了。
You know what, he's actually got a match today, and he's in there. Go and talk to him, just leave me alone.
谢谢你的好意，不过我…咳…我身体好得很…咳…没什么大问题。
Thank you for your kindness, but I... *cough*... I'm fine... *cough*... It's no biggie.
I came here to see you.
谢谢你的好意，不过我…咳…我身体好得很…咳…没什么大问题。
Thank you for your kindness, but I... *cough*... I'm fine... *cough*... It's no biggie.
I just came to see the armor.
…这怪物的盔甲吓到了不少人，也赚了不少钱。
This monster armor scared a lot of people and made a lot of money.
…咳…要是我会错意了，你就当我没说…我身体好得很…咳…没什么大问题。
*cough*... Forget I said anything if I misunderstood you... I'm alright... *cough*... Nothing wrong.
你身子很虚，去看看医生吧。
You are very weak. You should see a doctor.
不，我好得很，不劳你费神了。
盔甲对人可能有不良影响…
The armor may have adverse effects on people...
哪有什么不良影响，我说过了，我身体好得很，状态也很不错…咳…还能继续打拳。
There are no adverse effects. As I said, I'm in good health, and good shape... *cough* I can continue to fight.
咳…接下来还有几场和机器人的比赛，我得去准备……
Ahem... I have a few matches with robots in a bit, I need to prepare...
喂，「怪物盔甲」！醒醒，给我醒醒！
Hey, Monster Armor! Wake up, wake up!
他怎么倒下了，是体力不行了么？
Why did he fall? Is something wrong?
(I have to take him to the clinic for a checkup...)
你带着科鲁泽来到娜塔莎的诊所里，他那副虚弱的样子实在让你不放心。
You bring Kluzer to Natasha's clinic. His frail appearance really bothers you.
哦？{NICKNAME}，你的这位朋友是发生了什么情况？
Oh? {NICKNAME}, what happened to this friend of yours?
从裂界怪物身上获得的盔甲？这么危险的东西也敢穿在身上……
Armor from Fragmentum monsters? He's really got some guts to walk around wearing such a dangerous thing...
史考特老板跟我说，穿这套盔甲打拳赛，底薪就给我多加一点…咳咳……
Mr. Scott told me that if I wear this armor to matches, I will get a raise... *cough*
为了这么点钱，连命都要赔进去？
Is the money worth your life?
…我有很多地方…咳咳…要用钱，没办法。
...There's a lot of holes I need to fill... *cough* with money...
咳咳，看完了吗，医生？能让我回去了吗？
*cough* *cough* Are we done now, doc? Can I go back now?
等等，要先看看诊断结果。
Wait, let's read the diagnosis first.
嗯，报告是出来了，但这情况…实在是有点糟糕。
Well, the report is out, but the situation... is really not good.
医生还没说话呢…不过，你这一身情况确实不能回去。
The doc hasn't spoken yet... and you really can't go back like this.
你看这里，这几处都是旧伤，按理说早该痊愈了，但伤口不仅没愈合，表面还有像结晶一样的东西析出。
Look here, these are all old wounds which should have healed long ago, but not only did the wounds not heal, there are crystal-like things on the surface.
我检测过了，这些结晶物和裂界里的碎屑物质成分相似度很高。我见过一些受裂界侵蚀影响的患者，你现在的症状和他们很像。

I have checked, and these crystals are very similar in composition to the detritus in the Fragmentum. I've seen some patients affected by Fragmentum corrosion and your current symptoms are similar to theirs.
侵蚀就像某种慢性的毒素，它们会不断干扰伤口的正常愈合，继而增加器官的负担，严重的话可能会导致器官衰竭。

Corrosion is like a kind of chronic toxin. It constantly interferes with the normal healing process of wounds, which in turn increases the burden on the organs, and can lead to organ failure in severe cases.
总之，你不能再碰这套盔甲了，搏击活动也必须先停下。好好休息，把伤养好了再来我这儿复查一次。
In short, you can no longer touch this armor, and you must cease all fighting activities for the time being. Get some good rest, recover from your injuries, and come back to me for follow up.
不是我危言耸听，再这么下去，你迟早会倒在擂台上——永远都起不来的那种。明白了吗？
I'm not being alarmist. If you go on like this, sooner or later you'll fall in the ring — the kind of fall you'll never recover from. Do you understand?
那我先走了…谢谢你，陌生人。
I'll leave now then... Thank you, stranger.
科鲁泽拖着受伤的身体离开了诊所……
Kluzer left the clinic dragging his injured body...
哎，这样的病人我见过太多了，多半不会听从医嘱……
You know, I've seen too many patients like this, and most of them won't follow the doctor's orders...
{NICKNAME}，先别走。我这儿正好还有些事，想找你帮个忙。
{NICKNAME}, don't go yet. I need to ask you a favor.
就是有这么巧，你先听我说完。
Well, it's my lucky day. Now listen to me.
大概是从前不久开始，每隔几天就会有装满物资的包裹被送到诊所来。
A while ago, someone began sending a package full of supplies to the clinic every few days.
里面装的东西总是差不多，都是些给孩子们的食物、玩具弹珠，还有一些简单的衣物。
The contents are always roughly the same: Food, toys, and simple clothes for children.
奇怪的是，每次都是不同的人把包裹交到我手上，他们都不愿意透露究竟是谁如此慷慨……
Strangely, it's never the same guy who delivers the package, and none of them would tell me who the generous donor is...
拜这位匿名的好心人所赐，这里的小朋友们暂时什么都不缺了。
Thanks to this anonymous kind-hearted donor, the children here have more than enough things for the time being.
