星际和平公司与仙舟联盟再次重新签署互惠贸易协定，利好双边经济。
The IPC and the Xianzhou Alliance have renewed their trade agreement, bringing great economic benefits to both parties.
博识学会武装考古学派首席学士艾伦•琼斯主持发掘潜在灾害评级为Ω的古代遗迹「械皇遗冢」。

The head of the Armed Archaeologists of the Intelligentsia Guild, Allen Jones, personally oversaw the excavation of the ancient tomb of Emperor Rubert I. The ruins rank as a Category Omega site on the Potential Disaster Index.
著名歌者知更鸟受邀莅临匹诺康尼谐乐大典献唱颂歌。
Renowned songstress, Robin, has received an invitation to perform at Penacony's Charmony Festival.
流光忆庭完成对已逝世界「月卫之盾」的忆质碎片回收工作，世界回忆有望重现。
The Garden of Recollection has gathered memoria fragments from the lost world of Moonshield — the precious memories of this world will not be forgotten.
以下为您展开详细报道。
Let's take a closer look at the details.
星际和平公司与仙舟联盟：罗浮再度签署全新的互惠贸易协定。
Regarding the IPC and the Xianzhou Alliance: The Xianzhou Luofu has opted to renew the trade agreement.
该协定将进一步推动开放双方各自市场，在农业、工业、医药、文化等多个领域深入合作，为缔造自由、开放、繁荣和共赢的商业市场奠定坚实基础。

The agreement will help to open up markets and promote cooperation between the two sides in agriculture, industry, medicine, and culture, laying a solid foundation for a free, open, and prosperous business environment.
协议签订现场，星际和平公司市场开拓部发言人与罗浮天舶司司舵驭空小姐友好交换了彼此的意见，并在星际安全形势对自由市场的影响等问题上达成了共识。

At the signing of the agreement, friendly talks were held between Madam Yukong, Sky-Faring Helm Master of the Luofu, and a representative of the IPC's Marketing Development Department. The two sides reached a consensus on various issues, including the impact of interstellar security on the free market.
同时，公司发言人就近日反物质军团入侵仙舟一事向「罗浮」表达关切，并向死难者家属致以慰问。
The IPC also expressed their heartfelt concern for the Luofu regarding the recent invasion by the Antimatter Legion and sent their condolences to the victims.
星际和平公司强烈谴责反物质军团的野蛮暴行，并愿为一切受军团摧残的世界送上琥珀王的「存护」。
The IPC strongly condemns the barbaric atrocities committed by the Antimatter Legion and conveys the Amber Lord's wish for Preservation to all worlds ravaged by that wretched force.
一直以来，帝皇鲁珀特一世为宇宙留下了诸多恐怖遗迹，其中「械皇遗冢」自被发现起就备受各方关注。
Emperor Rubert I left many horrific relics across the universe, and one of them, the Mechanical Emperor Tomb, has captivated the interests of countless people since its discovery.
如今，由博识学会武装考古学派首席学士艾伦•德雷克•独臂•琼斯发起，天才俱乐部成员螺丝咕姆参与合作，正式挖掘这座潜在灾害评级为Ω的钢铁遗迹，揭开它的神秘面纱。

The excavation of the tomb is headed by the head of the Armed Archaeologists of the Intelligentsia Guild, Allen Drake One-Armed Jones, with assistance from Genius Society member, Screwllum. It is hoped that the excavation of this metallic relic, which holds a Category Omega ranking on the Potential Disaster Index, will finally shed a light on its mysterious nature.
按照无机军团留下的帝皇行止记录显示，兴建该遗迹最初的目的是「存放鲁珀特一世在玄想模式下产生的发明灵感」。
According to records of the Emperor's deeds left behind by the Inorganic Legion, the original purpose of the site was to "house the inventions inspired by the imagination of Rubert I."
博识学会发言人表示：「我们无从得知琼斯学士会有怎样惊人的发现，但我们希望，他的发现将会让我们更进一步了解帝皇，并使宇宙免于再一次承受他降临时带来的恐怖。」

A spokesperson for the Intelligentsia Guild said, "We have no way of knowing what amazing discoveries Jones will uncover, but we are hopeful that his findings will further our understanding of the Emperor and help save the universe from the horrors that he will bring with him when he returns."
星际和平播报将对该考古项目持续进一步跟踪报道。
The Interastral Peace Broadcast will be covering this story throughout the excavation.
盛会之星「匹诺康尼」宣布将邀请知名歌者知更鸟小姐为「谐乐大典」献声演唱。
Penacony, the Planet of Festivities, announced that it will invite renowned singer, Robin, to perform at the Charmony Festival.
作为盛会之星的悠久传统，每个琥珀纪仅举办一次的盛典，谐乐大典云集无数同谐信众，为宇宙美好的未来而祈愿。
Once every Amber-Era, countless followers of the Harmony will attend this long-held tradition of the Planet of Festivities, and together pray for a brighter and better future for the universe.
知更鸟小姐身为备受银河瞩目的巨星，曾斩获多项顶级殊荣，其天籁歌喉传扬诸界。
Robin is a superstar whose voice is known throughout the cosmos. She has been the recipient of many top awards.
据信，此次庆典中，知更鸟将以「家族」名义为「同谐」星神唱响颂歌，揭开大典的序幕。
It is believed that during the celebrations, Robin will sing a hymn for the Aeon of the Harmony in the name of The Family.
星际和平公司将全程转播本次庆典的盛况，将乐声和美好祝福共同送向寰宇千星。
The IPC will broadcast the entire event, sending the sounds of music and good wishes to worlds far and wide.
众所周知，流光忆庭始终致力于复现众多陨落的文明，为银河留下复苏的火种。
As we all know, the Garden of Recollection has always been committed to the restoration of lost civilizations, igniting the spark of revival across the cosmos.
根据可靠消息，在忆者的努力下，死灭世界「月卫之盾」的忆质碎片已全部打捞完毕。
According to reliable sources, thanks to the efforts of the Memokeepers, all memoria fragments of the deadworld of Moonshield have been salvaged.
该世界毁于反物质军团的入侵，但在公司与忆庭的通力合作下，对该世界的信息提取工作于近日宣告完成。按照忆者们的规划，它将在「记忆」的净土中得到重生。

Moonshield was destroyed during an invasion by the Antimatter Legion, but with the combined efforts of the IPC and the Garden of Remembrance, the collection of information about the fallen world was recently declared a success. The Memokeepers plan for it to be reborn in the pristine land of the Remembrance.
「毁灭」能带走一切，但永远无法夺走希望。星际和平公司将为银河中一切文明的长远发展提供力所能及的支持与存护——也包括那些消亡的世界。

The Destruction can destroy any material thing, but it can never take away our hope. The IPC will provide whatever support and protection within its means for the long-term development of all civilizations across the universe — including those that have perished.
本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.
这里是星际和平播报，观众朋友们晚上好。
Welcome to the Interastral Peace Broadcast. Good evening everyone.
欢迎收听今天的星际和平播报节目。首先为您介绍今天节目的主要内容。
Welcome to a new episode of the Interastral Peace Broadcast. We are here to bring you the latest news from across the cosmos.
备受瞩目的「谐乐大典」遭遇星核袭击，星际和平公司已联合多方势力展开救援。
The highly anticipated Charmony Festival has fallen victim to a Stellaron attack. The Interastral Peace Corporation, along with allied forces, has commenced a relief effort.
沉寂已久的巡海游侠再度现身，原因或与一位「虚无」的自灭者相关。
In a surprising turn of events, the once-quiet Galaxy Rangers have made a notable reappearance, a move that is thought to be linked to the Nihility's Self-Annihilator.
星际和平公司将与混沌医师开展合作，为陷入精神危机中的世界提供医疗救助。
To address the mental health emergencies plaguing various worlds, the IPC has announced a partnership with the Doctors of Chaos to provide medical assistance.
「仙舟联盟」将举行演武仪典， 邀请各友好世界前来观礼。
The Xianzhou Alliance is set to hold a Wardance ceremony, welcoming attendees from friendly worlds to witness the occasion.
工业行星巴兰扎熔炉在绝灭大君「铁墓」的袭击下瘫痪，联觉信标生产受到影响。
The industrial planet Baranza Forge has been crippled by an attack from the Lord Ravager "Irontomb," impacting the production of Synesthesia Beacons.
以下为您展开详细报道。
Let's take a closer look at the details.
盛会之星「匹诺康尼」遭遇一场突如其来的星核袭击，致使谐乐大典意外中断。
The Planet of Festivities "Penacony" has been hit by an abrupt Stellaron incursion, leading to the unforeseen interruption of the Charmony Festival.
这一事件引发了各世界的广泛关注。日前，在家族、星际和平公司和无名客的共同努力下，星核隐患已得到妥善处理。

The incident has garnered widespread attention across various worlds. But thanks to the collaborative efforts of The Family, the IPC, and the Nameless, the Stellaron threat has been successfully handled.
期间，公司「战略投资部」与家族代表进行了富有成效的磋商，双方将重启双边贸易，共同应对银河邪恶势力的威胁。

During this period, the Strategic Investment Department of the IPC held fruitful discussions with Family representatives. Both parties agreed to resume bilateral trade in order to collectively address the challenge posed by nefarious powers throughout the cosmos.
在未来的日子里，公司将与匹诺康尼开展旅游业、制造业、文化艺术等多个领域的深度合作，携手缔造更为璀璨耀眼的盛会之星。

Moving forward, the IPC plans to partner closely with Penacony in areas such as tourism, manufacturing, and cultural arts, with the aim of enhancing the luster of this celebrated Planet of Festivities.
沉寂已久的巡海游侠现身阿斯德纳星系，这是继琥珀<unbreak>2155</unbreak>纪「血色翁瓦克」以来，该派系首次出现大规模的集结行动。

The once-quiet Galaxy Rangers have made a notable reappearance in the Asdana system, marking the first significant mobilization of the group since the Crimson Vonwacq event of <unbreak>2155</unbreak> AE, indicating a momentous resurgence.
巡海游侠并未在阿斯德纳停留过久，亦没有引发任何冲突。据悉，此次事件或与「虚无」的自灭者有关。
The Galaxy Rangers' stay in Asdana was brief and conflict-free. Sources suggest that this activity might be connected to the Nihility's Self-Annihilator.
当地目击者称，他们在巡海游侠到来前普遍产生了难以抑制的负面情绪，或看见离奇的黑洞、裂痕现象。
Local witnesses reported experiencing inexplicable dark emotions and seeing strange occurrences like black holes and fissures shortly before the Galaxy Rangers made their appearance.
星际和平公司在此呼吁：银河各方势力须保持冷静克制，切勿因一己私仇伤及无辜民众。

The Interastral Peace Corporation calls for prudence: Entities throughout the cosmos should exercise caution and self-control, ensuring personal grievances do not result in the harm of innocent civilians.
据悉，近三个琥珀纪以来，精神疾病已成为许多世界首要关心的问题。
Reports indicate that in the last three Amber Eras, mental illnesses have emerged as a top concern across numerous planets.
星际和平公司骄傲地宣布：公司技术研发部已与混沌医师「慕榕」建立长期友好合作关系，将为陷入精神疾病危机的世界提供医疗救助。

The Interastral Peace Corporation is delighted to announce our Technology Department has established a long-term partnership with Murong from the Doctors of Chaos, aimed at providing medical assistance to worlds engulfed in mental health crises.
星际和平公司坚信，「虚无」绝非不可对抗的敌人。
The Interastral Peace Corporation holds the conviction that the Nihility is not an insurmountable adversary.
公司将在未来的日子里，投入更多资源聚焦精神疾病问题，愿每个人、每个世界都能以积极健康的心态面对每一天。

In the days ahead, the IPC will allocate more resources towards addressing mental health issues, with the hope that every individual and every world can face each day with a positive and healthy mindset.
仙舟联盟：罗浮将举行演武仪典，邀请众多友好世界的宾客前往观礼。
The Xianzhou Luofu is set to conduct a Wardance ceremony, welcoming attendees from numerous allied worlds to observe.
演武仪典是仙舟联盟的节庆仪式。在举办这一庆典期间，一座仙舟将以比武、竞技等方式纪念云骑军在「巡猎」星神的庇佑下赢得胜利。

The Wardance is a celebratory tradition within the Xianzhou Alliance. Throughout this celebration, a Xianzhou vessel pays tribute to the Cloud Knight victories achieved under the Aeon, The Hunt, through displays of combat and competitive events.
据悉，自反物质军团入侵事件之后，这是仙舟联盟首次向银河各界发出访问邀请。其重建情况如何，让我们拭目以待。

According to reports, this is the Xianzhou Alliance's first outreach to the cosmic populace since the Antimatter Legion's attack. The progress of their recovery is something we'll watch with interest.
星际和平播报将全程转播演武仪典的精彩赛事，欢迎各位观众届时收看。
Stay with Interastral Peace Broadcast for full live coverage of the Wardance's thrilling competitions. We encourage viewers to tune in and enjoy the action.
断联已久的工业行星巴兰扎熔炉确认遭到绝灭大君「铁墓」入侵，陷入全面瘫痪状态。
After a prolonged silence, it has been verified that the industrial world Baranza Forge has been invaded by the Lord Ravager Irontomb, plunging it into a state of complete paralysis.
据悉，绝灭大君「铁墓」常出现于科技发达的世界，以残酷无情的手段摧毁高度发展的文明。
Sources indicate that the Lord Ravager Irontomb frequently targets technologically advanced worlds, employing ruthless methods to obliterate highly developed civilizations.
巴兰扎熔炉是联觉信标的重要加工基地。此次袭击将对公司的边境拓荒事业造成不可忽视的影响。
Baranza Forge plays a vital role in the manufacturing of Synesthesia Beacons. The implications of this assault will undoubtedly influence the IPC's frontier pioneering efforts.
星际和平公司强烈谴责「反物质军团」的暴行，并呼吁宇宙间的文明联合起来，共同抵御「毁灭」的入侵。
The IPC strongly condemns the barbaric atrocities committed by the Antimatter Legion, and calls upon civilizations across the universe to unite and resist the invasion of the Destruction.
日前，第一支救援队已抵达巴兰扎熔炉，将与流光忆庭展开合作，抢救珍贵的技术成果，并帮助幸存者恢复正常的生活。

Just days ago, the first rescue team arrived on Baranza Forge, and will work alongside the Garden of Recollection to salvage valuable technology achievements, and assist survivors in rebuilding their lives.
星际和平播报将持续追踪报道巴兰扎事件，让我们为遇难者哀悼，祈愿和平的降临。
The Interastral Peace Broadcast remains committed to following the Baranza event closely. We'd like to extend our condolences to the victims and hope that peace will prevail.
本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.
那么，请允许小女子代表天舶司，欢迎各位恩公光临「星槎海」。
On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, allow me to welcome you to Starskiff Haven.
「罗浮」仙舟上，举凡空域、航行和贸易事务，一应由位列六司的「天舶司」主掌。作为最大的港口，星槎海也在我们治下。

On the Xianzhou Luofu, anything relating to aviation, navigation, and trade falls within the scope of the Sky-Faring Commission, which is one of the six commissions of the Luofu. As the biggest port on the ship, Starskiff Haven is governed by the Sky-Faring Commission, too.
不愧是…呃，什么渡使，说起话来好有气场。
You definitely sound like a... what was it again...? Oh, Amicassador! By which I mean — nice speech.
见笑了。我负责接渡来往的商客。这些文绉绉的场面话，我隔三差五要说一通的。
That's too kind of you. My job involves ferrying business delegates to and from Starskiff Haven, so I do this kind of introduction all the time.
总之，到这儿就安全了。本该带大家游览一番，让小女子尽尽地主之谊。但眼下非常时期，我们先走一趟司辰宫，向驭空大人禀报各位的来意。
Anyway, we're safe now. Normally I'd be a good host and take you around. But these are difficult times. Let's head to the Palace of Astrum first and report your arrival to Madam Yukong.
瞧见了没，城里最高的建筑。那儿就是天舶司的总部。事不宜迟，咱们快些去吧。
Right there, the tallest building in the city. It's also the headquarters of the Sky-Faring Commission. Let's hurry. We haven't got much time.
We need to take a breather.
Can we talk about it first?
哎呀，不是我着急，是怕驭空大人怪罪下来，小女子担不起这个责任……
*sigh* I don't mean to rush you, but if Madam Yukong holds me accountable for not getting you over soon enough, I wouldn't want to be around for the consequences...
这么可怕？你不是说她为人很和善嘛？
Sounds scary. I thought you said she was kind-hearted?
觐见六司，总得有些准备。停云小姐放心，我们不去他处。劳烦你先通报一声，我们稍后在司辰宫门口等候。

We need to make a few preparations before paying a visit to any of the six commissions. Rest assured, Miss Tingyun, we won't go anywhere. If you could inform Madam Yukong of our arrival first, we'll meet you at the palace entrance later.
那位狐狸姑娘做事节奏太快，我都难以适应，也许是闲得太久了…抓住这点时间好好喘口气吧，这会是我们唯一空闲的时光了。
Little miss fox moves at quite the pace — I can't keep up with her. *sigh* I've spent too long on the bench... Let's catch our breath for a while — we can expect a packed schedule ahead.
那个停云好像非常狡猾…
That Tingyun is a sly one...
谈不上狡猾吧，她的考虑都以利己为第一出发点。
That might be a little harsh, but she does put her own interests first.
遇到身份不明的可疑人士，做好防范是明智之举；随后的赶路，只能说她畏惧担责，想尽快把我们这个麻烦丢到上级头上去吧。
She did the right thing by not trusting us initially — we were an unknown quantity to her. As for the rush... my guess is she's just eager to get us out of her hair and further up the chain.
那个驭空似乎不好对付…
That Yukong sounds like a tough lady...
又不是去对付她，放心。我们行事光明磊落，没有什么可怕的。
It'll be alright, we're not trying to stand in her way. We have nothing to hide from her.
在贝洛伯格我们也挺光明磊落的……
We didn't have anything to hide in Belobog, either...
Nice! Let's have a look around the city.
先给两位打个预防针。接下来的谒见环节，务必打起精神，认真应对。
I need to give you two a heads up first. Our meeting with Madam Yukong won't be without risk. We need to be prepared and take it seriously.
杨叔是担心这次面见仙舟的长官，我们会重蹈贝洛伯格的覆辙嘛…？
She is a top Xianzhou leader... Mr. Yang, do you think this could be Belobog all over again...?
你是说，驭空就是幕后黑手！？
Are you saying that... Madam Yukong is the new Madam Cocolia!?
难不成仙舟也要在旅馆下手…
Let me guess, they're gonna put us up in a hotel first...
不会，仙舟联盟不至于如此失礼。但这位驭空接见我们时，一定会问出一连串问题——
No, the Xianzhou Alliance is better than that. But Madam Yukong will definitely have a string of difficult questions for us...
为什么我们选择这个时机来到仙舟？我们如何得知这场灾变与星核有关？什么人向我们透露仙舟的消息？……
Why did we choose to come to the Xianzhou now? How did we know that the incident is related to a Stellaron? Who leaked their information to us...?
回答若有不慎，很可能换来戒备与敌意，行事也会倍加困难。
Careless answers mean distrust and potential hostility, which would make things much harder for us.
这可糟了，我和{NICKNAME}都是笨嘴笨舌，一不小心就说错话的类型……
Aw, crud. One of us is gonna blurt something out or get something wrong, I just know it...
Mr. Yang should do the talking.
好主意，咱们两个在旁边扮演氛围组，给杨叔加油助威。
Good idea! We can be his cheerleaders in the background.
那要不咱们先对个供词？
Shouldn't we plan out what we want to say?
咱们又没做亏心事，对什么供词呀！
Ugh... But we haven't done anything wrong!
小三月说的不错。试图遮遮掩掩，只会让我们显得别有用心。
March is right. If we're too scripted, it'll sound like we're hiding something.
Let's just be honest with her.
那万一他们以为我们和星核猎手是一伙的怎么办？别说联盟了，我都不相信星核猎手……
What if she thinks we're with the Stellaron Hunters? Never mind the Alliance, even I don't trust them...
{NICKNAME}说的不错。试图遮遮掩掩，只会让我们显得别有用心。
{NICKNAME} is right. If we're too scripted, it'll sound like we're hiding something.
车到山前必有路。你们不必为难，到时候由我来应答就行。
Don't worry. We'll find a way through. Let me do the talking.
咦？恩公们到得挺早啊。久等啦，驭空大人在司辰宫内恭候各位。
Oh, you're here already? Sorry to keep you waiting. Madam Yukong is expecting you.
小女子已经将各位的情况呈报了司舵大人，我就不进去啦～
I've brought Madam Helm Master up to speed. It's over to you now~
将损失数据呈报给景元将军，再把太卜司的人找来。这么大的乱子，他们岂能置身事外……
Report the losses to General Jing Yuan and find someone from the Divination Commission. They can't just stand there watching while we deal with this mess...
Greetings, guests from the Astral Express.
你们的来意，停云已经悉数向我禀报过了。本来我的职责并不包括接见旅客。
Tingyun has informed me of the purpose of your visit. Receiving guests isn't normally one of my responsibilities...
但既然你们知道星核，又言明要帮助「罗浮」。那么于情于理，我都要给各位一个面对面的机会……
...but since you know about the Stellaron and have stated that you want to help the Luofu, I thought I should at least meet you in person...
区区星核而已，联盟早已知悉此物，自有办法应对。仙舟翾翔八千载，见惯了危急存亡。眼下的灾难虽来势汹汹，仙舟亦有余力自处，不需假借外人之力来平息祸端。

The Xianzhou Alliance knows what a Stellaron is and is more than capable of handling it ourselves. We have been around for over <unbreak>8000</unbreak> years and weathered countless dangers and crises. While the situation is serious, we have more than enough resources to spare. Outsider help is not needed on this occasion.
各位远到是客，断无理由卷入此事——我这么说，你们可明白？
You are guests from afar — there is no reason for this matter to concern you... Am I making myself clear?
从目前的状况来看，星核的影响尚未完全深入。
From what we've gathered, the influence of the Stellaron can still be contained.
如果能及时找到位置，对其进行遏制，无论是被侵蚀的空间，还是遭受侵染的人，都有复原的可能。
If we can locate it in time and contain it, it's possible that we can restore any space — and any individuals — affected by the corrosion.
我们曾经阻止过星核的灾难，这一次前来，也只是为了助各位一臂之力。
We have experience in preventing Stellaron disasters, and we've only come here to lend you that experience.
我已说得很清楚：这是仙舟联盟的内部事务，不劳星穹列车插手。为示尊重，我特意接见各位，传达最终的决定，不容更改。

I've said this and I'll say it again: This is an internal affair of the Xianzhou Alliance and there is no need for the Astral Express to get involved. I decided to arrange a meeting with you as a gesture of respect, but my decision is final.
算啦杨叔，联盟自己能搞定，咱们还费那个心干嘛。我们走就是了。
Never mind, Mr. Yang. If the Xianzhou Alliance say they can handle it, then we're wasting our breath. Let's go.
...Huh? And what's that supposed to mean?
「罗浮」上发现星核不过数日，星槎海全面封闭，无人离开——各位如何未卜先知，又怎么认定这一切与星核有关？

It's only been a few days since the presence of a Stellaron was detected on the Luofu. Starskiff Haven has been under full lockdown — no one has been permitted to leave. How did you come to know of the incident, and what led you to conclude that it was linked to a Stellaron?
我调取了星槎海的出入记录，在不久前，有人骇入系统，打开玉界门，指引一艘舰船入港，那就是你们：星穹列车……
I acquired the access history of Starskiff Haven. Not long ago, someone hacked into the system and opened the Jade Gate, before guiding you, the Astral Express, into our territory.
而骇入系统的人手段高明，甚至故意留下了一道印戳，仿佛挑衅——「银狼」，星核猎手的一员。
The hacker was skillful and even taunted us with her seal. Her name is Silver Wolf, a member of the Stellaron Hunters...
What say you in your defense?
是星核猎手委托我们来的！
The Stellaron Hunters told us to come here!
The Stellaron Hunters want to use you to take us out!
在上述疑团查清前，你们不得离开天舶司。
You are forbidden from leaving the Sky-Faring Commission until the aforementioned questions have been investigated.
驭空，别这么凶嘛，要是传出去，岂不让银河耻笑仙舟联盟不得待客之道？
Don't be too harsh, Yukong. If this gets out, the whole galaxy will think the Alliance has forgotten how to treat our guests.
星穹列车怎么可能和星核猎手同盟呢，他们可是死对头呀。
It's very unlikely that the Express has joined forces with the Stellaron Hunters. They are mortal enemies, after all.
打扰各位的会面，我是「罗浮」云骑将军：景元。
Apologies for interrupting your meeting. My name is Jing Yuan — I'm the general of the Cloud Knights here on the Luofu.
将军，这是罗浮的内部事务……
General, this is an internal affair for the Luofu...
对，对，内部事务——我完全赞同驭空司舵的意见。
I fully agree with you, Helm Master Yukong, this is indeed an internal affair.
很抱歉，列车团的各位。「罗浮」上确实有一颗星核，但我必须拒绝你们的好意：这是仙舟的问题，只能由我们自己解决。

I am sorry, guests of the Astral Express. It is true that there is a Stellaron on the Luofu, but I'm afraid I cannot accept your kind offer to help resolve the issue. This is a Xianzhou matter, and it is our responsibility to handle it.
——但是来都来了，怎能让各位无功而返！虽然「星核」一事不能接受列车团的帮助，但我确实另有一事，非得拜托各位不可！请！

...Of course, it would be inappropriate of me to let you return without something to show for it. While I cannot accept your help with regard to the Stellaron, I do have a favor to ask. Please, after you.
星穹列车——在下闻名已久，心驰神往，今日得见，幸甚至哉！
The Astral Express! I must confess that the train's reputation precedes it, such that it is often close to my thoughts. How delightful to come face to face with its passengers!
Would that this occasion had come sooner!
久仰将军大名，您有什么事要拜托我们？
It's an honor to meet you, general. May I ask what the favor you spoke of is?
噢，那可是非各位莫属。数日前，我们抓住了一位擅闯仙舟重地的星核猎手，叫做「刃」。
Ah, a matter that requires capable people such as yourselves. We captured a member of the Stellaron Hunters a few days ago, who goes by the name of "Blade."
审讯刃的期间，太卜司——仙舟负责情报与信息推演的部门——截获了他潜藏在仙舟上的同党「卡芙卡」发出的通信。至于通讯对象嘛……

During our investigation, the Divination Commission — the department in charge of intelligence processing — intercepted a transmission sent out by his accomplice, Kafka, who has managed to hide aboard the ship. As for where that transmission was destined...
各位与星核猎手之间的关系，我也略知一二。太卜司认为你们必是同党！我说不可能。星穹列车行事正派，见义勇为的美名诸界传扬，岂能与宵小之辈同流合污？

I have some knowledge of your relationship with the Stellaron Hunters. The Divination Commission is convinced that you made an alliance with them... I say that's impossible. The crew of the Astral Express are honorable people whose valiant deeds are lauded across the universe. There must have been a misunderstanding.
因此这则通信，必是星核猎手祸水东引的毒计。
As such, I came to the conclusion that the communication must have been an attempt by the Stellaron Hunters to sow dissent between us.
星核猎手也许更有深意…
Maybe the Stellaron Hunters have other motives...
「星核」之灾，仙舟确有解决法子。但平定灾患需要时间，需得投入云骑军主力方能成事。但这卡芙卡潜藏在仙舟上，终究是个祸患，不得不防。

We can handle the Stellaron, but it will take time and will require the bulk of the Cloud Knights on the ship. It is this Kafka that concerns me. The longer she stays on the ship, the bigger the threat she will pose.
既然星核猎手故意将各位引来罗浮，你我正好顺水推舟。我以将军身份给予诸位在仙舟便宜行事的权限，将下落不明的卡芙卡引出，一举捉拿。

Since the Stellaron Hunters lured you to our ship, we shall move with the current. You are hereby authorized to do as you deem fit on the Luofu, with the goal of bringing Kafka out of the shadows and under our control.
如此，一来洗清各位被星核猎手泼上的污水，二来也好得知这猎手潜入仙舟的目的，又与爆发的星核有何关联。列车团的诸位，意下如何？

Doing so would clear the misunderstanding between us, reveal the true intentions of the Stellaron Hunters, and help us understand their connection to the Stellaron burst. What say you, my Astral guests?
不妨顺水推舟，也帮点忙。
Let's move with the current and help out.
各位若能帮我捉住星核猎手，便是帮了仙舟一个大忙。
If you are able to capture this Stellaron Hunter, the Xianzhou will be indebted to you.
Our expedition was focused on the Stellaron...
很遗憾，事关外交，我必得公事公办。但若能捉拿猎手，得知其投放星核的目的，亦是在「星核」一事上帮了大忙。

I'm afraid my hands are tied on the matter — this is a diplomatic affair and I have rules to follow. But if you can bring me the Stellaron Hunter and discover her motive for placing a Stellaron on the ship, it would be of great help in resolving the incident.
We don't really have a choice.
各位当然有的选。无情人遭拒，抽身离去便是。但你们依然心念帮助仙舟。
Of course you do. You can be strangers and simply walk away. But I feel you wish to help the Xianzhou.
君如以赤诚待我，「罗浮」理当报以赤诚。
The Luofu never fails to reward that which is given.
妙极，一言为定。我这便下令，着驭空分享一切情报，拨出精锐人手，助各位展开搜捕。
Wonderful, it's a deal then. I shall notify Yukong that all intel is to be shared with you, and that our best personnel are to aid you in your search.
滞留仙舟期间，如有用得上天舶司和云骑军的地方，不用客气。
If there's anything the Sky-Faring Commission or the Cloud Knights can do for you during your stay, don't hesitate to make it known.
我知道你，{NICKNAME}对吧？…联盟对星穹列车也很关注呢。
I have heard of you, {NICKNAME}... The Alliance is very interested in the Astral Express.
「刃」不仅被公司通缉，也是联盟在案的重犯。关于他的情报，恕我无法透露。
Blade is wanted by both the IPC and the Alliance. I'm afraid I cannot comment on his file.
已知的「星核猎手」有五人，首领艾利欧从不出面，大多数行动都是卡芙卡主使的。
There are five known members of the Stellaron Hunters. Elio is their leader, but always stays behind the scenes. Most of the operations are led by Kafka.
若非太卜司捕捉到了加密通信，恐怕此人还能隐藏更久。
Had the Divination Commission not intercepted her encrypted transmission, she would have remained undetected for much longer.
Once we catch the Stellaron Hunter...
一旦抓住星核猎手，就交给我们。
卡芙卡有控制他人的能力。
Kafka is good at controlling the people around her.
卡芙卡什么都不会说的。
嗯，寻常的手段许是不好使，不过，我们太卜司有独门的办法……
Hmm, ordinary means may prove futile when it comes to this individual. But the Divination Commission has ways of...
…哈哈，别误会。仙舟不会虐待嫌犯，问讯情报也未必要倚靠暴力手段。
...Haha, don't misunderstand me. The Xianzhou does not engage in torture. Retrieving intel does not necessarily involve the use of violence.
总之，交给我们就好。所获的情报，我会毫无保留地同各位分享。
In any case, you can deliver her directly to us. Once we learn something, I will share every piece of information with you.
I don't have any other questions.
如果进展顺利，希望日后有时间与诸位聊聊星海间的见闻。我受俗务所困，已经多年没有出行远航了。

If things go as planned, I would love to find the time to sit with all of you and hear about your experiences among the stars. My responsibilities to the Xianzhou have meant that I haven't had the chance to travel in many years.
列车久无消息，如今看到它再度驰骋星海，重回正轨，真是令人畅怀啊。
We had heard nothing of the Express for a long time. It is heartening to learn of its continued journey along that starward track.
我还有其他要事，不克久留，告辞了。
I have other matters to attend to. Goodbye for now.
Hmm, I think we only scratched the surface of this General Jing Yuan...
Do you think there's something strange about him?
古怪倒也谈不上，只是总觉得哪里不大对劲。
I don't know about "strange," but my gut tells me something is off.
为何不让「我们」调查星核？
Why would he stop us from investigating the Stellaron?
他说这是仙舟内部事务，不容其他势力插手。理由确实站得住脚。
He says he doesn't want outsiders getting involved in the Xianzhou's internal affairs, which is understandable.
为何让「我们」搜捕卡芙卡？
Why did he ask us to go after Kafka?
啊！对，没错，就是这里！违和感就出自这里……
Yes! There's something about this point...
为何表现得这么亲切随和？
Why is he being so kind to us?
先是驭空对我们横加打压，再是将军出场谈笑风生，一下就让我们对他起了好感。
He wants us to trust him. He took advantage of Yukong's frosty reception to play the good guy.
他不是站在我们这边吗？
I thought he was on our side?
是这样没错，但总觉得哪里不大对劲。
Theoretically, yes. But something feels off.
我想到了！有一个奇怪的地方，非常微小——他刻意跳过了「刃」！
Ah, that's it! A minor detail, but curious. He avoided talking about Blade!
既然云骑军抓住了星核猎手的成员，以此为线索追捕卡芙卡就行了。何必要请我们「引出」卡芙卡？
Since the Cloud Knights have already captured a Stellaron Hunter, why not use him to get to Kafka? Why rely on us?
仙舟既不愿让外人插手「星核」灾害，又为何在「星核猎手」一事上如此大度？
The Xianzhou is reluctant to involve outsiders in the Stellaron disaster, so why is it so keen on letting us capture a Stellaron Hunter?
Do you think Jing Yuan lied about the Stellaron?
这是把我们当钓饵用呢…
对，我只能想到一个合理的解释：不论「刃」被捕一事是否属实，至少现在，「刃」很可能已经脱离了仙舟的掌控。
Yes. The only sensible conclusion I can draw is that Blade had already escaped when Jing Yuan spoke to us — provided they even captured him in the first place.
因此，景元如果想钓出星核猎手，就只有我们这个与卡芙卡产生联系的诱饵。
Therefore, given our connection to Kafka, we represent the only way of luring the Stellaron Hunters in.
所以他才拐着弯地请我们帮忙——因为「刃」的逃脱不能让别人知道！
That's why he asked for our help... He didn't want to let anyone else find out that Blade had already escaped!
想通了这一节，也许我们开始接近事件的核心了。
Now that we've figured that out, perhaps we can get closer to the core of what's happening here.
这个景元，他到底掌握了哪些信息，哪些又是故意隐藏起来的呢？
This Jing Yuan... how much does he know, and how much is he hiding from us?
仙舟的将军亲自支持我们！这回可不会——等等，上次是不是也这样？要是他们安排咱们住店，可得小心！
We've got a Xianzhou general on our side! This time we have to... wait, does this seem familiar to you? Let's hope he doesn't offer us a hotel!
既然将军有令，天舶司自当全力配合。星核猎手的调查就托付给各位了。星槎海各处设施的通行凭证，我会一并开具，方便你们行事。

Seeing as the general gave the order, the Sky-Faring Commission will lend you our full support. The Stellaron Hunter investigation is in your hands now. I'll issue you a pass so you can access the facilities around Starskiff Haven.
至于人手…各个空港目前正处于维护和修复中，人力捉襟见肘。我只能请停云暂代接引的职责，照顾各位在这段时间内的行程。
As for personnel... the skyports are currently all under maintenance, so we're thinly stretched. What I can do is send Tingyun as your guide — she'll take care of you during your stay.
What do you make of this Jing Yuan?
谁问你长相啦！虽然确实不错……
I'm not asking about that! Although, you're not wrong...
我觉得这个人比那个驭空好说话多了，要么说人家能当仙舟将军，她只能做个司舵呢？你看这待人接物，差距多大。
He's much easier to talk to than that Yukong — their attitudes are so different! Maybe that's why she's only a helm master and he's a general...
我也觉得。这个人比那个驭空好说话多了，要么说人家能当仙舟将军，她只能做个司舵呢？你看这待人接物，差距多大。
I feel the same. He's much easier to talk to than that Yukong — their attitudes are so different! Maybe that's why she's only a helm master and he's a general...
你好像看谁都有点可疑…{F#是女生的第六感嘛？}{M#是你想太多了吧。}
{F#You think everyone's suspicious... though they do say some girls have a sixth sense.}{M#Come on, you think everyone's suspicious...}
我觉得这个人比那个驭空好说话多了，要么说人家能当仙舟将军，她只能做个司舵呢？你看这待人接物，差距多大。
He's much easier to talk to than that Yukong — their attitudes are so different! Maybe that's why she's only a helm master and he's a general...
太卜大人，我与他们的谈话你都听见了，有何看法？
Master Diviner, you heard our discussion. What do you make of it?
什么看法？「天道昭邈，人心幽微」，你要我给这几位卜一卦，占测来意吉凶么？
What do I make of it? "The way of heaven is apparent, but the heart of humanity is often deceptive." Are you asking me to divine their true intentions?
这倒不必，星穹列车与此事无干，这我十拿九稳。你我不必深究他们的来意，只要饵吞下，鱼钓出，也就够了。
That won't be necessary. The crew has nothing to do with the incident, of that I am almost certain. It isn't their intentions that trouble me. All I want is for them to lure out the one we're after.
嗯，多得有符卿智珠在握，之后的事情，也全都仰仗你了。
Indeed, your counsel has always been of great help to me. You may use your discretion on the matters ahead of us.
哼，那你倒是早些退位啊。
Hmph, why don't you retire early and I use my discretion full-time?
还不是时候，万一有甚变数，我得在将军之位上承担罪责，可不能现在一走了之，陷符卿于不义呀。
It is still too soon, unfortunately. If something goes wrong, you'll need a general to take the blame. How could I simply walk away and put you at such risk?
你早将星核猎手交到我手里，眼下也没这烦恼。
If you'd brought me that Blade earlier, none of this would've been necessary.
你到底在想什么啊？景元！该不会…难道是你故意把人放跑的？！
Wait, what are you up to exactly? Jing Yuan, did you... let him escape on purpose!?
我？我又怎能像符卿一样未卜先知？云骑军看守不力，我有责任。
Me? I had no idea he might escape! Unlike you, my gaze never travels beyond the horizon. I take full responsibility — the Cloud Knights failed in their duty.
哼，我能理解。仙舟诸务繁杂，你难免精力不济。要不是有我在底下撑着……
Hmph, I can understand. There's a lot to take care of on the Xianzhou — you were bound to miss something. Thank goodness I'm here...
说来，下次「六御」议政，你该履行举荐我继任将军的诺言了吧……
On that note, perhaps it's about time you finally nominate me as your successor when the Six Charioteers next convene...
嗯嗯嗯，好好好，知道了，我还有要事。之后就全拜托「天赋异禀」的符卿了。
Yes, yes, yes... I have to go now — I'll leave this in your overwhelmingly capable hands, Fu Xuan.
仙舟上的麻烦，桌案上的文牍，花坛里的杂草，唯有这三样东西是无论怎么努力也打扫不干净啊。
*sigh* There are three things in the world that I can't seem to rid myself of: The troubles of the Xianzhou, the papers on my desk, and the weeds in my garden.
将军，符太卜想接您的位置，路人皆知。
General, Diviner Fu wants the general's position for herself. Everyone knows that.
她是很有能力啦，不过心智上还要再磨磨，什么时候磨去了直脾性，我大概会考虑退休吧。
She is very capable, but her intellect is burdened by a quick temper. I'll retire when she's achieved a better balance.
星核这事，说麻烦也不麻烦。人跑了，再抓回来就是。将军一声令下，我彦卿立刻替您排忧解难。
This Stellaron thing is easy. Blade escaped, now we gotta go get him. Just say the word and I'll solve this in a flash.
我知你心急，想做些什么，并且做成些什么，但现在还不是时候。你欲得「剑首」之名，不可随意动手，尤其不可与重犯械斗。

I can understand your impatience, and I know you want to prove yourself. Now is not the time. If you truly wish to become Sword Champion, you shouldn't be running around brandishing your sword at people, especially not a major criminal.
将军难道以为我会输给那个「刃」不成？
Tsk, you think I'd lose to Blade?
我是要你耐下性子，彦卿。仙舟治平与剑术不同，徐徐图之，方能成势。何况这棋局中的暗手还没揭开呢……

I'm saying you need to have patience, Yanqing. Governing Xianzhou is different from a sword fight. The only way to build momentum is to work slowly. Besides, we still don't know who's really moving the chess pieces...
有一个疑团，只要它还没解开，这局棋就只能僵持不动。那就是「星核」。
There is something we must take care of before making our next move. As long it remains unresolved, we're at a stalemate. That something is the Stellaron.
它如何掩人耳目，绕过天舶司的核查与太卜司的推演，又被置于何处？
How did it manage to bypass the Sky-Faring Commission's inspections and the Divination Commission's predictions? Where is it now?
我看，把两个星核猎手都抓回来送去符太卜那儿一审是最快的法子。
I say we bring those two Stellaron Hunters before Diviner Fu — she'll get an answer out of them in no time.
这件事我已托了列车上的客人去做。不忙，之后大局底定，自有你的用武之地。
I've asked our friends from the Express to take care of that for us. Worry not, you'll have your moment when the current stalemate is broken.
你是我最信任的人，有些事，我只有交给你才放心。彦卿，有个差事……
You are my most trusted aide, and there are some things that I would only assign to you. Speaking of which, Yanqing...
是我不好，少年在家里待久了，难免要生出些事情来。「匣中久藏三尺水，何日可待试锋芒？」…呵呵……
I suppose it is my fault. I should have given him an opportunity already. "A sharp sword can't stay sheathed forever," haha...
只怕这次要受的挫折，大过他的洋洋意气呵……
My fear is that this might prove too big a setback, bigger than his exuberance...
唉，驭空大人把接待各位的任务又派给了我。
*sigh* Madam Yukong has asked me to look after you.
看来小女子和恩公们的缘分不浅呢。
Seems like we were destined to be in each other's company...
天舶司订了「浥尘客栈」的上房。恩公们办完这里的事情，就请随我一起去旅店里喝杯茶，暂作歇息吧。
The Sky-Faring Commission has reserved rooms for you at the Petrichor Inn. When you finish your business here, how about some tea together?
客气客气，各位下回见到驭空大人，替小女子美言几句便是最好的安慰了。我已经接受了我的劳碌命。
Not at all, though I'd appreciate it if you mention to Madam Yukong that you got a warm reception from me when you next see her. *sigh* Better to be busy than idle, I suppose.
没有没有…各位下回见到驭空大人，替小女子美言几句便是最好的奖赏了。我已经接受了我的劳碌命。
No, no, though I'd appreciate it if you mention to Madam Yukong that you got a warm reception from me when you next see her. *sigh* Better to be busy than idle, I suppose.
刚接见就住宿？又来一次？
冷静，别有这么强的应激反应。
Easy, I know this probably brings back bad memories.
一看到旅馆招牌，倦意就止不住地涌上来了。
*yawn* Well, here we are. I feel sleepy already.
The sun hasn't gone down yet.
我们忙里忙外这么久，怎么天还亮着啊？在司辰宫里我都以为过去老半天了。
What? But we've done a whole day's work — what's the sun playing at? It felt like we spent the whole day in the Palace of Astrum.
Ready for a nap? That's not like you, March...
这回不一样！我可是随时紧绷着，观察情况准备开溜。
Hey, that's not fair! My eyes are peeled this time — I'll make a run for it the second things go wrong.
不瞒你们说，刚才我看到那位驭空眉头一皱，差点以为周围要冲出一队全副武装的士兵，要把咱们几个押进大牢。
Jokes aside, did you see Madam Yukong frown at us? I thought her guards were about to jump out of nowhere and throw us in jail.
和大人物打交道，可比对付怪物还累人……
*sigh* I'd rather deal with monsters than these big shots...
啊，我、我可不是在说驭空大人的坏话……
Ah! I—I mean... not that Madam Yukong doesn't have her merits, hehe...
放心吧，小女子不是乱嚼舌根的人～
Don't worry, my lips are sealed~
不过身为属下，我要替大人说句公道话：眼下的罗浮危机四伏，驭空大人率领的天舶司肩负着仙舟关口的安全，警惕戒备是她的天职所在。

But as her subordinate, I have to say that it's Madam Yukong's duty to keep her guard up. The Luofu is facing a crisis, and as head of the Sky-Faring Commission, she is responsible for the security of the Xianzhou's customs and borders.
私底下，她老人家也不是这么不近人情的啦。
She's actually a very reasonable old girl in private.
Reasonable? Are we thinking of the same person?
据说这位大人当年可是仙舟云骑军飞行士中的佼佼者呢～脾气火辣，技术一流，爱笑爱闹。
They say that many years ago, Madam Yukong was an ace pilot in the Cloud Knights. She was a "work hard, play harder" type, known for her hot temper and incredible skill.
只是嘛，岁月蹉跎，最终王牌飞行士还是收住脾气心性，成了总辖一司的首领，要滴水不漏地收拾各种麻烦。
Eventually, she became the head of the entire commission, which required her to learn patience and adopt a meticulous approach to her work.
这不，驭空大人亲自吩咐我，为各位安排好浥尘客栈的上房以及日常花销用度，希望各位能在这里住得舒心，吃得开心～这样一来，仙舟也算是没有失了待客的礼数。

In any case, Madam Yukong instructed me to reserve the best rooms at the inn and have all your expenses covered. She wants to extend the full courtesy of the Xianzhou so that all of you enjoy your stay to the fullest~
同时她还吩咐，要是各位瞧见什么喜欢的，想吃的，跟老板说，全都记在天舶司的账上。
She specifically mentioned that if you wish to buy anything at the inn, be it food or otherwise, just let the innkeeper know. The commission will cover the cost.
还不快说声多谢驭空姐！
Say thanks to Madam Yukong for us!
Why don't you go back yourself?
The commission will cover the cost!
真是我抵达仙舟以来听到的，最亲切的一句话了！
That's the friendliest thing I've heard since we arrived!
咳咳，遇到这样热情好客的主人，不好好享受一下真对不起人家的一番心意啊。对吧，杨叔？
Ahem! S—Seeing as our hosts are so thoughtful, I guess we should help ourselves. Right, Mr. Yang?
还是把注意力放在正事上吧。既然驭空司舵极力拒绝我们介入，想来天舶司对卡芙卡的下落多少有些头绪？

We should focus on our objective first. Seeing as Helm Master Yukong was extremely reluctant to get us involved, am I right to speculate that the Sky-Faring Commission has some leads on the whereabouts of Kafka?
恩公明察。嫌犯十分狡猾，除去加密频段外，通信的时间也卡得刚好，无法准确定位。
Exactly right. The suspect is extremely cunning. She encrypted her transmission and timed her communication — we couldn't pinpoint her exact location.
不过嘛，还是给太卜司找到了一点蛛丝马迹。
But as cunning as she is, the Divination Commission has managed to find something.
坐标在这里，一切交由你们自己决定。
Here are the coordinates. It's up to you how to proceed.
虽然追求的目标截然不同，但群星的轨道终将彼此交汇。再见。
Our destinations may differ, but the orbits of the stars will eventually converge. See you later.
Is there anything special about what she said?
恩公莫要被她的话引走了注意。
Don't let her words distract you.
恩公莫要被她的话引走了注意。
Don't let her words distract you.
I heard something in the background.
话音的背后，是某种装置运转的声响。
That's the sound of a device.
啊，有了这线索，局势就——毫无变化！仙舟可是一艘星舰哎，机器装置到处都是！
Ahhhh, which means... what exactly!? This is a starship! There are all kinds of devices making weird noises.
三月小姐，对于大部分人来说，这种响动也许毫无区别。但对负责维护设施的工造司来说，每一种机械的运转都像曲子的旋律高低各有不同了。
Miss March, to the untrained ear, these noises may sound the same. But for the craftsmen of the Artisanship Commission, each machine has a different pitch and melody.
将军召来了匠人，在比对辨听之下，发现卡芙卡的背景音来自「迴星港」的造船设施。
The general sent for craftsmen, and they concluded that the sound came from the shipyard facilities in Stargazer Navalia.
请各位稍事休息，养足精神。准备就绪便可出发擒贼，届时就看恩公们的手段啦～
Now, get some rest and prepare yourselves for the operation ahead. I look forward to seeing you in action~
大家先休息片刻，追踪星核猎手卡芙卡，必然是一场硬仗。
Let's take advantage of the rest. It won't be easy to track down Kafka the Stellaron Hunter.
对了，{NICKNAME}，咱们跟列车报个平安吧～
Oh, let's let the Express know how we're doing~
尤其是丹恒，嘿嘿，你问他在干嘛，然后告诉他我们这儿可好玩了！
More importantly, let's see how Dan Heng's doing! Hee-hee, ask him what he's up to — then tell him we're having loads of fun!
There's something I want to say.
截获通信时，仙舟上在下雨吗？
Was it raining when Kafka's transmission was intercepted?
卡芙卡在通讯时拿着伞…
Kafka was holding an umbrella in her transmission...
恩公观察得挺仔细嘛。仙舟上风云雨雾都是机巧造景，受地衡司风雨台的调遣。
How perceptive. Our wind, clouds, rain, and fog are all artificial. The Realm-Keeping Commission's weather pavilion manages the environmental conditions here.
卡芙卡撑着伞，意味着通信时她所在的地方正巧被人工雨云覆盖。
If Kafka was holding an umbrella, that means she was in an area with artificial rainfall during the transmission.
不过光有这一节也不能说明什么，毕竟仙舟上不止一处洞天，当时降雨的地方也不止一处。
Still, that doesn't help us much. The ship is huge, with changing conditions across various delves. I'm sure there were showers across many of them at the time.
卡芙卡还会停留在迴星港吗？
Any chance Kafka is still at Stargazer Navalia?
这可说不准。原本太卜司能调取每个洞天间的出入文牍来进行追踪……
Impossible to say. It used to be that the Divination Commission could track the access history of all the delves...
不过眼下星核降临，一切都乱了套。有些洞天甚至连出入口都发生了错位。
But with the arrival of the Stellaron, things have become messy. Some delves even had their entrance marked as the exit.
我若是星核猎手，这样的混乱正中下怀，虽说增加了趁乱逃脱的难度，但更不易被发现了。
If I were one of the Stellaron Hunters, I'd be very happy to capitalize on all the chaos. It'd be harder to escape, but easier to blend in.
请您停步。将军有令，暂时封锁星槎海部分区域，以防危险发生。
Halt. Under order of the general and to mitigate further risk, Starskiff Haven is under partial lockdown.
抱歉，前方禁止通行。按云骑军巡防令，我们正在排查风险地区。
I'm sorry, but this route is closed. We're conducting inspections in accordance with the Cloud Knights patrol ordinance.
前面的区域……不是，前方区域目前正在接受封锁排查，暂时禁止通行。
How about we explore the area ahea... I mean, the area ahead is currently under lockdown and inspection. This route is closed for the time being.
严肃但礼貌的云骑士兵
Serious but Polite Cloud Knights Soldier
A lockdown has been imposed up ahead! No passage will be permitted!
My daughter is waiting for me at home...
I'll lose money on this shipment!
Please find it in your heart to let me through...
请您让我过去吧，我家闺女还在家等我。
Please let me through. My daughter's waiting for me at home.
严肃但礼貌的云骑士兵
Serious but Polite Cloud Knights Soldier
对不起，请您谅解，前方禁止通行……
I'm sorry. Please understand, the road up ahead has been sealed off...
快让我过去！我这批货必须尽快卖出去！
Let me through now! I have to sell these goods on the double!
严肃但礼貌的云骑士兵
Serious but Polite Cloud Knights Soldier
请冷静一点，生命和生意哪个更重要？请您掂量清楚。
Please calm down. Which is more important: Your life, or your deal? Consider this carefully.
请您通融一下吧，我真的有急事，让我过去吧……
Please find it in your heart to let me through, I'm on urgent business. Please let me through...
严肃但礼貌的云骑士兵
Serious but Polite Cloud Knights Soldier
不行，请您谅解。不止您着急，大家都着急，怎么可能单单为您通融呢？
That won't be possible. Please understand. You're not the only one in a rush. Everyone is. How can I make an exception for you?
Hold! You can't go through here!
对不起，请您留步。目前情况复杂，局势尚未明朗，因此我们不得不封锁各区域。
My apologies, please stay where you are. The situation is complicated, and we currently do not have a clear view of the situation. We have had no choice but to seal this area off.
有事要办的话，还请您在局势稳定后再来吧。给您添麻烦了。
If you have business to attend to, please do it when the situation has settled down. Apologies for any trouble.
Starwatcher Avenue is a bustling sight...
A pity we can't get through...
都戒严了，宣夜大道还是那么繁华…真不愧是仙舟。
That Starwatcher Avenue would be so crowded even with a lockdown... Xianzhou is really a sight to behold.
可惜我们只能远观，过不去。
It's a pity that we can only admire from afar.
没事的，很快就会好起来的。等解封了请你吃饭。
It's all right, it will get better very soon. I'll treat you to a meal when the lockdown is lifted.
The area's been sealed off... are we still going to get paid...
How am I going to make ends meet...
哎…港口封锁了，还会不会发工资啊？
*sigh* The dock's been sealed off. Will we be getting our wages?
不知道。我看够呛，这么一闹，老板也没收入了啊……
No idea. I doubt it. The boss probably has no money to pay us, what with this fiasco...
可这样的话，解封之前我们该靠什么养活自己啊？
If this keeps up, how'll we survive then?
谁知道呢…哎，也不知道什么时候才能解封……
Who knows... *sigh* I wonder when the restrictions will be lifted...
It's been a long time since something this serious happened...
Xianzhou will surely quell this crisis!
哎…仙舟可真是好久没出过这么大的乱子了……
*sigh* It's really been a long while since Xianzhou encountered something this serious...
嗯？您是游客吗？现在是非常时期，请您尽可能不要在外面闲逛，可能会遇到危险…哎，一定要注意安全啊！
Hm? Are you a traveler? These are unstable times right now. You should not be strolling around in the streets, or you might run into danger... Hey, keep yourself safe!
你是游客？别在外面乱晃了，快点回住处去吧。虽然我们仙舟云骑有自信保护你，但现在外面还是比较危险的。

Are you a traveler? You should avoid the outdoors and return to your lodging. We Xianzhou Cloud Knights may be able to protect you, but we cannot stress enough the dangers of being outdoors right now.
无论如何，别担心，也别害怕！只要有我们在，仙舟就一定能够逢凶化吉。
In any case, worry not, and don't be afraid! As long as we're around, Xianzhou will surely tide over this crisis.
How are things going at the moment?
由于云骑军的排查和警戒工作，此处挤满了人，你暂时无法通行。
Due to the Cloud Knights' security regulations, this place is overcrowded with people. For the time being, you can't squeeze past.
抱歉，此处暂时被封锁了，请另行寻找通路。
Sorry, this place has been sealed off. Please go another way around.
这儿暂时不让通行，要请您走别的路了。
This place is temporarily closed off. Please use another route.
您好，我受命把守此处的进出。您可以换走别的路。
Hello, I've been assigned to guard the entrance here. You can take another route.
闲谈落定，瓦尔特暗暗对你比了个手势。你明白，下面是列车团自己的谈话时间。
The chat concluded, and Welt shot you a covert gesture. You understand that this is the Crew's own discussion time.
…本座平日虽深居简出，治下是何模样还是认得的。
...I may live in relative seclusion, but I can recognize my own territory.
你带的这是什么路？！太卜司所在是这里么？！
Why did you bring us here!? Does this look like the Divination Commission to you!?
啊哟，太卜息怒！穹仪失灵了，定位洞天的入口可不容易。小女子也想把事情办利索些，可眼下能停靠星槎的也就只有这儿啦。

...No need to yell, Master Diviner! The Meridian Pin is malfunctioning and I couldn't find the entrance to the delve. I wanted to get us straight to our destination but this is the only place I could dock the starskiff.
您瞧：「长乐天」——一看就知是个安全地界。剩下的路，咱们就多走几步嘛。
Look — "Exalting Sanctum" — this is a safe place. Let's just walk the rest of the way from here.
卦象涨落，兑坎之间。行舟困顿，泥足不前……
Our hexagrammatic position is fluctuating between the marsh and water trigrams. The vessel is stranded and the way is blocked...
倒是听说仙舟有什么「卜算」神技，这怎么就是手指比划？跟我数数一样。
I heard the Xianzhou can tell your fortune — is that how they do it? Anyone can count on their fingers...
这叫内行看门道，外行看热闹。
The connoisseur appreciates the artistry, and the layman enjoys the show.
是是是，咱是外行，你这个内行给我说说门道呗？
Yeah, yeah, yeah — so I'm a layman. Why don't you enlighten me, oh connoisseur?
这就是传说中的量子纠缠。
This must be the "quantum entanglement" you hear about in stories.
你这套东西早几百琥珀纪就不流行了！
That's been out of fashion for hundreds of Amber Eras!
干嘛！辅助一下嘛，十根指头不用也是浪费呀！
What's wrong with that? We've got ten fingers, may as well use them!
本座方才占了一卦，卦象所示与现状无差。看来今日不可乘星槎直抵太卜司了，那厢也受星核作祟，出了点麻烦。唉，没了我坐镇，也不知司内乱成什么样子了……

I just performed some quick divination and the hexagram is consistent with our current predicament. The starskiff cannot take us to the Divination Commission today. Alas, without me in charge to handle the Stellaron crisis, I dare not even imagine the kind of mess the commission must be in.
是啊，想来太卜司一日也不可缺了符大人。
It's true — the Divination Commission really can't go a single day without Lady Fu.
那还是做好梯度建设吧，万一你要请个假啥的，怪麻烦的……
That's why you have to develop your talent pool — otherwise everything falls apart when you go on vacation...
本座谅二位不知内情，就不责怪方才的妄言了。先行一步准备问讯事宜，再见。
Hmph, since you are clearly ignorant of the commission's internal affairs, I shall absolve you of your ridiculous remarks. I'm going ahead to make some inquiries. Goodbye.
你们——还真是热心肠，难怪景元说可以随意差遣……
You... really are enthusiastic. No wonder Jing Yuan told me to give you errands...
人犯当然要寸步不离地跟着我，这是景元的命令。
The prisoner must follow me every step of the way. This is Jing Yuan's order.
咱这话可能不中听，但是——你们将军可是说好了，审讯卡芙卡时我们也得在场喔。
Um, you might not wanna hear this, but your general gave us his word. We have to be present when you question Kafka.
你们也忒小瞧本座，我一诺千金！便是洞天塌下来也一定守诺——当然了，此事的概率微可不计。
You think too little of me — my word is my bond! I will stick to my promise even if this delve collapses. That's... very unlikely, by the way.
要使这人犯「开口」，太卜司得用上特殊手段。事涉秘密，无法公开。请你们见谅，但本座发誓：即使准备就绪，不待各位到来，审讯绝不开始。

To have this prisoner speak, the commission must resort to unconventional means... the nature of which is confidential and cannot be disclosed — forgive me. But I can assure you that the questioning will not begin until you arrive, even if that means wasting precious time.
我已指派了一位门人在「长乐天」广场前等候，一旦内务整顿完成，便传令让接引人带各位进入太卜司，还请各位耐心逗留。
I have appointed someone to wait for you in front of Exalting Sanctum Plaza. Once we've consolidated our internal affairs, you will be brought into the Divination Commission. Please be patient.
得不到信任是很让人恼火。
She's just annoyed that you won't trust her.
哼，你又和她共情上啦？我也是怕她出尔反尔，想着提醒一句嘛。
Hey, are you on her side? I just wanted to remind her not to break her promise, that's all.
没办法，总得有人提醒她。
Well, someone had to put her in her place.
那下次你来吧，每次降好感的事都是我干……
Hmph, you do it next time — I'm tired of being the villain.
别放在心上，三月。我觉得那位符玄姑娘挺通人情的，不会生你的气。
Don't take it to heart, March. Miss Fu Xuan seems like a reasonable lady — I'm sure she's not angry with you.
有吗？我怎么觉得她冷冰冰的……
Really? I thought she was pretty icy...
Some people are not what they seem.
这样啊…我对这种人不是很有办法。
Hmm... I don't know how to deal with people like that.
I'm sure she's just putting on a tough front.
就好像沉默只是你的保护机制是吧？
Like how you're always pretending to be quiet?
哈哈，丹恒才不是「冷」哩，他那叫「愣」。
Haha, Dan Heng's not icy. He's nerdy.
好啦，别拌嘴了。估计太卜司要准备挺长时间。我们先在附近走走吧。
Okay, enough chit-chat. I reckon the Divination Commission could be a while — let's take a look around.
好耶，刚刚坐的星槎就挺有意思。这个长乐天估计好玩的东西也不少～
Yeah! That starskiff was pretty cool, there must be loads of interesting things in Exalting Sanctum.
请问太卜司是做什么的？
What does the Divination Commission do?
唉…恩公可从来没问过小女子天舶司是做什么的。真真人比人，气死人；司比司，没意思……
*sigh* You never asked what the Sky-Faring Commission does. I suppose not all commissions are created equal...
好罢，恩公既问了，小女子回答就是：太卜司主掌仙舟的情报、运筹与卜算。
Anyway, if you must know, the Divination Commission is responsible for gathering intelligence, devising strategies, and performing divination.
也许他们另有妙法呢？哈，太卜司的内务，我一个小小接渡使如何知晓～
Maybe there's more to it? It's not like I would know, I'm a mere Amicassador.
恩公且宽心。既然符太卜胸有成竹，您就瞧她表演便是。
Don't worry, Diviner Fu seems confident about getting Kafka to talk. If I were you I'd just sit back and watch her do her thing.
Divination? Isn't that the same as flipping a coin?
恩公有所不知，仙舟的卜算之法可不是抛铜钱，抽木签之类的哄人玩意，而是名为「玉兆」的技术。
Oh no, Xianzhou divination is nothing like the superstitious scams you see elsewhere. It's based on a technology called the jade abacus.
上至仙舟运行航路，庙堂治策，下到行军折冲，民生问题，都由太卜司推演占算，趋吉避凶。
From navigation to governance, military issues to civil affairs, every decision on the Xianzhou must be reviewed by the Divination Commission to ensure that it can be executed without a hiccup.
Will Fu Xuan go back on her word?
不知道呢～那位大人行事端看占算结果，人情世故理会得少些。
Who knows? She tends to make decisions based on the results of her divinations as opposed to what others might be thinking.
既然她不愿示秘，只能耐心等候回音啦～
If she doesn't want to reveal the commission's secrets, then you have no choice but to wait.
卡芙卡就可以知道秘密了？
How come Kafka gets to know their secrets?
把犯人带进去就没问题吗…
But it's okay for a wanted fugitive to find out...?
将军之所以请太卜审问犯人，正是因为相信她能掌控局面呀。能登上「六御」之位，总有些厉害本事。
The general entrusted the master diviner with the interrogation of the fugitive because he has faith in her ability to manage the situation. As one of the Six Charioteers, she is certainly capable.
要不然在迴星港，那位星核猎手也不会一见她就缴枪投降啦。
Why do you think Kafka surrendered at the mere sight of her back in Stargazer Navalia?
Miss Tingyun, are you familiar with this place?
怎么？恩公想要约我共游「长乐天」吗？嘻嘻……
Oh? Did you want a tour of Exalting Sanctum? Heh heh...
上一次驾驶星槎来此…让我想想…是约莫二十年前了。小女子终日在商路漂泊，仙舟里的景象倒有点陌生。

The last time I came here on a Starskiff was... let me think... about <unbreak>20</unbreak> years ago now. I've been on the road for so long that I've started to forget the sights and sounds of the Xianzhou...
只记得这儿是个闲适度日的好地方～不过，星核降临，许多洞天都变得面目全非了吧。
All I remember is that this is a good place to while away the days~ Still, many delves have changed beyond recognition since the arrival of the Stellaron.
恩公若是闲不住，可以到处逛逛，也可以这就动身和太卜司使者碰头。
If you're bored, you could go and find the messenger from the Divination Commission.
恩公若是闲不住，可以到处逛逛，也可以这就动身和太卜司使者碰头。
If you're bored, you could go and find the messenger from the Divination Commission.
「事涉秘密，无法公开」…这是不是仙舟的格言啊？从天舶司到太卜司，个个都把这话挂在嘴边，也就将军大人和蔼可亲。

"...the nature of which is confidential and cannot be disclosed..." Is that a Xianzhou motto or something? First the Sky-Faring Commission, now the Divination Commission — they're all so secretive! The general's the only friendly face here.
说句不想承认的话：我都有点想念桑博了…慢着！这想法是怎么冒出来的？我疯了吗？不不不，仙舟人比桑博可强太多了！
I hate to admit it, but I'm even starting to miss Sampo... Hold up! I must be losing my mind. Nope — I'll take the Xianzhou over that blue-haired bore any day...
唉，在贝洛伯格被追得上奔下跑，连喘口气的功夫都没有。这次到了仙舟上，时间倒是一大把，都花在等待上了。
*sigh* We've gone from being chased through every street in Belobog, to waiting on every corner in the Xianzhou.
追逐、逃离和等待，也许人生就是这样……
Chasing and waiting — maybe that's what life's all about...
Wow, when did you become a poet?
这有什么，美少女嘛，随便叹口气，呵出的忧伤都是诗。
Hmph, I'm not just a pretty face, y'know! I've got poetry on standby <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7.
Does the Xianzhou scenery seem familiar to you?
…你是问「仙舟有没有可能是我的故乡」？
...Are you wondering if the Xianzhou is my homeworld?
没有，脑袋里没有噼啪闪过的回忆喔。拜托，你看我的头发，看我的眼睛，像仙舟人吗？你总归见过丹恒的吧。
No, I'm not getting any flashbacks. Please — do I look Xianzhouish to you? You must be thinking of Dan Heng.
走，逛街能治愈一切胡思乱想。
Come on! Let's go take a stroll and clear your head.
等等，什么叫胡思乱想啊！
Wait a minute — clear my head of what!?
咱们是在这儿等着，还是现在就去见太卜司的人？
Should we wait here, or go find the messenger from the Divination Commission?
我们和卡芙卡对峙时，她好像知道符玄会出现……
When we confronted Kafka, she seemed certain that Fu Xuan would show up...
It's like someone told her it would happen.
很浪漫主义的比喻，不过…用在这里似乎不太恰当。
That's a romantic way of putting it, but I suspect the reality could be more sinister...
艾利欧——「星核猎手」的首领。没人知道他是谁，长什么样子，只知道星际和平公司称他为「命运的奴隶」。
The leader of the Stellaron Hunters is called Elio. No one knows who he is or what he looks like — only that the Interastral Peace Corporation calls him "Destiny's Slave."
这个人，传说他拥有能预见「可能性」的力量。黑塔说公司认为艾利欧能看见无限多的可能性产生的时间支流，这样的能力几近于预知未来。

It's said that he has the power to foresee "possibilities." According to Herta, the corporation believes Elio can see the temporal branching of infinite possibilities — which is very much like being able to predict the future...
——甚至有过之而无不及。如果传闻属实，那么星核猎手的每一步看似虚无的动作，实质上都是对「可能性」的选择。
...in fact, it may even be superior. If the rumors are true, every seemingly meaningless action taken by the Stellaron Hunters may actually be a choice based on those "possibilities."
包括你，{NICKNAME}，他们对你做的事情也是一样的……
...which would include what they did to you, {NICKNAME}...
我不一样，我有自由意志。
I'm different. I have free will.
我想这大概就是星核猎手经常在你身边出现的原因。
I think that may be why the Stellaron Hunters won't leave you alone.
你要小心，{NICKNAME}，猎手的每一次出现或许都是暗示，为了修正未来的方向……
Be careful, {NICKNAME}. Every time a Stellaron Hunter appears, their objective may be to steer the direction of the future.
我只是未来的一个变量吗？
Is that all I am — a future variable?
就刚刚那个话题吗？我认为没错。但，{NICKNAME}…谁又不是呢？
For the sake of this discussion? Yes, I think so. But, {NICKNAME}... who isn't?
我们所有人都是未来的变量，藉由选择将现实固化。未来并不是什么了不起的事情，它只是一团等待我们决定的迷雾。
All of us are future variables, our choices solidifying reality. The future is nothing incredible either — just a fog waiting for us to make a decision.
Whatever, I only care about the present.
那样很好，{NICKNAME}，但你要小心：猎手的每一次出现或许都是暗示，为了修正未来的方向……
That's good, {NICKNAME}, but be careful — maybe the Stellaron Hunters showing up is a sign that they're trying to change the future...
回到现在的话题吧，关于卡芙卡——
Back to the matter at hand — Kafka...
It was all within her expectations.
是的，一个能洞察未来的逃犯束手就擒，说明在她眼中，事情「应该如此」。
Yes. It's strange for a fugitive to give themselves up, but a fugitive who can see the future? For her, perhaps that was the way it was always going to be...
她真的这么放心吗？未来的可能几乎是无限的，她如此坦然，反而让我觉得：她真的有把握证明自己和这次的星核危机无关。
...but is she really as calm as she seems? The future holds almost infinite possibilities, after all. I suspect she has proof that she has nothing to do with the Stellaron crisis.
又或者，太卜司的审讯将会发生什么变故，让她能够顺利脱身……
Or perhaps something is supposed to transpire during the Divination Commission's interrogation — something that would allow her a window of escape...
但是，星核猎手费尽心思将我们带到这里又是为了什么？这一连串行动的背后，「命运的奴隶」到底看见了怎样的未来？
*sigh* Why did the Stellaron Hunters go to such lengths to bring us here? What is the future that Destiny's Slave sees behind this course of action?
抱歉，我想得入神了。如果你想走，我们这就出发。
Sorry, I'm getting a little fixated. If you want to head out, we should go this way.
快些将那些从别处洞天撤出来的病人妥善安置起来，稳定病况。
Hurry, find beds for the patients from the other delves and stabilize them.
记得，过程中一定要减少接触，免得你们的人也受那不明邪祟的侵蚀——
Remember to minimize contact — we don't want your people to succumb to the same evil...
是是是！咱们地衡司的人手已经倾巢而出，半个都不剩啦。倒是你们丹鼎司的人呢？怎么才来这么几个？
Yeah, yeah, yeah, the Realm-Keeping Commission is out in full strength — what about the Alchemy Commission? Why are there so few of you here?
是是是！咱们地衡司的人手已经倾巢而出，半个都不剩啦。倒是你们丹鼎司的人呢？怎么才来这么几个？
Yeah, yeah, yeah, the Realm-Keeping Commission is out in full strength — what about the Alchemy Commission? Why are there so few of you here?
别乱用成语，倾巢而出那是什么好词么？
Do you mean "out in full force"?
哎唷，小姑奶奶，都什么时候了你还在这跟我掰扯文化，集中精力看诊吧！
Hey, missy, does this look like a classroom to you? Concentrate on treating the patients!
丹鼎司是指望不上了，得尽快找些能医会药的人手来……
There must be alternate medical practitioners somewhere — the Alchemy Commission can't help us right now...
That's... the best I can do...
呸呸，什么丧气话！这话是你一个医生随便说的吗？
Tsk, what's that supposed to mean? Doctors don't give up that easily!
那我能怎么办？通往丹鼎司洞天的航路也不见了。我们这些在外执勤的医师手头缺针少药，又能做些什么？
What else am I supposed to do? The route back to the Alchemy Commission has disappeared, and we're in the field without the right medicine or supplies.
何况这压根就不是医经上所载的疾病，这是…魔阴身发作的前兆。
Besides, we have no record of this disease at all. These symptoms are consistent with someone about to be stricken with mara.
病历上写着这人不过两百余岁，刚加入云骑军，哪来魔阴身发作的道理？你…你再仔细瞧瞧？

According to his medical record, this man is barely over <unbreak>200</unbreak> years old — he only just joined the Cloud Knights. How can he possibly be mara-struck? Why don't you... take another look.
再这样下去，十王司的判官们该要出来收拾残局了。
If it goes on like this, the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission will have to come out and clean up this mess.
我长这么大还没见识过「魔阴身」的症状…没想到竟是这般可怕。
My first time seeing these symptoms up close... Being stricken with mara is more terrible than I imagined.
听说持明族的龙女也来了，不知道她的医术能不能镇住场子……
I heard the Vidyadhara dragon lady is here. Maybe she can help stem the tide...
快喂他喝下这药，让他乖乖躺好。
Quick! Get him to drink the cure and lay him down!
我是说…让他们…乖乖躺好！
I mean... Lay... all of them down!
那个云骑军到底怎么了？
What happened to that Cloud Knight?
Nothing to see here folks — go home.
啧，真是屋漏偏逢连夜雨。工造司那厢也出了问题，还是个大麻烦！你去通知云骑军，看看能不能……
Tsk, when it rains, it pours. The Artisanship Commission has its own issues — sounds serious too! Go and inform the Cloud Knights — see if you can...
失礼了，在下是地衡司勤务。看您的打扮，是造访「罗浮」的外客吗？
Oh, my apologies. I'm an orderly from the Realm-Keeping Commission. Judging by your dress, you must be visitors to the Luofu?
很抱歉，仙舟上目前出了些…特殊状况。但云骑军一定会尽速妥善解决的。
Sorry, the Xianzhou is currently caught in... unusual circumstances. But the Cloud Knights will resolve the issues as soon as possible.
出于安全考虑，请您呆在旅馆里，暂时不要外出行动。
For safety reasons, please stay in your residence and refrain from going out for the time being.
我是你们将军请来的客人。
I'm a guest — the general invited me.
我是将军请来的公务员。
And I'm a civil servant — the general hired me.
话也没错，严格来说，每一位抵达仙舟「罗浮」的旅客，都是受将军之邀而来的贵客。
Technically speaking, every traveler aboard the Luofu is a guest of the general.
如果埠口还在通航，我会建议阁下立刻坐船前往「星槎海」，不过，据说离开这儿的航路暂时停运了。
If the port is still open, I would suggest you take a boat to Starskiff Haven right away, though I heard the route may have been temporarily suspended...
对了，我认识个朋友，他的星槎有通行许可证，能帮您和您的朋友速速离开，价格公道好商量，您意下如何？
Oh, that reminds me... I have a friend with a starskiff and a travel permit — he could help you and your friends get over quickly. The price is fair and negotiable. What do you think?
No need, I have a vessel picking me up.
唷，还真是贵客！私底下给您透个信，这次可不是小打小闹的安全维护。将军派了云骑军清查隐患。
Well now, you must be quite special! Don't spread this around, but this isn't some small-scale maintenance drill. The general has sent the Cloud Knights to check for hidden dangers.
虽然您不一定需要，但要是有什么急用得上我的地方，欢迎随时来找我。
You may not need it right now, but if there's any help I can give you, come to me any time.
那行，在下还有公务要忙，您要是改了主意，欢迎随时来找我。
Hmph, very well. I still have business to attend to. If you change your mind, come to me any time.
唔，每个月就领这么几个钱，出了事儿却得顶上前线……谁干谁傻啊。
Ugh, they pay us next to nothing then order us straight to the front line when things go south... I must be crazy.
稍安勿躁，各位。遵地衡司总务府的公文，「长乐天」目前会暂时封闭关口航路。具体消息很快会发送在邸报和各位的玉兆上。

Everyone, please remain calm. This is an announcement from the Realm-Keeping Commission General Bureau. Exalting Sanctum is temporarily closing its borders and navigation routes. The details will be outlined in the official bulletin sent to your jade abacus soon.
若有身体不适的朋友，请速速前往地衡司公廨登记。我们请来丹鼎司的医师会在此逗留，为各位免费看诊。
If you feel unwell, please report to the Realm-Keeping Commission as soon as possible. We have doctors from the Alchemy Commission here who will see you free of charge.
对了，我们还会向各位发放蛋白米一袋，应急药物若干。这些物资找我当面申领，或是晚些由地衡司勤务送上门都行。
Oh, we will also be distributing a bag of protein rice and emergency medicine to each of you. You can collect the supplies from me in person, or the commission can deliver them to your door.
Hello, I'm here to collect supplies.
请用您的玉兆手镯登记…哎，您是外来的旅客啊。
Please register with your jade abacus bracelet... Oh, you must be an outsider.
我明白了，来，您在这儿签个字。
你好，太卜司那边情况如何？
Hello, how's the Divination Commission faring?
听说太卜司的穹仪出了问题。
I heard there's a problem with the meridian pin.
有些个卜者和观星士逃出了洞天。其中一些人害怕地嚷嚷什么「植物」、「根须」之类的话…也不知道其中究竟发生了什么可怕的事情。
Some diviners and stargazers managed to escape the delve. Many of them were terrified — they were muttering about "plants" and "roots..." Something terrible must have happened there.
莫非您有朋友留在那儿，还没能出来？您要是实在担心，可以去找个逃出来的卜者来问问。
Do you have friends trapped in the delve? If you're worried about them, find a diviner and see if they can tell you what happened.
虽然我想说不辛苦…但，我已经连续在这儿站了六个时辰了。这场灾难，什么时候才能结束呢？
I want to say it's all in a day's work, but I've been here for twelve hours already... When will this end?
遵地衡司总务府的公文，「长乐天」目前会暂时封闭……
This is an announcement from the Realm-Keeping Commission General Bureau. Exalting Sanctum is temporarily closing its borders...
这位{F#小姐}{M#小哥}，请问有什么能帮你的吗？
Can I help you with anything?
Hello, I'm here to collect supplies.
请用您的玉兆手镯登记……
等等，我是不是才刚发给过你物资来着…这位客人，请不要戏弄我们地衡司的工作人员。
Wait a minute, I already issued you with supplies... You won't fool the Realm-Keeping Commission that easily.
虽然我想说不辛苦…但，我已经连续在这儿站了六个时辰了。这场灾难，什么时候才能结束呢？
All in a day's work, although I've been standing here for twelve hours now... I just want this to be over.
我是不是刚才也跟谁这么抱怨过来着…？
Huh, now I'm getting déjà vu...
...I think I need to take a break.
可是，也没瞧见谁在等人呀？咱们四处找找吧？
...but I can't see anyone waiting for us. Should we look around?
这是什么意思？就一张图片，是让我们去这个地方碰头吗？
What does that mean? It's just a picture. Are we supposed to meet someone there?
也许是遇上了什么麻烦？
好像电影里的绑匪接头喔……
It's like one of those messages a kidnapper sends in a horror movie...
That's enough of that. Come on, let's go.
动作快点啊，青雀。等你过这一手，咱们哥几个都快坐化了。
Hurry up, Qingque! We'll be fossils by the time you're finished.
今天地衡司发了公告，「星槎海」的港口也关闭了。云骑军四处出动，封锁设施。朋友们，珍惜还能打牌的好日子吧。

The Realm-Keeping Commission made an announcement today — Starskiff Haven has been closed off and the Cloud Knights are shutting everything down. We need to enjoy our celestial jade-playing days while they last!
听说太卜司的洞天也遭了灾？青雀，你怎么还有心思玩牌戏啊？
I heard there was a disaster in the Divination Commission's delve? I'm surprised you're in the mood to play right now, Qingque.
打牌也是一种定力修炼嘛，卜者可是很需要定力的。
*yawn* Celestial jade helps train my concentration. Diviners need to be able to focus.
太卜司的天就是塌下来，还有太卜大人顶着。虽然她老人家身高不济，能耐却是顶天的。
Even if the sky was gonna collapse on the Divination Commission, the master diviner would be there to hold it up. What she lacks in height, she more than makes up for in stamina.
我来这儿也不是瞎玩呀，是奉了她的命令，在此等候要来的贵客。时间多宝贵呀，这叫「摸鱼工作两不误」。
Anyway, I didn't come here just to play — she ordered me to wait here for our guests. Time is precious! I'm simply multitasking.
看照片应该就是这里了。这…是个牌馆？！在这儿能有什么麻烦？
It's the place in the photo alright. Is this... a games parlor!? What kind of problem can they possibly be facing?
哈！这牌还不麻烦吗？哎呀，这是摸了个什么鬼……
Ha! Isn't this hand a problem? I have the worst luck...
三位好啊！一看三位面带贵气，就知道你们准是太卜司的贵客！
Hi there! I can tell just by looking at you that you're the Divination Commission's guests.
把大家叫到这里，就为这事啊？
Did you bring us here just for this?
你知道我们等了多久吗！
Do you even know how long we've been waiting!?
你也不想让太卜知道你去玩牌吧？
You don't want the master diviner to know you've been slacking off, do you?
对不住、对不住嘛。我原本也想等你们来着…哎，那个，碰！！
I know, I know, I'm sorry — I was going to wait for you by the statue, but— Ah— Triplet!
只是那附近被地衡司的人占去了，实在嘈杂…吃！
...but folks from the Realm-Keeping Commission descended on the area. It's too loud over there now... Pass! Pass!
我心说，要是在那样喧嚣的地方和诸位碰头，岂不是…到我了？杠！！
...So I thought to myself, wouldn't it be better to meet somewhere quieter? FOUR OF A KIND!
…岂不是煞风景，不如就趁着闲暇时光带各位「长乐天」一游，顺便体验一下仙舟民粹——帝垣琼玉牌。等我…这一把……
...And wouldn't that be more fun, too? Better to show you the real Exalting Sanctum and introduce you to a true Xianzhou pastime: Celestial jade. Aha...
此间心愿已了，再无牵挂。客人，请，咱们出发吧。
*sigh* Now that my wish has been fulfilled, there's nothing holding us back. Follow me, honored guests.
让诸位贵客等我许久，青雀实在过意不去。
I must apologize for your long wait, honored guests.
也不算太久，在一旁看姑娘玩得热火朝天，也有些好奇这个帝垣琼玉牌。
It wasn't too long. Seeing your enthusiasm for this "celestial jade" game has stoked my curiosity.
嗨呀，先生说话真是耐心又体贴，还很有眼光呢！有兴趣的话，我来教教你这帝垣琼玉牌？很好玩的。
Haha, I'm glad to hear it — you clearly have excellent taste! If you're interested I can show you how to play — it's great fun.
杨叔，现在是办正事的时候吧！
Mr. Yang! Is this really the best time?
那是名唤「建木」的古树，「罗浮」仙舟曾引以为傲的宝物。
It's an ancient tree — we call it the Ambrosial Arbor. It was once the Xianzhou Luofu's prized treasure.
天舶司的人也对历史这么有研究吗？厉害啊，新生代几乎都说不出它的来历了。据说这建木是上古仙舟遨游天外时所遗留的残迹。

I didn't know the Sky-Faring Commission were history buffs! Not bad, younger generations usually don't know much about it. It's said that the Ambrosial Arbor is an ancient remnant from when the Xianzhou roamed the ether.
别看远望不过是半截枯木，按《上国梦华录》里的记载，它全盛时的体积「攀揽穹窿，垂挂辰宿」！
From a distance it looks like half a tree stump, but according to Records of the Early Nation, in its prime, "it wound into the heavens, and from it celestial bodies hung!"
是说这棵树的高度能攀上天空，枝条上能垂下星星。
It means the tree was as tall as the sky and stars hung from its branches.
那得有多大？列车这么大？不对，黑塔空间站这么大！也不对。
So how big was it? Bigger than the Express? Bigger than Herta space station? No, that can't be right.
垂下星星…这怕是整座仙舟都装不下吧！
"Stars hung from its branches..." Then how did it fit in the Xianzhou!?
太空船里哪棵树都符合描述吧？
Technically, any tree in the spaceship fits this description.
这是修辞！修辞！不要在故事里死抠现实的字眼啊！
Those are metaphors! You shouldn't take poetry so literally.
真是难以想象的雄伟巨树。
It sounds like an unimaginably magnificent tree.
正是，总之想象有多大，它就有多大。
Exactly, let's just say it was bigger than your imagination.
反正都是传说罢了。我上下班路上，天天都能瞧见这般景色，看也看腻味了。
Anyway, it's just a legend. I see this view every day on my way to work — I'm kinda bored of it.
天东有若木，下置衔烛龙…有生之年，我一定能看到这番景象。
On the eastern horizon, the arbor stands tall, the candle dragon down below... One day, I'll see that view for myself.
这位小友，你也是来此处游赏「长乐天」胜景的吗？
Hello, are you here for a bit of Exalting Sanctum scenery too?
I'm on my way to the Divination Commission.
在下虽然目不能视，但也听说「罗浮」上目前出了些变故。太卜司所在的洞天断绝了音信。安全起见，还是留在此处为好。
I've heard there are serious incidents unfolding on the Luofu. Communication with the Divination Commission's delve has been severed. For your own safety, I'd suggest you remain here.
要是有非去不可的理由，也请务必小心。
If you do have an important reason to go, then please be extra careful.
我不过是一介医师，帮不上您什么忙。这些是丹鼎司配发给外勤医师的丹药，也许能应急，拿上吧。

I'm just a doctor — there's not much I can do to assist you. These are medicinal pellets that the Alchemy Commission hands out to field doctors — you might find them useful in an emergency. Take them.
那么，有劳您，能否为我描述一下看到的景象？
In that case, would you mind describing it to me?
阁下看不见眼前的景色吗？
...You mean you can't see it yourself?
抱歉。在下自出生起就目不能视，是个「天缺者」。
Precisely. I've been without sight since the day I was born.
我其余的感官倒也不弱于常人，能稍稍弥补所需。
My other senses make up for that fact to some extent — they're as strong as anyone else's.
我能听到风里飘来的人声喧闹，嗅到工造司雨云降下的湿气，触摸到玉勒花瓣细腻的质感。但独独缺一双眼睛……

I can hear the sounds of people on the wind, smell the moisture from the rain clouds of the Artisanship Commission, feel the delicate texture of the yule flower's petals. All I lack is a window on the world...
我这辈子来过这里许多次了，只能白白面对着那边的景色兴叹。
I've been here many times in my life, but the scenery can never fully reveal itself to me.
能否劳烦您，为我用语言描述一下那番景象？
That's why I'd love you to describe it to me.
I'm so sorry, but I have something important to attend to.
We're almost there everyone, stay close.
刚才吓死我了，多亏有人救了那位持明族的龙女大人……
That was terrifying, thank goodness the Vidyadhara dragon lady was saved...
是啊，那孩子平日里都深居简出，怎么会跑到咱们这儿来。
Yes, that child's usually hidden away. What's she doing out here?
听说沾染了邪祟的云骑军都发起狂了！
I heard the Knights affected by the evil are going berserk!
别吓唬自己，有丹鼎司的龙女在，什么疑难杂症都能治好。
Don't scare yourself — the Alchemy Commission's dragon lady can cure anything.
这位{M#小兄弟}{F#小妹妹}打搅了，请留步。
Excuse me, {M#fella}{F#miss} — hold on a moment.
之前幸好有您出手，替「长乐天」的百姓和那位龙女大人解了围。
It was only thanks to your help earlier that the dragon lady and those Exalting Sanctum residents got away unscathed.
就是那位丹鼎司的龙女，白露大人。
The dragon lady of the Alchemy Commission — Lady Bailu.
那个孩子啊，听称呼来头还不小。
You mean the child? She's starting to sound like a big shot.
真是贵人忘事。您在危急关头出手摆平了魔阴身，在下可都看在眼里。
You don't remember? You dealt with those mara-struck knights in the nick of time — I saw it all.
我从天舶司的朋友那儿听说将军请来了几位客人，似乎专为解决罗浮之上的麻烦而来。看来就是你们几位了。
A friend in the Sky-Faring Commission told me the general commissioned guests to deal with the troubles on the Luofu. You must be the guests.
如果您不介意的话，希望能拨冗来地衡司公廨一叙。我想和您聊聊「长乐天」眼下面临的麻烦……
If you don't mind, I hope you can take the time to come to the Realm-Keeping Commission. I'd like to talk to you about the issues Exalting Sanctum is currently facing.
眼下四周嘈杂，不便细说。如果您不介意的话，希望能拨冗来地衡司公廨一叙。
This isn't a good place to talk — too much activity. If you don't mind, I hope you can come to the Realm-Keeping Commission.
被人教训了一顿，现在能乖乖躺好了吧？
...That'll teach you a lesson. Ready to lie down now?
多谢{F#叔叔姐姐}{M#哥哥姐姐}帮忙稳定病患的情绪啦，这一手「重击麻醉」技术相当了得啊。
Thanks for helping to stabilize the patients — your "assertive sedation" techniques are quite effective.
"Assertive sedation techniques..." Does she mean beating people up?
不过你们这一出手，这几个云骑病上加伤，我得加把劲给他们正骨包扎一下。可恶，这下完全忙不过来了啊！
However, these Cloud Knights were already sick, and now they're injured too. I've gotta bandage up their wounds, realign their bones... Ugh, as if I didn't have enough on my plate!
小朋友，你在给他们看病？
Aren't you a little young to be realigning bones?
看病可不是小孩子过家家…
I'm gonna need to see some qualifications...
我明白，你们瞧我身材小小，就觉得我一定是背着父母偷偷跑出来的「小朋友」。
I get it — you think because I'm small I must be a runaway child.
哼，这里可是仙舟！外头来的短生种{F#小妹妹}{M#小老弟}，可别以貌取人啊！咱们持明族轮回自足，不需要什么爸爸妈妈！
Hmph, welcome to the Xianzhou my short-lived outsider friends — appearances can be deceiving here! The Vidyadhara race is self-reincarnating — no mum or dad required!
本小姐打从蜕生出水就开始研习医道了，在丹鼎司里也是正儿八经的挂牌执业的医士！
I've been studying the art of healing ever since I cast off my old shell! You're looking at a recognized, practicing, dedicated doctor.
贝洛伯格的孩子还在地底下玩泥巴，这里的孩子就已经能熟练地给人看病了。
Belobog kids are making snowmen while children here are writing prescriptions...
仙舟联盟除去人类与狐人定居之外，还有被称为「龙裔」的持明一族。这孩子应该就是其中的一员吧。
In addition to humans and foxians, the Xianzhou Alliance is also home to the Vidyadhara people — also known as "Long's Scions." This child must be one of them.
最近罗浮上很不太平呀，你们如果……
Things haven't been very peaceful on the Luofu recently. Make sure you don't—
如果没事就别到处乱跑是吧？真遗憾，罗浮的将军给了咱们一桩差事，少不得要跑东跑西。
Go running around, right? Well, your general gave us an errand, so I'm afraid we have to.
那，{F#叔叔姐姐们}{M#哥哥姐姐}要是有什么三长两短、跌打损伤的…我可以为你们免费看诊！看在你们救了我的份上，药金就打个八折吧。
Hm, well, seeing as you saved me just now, if you're unlucky enough to acquire any breaks or sprains... I'll treat you for free! As for medicine, I'll give you a twenty percent discount.
哈，你知道罗浮仙舟上有多少人想挂个号看本小姐的专家门诊，却求之不得嘛！
Ha, do you have any idea how many people on the Luofu are waiting for an appointment with me? You should count this as a blessing!
要不是溜出来的时候身上没带够钱，本小姐也不至于……
If I hadn't left my purse at home, I wouldn't have to...
咳咳，闲话打住，误了病人的诊断可就不妙啦。
Ahem, enough of that. I have patients to see.
这孩子哪来的？你爸爸呢？
Where did you come from little one? Is your Dad around?
I don't have a mom either.
杨叔，这位小神医看起来和周遭的人似乎完全不是一个画风啊。
Our little miracle worker here seems very different from everyone else around — don't you think Mr. Yang?
原来如此，这便是「持明族」吗？我也只在文献里看过记录。听说他们是龙脉族裔，如此一看确实很贴切。
So this is the Vidyadhara, I've only ever read about them. They're known as the dragon race... not hard to see why.
I need to focus on healing
Where are the people from the Alchemy Commission?
Everyone we can mobilize is here
我们会向各位发放物资
We will be distributing supplies to everyone
Ambro... The Ambrosial Arbor is reborn!
Did you see that... that tree?
便是长生种也难得一见
That is true even for long-life species
The result of the augury is woe
还好我支起了换境画屏
Thank fortunes I put up the shifting screen
I won't be able to graduate at this rate...
Yunche, this material is so unique
Silly Ziming, don't go seeking your own demise
刚刚那四个人什么来头
Maybe they are visitors who are fleeing?
与此同时，在罗浮的另一边…
Concurrently, at the other end of the Luofu...
这「流云渡」的运货通道若是稍有变化，整个路线就截然不同了。
If the shipping passages in Cloudford changed even a little, the entire route would be drastically altered.
Do you two know the way?
哈哈，本姑娘就是从这儿来的，熟得很，跟我走就没错啦。
Haha, I came this way, I know it like the back of my hand. Just follow me.
那个…闷葫芦，你准备好了就跟我说一声，咱们好出发。
Um... So, silent but deadly, let me know when you're ready and we can set off.
...Seriously? I just got to the Luofu myself...
Do you hail from the Luofu, young master Dan Heng?
这样啊…你不愿多说，也没关系。
I see... It's fine if you'd prefer not to discuss further.
哦，不知怎的，我看你与罗浮有种极为契合的感觉…大概是我看错了吧。
Ah. For some reason, you seem to fit right in here... Perhaps I read it wrong.
我有时掌握不好与人交流的分寸，希望没有冒犯到你。
I do often struggle to judge the boundaries of small talk — I hope I haven't offended you.
罗浮封锁之事，你知道多少？
How much do you know about the Luofu being sealed off?
几乎一无所知。我本要依照行程登船离开罗浮，突然听说爆发了骚乱。
Almost nothing. I was scheduled to leave the Luofu when I heard there was a disturbance.
隔壁这位素裳姑娘是云骑军人，去问她吧。
Miss Sushang here is a member of the Cloud Knights. You could try asking her.
这位云骑姑娘是什么人？
Who is this Cloud Knight girl?
她叫素裳，好像刚从仙舟「曜青」调动过来。
Her name is Sushang. She apparently just transferred here from the Yaoqing.
据我所知，每艘仙舟虽然独立行事，但云骑军却是由元帅统一指挥的，故而各支云骑之间常有兵将调遣，也不奇怪。
Every Xianzhou ship operates individually, but the Cloud Knights are all commanded by the Marshal. Therefore, it's normal for Knights to transfer between ships.
你不像仙舟人，从哪儿来的？
You don't seem like you're from the Xianzhou. Where have you come from?
行商没有所属，四处漂泊，星海为家。但如果你好奇…我在联盟的注册地是仙舟「玉阙」；在公司的登记号隶属于北谷星：星和商城分部。

Merchants don't belong anywhere — we wander and make the stars our home. But if you're curious... Within the Alliance I'm registered at the Xianzhou Yuque. Within the IPC, I'm registered at the Star Unity Mall branch at the North Valley Star.
…所以罗刹只是我在仙舟的常用名。仙舟以外的地方，我有个更拗口的名字。我猜你也想问这个吧？
...Therefore, Luocha is just the name I use within the Xianzhou. Outside of the Xianzhou, I use something more difficult to pronounce. I'm guessing you want to know that name, too?
作为商人，你的武艺不错。
You have pretty good fighting skills for a merchant.
谁叫宇宙这么危险呢。作为行商，公司和联盟只能庇佑我们进行星际穿越而已，安保这件事可全得看自己的手段。
The universe is a dangerous place. The IPC and the Alliance only provide for our safety during interstellar travel — on-site security is dependent on our own capacities.
剑术和医术，都是这么练出来的。丹恒兄弟也是漂泊的人，一定能理解吧。
As such, I had to improve my swordplay and healing skills. You are also a wanderer, young master Dan Heng — surely you understand?
啊，那是一段孽缘。我不小心卷入一场争斗，平白无故担了人情，只好帮忙把一具遗体送还仙舟。
Ah, a story of ill luck. I found myself embroiled in a conflict and ended up owing a favor... Now I must assist in delivering these remains back to the Xianzhou.
我这人或许有些惹祸上身的本事吧，本来寻思到了罗浮总该安全了，可又出了这样的事情……
It would seem I am a magnet for such misfortune... I thought I would be safe on the Luofu, but now...
不动身吗？在这里耽搁太久也不安全吧。
Are we heading off? It's not safe to linger here.
罗浮封锁之事，你知道多少？
How much do you know about the Luofu being sealed off?
几乎一无所知。我本要依照行程登船离开罗浮，突然听说爆发了骚乱。
Almost nothing. I was scheduled to leave the Luofu when I heard there was a disturbance.
隔壁这位素裳姑娘是云骑军人，去问她吧。
Miss Sushang here is a member of the Cloud Knights. You can try asking her.
这位云骑姑娘是什么人？
Who is this Cloud Knight girl?
她叫素裳，好像刚从仙舟「曜青」调动过来。
Her name is Sushang. She apparently just transferred here from the Yaoqing.

You don't seem like you're from the Xianzhou. Where have you come from?
行商没有所属，四处漂泊，星海为家。但如果你好奇…我在联盟的注册地是仙舟「玉阙」；在公司的登记号隶属于北谷星：星和商城分部。
