...Therefore, Luocha is just the name I use at Xianzhou. Outside of Xianzhou, I use something more difficult to pronounce. I'm guessing you want to know that name, too?
作为商人，你的武艺不错。
You have great martial skills for a merchant.
谁叫宇宙这么危险呢。作为行商，公司和联盟只能庇佑我们进行星际穿越而已，安保这件事可全得看自己的手段。
The universe is a dangerous place. The IPC and the Alliance can only ensure that we travel in safety. Our personal security is dependent on our own capacities.
剑术和医术，都是这么练出来的。丹恒兄弟也是漂泊的人，一定能理解吧。
That's how I trained my swordplay and healing skills. You are also a wanderer. Surely you understand.
啊，那是一段孽缘。我不小心卷入一场争斗，平白无故担了人情，只好帮忙把一具遗体送还仙舟。
Ahh, that was some ill luck. I got involved in a conflict by accident and ended up owing a favor, so now I have to help send a deceased body back to Xianzhou.
我这人或许有些惹祸上身的本事吧，本来寻思到了罗浮总该安全了，可又出了这样的事情……
Perhaps I simply attract problems... I thought I would be safe at the Luofu, but now...
闷葫芦，我这么叫你，你不会生气吧？
Silent but deadly... are you sure that nickname isn't annoying you?
Huh, I should learn to be this easygoing...
It's good to have a sense of humor!
*sigh* ...I mean, you're kinda living up to the first bit right now.
我们随时都能动身，你好了就跟我说一声。
We can move out any time. Let me know when you're ready.
嗯？说吧，本姑娘知无不言～
Hmm? Go ahead. I'll tell you everything I know~
罗浮封锁之事，你知道多少？
How much do you know about the Luofu being sealed off?
我听说好像哪里发现反物质军团的炸弹…安全起见，整座罗浮都要封锁，把炸弹清除了才能开放。不知道是不是真的。
I heard they found an Antimatter Legion bomb... Out of safety, they locked down the entire ship. They'll only re-open it after they've removed the bomb... I don't know if all that's true, though.
反正上面啥也没说，就让我过来疏散流云渡里的百姓啦。
Anyway, the higher-ups didn't say anything — they just got me to evacuate the civilians at Cloudford.
你和这个罗刹之前认识吗？
Had you met this Luocha before?
不认识啊，遇见他和遇见你，这不是同时嘛。
Nope, I met him when I met you.
不过你这么一问，好像我还真在哪里见过他？有点眼熟……
But now that you mention it... maybe I did see him somewhere? He seems a bit familiar...
Me? There's not much to talk about...
When did you join the Cloud Knights?
没多久…但本姑娘从小就接受严格的云骑式训练了！
Not that long ago... but I've been receiving strict Cloud Knight military training since I was a child!
我爹我娘都是「曜青」的名人！…要不然也不会有我了，所以打我落生起，他俩就特别严格地教育我。
My parents are both famous on the Yaoqing! I wouldn't be here otherwise. They've been training me ever since I was born!
你可不要因为我是新兵就小瞧我哦～
Don't look down on me just because I'm a new recruit~
Yep. Have you been there before?
我觉得「曜青」和「罗浮」各有各的特色，虽说现在我是罗浮云骑了，但还是觉得曜青好点…就拿领导来说吧，我觉得景元将军就没有我们曜青的女将军靠谱……

I think the Yaoqing and the Luofu have different characteristics. I might be a Luofu Cloud Knight now, but I still think the Yaoqing is better... For example, when it comes to leadership, I don't think General Jing Yuan is as reliable as our madam general back on the Yaoqing...
呃，把上一句话忘掉吧，就当我没说。
Uh, a—actually, forget about that last sentence. Just pretend I never said it.
Let me have a think first...
嗯？说吧，本姑娘知无不言～
Hmm? Go ahead. I'll tell you everything I know~
罗浮封锁之事，你知道多少？
How much do you know about the Luofu being sealed off?
我听说好像哪里发现反物质军团的炸弹…安全起见，整座罗浮都要封锁，把炸弹清除了才能开放。不知道是不是真的。
I heard that they found an Antimatter Legion bomb, and the entire Luofu needs to be locked down for safety's sake. They'll only re-open after they've removed the bomb... I don't know if that's true.
反正上面啥也没说，就让我过来疏散流云渡里的百姓啦。
Anyways, the higher-ups didn't say anything. They just got me to come evacuate the civilians in Cloudford.
你和这个罗刹之前认识吗？
Do you know this man, Luocha?
不认识啊，遇见他和遇见你，这不是同时嘛。
Nope. I met him and you at the same time.
不过你这么一问，好像我还真在哪里见过他？有点眼熟……
But now that you've asked... maybe I did see him somewhere? He seems a bit familiar...
Me? There's not much to talk about...
When did you join the Cloud Knights?
没多久…但本姑娘从小就接受严格的云骑式训练了！
Not that long ago... but I've been receiving strict Cloud Knight military training since I was a child!
我爹我娘都是「曜青」的名人！…要不然也不会有我了，所以打我落生起，他俩就特别严格地教育我。

你可不要因为我是新兵就小瞧我哦～
Don't look down on me just because I'm a new recruit~
Yep. Have you been there before?
我觉得「曜青」和「罗浮」各有各的特色，虽说现在我是罗浮云骑了，但还是觉得曜青好点…就拿领导来说吧，我觉得景元将军就没有我们曜青的女将军靠谱……

I feel the Yaoqing and the Luofu have different characteristics. I might be a Luofu Cloud Knight now, but I still think the Yaoqing is better... For example, when it comes to leadership, I don't feel General Jing Yuan is as reliable as our madam general back on the Yaoqing...
呃，把上一句话忘掉吧，就当我没说。
Um, actually, forget about that last sentence. Just pretend I never said it.
我在前面开路，辛苦二位也留神四周啦。
I'll lead the way. You two keep an eye on our surroundings.
Not exactly my expertise. I'm just a traveling merchant...
事关生命耶！你这人长得也算一表人才，怎么性格这么懒啊！
This is life and death, okay!? You look like you can handle yourself, how come you're so lazy?
长相和性格，也没有必然联系吧。
Bold of you to assume my appearance betrays my nature.
闷葫芦，你怎么不吭声啊？发现危险就大声叫唤喔，可别仗着自己懂两下子，就逞血气之勇单打独斗啊！
Hey, silent but deadly, shout if you see any danger, okay? Don't think just because you know a move or two you can charge off by yourself!
咦，小素裳，你怎么也来了——
Huh? Sushang? What are you doing here...?
奉命过来疏散群众啊，瞧，我身后这几位就是。我得赶紧带他们出去，这里面好危险啊。
I have orders to evacuate civilians. See these two behind me? I need to get them out of here quickly. It's too dangerous.
可不是吗。有同僚在附近遭遇了怪物，受伤了，刚刚才救出去。
You can say that again — some comrades were injured by monsters in the vicinity. They only just made it out.
我奉命殿后，马上也要撤离了，你也快点走吧。
I'm taking up the rear — I should be out of here soon. You guys should hurry.
打扰，请问你有没有见过三个化外民，一个戴眼镜很稳重……
Excuse me, have you seen three outworlders? One of them's older — wears glasses — calm demeanor?
不清楚，戴眼镜的人很多。
Sorry, that could be anyone around here...
有一个粉头发，咋咋呼呼的……
Then... how about an excitable girl with pink hair...?
噢，我知道你说的是谁，见过，他们已经走了，就是这条道。
Oh, I know who you're talking about. I saw them leave — they were going this way.
不对啊，这儿应该有条通道的…怎么不见啦？
There's supposed to be a passage... Why can't I see it?
有人动了流云渡的操纵台，用货箱堵住了路。
Somebody used the Cloudford control panel to block the road with containers.
谁干的好事啊！这下完了，本姑娘对机巧玩意儿一窍不通…等会儿，你为什么会知道？！
Ughh, who did this? I'm terrible with machines and stuff... Hold on, how do you know!?
我是行商啊，来过这里很多次了。倒是你一个云骑，好像全不熟悉本地的路线似的。
I'm a traveling merchant, I've been here many times. Now, for a Cloud Knight to be unfamiliar with the local topography...
…都说了我刚从「曜青」仙舟调过来嘛，确实没怎么来过这儿。
...I told you, I was only just transferred here from the Yaoqing. I don't come here very often.
操作台，操作台…在哪儿呢？
Control panel... Where is the control panel?
我看看…哇，罗刹！你眼神真好！
Let me see... Whoa, Luocha! You've got sharp eyes!
罗刹明明都看见操作台了，为啥我们还找了这么久……
Luocha already saw the control panel — why is it taking this long to find it...
需要再给你指一下路吗？
Do you need me to point the way for you again?
太好啦，总算还有一艘星槎。
Phew, thank goodness, there's one starskiff left.
看码头的线路，终点是星槎海的中枢。嗯，到那儿我们就安全啦。
Judging by where it's docked, it must be heading for Central Starskiff Haven. Nice, we'll be safe there.
你很熟悉流云渡的操纵机制吗？
Are you familiar with the operational mechanisms in Cloudford?
不清楚，只是见多了几次吧。
Not really, I've just seen them before, that's all.
Do you not want to go to Starskiff Haven?
咦？丹恒兄弟何出此言？能离开这儿就很好了，去哪里都行呀。
Oh? What makes you ask that, young master? I'm happy as long as I get to leave this place.
我是个没什么意思的人呢……
I'm not a very interesting person...
What are your plans from here?
事已至此，只好走一步看一步了。
At this stage, I'm just taking it one step at a time.
好在我作为注册行商，在仙舟吃穿住行都有优惠的政策。待久一点也没关系，哈哈。
Thankfully, as a registered merchant on the Xianzhou, I get a discount on all my expenses. In that regard, it makes sense for me to stay a little longer, haha.
而且那位素裳姑娘说如果我没法离港，她可以带我四处走走呢。
Miss Sushang said she could show me around if I find myself unable to leave.
手头还有几笔其它仙舟的商单，但…说实话，原本约了「鸣火」商团的停云女士谈笔买卖，看来现在是不成了。

I had some more trading to do on the other Xianzhou ships, but my main appointment was with Miss Tingyun of the Whistling Flames merchant guild. We had a business deal to discuss, but I fear it will no longer go ahead.
已有的单子没什么利润，都得过公司一道，扣个七七八八。只有一笔生意是直接去「方壶」的，兴许有点价值……
Most of the deals won't be particularly profitable — the IPC takes the majority. There's only one that might be worth the journey — a direct trade with the Fanghu...
Let's hurry and get on the starskiff!
Is it okay to change our route?
不知道耶…我想应该不要紧吧，总之先出去，到了安全的地方怎么都好说。
I dunno... I think we should be okay. Let's get out of here first and talk about it when we're in the clear.
What will happen at Starskiff Haven?
那里应该会有专门的疏散部队接应，然后你跟他们走就好啦。
There should be a dedicated evacuation team waiting for us. You can go with them.
Thank you for guiding us all the way here.
客气什么，这是云骑军人应该做的！
No need to thank me, just a Cloud Knight doing her job!
What are your plans after this?
呃，得看上面有什么安排，如果还有未疏散的民众，我还得再回来。
Umm, that depends on the higher-ups. If there are still civilians to evacuate, then I'll need to come back.
Let me have a think first...
Maybe they demolished the base stations?
超距通信技术还不太成熟，也可能星核的存在干扰了信号传输吧。
Long-range communication technology is still improving. Perhaps the presence of the Stellaron is affecting signal transmission.
不会呀，其它功能还能用，瞧？
Doesn't seem like it, everything else is working fine — see?
那么，只可能是有人动了手脚。既然卡芙卡在，想必这应该是星核猎手那个小骇客的手笔吧。
In that case, it looks like someone wants to make things difficult for us. Since Kafka's here, I wouldn't be surprised if this turns out to be that Stellaron Hunter hacker girl's handiwork.
不会，也就多等了半个时辰吧～
No, no, only an extra couple of hours~
Seems like you're not particularly happy to see us.
恩公说笑了，小女子还盼着一同抓捕星核猎手，立个大功哩～
Hee-hee, I like your sense of humor, benefactors. Of course I'm happy to see you! When things settle down, I might even get promoted for catching a Stellaron Hunter.
「迴星港」是工造司治下之地，报备许可花了些时间。因此我顺路打听了点情况。
Stargazer Navalia is governed by the Artisanship Commission — it took me a while to sort out our paperwork. I got a sense of the situation on my way back.
和「流云渡」一样，「迴星港」的穹仪也停转了，关哨失守。云骑军忙着排查星核的位置，无暇他顾。
Just like at Cloudford, Stargazer Navalia's meridian pin has malfunctioned. The checkpoint there is abandoned and the garrison is scrambling to locate the Stellaron.
内里怪物横行，人迹了无，倒确是藏匿行迹的妙处。
With monsters wreaking havoc and the Knights scattered, Stargazer Navalia has become a perfect place for the suspect to hide out.
那就是说咱们没帮手，没支援，得对付一群怪物，还得抓个公司悬赏天文数字的星核猎手…行吧，也不是第一次了。

So... we've got a bunch of monsters to deal with, an IPC most-wanted Stellaron Hunter to catch, and we have to do all that on our own without reinforcements... Fair enough, this isn't our first rodeo.
这不正是我们的日常吗？
That's just what we do every day.
Haha, that's the trailblazing life for ya.
你以前也抓过星核猎手？
You've caught a Stellaron Hunter before?
随便聊聊天，不要在意细节！
I was just making small talk, never mind the details!
呵呵，若说没有援手，也不尽然。恩公们准备好了，咱们就出发吧～
I wouldn't say you're entirely on your own, hehe... When you're ready, let's get going~
我带了一位帮手，定能帮助各位。搜捕卡芙卡兹事体大，天舶司担不起让她走脱了的责任。所以我使了些面子，从工造司那儿借来一个追逃的宝贝。

Now, what's a hunt without a hound? Kafka is still at large, and the Sky-Faring Commission wants this problem to go away. I made a few calls and managed to procure this from the Artisanship Commission — perfect for hunting down suspects.
咳，这什么宝贝？它能干嘛，扑上去咬紧卡芙卡不放么？
Uh, ahem, I mean... what can he do exactly? Are we gonna set him loose on Kafka?
是，也不是。这是工造司仿生我狐族五感而开发出的「谛听」，敏锐程度更甚。
Yes, and no. This is Diting, a bionic dog developed by the Artisanship Commission. He has all the five senses of the foxian race and takes them to another level.
无论脚印还是气味，只要锁定特征，它就能嗅探出目标留下的痕迹，一路追查到底。
Be it tracks or scent, as long as he uncovers a trace, he'll follow it all the way to the end.
只要能找到一点点卡芙卡的痕迹就够了，就算她躲藏得再隐秘，也逃不过「谛听」的追踪。
All we need to do is look for any trace left by Kafka. It doesn't matter how good she is at hiding, Diting will find her.
不过，在我们正式搜捕前，得先调试一下这个小玩意儿，让它熟悉工作～
But before we get started, let's play with his settings a bit and get him ready~
循着这些亮晶晶的痕迹，把停云小姐找出来对吧？
*sigh* We need to follow these sparkly traces to find Miss Tingyun, right?
停云小姐也真是的，这么紧要的关头还和咱们玩起捉迷藏来了。
She's not in a hurry, that's for sure. Playing hide-and-seek with us while Kafka's still at large.
首先，把它设置成能嗅探某人留下的气味～
To begin with, let's set him to scent detection mode~
不妨以我的香水味作为目标，各位拿「谛听」来试试身手吧。
Tell Diting to follow the scent of my perfume and see what he can do!
痕迹…消失了？是「谛听」失灵了吗？
The traces... where did they go? Is Diting malfunctioning?
嗯嗯。它说港口风急，要用气味追踪可不容易。
Got it. He says the wind is too strong here at the port, so it's not easy to follow the scent.
How do you know what he's saying?
它只叫了一声，哪来这么多话？
That's a lot of words for one bark, don't you think?
是美少女和可爱小狗之间的心灵感应！
That's just the psychic bond between cute girls and cute puppies!
利用环境掩盖痕迹…天舶司的这位姑娘还真喜欢考验人啊。咱们四处找找，看看她有没有留下别的痕迹？
Using the environment to hide her traces... Our girl from the Sky-Faring Commission sure knows how to put up a challenge. Let's look around and see if we can find any other clues.
或者，问问附近的人吧？这里人来人往，一定有人看见过停云小姐。这也是收集信息的一种手段，应该不算作弊吧？
Or... we could ask around? Look how busy this place is, someone must have seen Miss Tingyun. That's not cheating, right? We're just collecting intel.
打扰了，请问两位有看见一位狐人经过吗？
Excuse me, any chance you saw a foxian lady pass by?
这问题可问对人了。星槎海终日狐人来来往往，没个一两千也有七八百。您问的狐人，与我们见过的狐人，那未必是同一个人。

Well that's a heck of a question, miss! I'd say nearly one in every two people passing through Starskiff Haven is foxian. We might have seen the lady you're looking for, but we wouldn't have batted an eyelid.
那肯定不是。要不您给咱形容形容？
He's not lying. Still, if you describe her a little, maybe it'll jog our memory.
好么，这一句话就抓准了问题的关键。
Write that down, write that down!
「好看」这个形容词放在狐族身上有些宽泛。莫说女子，便是肤白貌美的狐人男子也一抓一大把……
"Pretty?" That's too generic for a foxian. Even if you don't count the ladies, there are plenty of gents that fit that description like a glove...
您受累，再展开讲讲，她有没有什么明显特征——头上有耳朵，身后有尾巴可不算。
As tedious as it is, I'm afraid you'll have to describe her in more detail. Please don't say "two ears, one tail."
...I can put my hand on my heart and say I remember this fine lady.
你可又胡说，我和你在这站了这么久，何曾见过她？
Nonsense. I've been stood next to you this whole time and I don't remember anyone like her.
你看这照片，我虽然没有见过她，但是我看她容貌姣好，在我心里就把她当作是旧相识了，今天就是我们久别重逢，
Well, I may not have seen her in person, but her beauty feels like a long-lost acquaintance... How wonderful to be reunited with her after so long!
{F#姑娘}{M#小哥}您听懂了吧，我这搭档是在白日做梦呢。
Oh dear. I'm sorry, my friend here appears to have lost touch with reality.
你俩是特地来消遣咱们的吧？
Are you two professional time-wasters or something?
真对不住，咱哥俩平日里在街角的茶馆「不夜侯」搭档讲相声。情况你也看到了。云骑军一戒严，这几天茶馆生意是做不成啦。咱就寻思找个露天的地儿开开嗓子，练练功。

Please accept our apologies! Me and my partner do double act comedy in the Sleepless Earl — the teahouse round the corner. As you can probably guess, with all these curfews and lockdowns, we've hardly had an audience the past few days. We figured we'd find a spot on the street and do some rehearsal — just to stop us getting rusty.
这不赶巧您来问人嘛，我心想我得露一手活儿啊。您别担心，这是免费表演，不强买强卖。
Then you guys swung by asking for this foxian lady, so we thought we'd give you a bit of improv — free of charge I might add.
别气啊！您说的这姑娘我刚巧见过。就刚才，我瞧她转进了宣夜大道。您往那儿溜达溜达，快几步兴许还来得及找见。
Stay calm, stay calm! I did see the girl you're looking for. She took a turn from here into Starwatcher Avenue. I'd suggest you head over that way — she might still be there.
从这两张嘴里说出来的话还能信吗…？
I find it hard to trust anything you've just said...
被你们找到啦~有了「谛听」，追踪是不是更得心应手了呢？
You found me~ Diting's quite handy when it comes to tracking, isn't he?
在迴星港中如果发现了卡芙卡的踪迹，就开启这个小东西，别让她跑了。
If you pick up traces of Kafka in Stargazer Navalia, just switch him on. Don't let her escape.
我想，这几件东西应该和停云小姐都有关吧？
Miss Tingyun must have left us these clues, right?
现在「谛听」应该能追踪到她的踪迹了。
Diting should be able to pick up her traces now.
一张洁白的名刺，角落印有一只展翅欲飞的鸢。落款则是「天舶司商团『鸣火』的首席代表，接渡使停云」。
A piece of white name card, with a bird spreading its wings at a corner. The card belongs to Amicassador Tingyun, Head Representative of the intergalactic merchant guild, Whistling Flames.
毫无疑问，这是她抛给你们的小小线索，之一？
No doubt this is a tiny clue she left for you. Or maybe there are more of them?
被团成一团的包装纸，展开便能看到出自茶饮品牌「仙人快乐茶」。
A crumpled up packaging of the tea brand Immortal's Delight.
不行啊停云小姐，就算是留下线索，也不能到处乱扔垃圾啊。
No Miss Tingyun! You can't throw trash even for leaving behind clues.
一枚雕琢成锦鲤形状的精巧扇坠，被孤独地弃置在了街道不为人知的角落里。
A refined pendant of a fan in the shape of a koi, but is left alone in some forgotten corner of the street.
听说在仙舟民俗中「鱼」象征着丰足。你依稀记得游鱼交洄的形状也出现在停云小姐持有的扇子上。
It is said that in the culture of the Xianzhou, "fish" represents affluence. You vaguely recall that you have seen the pattern of fish swimming around each other on the fan of Miss Tingyun.
这是一张来自天舶司的罚单，看起来再普通不过。
A fine comes from the Sky-Faring Commission. There's nothing special about it.
但，接渡使停云小姐会给人开交通罚单么？
But... would Amicassador Tingyun issue traffic tickets to anyone?
你捡到了一份来自「廿四协会」邀请函。
You picked up an invitation from the Club of the Twenty-Four.
上面写着「廿四协会由<unbreak>23</unbreak>人组成，成立的目的，就是在每个月的二十四号，凑一桌人去吃至味盛苑的德悦全席」。

The invitation reads: The Club of the Twenty-Four, consisting of <unbreak>23</unbreak> people, is aimed to taste the set menu Virtue and Delight at the Garden of Gourmet every month on the <unbreak>24</unbreak>.
No wonder, someone has betrayed their club.
没想到又来了客人，想吃些什么？我这边推荐来一份缘虾饼如何？
More customers? You're a sight for sore eyes these days. So, what do you have in mind? I'd recommend our prawn crackers.
刚才有一位狐人小姐姐，点了一份鸣藕糕。
A foxian lady. She ordered a songlotus cake and went on her way.
请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐路过？
你们认识啊，刚才那位狐人小姐点了一份貘馍卷便离开了。
So you know each other! She ordered a tuskpir wrap and went on her way.
What else is on the menu?
琼实鸟串、貘馍卷、热浮羊奶…刚才还有一位狐人小姐姐，点了份鸣藕糕，也非常好吃。
Berrypheasant skewers, tuskpir wraps, steamed puffergoat milk... Oh, a foxian lady just ordered a songlotus cake — they're great too.
喂喂，{NICKNAME}，你怎么光顾着看起吃的来啦！
Hey {NICKNAME}, we're not on a food tour, remember?
请问这位狐人小姐现在在哪？
Do you know where the foxian lady might be now?
刚才还在这附近的，我想想，她往迴星港的方向去了，应该就在那边儿。
She was just here, give me a second... Oh, she was heading towards Stargazer Navalia — that's my guess.
抱歉啦亲，您赶得不巧，今天敝店得早早打烊了……
Apologies, you've come at a bad time. Our shop is closing earlier than usual today...
刚刚有狐人女孩从这儿路过吗？
Did you see a foxian girl pass by here?
狐人女孩？确实，敝店的镯子吊坠深受狐族姑娘的喜爱，当然……
A foxian girl? Well, our bracelets and pendants are extremely popular among foxian customers...
像{F#小姐您}{M#您身边这位}这般俊俏的美人儿自然也不能错过。要不要试戴一下最新推出的这款「琢月」系列……
...and I'm sure this pretty young lady won't want to miss out on our Verdant Luna selection. Please, try anything you like...
喂，{NICKNAME}，你忘了咱们是干嘛来了？
Hey, {NICKNAME}, remember what we're here for?
We were just wondering if you could help us find somebody...
Sorry, we were just wondering if you could help us find somebody...
我就知道，谁会赶这会儿功夫来买首饰啊。狐人女孩啊，让我想想……
*sigh* I knew it, nobody has time for jewelry in these trying times... A foxian girl you say? Let me think...
我刚刚见着咱们店里的大客户，停云小姐她……
I did just see Miss Tingyun walk by. She's a big patron of ours...
有没有见过这位小姐姐？
哎哟这不是停云小姐么？咱们店里的大客户。
Well that's Miss Tingyun! She's a big patron of our shop.
你们几位找她是有何贵干？该不会……
May I ask why you're looking for her? Surely she...
难怪瞧你们一身打扮，像是从其他世界来的吧。
I should've guessed from your attire — you look like you're from another world.
停云小姐时不时会带些商团的外宾来星槎海游览…我刚才一晃眼还瞧见她呢，正往街道里边走。
Miss Tingyun sometimes takes intergalactic business delegates on tours around Starskiff Haven... In fact, I just saw her walk by, she was heading down the street.
这位客官，我看您眼生，是打算到茶馆里吃茶的吗？
Ah, new patrons I see! Looking for some refreshment at the teahouse?
不巧，「不夜侯」刚刚关张。您要是想喝茶，恐怕得等云骑军排查危险结束，一切太平以后了。

Sadly there have been fewer and fewer bookings since the lockdown, so we decided just now to close the Sleepless Earl until further notice. We'll reopen once the Cloud Knights finish addressing their "security concerns."
刚刚有狐人女孩从这儿路过吗？
Did you see a foxian girl pass by here?
客官您问的可不就是「不夜侯」的老板娘吗？
Unfortunately yes, the boss is never far away.
停云小姐…是这儿的老板娘？
误会误会。原来您想打听的是刚路过的停云姑娘啊……
No, no, my apologies, different foxian. If it's Miss Tingyun you're looking for, she was here a moment ago...
请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐？
Any chance you've seen this lady?
原来您是要找停云姑娘啊……
Ah, so it's Miss Tingyun you're looking for...
她在咱们这儿点了一杯「仙人快乐茶」就离开了。刚刚见她的时候，正在街边小吃摊那儿转悠呢。客官可以去那里找找。
She ordered a cup of Immortal's Delight and went on her way. I saw her checking out the food stalls over there, that might be a good place to start.
我们可是很认真地在配合她练习哎！她竟然还有心思吃点心？
*sigh* Here we are sweating over our training while she's busy sampling dim sum!
这位客人这个时候来「赎珠阁」…嗯，面无愁容戚色，看来您不是来典当的。
Curious timing for a visit to Jeweler's Pagoda... Hm, your faces... no sadness or misery. I take it you're not here to pawn anything?
刚刚有狐人女孩从这儿路过吗？
Did you see a foxian girl pass by here?
这儿是典当铺，专供周转济急之用。不过您要找的人嘛……
Well, we're a pawn shop — we see plenty of customers. But let me see if I can recall the lady you're looking for...
请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐路过？
这儿是典当铺，专供周转济急之用。不过您要找的人嘛……
Well, we're a pawn shop — we see plenty of customers. But let me see if I can recall the lady you're looking for...
我见那姑娘从这儿路过，往小吃摊的方向去了，客人可以去那边逛逛。
I remember, she walked past my shopfront and headed over to the food stalls. I'd recommend asking over there.
等云骑军排查危险结束之后，欢迎客人再来赏光。
Do come back when the Cloud Knights finish their business.
哎呦，客人来照顾我家生意啦。来！慢慢挑，慢慢选，这些小礼物带回家乡可最体面了。
Customers! Take your time, I've got plenty of good stuff here. Lots of nice gift ideas.
刚刚有狐人女孩从这儿路过吗？
Did you see a foxian girl pass by here?
唔，似乎是见过，但又好像没见过？您容我想想……
Yeah! Oh, wait, um... maybe not. Hmm, let me uh... search my memory for a moment...
请问，您有没有见过这位小姐姐路过？
唔，似乎是见过，但又好像没见过？您容我想想……
Yeah! Oh, wait, um... maybe not. Hmm, let me uh... search my memory for a moment...
嘶，您要是，咳咳，能在敝店买个什么，也许能帮助我加快回忆？
Ahem, if only business were better, perhaps my memory would start to improve... don't you think?
这根本就是借机推销吧？是敲诈吧？
You just want us to buy your things! This is extortion!
在离开列车前，姬子给了你一百信用点零花钱。现在也许是用上它的时候了。
Before you leaving the Express, Himeko gave you <unbreak>100</unbreak> credits as pocket money. Maybe it's time to spend them.
你颤抖着打开手机，对仙舟物价一无所知的你祈祷着这儿的货物价格不要太贵……
You swiped to open your phone with trembling hands. You barely know anything about the prices on the Xianzhou. Hope you can still afford it...
我可没有逼两位花钱啊。我只是说买了能帮助我回忆。但我确实不记得有这么个姑娘路过嘛……你也不希望我随便编一个答案吧？

Hey, I didn't force you to buy anything, did I? I was simply commenting on my memory. And now I remember that I didn't see your foxian lady... I mean, surely you don't want me to make up an answer and point you in the wrong direction?
那就只能恕我记不得啦。
Then you'll have to pardon my bad memory.
{NICKNAME}，看来咱们在这儿也没什么收获啦，换个地方找找吧？
{NICKNAME}, doesn't look like we're gonna get anything from him. Let's go search somewhere else.
I just saw a pretty lady go past...
Man, we really came to the right place today.
Doing a crosstalk here during a blockade...
Means we get no audience. That's a loss!
But the ladies sure are pretty.
My store is full of treasures...
Better shut the store early then.
Brave Cloud Knights clear out danger,
It's not a good day for flogging wares...
Docks are blocked! Closing down sale —
Final three days! Final three days —
谁曾想「迴星港」也有停转的一天；「星河夜转漂迴星，银浦流云学水声」…这是某位诗人描绘当年迴星港造船的盛况。
Who'd have thought that Stargazer Navalia might become so quiet. "Long were the nights, when the clangor of hammers rose to meet the stars." ...People used to write poems about the shipwrights here.
罗浮内外的通航全都仰赖星槎往来。迴星港的生产线一断，仙舟内外航行的路线恐怕也得暂歇一段时日。
The Luofu relies on the starskiffs produced here to transport people and goods. Now that work in the shipyard has stopped, our internal transport and outbound flights might also grind to a halt.
嗨呀，也好。也省去我随团出使的活儿了。
*yawn* Of course, the silver lining is I don't have to go on as many trips anymore.
停云小姐，你看起来倒是一点也不为仙舟担心啊？
You don't seem to worry too much about the Xianzhou, Miss Tingyun.
哪儿的话。经商讲究的是个「喜怒不形于色」嘛。再说联盟经历的风浪多了，今日之乱，也不算什么大事。
I wouldn't say that — a good businesswoman doesn't wear her heart on her sleeve. Besides, the alliance has weathered plenty of challenges. We can handle this situation.
有言在先，要是真遇上了卡芙卡，请恩公们自管自动手。小女子什么忙也帮不了，能做的也就是在一旁瑟瑟发抖，加油鼓劲什么的啦～
Just to warn you, if we do run into Kafka, you'll have to do the fighting, benefactors. I'd love to help, but there's very little I can do except cheer you on from the side lines~
You want to leave all the fun to us?
恩公身手了得，和魔阴身打得有来有回。小女子不过一介文职小吏，万一卡芙卡暴起伤人……
Not a lot of people out there could've fought the mara-struck like you did. I'm only a civil servant — I can't imagine what Kafka would do to me if I were caught in the fray...
狐族虽不如仙舟人长寿，小女子也还想再过一百几十年安稳日子呢，就饶了我吧～
We foxians don't live as long as the Xianzhou locals, but I still want to enjoy the hundred-odd years I've got left. You'd do the same in my shoes, wouldn't you?
But Madam Yukong ordered you to...
哎哟～恩公也不必拿驭空大人来压人家吧？
*sigh* Playing the Madam Yukong card, are we? That's not very heroic now, is it.
司舵大人只是命我接引诸位通行星槎海。和我平常出使天外，周旋客商没什么不同。
Besides, the Madam Helm Master simply asked me to assist you in navigating around Starskiff Haven. It's no different to any other diplomatic mission or delegate reception.
碰到战斗，小女子既不擅长，也从不拿生命冒险。能借来「谛听」，已是尽了最大的心意啦。
I was never much of a fighter, and I'm not one for risking my life either. Getting Diting into your hands is already beyond the realm of my job description.
下次见到驭空，我一定好好打个报告。
I'll definitely be putting in a few words next time we meet Yukong...
不要紧，我们绝不勉强停云小姐。
Understood. We won't put you out of your comfort zone, Miss Tingyun.
一旦遇上卡芙卡，追捕和战斗交给我们。辛苦你替我们引路了。
When we run into Kafka, we'll do the fighting — and the capturing for that matter. Thank you for showing us the way.
可疑的线索应该就是这些了…但，它们都是卡芙卡留下的吗？还是故布疑阵？
I think we've rounded up all our suspicious clues... but did Kafka leave them behind on accident or on purpose?
从数量上看，是在故意戏耍我们吗？
She sure did put a lot of work into this gag, and I think we're the punchline.
我都能想象那个女人一脸故弄玄虚的表情，一字一顿地说「来、抓、我、呀」的样子。
Ugh. Making us run around like jerks. I bet she's loving this! I can almost hear her whispering: "Come and get me..."
She sure is a Stellaron Hunter...
你这很神往的语气又是怎么回事？
Ugh, why don't you go and marry her, huh?
毕竟是被星际和平公司重金悬赏，却永远没人能把她归案的通缉犯啊。我们倒像是成了被她暗中观察的猎物。
Don't forget, she's on the IPC's most-wanted list — a fugitive that nobody can seem to pin down... and now we've become her prey while she stalks us in the shadows.
走吧，恩公，事不宜迟，咱们应该很接近她了。
Let's go, benefactors, time is of the essence. We must be close.
搜集的线索应该已经足够让「谛听」追踪卡芙卡了。
We should have enough clues here to get Diting on the move.
快快打开小家伙，让它追着这些线索上的味道，动起来吧！
No time to lose! Let's give him the scent and let him lead the way.
等等，恩公，我的直觉告诉我，这儿似乎有些不对劲？
Stay still, benefactors... My instinct tells me something's not right here.
可是这儿什么也看不见啊？是卡芙卡布下的陷阱吗？让小谛听来探一探吧。
I can't see anything fishy... Did Kafka lay a trap for us? Let's get Diting to investigate.
虽然迴星港停转了，但警铃倒是没有停摆……她是怎么闯过这里的呢？
Stargazer Navalia may have come to a standstill, but the alarms are operational... How did she get through here?
也许是星核猎手里那个黑客小姑娘玩的把戏。
I bet that hacker Kafka pals around with had a hand in it.
嘿嘿，多亏了小谛听，咱们才没闯进去。
Hee-hee, thanks to little Diting, we didn't have to break and enter.
{NICKNAME}, can you watch what you're doing!?
The scent... where did it go?
当猎物的痕迹突然消失，猎手就该小心了——
When the trace of the hunted disappears, the hunter better think twice...
因为，那往往是追猎关系逆转的征兆。
It might mean the tables have turned.
这些云骑没有堕入魔阴身…你对他们做了什么？
These Cloud Knights aren't mara-struck... What did you do to them?
只是一点小小的暗示，让他们<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>说话而已呀。{NICKNAME}，这你最了解不过了。
Just a little persuasion to get them to <color=#dbc291ff>listen to me</color>. But you know all about that already, don't you {NICKNAME}?
这里不好，太卜要走很长的路，对我也没什么好处。去前面再会吧。
What a hassle, this place is too far for the diviner. See you up ahead.
还差一点点，各位…欲速则不达。
So close and yet so far... you'll have to pick up the pace.
可恶，这里完全过不去，得想办法截住她！
Ugh, there's no way through here, we need to think of a way to cut her off!
恩公，门关了不打紧，我们绕过传送带就行。
Don't worry about locked doors, benefactors, we can use the conveyor belts.
我可是一直在等你们呐。
为了方便你们找到我，我还留下了许多蛛丝…瞧见了没？
Of course, I didn't want to make things too difficult, so I spun you a broad web... Wasn't that nice?
可恶，这里完全过不去，得想办法抄近路截住她。
Ugh, there's no way through here, we need to think of a way to cut her off!
欢迎，列车团的各位，你们逮住我啦。
Welcome, Astral Expressers. Looks like you caught me.
You have the right to remain silent...
This was all part of your plan.
亮牌吧，卡芙卡。我们来到这里，应该都在你的计划之中。
Admit it, Kafka. You planned for us to come here.
不是计划，是「未来」。我们在无数的未来可能性中施与干涉，将最好的「未来」变成现实。
I didn't plan anything. It was the future. We interfere on countless future possibilities and make the best future a reality.
不要抬举我们，瓦尔特，星核猎手也只是「命运的奴隶」。
You speak too highly of us, Welt. The Stellaron Hunters are merely destiny's slaves.
最好的未来？对谁而言最好的未来啊？我才不信你会为别人着想呢。
Best future? Best for who? As if you'd consider anyone but yourself.
全宇宙——你信吗？当然是：对我而言。
If I said "best for the universe," would you believe me? Hehe... Best for me, naturally.
Surrender, and save your explanations for the Xianzhou.
If you want a fight, quit stalling!
I have a lot to ask you...
我们会带你去见罗浮将军，既然你自认清白，不妨向他解释，他自会裁决。
We're taking you to see the general of the Luofu. You can profess your innocence all you like, but the general will decide your fate.
不行呀，我讨厌按别人的步调做事。
Oh thanks, but no thanks. I can't stand moving at someone else's pace.
时间不多了，快动手吧，不然就来不及啦。
We don't have much time. If I were you, I'd make a move before it's too late.
你的一举一动，早在法眼占测之内。
Your every move has been foreseen.
I'll be taking the criminal from here.
列车团的诸位，初次见面，不，应该说我已在预见中与各位会晤过了。本座是仙舟「六御」之一，太卜司太卜，符玄。

Greetings, crew of the Astral Express. This is our first encounter... though given that I have encountered you in foresight, perhaps I should say the second. I am Fu Xuan, master diviner at the Divination Commission and one of the Six Charioteers.
有朋远来，本当旨酒倒迎，然天、地、人三元不在当位，只能往后推些个时辰了。咱们先谈正事。

Far-flung friends ought to be received with fine wine, but alas, the heavens, earth, and body are not aligned for such an occasion. You'll allow for a postponement of the usual formalities, I trust? We should begin with the matter at hand.
...What the actual heck is she saying?
She's just showing off with some big and fancy words.
联觉信标都翻译不出来…
Even my Synesthesia Beacon can't make sense of what she said.
咳咳！对本座的说话方式有意见，不妨直说。
Ahem! If the method of my speech is offensive to you, you need but say.
我们受景元将军的委托来此捉拿星核猎手，感谢太卜出手相助，但人得由我们押送到将军那里。
We received an assignment from General Jing Yuan to arrest the Stellaron Hunter. Thank you, diviner, for coming to our aid, but we must escort the fugitive to the general.
不必，本座这儿有将军文告，请看。诸位捕获星核猎手之后，即由太卜司接手审问事宜。

Inessential. I hold a proclamation from the general here, if you care to see. Upon detaining the Stellaron Hunter, questioning and all further arrangements are to be undertaken by the Divination Commission.
不用跟那女人一起走了？将军还挺好心的嘛～
Did the general just spare us a walk with Kafka? I knew he was a good guy~
我明白了。但将军曾许诺与我们共享情报。卡芙卡交代的每一个字我们都有权知情。
Understood. However, the general promised that all intel would be shared with us. We have a right to know anything that Kafka divulges.
这个家伙…能不能别给我挖坑啊——
That guy... Can I go one day without him throwing me under the—
我们不会增添手续，只要旁听审讯就好。
We won't make things anymore complicated than they need to be. We just want to listen in on the questioning.
好罢，事急从权…你们三个，和我一同去太卜司。
Very well, urgency demands fluidity... The three of you shall accompany me to the Divination Commission.
不能就地审讯吗？星核猎手多狡猾啊，万一又给她跑了？
Can't we do the questioning here? The Stellaron Hunters are slippery, what if she makes a break for it?
Are you guys up to this?
有本座在，她跑不了。能撬开星核猎手之口，让她吐露实情的手法，唯有在太卜司里方能生效。
While I am here, she will not escape. Only the Divination Commission has the methods to make her talk and bring the truth to light.
吉时已到，得动身了。各位，请吧。
The time has arrived. We must depart. Please, proceed.
要「谛听」启动追踪，得先找些线索为引。
Before Diting can start tracking, you'll have to feed him some leads.
卡芙卡若真在迴星港，多少会留下痕迹。我们散开找找。任何看起来可疑的物件都别放过。
If Kafka is hiding in Stargazer Navalia, she'll have left behind traces. Let's spread out and look for them — leave no stone unturned.
当务之急，是先找到可能是由卡芙卡行动留下的线索。
Our priority now is to find anything that could lead us to Kafka.
小谛听说它嗅到了特别的东西……
…造船监匠人的通行玉符，用来开启门关的。
...A jade seal used by the shipwrights. It opens various passages.
有人用完后故意将之破坏，或许是卡芙卡。
It looks like someone used it and then destroyed it — possibly Kafka.
云骑军武器的一部分，被什么锐利之物削断了……
Shards of a Cloud Knight's weapon. Something really sharp caused this...
就是那个坏女人没跑了吧？她有把又快又长的刀子。
It must have been Kafka! She's got a scary sword.
知道啦，知道啦，咱们去那边看看！
I know, I know, let's go and have a look!
手雷？哇！沾了什么东西——噫，是口红……
Agh! Is that a grenade? What's that on the side... Huh? It's lipstick...
这女人，分明是挑衅咱们！
等等，你们看，「谛听」发现了个奇怪的箱子，上面还有掌印……
Look, Diting found a strange chest... and there's a hand print on it...!
从留下的印迹来看，手指修长有力，又很稳定呢。看起来是一只致命的手。
Let me see... Slender fingers, but strong. This hand belongs to a killer.
唔？箱子上还夹着一张字条？「喜欢吗？这儿有奖励哦~」
Huh? There's a note here too. "Take your fancy? There's a reward inside~"
可恶，我们这不是完全被牵着鼻子走了吗？
Ugh, why do I get the feeling we're not the ones doing the hunting?
卡芙卡似乎完全料中了我们每一步行动…各位，当心陷阱。
It seems like Kafka predicted our every move... Stay alert, all of you. We could be walking into a trap.
这…不会也是卡芙卡的线索吧？
Is this... anything to do with Kafka?
这是造船监匠人的焊接枪，可能是冒失的工人留下来的。
That's a shipwright's soldering gun. I think one of the workers here must have left it behind.
这是什么啊？好像黏土一样。
What's this? It looks like clay.
这恐怕是从流水线上遗落的造船材料，虽然我也认不出这是什么……但这应该和卡芙卡没什么关系。
I think it might be shipbuilding material leftover from the assembly line, though I can't tell exactly what the substance is... I don't think it's connected to Kafka.
「云阶月地，关锁千重。纵浮槎来，浮槎去，不相逢。」
"Downy cloud and opalescent moon are set in twain by the seals multitudinous. Neither road nor skiff shall cross the gulf and carry me to thee."
虽然{RUBY_B#翻译装置}联觉信标{RUBY_E#}让每个字都能看懂，但连一块儿就不明白是什么意思…这是卡芙卡留下的东西吗？
Thanks to the {RUBY_B#machine translator}synesthesia beacon{RUBY_E#} I can understand the characters, but I don't get what any of it means... Is this something Kafka left behind?
这应该只是一首打算送给某人的情诗吧？
Seems like a love poem to me.
情、情诗？还、还是放回去吧！
L—Love poem? Quick, put it back!
这不是什么线索，只是我喜欢喝的茶饮品牌…每天两杯，干活不累。
This isn't a clue, it's just a brand of tea I like...Two cups a day keeps the tiredness at bay.
I could do with a cup once we're done here...
啊，这个我知道，家用寻物仪的广告。
Ah, I know what this is! It's an advertisement for a Home-Use Object Finder.
星际和平公司的广告到处都是，是时候该问候一下他们的贸易专员了。
There are IPC advertisements everywhere. It's about time I got in touch with their trade commissioner.
又是宝箱上的手印，这个女人真的好闲。
Another chest, another hand print. Has this woman got nothing better to do?
「为迷宫里乱窜的小老鼠们备下的奶酪~」
"A little cheese for the rats in the maze~"
她好像是在跟咱玩游戏一样，可恶！
Rats!? She's playing games with us — I hate her!
{NICKNAME}，稍后要看着点小三月，别让她冲动行事。
{NICKNAME}, keep your eye on March. We can't let her be impulsive.
吉时已到，得动身了。各位，请吧。
The time has arrived. We must depart. Please, proceed.
...Whoa, looks like the battle here was intense...
看来我们在工造司耽搁时，太卜大人已先行开拔出征啦。
The master diviner must have launched the campaign while we were delayed in the Artisanship Commission.
She must have divined it was the right time.
兵贵神速。罗浮仙舟眼下最紧要的就是遏制星核灾变。
Time is of the essence. The most important task for the Xianzhou Luofu is suppressing the Stellaron.
景元将军把指挥云骑的重任交给太卜，必然知道她会按卜算的结果行动。
General Jing Yuan tasked the master diviner with commanding the Cloud Knights — he would've known she'd act on the results of her divination.
太卜怎么会乖乖听别人的话？
I can't imagine Fu Xuan obeying orders to the word.
是啊。景元将军把指挥云骑的重任交给她，必然知道她会按卜算的结果行动。
Indeed. Since General Jing Yuan tasked the master diviner with commanding the Cloud Knights, he must've known she'd act on the results of her divination.
幸好将军没让咱们跟着云骑…打仗和冒险真的不一样啊，这满地的人…我、我见不得这种大场面。
Thank goodness the general didn't make us go with the Knights... Fighting is totally different from adventuring. All these people... I—It's tough to bear.
恩公说哪里话，这也算不得什么场面……
I'm afraid this is nothing, benefactor...
数百年前，某「丰饶」的令使为了劫夺「建木」，率军压境罗浮，几乎摧毁半数洞天，杀得云骑军十不存一。
Centuries ago, an Emanator of Abundance besieged the Luofu with the aim of taking the Ambrosial Arbor. They destroyed half our delves and killed most of the Cloud Knights.
这样的过去，对长生种来说甚至不算历史，称「昨天」也不为过。与之相比，眼前这不过是小打小闹罢了。
For long-life species, such events are more like yesterday's memories than ancient history. This awful spectacle is child's play in comparison.
哇，哪有你这么安慰人的！
Hey, is that supposed to make us feel better!?
也不知道太卜这一仗是输是赢？
It's hard to tell if the master diviner won or lost here.
I think she won total victory!
我觉得也是。倒下的都没几个云骑军，这一仗仙舟应该打得很漂亮。
I think so too! I can't see many Cloud Knights — the Xianzhou must have fought well!
Seems to me, her troops were wiped out...
你是哪边的啊！我看倒下的都没几个云骑军，这一仗仙舟应该打得很漂亮。
Hey, whose side are you on!? I can't see many Cloud Knights — the Xianzhou must have fought well!
Let's play it safe and say it was a draw.
…你以为是打比赛啊还有平局？我看倒下的都没几个云骑军，这一仗仙舟应该打得很漂亮。
...A draw? This isn't a tournament, y'know! I can't see many Cloud Knights — the Xianzhou must have fought well!
…未必。如果行军大捷，通常会留下据点和部队置后策应。但这里却没有。
...Not necessarily. There'd usually be a base with supporting forces set up after a successful engagement, but we don't see any of that.
四下找找，或许还有线索。
Let's look around and see if we can find some clues.
久等了，诸位。我已查明「药王秘传」的玄虚。
I have kept you waiting, but the deceit of the Disciples is laid bare to me now.
战事不利，太卜身先士卒，亲自探察敌情，令人钦佩。
The conflict is difficult, master diviner, but you have led your forces from the front lines and beyond in pursuit of the enemy. Admirable work.
那…那倒也没什么！演算之事，须卜者亲炙，获得一手情报方能趋近正确结果……
Hardly! A diviner must acquire first-hand knowledge in order to calculate the future. Collecting intelligence in this way assists me in achieving the right answer...
等等…谁说战事不利来着？「药王秘传」蓄谋已久，手段了得，但我军也未见劣势，怎能说战事不利？
Wait... what's all this about a difficult conflict? The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been scheming for a long time, but our army is in no way inferior. How can things be so difficult?
接下来，是想让我们上阵了？
Is this a segue into us joining the fray?
看看，跟太卜待久了，咱们几个都沾上了未卜先知的毛病了。
*sigh* I knew we'd spent too long around the master diviner — now we're predicting the future...
你等我们，怕是又有所求吧？
Just ask for our help already...
It would seem you came prepared.
唉，头一回见你们家驭空大人，她有句话说的可好：「这是仙舟内务，不劳各位挂怀」。
*sigh* The first time we met Madam Yukong she said something like: "This is a Xianzhou affair and there's no need for the Express to get involved..."
怎么一眨眼，什么苦差事都塞给我们了？公司都没你们会差遣人。
...and now here we are running around doing everything. Even the IPC takes it easier on us.
咱猜猜，这回你打算让我们做什么？不会是打头阵…和云骑军一起…冲锋吧？
Lemme guess, what are we up to this time? Could it be... heading to the front lines? Leading the Cloud Knight charge?
不去不去！本姑娘晕大场面！
Well try this on for size — nope! I can't stand anymore of this fighting, so there!
谁说要让各位上战场了……
*sigh* Who said you'd be heading to the battlefield...
景元吩咐过，各位是因缘际会而来的奇兵，端得一个「奇」字。适才云骑的强攻，乃是示敌以正。用奇之时，就在此刻。

Jing Yuan's orders. He said that the value of unexpected guests lies in the unexpected. The Cloud Knights' assault was to demonstrate our power to the enemy head-on... now it is time for the unexpected.
哼，本座只是客气客气。依着卜算结果，你在这里也没等多久。
Hmph, I was merely being courteous — according to my divination you've hardly been here long.
何不早说药王秘传的事？
Why didn't you tell us about the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus earlier?
抱歉，为防机密外泄，「药王秘传」之事只有我和将军知晓。
Apologies. To avoid dissemination of intelligence, the general and I kept the involvement of the Disciples to ourselves.
这是一个阴谋颠覆联盟的隐秘组织。他们常年潜伏在暗处，这次星核作祟，终于忍不住露了行踪。并且，这一场灾乱与他们也有非同寻常的关系。

It is a clandestine organization that seeks to overthrow the Alliance. Before the Stellaron disaster, the Disciples had remained veiled in shadow for years. Their emergence reflects their intricate connection to this calamity.
Please tell us the whole truth this time...
抱歉，为防机密外泄，「药王秘传」之事只有我和将军知晓。
Apologies. To avoid dissemination of intelligence, the general and I kept the involvement of the Disciples to ourselves.
这是一个阴谋颠覆联盟的隐秘组织。他们常年潜伏在暗处，这次星核作祟，终于忍不住露了行踪。并且，这一场灾乱与他们也有非同寻常的关系。

It is a clandestine organization that seeks to overthrow the Alliance. Before the Stellaron disaster, the Disciples had remained veiled in shadow for years. Their emergence reflects their intricate connection to this calamity.
「晓钟觉迷梦中梦，烟霞聚散身外身」…各位，瞧见那边了罢？
"Morning bells chime in a dream, evening mist gathers around me"...Do you see that?
好大的丹炉，还在冒烟呢。
What huge elixir crucibles. There's still smoke coming out of them.
这是古时候丹士们阐演仙道的地方。他们在此建起丹炉，汲取「建木」之力，化奇想为现实。因为炉中烟霭不息，故得名「云霞紫府」。

This is where the alchemists practiced the way of immortality in ancient times. They erected elixir crucibles here to absorb the power of the Arbor, turning fantasy into reality. Since the smoke from the crucibles never ceases, this place was named Evemist Mansion.
名字虽然风雅，却是兵法上的死地。只要丹炉不熄，云霞缭绕，我们便寸步难近。
An elegant name, but as far as the art of war is concerned, it's a deathtrap. As long as the crucibles are lit and the smoke continues to linger, we cannot get any closer.
这就是云骑军失控入魔的原因？
This is why the Cloud Knights lost control and became mara-struck?
正是。「药王秘传」在这散入洞天各处的雾霭中，混入了诱发魔阴身的丹药。
Indeed. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus infused the smoke that permeates this delve with medicinal pellets that elicit mara.
除非能闭气行军，不然云骑军将不战自溃。因为没人知道身边的战友会在什么时候堕入魔阴身。还有什么比猜忌能更好地瓦解一支军队的士气？

Unless the Cloud Knights were able to march with their breath held, they would be doomed to fall into disarray. Moreover, no one could know whether their comrade was about to be stricken with mara. Is there anything better than fear for destroying the morale of an army?
云骑的第一次强攻只是掩护，太卜用云骑主力吸引敌人注意，而让我们去熄灭丹炉，止住烟雾。
The Cloud Knights first assault was just a cover. You're using the main army to attract the enemy's attention, while we douse the elixir crucibles and stop the smoke.
这股烟雾对我们没有影响？
对，这妖雾是专为对付云骑军的杀手锏。
Indeed. This demonic vapor is a weapon targeted against the Cloud Knights.
「建木」是罗浮禁忌。仙舟联盟素来独立，「药王秘传」的人怎么也料不到将军敢请外援，当然也不会为了对付短生种而作准备。

The Ambrosial Arbor is taboo for the Luofu, and the Xianzhou Alliance has always been fiercely independent. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus could never have guessed that the general would seek outside help — they won't be prepared against short-life species.
为何不让狐人与持明去试试？
Why not get the foxians and Vidyadhara to try?
你误会了魔阴身，它不是专对人类生效的诅咒。狐人不易魔阴身，是因为他们虽为长生种，寿命却并不无限；而持明凭借「蜕鳞」抛却旧世。仅就魔阴身而言，长生种是平等的……

You misunderstand the nature of the mara-struck condition — it is not a curse unique to humankind. foxians don't usually succumb to it because their lifespan is not eternal, yet they are still a long-life species. The Vidyadhara rely on molting to discard the old world. All long-life species are equal in the face of mara...
不过，「药王秘传」的人怎么也料不到将军敢请外援，当然也不会为了对付短生种而作准备。
However, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus could never have guessed that the general would seek outside help — they won't be prepared against short-life species.
景元将军所说的奇兵，就是这个意思么？
Is this what General Jing Yuan meant by unexpected guests?
本座不敢妄言。只能说，星核猎手的预言比本座的卜算更准。卡芙卡所求的未来正在一一应验。
I wouldn't hazard a guess. All I can say is that the predictions of the Stellaron Hunters were more accurate than mine. The future that Kafka seeks is becoming reality... one step at a time.
我不想按他们的预言行动。
I don't want to act according to their predictions.
我也不想受人摆布。但人们行于命途之上并非独来独往，不受羁绊。每个人的选择除了造就自身，也将同行之人推向前方。
I do not wish to be their puppet, either. In any case, we do not walk alone and unhindered on our paths. Our choices define us and influence others.
也只有这一条路可走了…
是「只有这条路通向了已知最好的结果」，如果可以选，没有人会选择跳下悬崖。
Rather, only this way leads to the known best result. If we can afford to choose, then none would choose to leap off a cliff.
何况，这并非是我一人的决定……
Besides, this is not my decision alone...
太卜的职责是趋吉避凶。我不想让自己的选择，令罗浮滑向糟糕的未来。
The duty of the master diviner is to bring luck and avoid misfortune. I don't want my choice to plunge the Luofu into a terrible future.
言归正传，熄灭丹炉而不受其害，这件事只有你们能办到。意下如何？
To return to the matter at hand, only you can douse the elixir crucibles without being harmed by them. What say you?
好吧，虽然太卜这回没有说「请」，但谁教这个忙只有咱们能帮。{NICKNAME}，杨叔，我说的对吧？
Fine. I didn't hear a "please," but seeing as we do kinda have superpowers around here... {NICKNAME}, Mr. Yang, what do you think?
一旦烟雾止息，我会立刻前来，绝不让各位孤军奋战。
I will come at once when the smoke dissipates — you won't be left to fend for yourselves.
「药王秘传」放弃百年潜伏，选择现在示身，说明其有必胜把握；然而准备再充分，终究是冲着云骑军而来。各位的能力与存在，「药王秘传」丝毫不知，也无法防备。

The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus renounced their century of secrecy and chose to reveal themselves, meaning they feel confident of victory... but no matter how well-prepared they may be, their focus has always been the Cloud Knights. They are completely unaware of your existence and capacity, and in short — cannot be prepared against you.
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
So you succeeded in dousing the elixir cauldrons...
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
不要紧，该来的终究还是来了。
Unimportant. The inevitable is already upon us.
嗯，「药王秘传」必藏身丹鼎司，将军和本座心知肚明。只是捉不住把柄，没法问六司的罪，只好等你自己跳出来了。

Indeed. The general and I knew that the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus must be hiding in the Alchemy Commission. However, without evidence, we couldn't bring charges before the commissions. We had to wait for you to show yourselves...
也好，将星核邪祟引入仙舟，重生建木，诱人堕入魔阴身…这些大罪，十王司会一条一条同你清算。

...and now, your charges are many. Drawing Stellaron spirits into the Xianzhou, resurrecting the Ambrosial Arbor, striking down our people with mara... The Ten-Lords Commission will address these transgressions during your reckoning.
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
罪？如果我所为有罪，那末仙舟的先祖将与我同罪！是他们接受了「丰饶」之赐，将后裔转化成了长生种……
Crimes? If I am guilty, then all of our Xianzhou ancestors are also guilty! They were the ones who accepted the blessings of the Abundance and turned their descendants into long-life species...
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
「药王秘传」只是走在他们曾经走过的道路上，追求超脱，何罪之有？
The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are only walking on the road our ancestors once took. How is it a crime to seek ascendance?
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
彼时，建木玄根包覆罗浮仙舟，宛如有生之物。我族捭阖星海，无可匹敌。人人皆能得道成仙，自在变化。丰饶神迹降于九艘仙舟，那是何等荣光的时代……

In days of old, the roots of the Ambrosial Arbor enveloped the Xianzhou Luofu like a living creature. We controlled the stellar seas and none could stand in our way. Everyone could become a celestial and shift form at will. Divine miracles descended onto all nine Xianzhou ships. What a glorious time that was...
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
再瞧现在，仙舟沦落成了何等模样？！甘受妖弓驱使，屡遭丰饶之民涂炭，「十王司」甚至逼迫我们放弃长生……

How far the Xianzhou has fallen! We consent to be commanded by the Devilish Archer, suffer continuously at the hands of the Denizens of Abundance, and the Ten-Lords Commission even forces us to give up our immortality...
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
可叹啊，我不怪你无知。因为我们没能出生在建木初降的时代，见证那时的奇迹。但现在，我们还有机会，恢复古制……

How pitiful! I do not blame you for your ignorance — we were not born in the era when the Ambrosial Arbor first descended, nor did we witness its miracles. But now we now have an opportunity to restore the ancient laws...
我以为你有何高论，不过是些追求力量再不做人的老套说辞。
Hmph... Forgive me for thinking you might have harbored some profound enlightment. Yours is the same old talk of those who seek power... and give up on their humanity.
仙舟先民与帝弓同战，毁弃建木，设立「十王司」划定生死，正是为了重新以人类的姿态活下去。

Our Xianzhou ancestors fought side by side with the Arbiter, laid waste to the Arbor, and established the Ten-Lords Commission to lay down the lines between life and death... In doing so, we enshrined our future as human beings.
仙人？仙舟之上并无仙人。什么「丰饶」神迹，什么操弄生死，你们的所作所为，不过是妖孽行止罢了！
Celestials? There are no celestials on the Xianzhou. The "divine miracles" of the Abundance, the manipulation of life and death... Your deeds are nothing but evil!
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
话不投机半句也多。太卜大人，您已做出选择，您抛弃了力量…那是最愚蠢的选择。
I have nothing to say to you, Master diviner — you have already made your decision. You have discarded power... a most foolish choice.
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
丹士长见过太卜大人…您好像并不意外。
I have met you before in my capacity as chief alchemist, master diviner... You don't seem surprised.
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
还有你，无名客。你也站在云骑这一边……
And you, the Nameless. You stand with the Cloud Knights too...
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
「建木」降临…会带来不死的仙躯——
The Ambrosial Arbor's descent... will bring us undying bodies...
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
赐予我们星核的人…这么说……
The one who gave us the Stellaron... said that...
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
Phantylia... the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have fulfilled our promise...
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
「绝灭大君」也该兑现承诺…快！就是现在！
You, Lord Ravager, must do the same... Now! Quickly!
啧啧，为什么要逼我亲自出手呢，这有悖我的「毁灭」美学呀…小卒子。
Ah ah, little pawn, must you force me to intervene directly? I'm loath to flout my philosophy of destruction.
罢了，看来要从内部崩裂仙舟，还得用别的法子……
Never mind. It would seem the time has come for other means of dismantling the Xianzhou from within...
这…这…所以，和我们一路同行的停云小姐是军团的人？！
W—Wait, hold on a second — are you really saying that Miss Tingyun was a member of the Antimatter Legion all along?
她身上冒出的那团火又是什么东西？停云小姐的身体…她的身体又去哪儿了？
And what was that fire that came out of her? And her body — where did it go?
杨叔，你见多识广，刚才到底发生了什么？！
Mr. Yang, you're smart. What happened just now!?
那团火焰自称绝灭大君，幻胧。这个名字，我曾经从其他无名客口中听过。
The flame we witnessed claimed to be Lord Ravager Phantylia — a name I've heard other Nameless speak of in the past.
她是纳努克座下的七位大君之一，钟爱凡人的自毁，许多生灵被她诱入过万劫不复的深渊……
She's one of seven Lord Ravagers who serve Nanook... and finds pleasure in witnessing the self-destruction of mortals. She's led countless souls down a dark and hopeless path.
言下之意是，那位天舶司的姑娘早已遭其蛊惑，成了军团的走卒？
...Meaning that Tingyun had long since fallen under the Lord Ravager's influence?
她的目标一定是建木！染指建木，有如夺走罗浮的根源，如此一来，覆灭仙舟轻而易举。事不宜迟，必须阻止她！
Phantylia is aiming for the Ambrosial Arbor! If she succeeds, the Luofu will be deprived of its roots, making its destruction all too easy. We must stop her!
真可惜。还想多观察一阵子呢……
What a pity. I would've liked to observe it for a while longer...
既然领受了「丰饶」的恩赐，你们应该承受得住「毁灭」的祝福吧？
Since you received the gift of Abundance, surely you can withstand the blessing of Destruction as well?
杨叔的意思是，真正的停云还……
You're saying that the real Tingyun is still...
抱歉，三月七，我无法给出肯定的答复。原本的停云身在何方，又是何时被偷梁换柱，随着那具身躯的消散，我们已无从查究。

I'm sorry March, I can't say with any certainty where the real Tingyun may be, or at what point she was replaced by the impostor. Without knowing where the body vanished to, it'll be tough to get an answer.
这只是我个人的猜想…和希望。如果那就是停云，幻胧为何要多此一举湮灭证据。将遗体扔于故人面前，岂不更符合她的毁灭「美学」？

At this point, it's all just conjecture and hope. But if that body belonged to the real Tingyun, it does raise the question of why Phantylia would go to such lengths to destroy any evidence of her. Wouldn't it be more in line with her destructive nature to leave Tingyun's remains behind as a display of power?
我相信这才是幻胧的目的——让我们因此身陷混乱和猜疑，彻底落入她的毒计。
I believe this to be Phantylia's goal — to sow seeds of doubt among us and ensnare us in a malevolent trap.
难怪「药王秘传」兴起叛乱，原来是与军团大君暗中勾结。她伪装仙舟人的样貌，将星核送入罗浮，让我们自相毁灭……

It's clear that the sudden resurgence of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus is all connected to the Lord Ravager. Pretending to be a Xianzhou citizen, planting a Stellaron on the Luofu — all part of her plan to bring about our self-destruction.
…我不这么认为。幻胧钟情于精神与物质双方面的毁灭，由心灵的溃败导向肉体的消亡。
I don't believe so. Phantylia revels in watching a corrupted mind eating away its host from inside out, until the obliteration of both is achieved.
但停云的言谈举止却不像是受蛊惑，或被操纵，若她不是原本的停云，那更可能是幻胧的化形。
But there was no indication that Tingyun had been misguided or manipulated... It's possible that the Tingyun we knew wasn't her true self, but an image Phantylia devised to serve her own purposes.
怪物僵死的身躯上，几处显眼的伤口正以肉眼能辨的速度缓缓收缩。尽管没有任何生命体征，你却觉得眼前这怪物并没有彻底死去。

On the monster's rigid body, several conspicuous wounds are shrinking at a speed discernible to the naked eye. Despite the absence of any vital signs, you sense that the monster in front of you is not completely dead.
盔甲上留有刀剑的斫痕，令人惊诧的是，这些斫痕全都来自死者自己的武器。
Its armor is covered in sword marks. But the strange thing is that these marks all came from the deceased's own weapon.
倒下的巨猿身躯庞然如山岩，但它似乎仍有暴起伤人的力量。
The fallen creature's body lay on the ground like a giant boulder. It looks as though it still has the power to spring back up and attack people.
一头巨大的狼形孽物匍匐在地，你从它的残躯上感受不到生命，但一些细微的幼芽在它的身躯下茵开。
A huge, wolf-like beast lies on the ground. Its corpse shows no signs of life, but tiny saplings are sprouting from underneath it.
摘去头盔，你直视阵亡云骑的脸。
Removing the helmet, you look straight into the face of the fallen Cloud Knight.
这张仙舟人特有的不辨岁月的脸旁上凝固着强烈的痛苦。你在他发鬓边找到一簇变异的枝条——他死前似乎正经历炼狱般的折磨。

An expression of agony is frozen on the face of this Xianzhou man of indiscernible age. You find a cluster of mutated branches at the temples of his hair — he seems to have been subjected to purgatory-like torture before his death.
Here! There are still survivors here...
咦，你们不是云骑啊…来这里做什么？很危险的。
Hmm? You're not the Knights... What is your purpose here? It's dangerous.
我们是将军请来的援助。请问其他人都到哪儿去了？
We're reinforcements sent by the general. Where's everyone else?
竟把短生种搬来当救兵…嘿嘿，景元真是无人可用了。
Tsk, resorting to short-life species as reinforcements... Hehe, Jing Yuan is truly running out of options.
快逃！这家伙是…「药王秘传」！
Run! She's... a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus!
多嘴多舌。我若把你医好，你也会是我们中的一员啊。
Silence. If my healing worked, you'll become one of us...
所以，你不会让他们逃走的，对不对？
...and then it's not just me they'll be running from.
你、你再坚持一下，我们找人来救你……
H—Hold on! We'll find someone to help...
别浪费时间了，我已被那家伙「转变」，要不了多久……
Don't waste your time. They've "converted" me. I don't have much longer...
你们快走吧…太卜的人就在前边……
Go... The master diviner's troops are ahead...
他不再言语，仿佛耗尽了力气，又像是在等你们离开。
He stops talking. It could be because he is exhausted, or he's waiting for you to leave him be.
潜伏已久的「药王秘传」竟在这个节骨眼现身了，不知那位太卜有没有算到这一节……
The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were in hiding for so long... now they finally show their face. Did the master diviner fail to foresee this...?
恩公，你们要小心了。药王秘传信奉寿瘟祸祖「药师」，是仙舟的心腹大敌。
Be careful, benefactors. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus worship Yaoshi the Plagues Author — the greatest enemy of the Xianzhou.
一片狼藉的战场中，某个痛苦的呻吟吸引了你们的注意。
A painful moan amidst the ravaged battlefield draws your attention.
帝弓庇佑，你们不是「药王秘传」的人……
Reignbow's blessing... You're not Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...
你可别再乱动了，让咱看看有什么办法能让你快点好起来。
Stop moving around! Let's see if there's a way to help you recover faster.
来吧，服下这个，对快速恢复有帮助的。
Come on, take this. It'll help with your injuries.
咱们手头竟然没有可以救急的东西吗？
Don't we have anything to help her?
呃，你等等，我这就去找你的同僚来救你。
Uhh, you wait here. I'm gonna get your comrades to help you.
你们手忙脚乱地从行囊里翻找出能促进伤口愈合的药物，缓缓滴进他的嘴里。
You fumble through your bag to find medicine for her wounds and administer it one drop at a time.
一时间你们竟有些忐忑，不知道对寻常人类起效的成分，是否还能作用在长生种的身体上？
For a moment you are worried that medicine made for ordinary humans might not work on long-life species.
云骑军强撑着自己的身体站了起来。
The Cloud Knight propped herself up so she could stand.
你们…谢谢你们。我感觉自己好多了。
...Th—Thank you, all of you. I feel much better now.
幸亏遇见了你们，咱们的驻军就在前面，如果你们想找个地方暂时休整一下，我就在前面等你们。
Thank goodness you're here... The garrison is up ahead, are you heading there now? I'll wait there for you.
数千年来，联盟一直想祓除这隐秘组织，始终未能如愿。选在这个时刻出世，一定不是偶然。
The Alliance has been trying to root out their secret organization for millennia — it's no coincidence that they've chosen this moment to reveal themselves.
毕竟，是他们将所有仙舟人转变成了长生种…也是他们自「建木」中研究出了种种不可思议的技术。
After all, it was they who changed the Xianzhou natives into long-life species... They also developed many incredible technologies from the tree itself.
几位恩公怕是都比我活得长些。
Even you benefactors have probably lived longer than me.
等等，是你们啊——几位快些进来，外边危险。
Wait, it's you...! Quickly, in here! It's dangerous outside.
你们不是将军请来的客人吗？太卜算到了各位。她吩咐过，一定要等候几位到来。
Are you not the general's guests? The master diviner prophesied your arrival — we were ordered to wait for you under any circumstances.
是，太卜命队伍驻扎此处后，便率斥候去前方探查了。据说隐藏多年的「药王秘传」出现在附近，队伍里人心惶惶……

Yes. The master diviner ordered us to remain stationed here and went to scout ahead. They're saying the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have returned — they haven't been seen for an age... The troops are anxious.
好在各位来了。太卜说了，几位不到，云骑便不得进发。
It's good that you're here — the master diviner said the Knights weren't to move out until you arrived.
各位还请到阵中稍候，一切等太卜大人返回后再作主张。
Please wait in the camp — we'll decide on our next steps once the master diviner returns.
云骑军驻守在此，裹足不前，看来形势并不乐观。「药王秘传」…我在哪里听过这名字，记得是潜伏在仙舟内部，阴谋颠覆联盟的丰饶秘系……

That the Cloud Knights received orders not to advance is a bad sign. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... I've heard the name before. If memory serves, they're an underground sect of the Abundance that's said to have lain dormant within the Xianzhou, plotting to overthrow the Alliance...
星核的确引起了与丰饶有关的异象，难道药王秘传因此放弃了伪装？不应该啊，云骑的主力丝毫未损…一定有什么我们不知道的事情发生了，太卜不在，向营地里的云骑打听打听吧。

The Stellaron has certainly caused Abundance-like abnormalities — is that what motivated the Disciples to come out of the shadows? No. The Knight's main force remains intact... Something must have happened — something we're not aware of. The master diviner isn't here — let's head into camp and see what we can learn from the troops here.
那，恩公们不妨先到处看看，小女子找个地方歇歇脚。
Good idea, why don't you take a look around, benefactors? My feet need a rest.
这位驻守的云骑战士面色铁青。看到你们靠近，他点头致礼。
There is a ghastly paleness in the face of this resident Cloud Knight. As you approach him, he nods his head in salute.
长话短说吧。请见谅，兵凶战危，现下不是分神闲聊之时。
Forgive me for being brief — warfare is a dangerous business. There's no time for idle chat.
我们按照太卜的军令，几个时辰前攻陷此处。之后我们才知道，原来此行的对手是信奉{RUBY_B#药师}寿瘟祸祖{RUBY_E#}的「药王秘传」。

We took over this place a few hours ago under the master diviner's command. It was only afterwards that we learned our enemies were none other than the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus — those who worship the {RUBY_B#Yaoshi}Plagues Author{RUBY_E#}.
原本一切顺利，无论是「药王秘传」的妖人，还是受他们驱使的异兽都不是我们的对手。
Everything was going as planned. The sorcerers of the Disciples and the fantastic creatures they commanded were no match for us.
但没过多久，行伍里的弟兄姐妹突然不分敌我、肆意砍杀起来……
...Then, after a while, our comrades suddenly started to slaughter one another...
可恨！「药王秘传」到底使了什么妖法！
Curse it! What Sanctus Medicus sorcery did they use on us!?
不止「药王秘传」炮制的怪物，也有我的同袍……
Yes, among the Sanctus Medicus monsters... there were our comrades.
仙舟人最忌讳将「魔阴身」展露人前，因为那意味着放弃为人，输给了埋藏在长生血脉中的「孽物」…也违背了帝弓的训诫。

The greatest fear of the Xianzhou people is succumbing to our mara-struck form around others. To do so means that we have given up on being human, lost to the abomination sleeping in our immortal blood... and violated the Reignbow's admonishments.
「药王秘传」所为的，是每个联盟子弟最痛恨的卑劣行径！
What the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus did are despicable acts that every Alliance resident detests!
…我对帝弓咒誓，必为同袍报仇雪恨。
...I swear to the Arbiter that I will avenge my comrades.
有个受伤的战士没能归队…
There's a wounded warrior that didn't make it back to his unit...
感谢各位报知，我这就派人去察看。
Thanks for your intel. I'll dispatch someone immediately.
一位云骑站在俘虏旁边。你们说明自己的身份和将军的命令后，他不再阻拦你的接近。
A Cloud Knight is standing next to the captive. He steps aside after you explain your identity and show him the general's order.
想要问话？可以。但我必须全程旁听，这部分内容要一并录入口供。
You want to ask questions? Fine, but I must be present the whole way through. This part needs to be recorded as testimony.
嘻嘻，总算有个说话的伴儿了。被这群板着脸儿一声不吭的云骑押着…嘻嘻，真无聊啊～
...Finally someone to talk to. These Cloud Knights are so serious, so boring, hehe...
那颗发光的种子？哈哈，我见过呀，它可真美。望进去，里面有声音会说话哩……
That shining seed? Haha, I've seen it, so beautiful. If you gaze into it, there's a voice inside that speaks to you...
魁首说靠着这东西，我们能为「建木」注入新生。嘻嘻，我原本是不信的。
The master said we could inject new life into the Ambrosial Arbor with it. Hehe, I didn't believe it at first.
咱们想了那么多办法，花了短生种几辈子的时间，「建木」却没有一丝活过来的迹象。
We tried many methods, spending multiple lifetimes of short-life species, yet the Arbor showed no signs of resurrection.
但现在你瞧——嘻嘻，「唯有星神的力量才能再现神迹」。没错，没错，伟大的药王「丰饶」！
But look upon it now, hehe — "only the power of an Aeon can recreate the miracle." Yes, yes, the mighty Sanctus Medicus! The Abundance!
你也看到了，对吧！建木重生的样子，嘻嘻，何其壮绝！
So you witnessed it too? The Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection, hehe... Magnificent!
在长生种都回忆不起的神降时代，药王「丰饶」将建木赐给罗浮仙舟。借着这株神木，人类实现了无数奇迹：息壤、木无患、自在应身…

In the {RUBY_B#Theophany Era}befall era{RUBY_E#}, so far in the past that even long-life species cannot recall, Sanctus Medicus the Abundance gifted the Ambrosial Arbor to the Xianzhou Luofu. With that sacred tree, humanity realized many miracles: The fallow earth, the western soapberry, the altered flesh...
只可恨妖弓毁掉了一切，颠倒黑白，抹去了药王的一切功绩…不过要不了多久，咱们就能重归神降时代的繁华！

But that Devilish Archer ruined everything! They twisted right and wrong and erased Sanctus Medicus's achievements... But soon... soon we will return to the glory of the {RUBY_B#Theophany Era}befall era{RUBY_E#}!
你见识过和我们一起战斗的那些异兽了，对吧？这只是「建木」小小的恩赐……
You've seen the fantastic creatures that fought with us? They are only minor gifts of the Ambrosial Arbor...
住口吧，胡言妄语的鼠辈。云骑军用不了多久就会把你们连根拔起。
Shut it, rambling rodent. The Cloud Knights will root all of you out soon.
你们对那些云骑做了什么？
What did you do to these Cloud Knights?
做了什么？我们治好了自己的同胞啊。嘻嘻，被困在孱弱的血肉里，一定很痛苦吧……
What did we do? We cured our kin! Hehe, it must hurt to be trapped in such weak flesh and blood...
混蛋…我真想现在就砍了他。
You scum... If the order allowed I would cut you down now.
哦，你们不懂…短生种不懂的。什么「魔阴身」？那是药王所赐的第二生命！消解我执，成就仙体，自由自在的生命！

Oh, you don't understand... a short-life species couldn't understand. Mara-struck? Bah! It's a second life gifted by Sanctus Medicus! To eliminate the self! To achieve transcendence! A life of true freedom!
我在你的眼睛里看到了对力量的渴望。此生苦短，不是吗？嘻嘻，我可以、我可以让你……
I see a desire for power in your eyes. This life is too short for you, isn't it? Hehe, I can... I can help you...
别被他的花言巧语蛊惑了。
Don't listen, his words are poison.
逗他们玩玩罢了，军爷。嘻嘻，没有「丰饶」的赐福，你们短生种可承受不了这种「转变」。
We're just having fun, sir, hehe... Without the blessing of the Abundance, you short-life species would never be able to endure the transformation.
I don't have any more questions.
It was so close... so close...!
服役三百年的老人都变成了…那种不人不鬼的模样！只差一点…只差一点我就……
Even seasoned soldiers — soldiers of three centuries were turned into... twisted beings! I was almost... almost...
「药王秘传」，谁知道敌人竟是「药王秘传」……
Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... who would have thought our enemies would turn out to be the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...
唉，想来太卜大人是怕打草惊蛇，才对我们秘而不宣吧。
*sigh* The master diviner must have kept it quiet to avoid alerting them.
云骑军的训练那么严格，怎会失控成这样？
The Cloud Knights undergo such thorough training. How could they lose control like this?
人受「魔阴身」的困扰也就罢了，怎么连狐人与持明也……
It's one thing for humans to be stricken with mara. But foxians and Vidyadhara...?
这和以前打的仗不一样！队长，这回连自己的战友都可能是敌人……
But this is different from all our previous battles! Captain, even our own comrades may become our enemies this time...
战友堕入魔阴身应该怎么做，当云骑的心里都有数，不要忘记你受过的训练。
Every Cloud Knight knows what they must do if their comrades become mara-struck. Don't forget your training.
可、可是，这不应该啊。我们还没有到岁数，还没到魔阴身的岁数……
B—But this shouldn't be happening! We're still so young — we're not old enough to be stricken with mara yet...
我在《云骑武经》中看过相关的记载：接触寿瘟祸祖之人，瞬间堕入魔阴…但没想到，「药王秘传」竟然真的存在，真的就在我们身边。

There are records of such a phenomenon in the Cloud Knights Martial Doctrine. Those who come into contact with the Plagues Author become mara-struck instantly... I never thought the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were real, or so close to us.
我、我、我不知道接下来咱们队伍中还会有多少人……
I—I don't know how many more of our soldiers will...
我当时只觉…身边都是敌人。脑袋里只有恨意，想一人杀出去……
I just felt there were... enemies all around me. I only felt hatred. I wanted to kill everything in my path...
要我们出示行动命令的意思吧。
We probably need to present it with a command for it to act.
云骑看守着一个喃喃自语的犯人。
The Cloud Knights are guarding a prisoner who is murmuring to himself.
我…看到了我看到我自己成了雷霆我看到自己变成风暴……
I... saw it... I saw myself become thunder... become a storm...
丹炉中的烟气…我嗅到了未来……
That scent in the elixir crucible... I could smell the future...
血肉泥犁困不住我…化身玄鹿我看到了枝叶伸展遮蔽穹窿，我将再度变化……
Mere flesh will not trap me... I am the Ebon Deer. I see the leaves and branches covering the sky. I will change again...
咱们俘虏了几个「药王秘传」的妖人，有些人疯了。他是疯得最彻底的一个。
We captured a few devils from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Some of them are already mad, and this one is the maddest.
那名丹士的双眼失焦，分别望着不同的方向，仿佛同时看到了一条小径分岔的两端。
The alchemist's eyes were unfocused, darting back and forth, as if he were looking at the two diverging ends of a path.
恩公同「药王秘传」的人说过话了？你觉得他们如何？
Have you talked with these Disciples, benefactor? What do you make of them?
是啊。可在丰饶之民看来——
True. But in the eyes of the Denizens of Abundance...
无视长生种的本性，遏制心魔，假扮凡人维持文明社会，就像成年人玩小孩子过家家。这是另一种疯狂。
...ignoring the true nature of long-life species, suppressing the inner mara, maintaining the facade of mortal society... it's a child's game. Another breed of madness, perhaps.
是咎由自取。仙舟联盟不允许有人触碰长生的禁忌。
They brought this upon themselves. The Xianzhou Alliance forbids anyone from accessing forbidden knowledge regarding immortality.
这群人索求星神的力量时，就该考虑清楚，自己是否有能力支付相应的代价。
They should have thought about whether they were capable of paying the price when seeking the power of an Aeon.
为了追求知识，可以理解…
I can understand their desire for knowledge...
您还真是胆大呢，这话也敢当着大庭广众说…还是小声些罢，若让云骑军听到，他们可不会手软的。
Shh, that's a brave thing to say out in the open... If the Cloud Knights hear you, they won't think twice.
恩公竟是个为达成目的不择手段的人呢。
Hehe, it strikes me that you'd use any means to achieve your goal, benefactor.
比起害怕死亡，仙舟人对「不死」的恐惧反而更深呢。
Xianzhou natives are more afraid of immortality than they are of the days coming to an end.
如愿以偿获得了长生，却要面对比死更恐怖的结局，那位「丰饶」之主真是开了个恶毒的玩笑啊。
They received eternal life as they had desired, but are doomed to a fate more terrifying than death. The Abundance played a cruel trick on them.
恩公有没有同这些「药王秘传」的人说过话了？你觉得他们如何？
Have you talked with these Disciples, benefactor? What do you make of them?
这些家伙到底为何要背叛罗浮呢…想不明白啊。
Why would they betray the Luofu... I don't understand.
太卜随斥候前去探察敌情了，请您在此稍作逗留。
The master diviner has gone ahead with the scouts. Please wait here for her.
如今外面「药王秘传」的妖人正潜伏着，到处乱走太危险了，请您在这儿暂作停留，等太卜大人的情报吧？
There are Sanctus Medicus sorcerers hiding out there — it's too dangerous to roam. Please wait here for the master diviner's return.
等太卜回来，咱们可能要面对一场硬仗了…害得我都有些紧张了。
When the Master Diviner gets back, we might be in for tough times... It's making me a little nervous.
咳咳，现在开始练习闭气，应该不算晚……
*coughing* What? It's not too late to practice holding my breath...
离丹炉还很远哩。本座虽不通药理，但也知道抛开剂量谈毒性是纸上谈兵……
We're still far from the elixir crucibles. I'm no healer, but I do know that dosage is important in the application of poisons...
哼，虽然如此…本座心里面还是怕得要死！本座还年轻，不想这么快就坠入魔阴身啊！
Hmph, even so... Okay I admit it — I'm terrified! I'm still young! I don't wanna become mara-struck so soon!
那你还是退回本阵好了。
Then you'd better return to the home front.
那怎么成！景元将云骑交托给我，连身先士卒都做不到，还想继任将军…咳，还想服众吗？

Out of the question! Jing Yuan gave me authority over the Cloud Knights. If I can't even stand on the front lines, then how can I succeed him as general? *cough* How can I win the hearts of the people!?
本座的运势涨落在兑、乾之间，当机立断便能不受其害。所以别多说话动摇我！！
My fortune is fluctuating between the marsh and heaven trigrams — I can avert disaster by being decisive. So stop talking to me and distracting me!
本座会竭力维持神智，剩下的便靠你们了。
I'll focus on keeping my sanity. The rest is up to you.
那股烟雾真的对我们无害？
Is that smoke really safe though?
咳…要是本座说「不知道」，你该不会立即撂挑子不干吧？
*coughing* ...If I told you I wasn't certain, would you turn back on the spot?
你居然一点把握也没有？
You don't have the slightest clue, do you?
胡说，本座很有把握！没问题的！
Nonsense! I'm very certain! One-hundred percent!
不用算。本座除术数占卜外，直觉也很准！
No need. Aside from divinations and calculations, my instincts are accurate too!
…也给诸位吃颗定心丸罢。各位还不知道「魔阴身」是什么，对么？
...Though I'm sure a little reassurance wouldn't hurt. You don't know what being mara-struck actually means, do you?
医士认为，「魔阴身」与记忆有关。长生种虽有极其漫长的寿命，记忆的容量终有极限。
The healers believe that the mara-struck condition is related to memories. Unsurprisingly, long-life species have long lifespans, but there is a limit to the brain's capacity.
数百年，上千年过去，长生种能感受的情绪阈值不断提升，记忆也在天长日久的磨蚀下稀薄和厌倦，只留下了最极端、鲜明的沉淀。那几乎必定是痛苦和悔恨的回忆残渣……

After centuries and millennia, a long-life species' emotional threshold becomes higher and higher. Simultaneously, their memories fade and become dull under the erosion of time, leaving behind only the most extreme and vivid recollections, which are almost guaranteed to be memories full of anguish and regret...
明白么？长生种的结局，就是不再感受到快乐与幸福、只余下如伤痕般镌刻在心头的痛悔恨仇。在这些极端情绪下，身为人的自我开始崩溃…这便是「魔阴身」的开端。

Do you understand now? The fate of all long-life species is to no longer feel joy and happiness, left only with hatred and regret etched into the heart. Under such extreme conditions, a person's ego starts to crumble... and that is the beginning of the mara-struck condition.
短生种不必担心这些。你安心了吗？
Short-life species don't need to worry about this. Feel better?
啊，那我倒安心了，我正好什么都不记得。
Phew, I do — I never had memories to begin with.
…不对，你还是不明白。魔阴身的病因不是记忆，而是情感的阈值被磨砺到…算了，你便当记忆听罢。
...No, you still don't understand. The condition isn't caused by memories, but by the emotional threshold having been... Never mind. You can regard it as a memory issue.
How large are the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus's forces?
数目寥寥，多为受蛊惑的丹士和医者。他们虽然能驱使异兽战斗，或是以丹药自壮身躯…但说到底并不是云骑军的对手。也正因此，这些人才会想出散布妖雾的法子。

Only a handful of converted alchemists and healers. They can drive fantastic creatures into battle and strengthen their bodies with medicinal pellets... but they are no match for the Cloud Knights. That's why they decided to spread this demonic vapor.
实力对比如此悬殊，可他们却结束了潜伏，举事叛乱了。这不正常，这些人在等候什么转机……
There is a gulf in strength between us, yet still they emerged into the open and rebelled. Something isn't right. They must be waiting for some shift in fortune...
一旦丹炉熄灭，烟气散去，本座立即赶来。
I will come at once when the crucibles are doused and the smoke dissipates.
快去吧。一旦丹炉熄灭，烟气散去，本座立即赶来。
Hurry. I will come at once when the crucibles are doused and the smoke dissipates.
炉身开始震动，原本冷却的丹炉中喷涌出烟雾。
The crucible starts to shake, and smoke emits out of the cold elixir crucible.
关…快关掉它！{NICKNAME}，你怎么把关闭的丹炉打开了？
T—Turn it off! {NICKNAME}, why did you turn it on!?
炉鼎上的符箓黯淡无光，丹炉静默。
The talismans on the elixir cauldron are dark and inactive. The elixir crucible lies silent.
你好奇地将手放在一枚古老的篆纹之上，炉身开始震动，烟霭腾空而起。
Curiously, you put your hand on an ancient engraving. The crucible begins to shake and smoke rises up towards the sky.
Are you doing this on purpose!?
等等，咱们还没有关闭这些丹炉呢？！
Wait, we still haven't doused the burners!
那家伙以仙舟人的样貌潜伏行事，愚弄我等…真是可恶、可恶至极。
That impostor had the audacity to carry out her nefarious plans right under our noses... How utterly despicable.
更让人担心的是…还有多少反物质军团的卒子潜伏在仙舟之上？
What worries me more is... just how many more Antimatter saboteurs are at large?
这一切发生的太突然了…但杨叔说得对，回过头看，停云小姐是有不少古怪的地方，尤其对「丰饶」的造物过于感兴趣了。
It all happened so suddenly... but looking back, I think Mr. Yang was right. Tingyun was behaving strangely — she was fascinated with the Abundance's creations.
既然是天舶司派出的使节，显然天舶司中确有「停云」其人，放心，她的去向就由云骑军探查究竟。

Since she was an Amicassador dispatched by the Sky-Faring Commission, it's evident that there must indeed be a person with her name in the Commission. We'll have to let the Cloud Knights get to the bottom of what happened to the real Tingyun.
至于出现在我们身边的这位「停云」…正如瓦尔特先生所言，她表现出的阴毒与残忍正是为了扰乱我们的心神，切不可落入陷阱。
As for the "Tingyun" who accompanied us all that way, it's like what Mr. Yang said — her appearance was designed to sow seeds of doubt among us... we cannot allow ourselves to fall into her trap.
那本是持明族管理的洞天，据说是自持明故乡世界移栽而来的古海胜境。
It is a delve governed by the Vidyadhara — supposedly an ancient oceanic region transferred from the Vidyadhara home planet.
「建木」自从在大战中被斫断后，其根系盘虬，从未真正死灭。
After the Ambrosial Arbor was broken in two during the war, its roots were left gnarled and broken... yet it never died.
联盟决议，将建木封入了鳞渊境，并交由持明龙尊世代守望，意在借助持明龙裔的力量遏制建木。
The Alliance decided to seal the Arbor within Scalegorge Waterscape, entrust it to the high elders of the Vidyadhara, and rely on the power of Long's Scions to constrain it.
{NICKNAME}，当心哦。那些怪物的生命力可顽强了……
Be careful, {NICKNAME}. Those monsters are pretty tough...
Don't move. Let me have a look...
短生种的寿命转眼即逝，何必自蹈死路？
The lives of short-life species are so fleetingly brief. Why seek death?
你们来仙舟是为什么，想求得长生么？
Why did you come to the Xianzhou? To seek immortality?
用不着看景元的脸色！「药王秘传」可以给你们想要的！
You don't have to appease Jing Yuan! The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus can provide all that you desire!
时间过去太久了，也不知当年的封印是否仍在…就算在，恐怕也挡不住那个幽魂般的绝灭大君。
It has been so long — no one knows whether the seal remains... Even if it does, I doubt it will hinder that spectral Lord Ravager.
我已将眼前的情况报知了神策府。
I've reported the current situation to the Seat of Divine Foresight.
他自从在穷观阵与我通话后，便再也没有音信，说是「有机缘要事，必须亲至」。
He made no further contact after we communicated at the Matrix of Prescience. He said he had "important matters to personally attend to."
情况已到了危如累卵的时刻，只能相信将军了……
The situation stands on the edge of a precipice. We must trust in the general...
Time is of the essence. Let's go.
太卜大人，我也得跟着吗……
Master diviner, do I have to come...
喔，你也在啊…不巧，将军指名要你同几位客人同行，就受累走这一趟罢。
Oh, you're here too... Unfortunately, the general designated you to accompany our guests. So yes, you do.
受赐「建木」后，丹鼎司曾是罗浮仙舟最重要的司部。
After receiving the Ambrosial Arbor, the Alchemy Commission was once the Luofu's most vital commission.
可到最后，丹士们仍不满足，开始以操纵生命为乐。对「建木」的研究，就像饮鸩止渴…越深入，越渴望。

But in the end, the alchemists grew discontented and began to obsess over the manipulation of life. Research into the Arbor poisoned their minds... the more they pursued it, the more they longed for it.
唉，我总觉得，虽然长生种能活很久……
*sigh* I feel like... even though long-life species get to live forever...
但论烦恼和痛苦，和咱们这些短生种也没什么两样。
...they aren't so different from us short-life species when it comes to worries and suffering.
人命关天。停云小姐，你回去吧，将军那儿我们解释。
Your life is more important, Miss Tingyun. Go back, we can explain to the general.
等等，停云小姐，你怎么还不回去！这里离丹炉很近了！
Wait, Miss Tingyun, why are you still here!? You're too close to the crucible!
承蒙关心，小女子没事～谁叫将军命令我跟着各位呢，可不敢违抗军令呀。
Thank you for the concern, but I'm fine~ The general commanded me to stay with you — I dare not go against military orders.
炉身渐渐停止震动，不停涌出的烟霭渐渐止息。
The crucible gradually stops shaking, and the smoke slowly ceases to pour out.
Seems like the smoke is getting thinner...
哪有这么快。咱们得加紧脚步了。
Not thin enough. We need to hurry.
好嘞，完成了！这下烟雾瞧不见了。
Yay, we did it! Can't see the smoke anymore.
好…好极了。本座这就率军前来汇合。
E—Excellent. I'll lead my troops to the rendezvous.
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
太卜，容我向您展示「仙人」们曾做到的事情。
Master Diviner, allow me to show you what the celestials were capable of.
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
Chisel out the form, control the flesh and bone!
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
为何…为何如此？她明明说过……
列位「恩公」，容我重新介绍——
Benefactors, allow me to reintroduce myself...
我来此，乃是让这仙舟分崩离析，自灭而亡！
I have come with a single purpose: To set in motion the self-destruction of the Xianzhou!
停云小姐是…军团的「绝灭大君」？！这、这到底是怎么回事啊？！
Miss Tingyun... is a Lord Ravager of the Antimatter Legion!? But— How can that be?
诸位，冷静！大敌当前，切不可乱了阵脚！
Keep calm, all of you! This is a formidable enemy — we have to stay together!
我嘛，是最不喜欢亲手制造毁灭的了……
They have no qualms about dealing out destruction by their own hand...
还不行动吗？再迟恐怕情势有变。
Why are we still here? Things will change if we tarry too long.
真不必。嘻，小女子常年在宇宙中航行，别看年纪不小，实际满打满算也只有十几年阅历呢。
Hehe, there's really no need — I've spent my years traveling the universe! Not to mention, I'm younger and stronger than I look.
盯上仙舟的不是「焚风」，不是「星啸」，你们很幸运哦。
You are fortunate that Zephyro and Celenova never set their gaze upon the Xianzhou.
登上星槎，前方便是封印建木的洞天，「鳞渊境」。
We need to take a starskiff to Scalegorge Waterscape — the Ambrosial Arbor can be sealed from that delve.
可惜那位将军执意要我登台，幻胧也只得献丑一番。
But since that stubborn general of yours has forced me to take center stage, I'll make sure I steal the show.
该赴约了，请容我先行告退，希望你们能同这些戏子…玩得开心。
Haha... My apologies for leaving so soon, but I have an appointment to keep. I'm sure my friends here will be happy to entertain you...
The fighting has stopped for the moment at the Alchemy Commission
与此同时，载着丹恒、素裳与罗刹的小舟姗姗来迟，停靠此处…
Meanwhile, the ship carrying Dan Heng, Sushang, and Luocha finally arrives nearby...
Huh? You're pretty familiar with this place.
嗯，是丹鼎司没错，难怪船半路上断断续续收到几条军令，说云骑在此集结，想必是为了解决星核的问题。

Yep, it's the Alchemy Commission. No wonder we were getting those military broadcasts on the way over — something about the Cloud Knights gathering here, right? They're probably coming to fix the Stellaron problem.
终于！走了这一路，终于能见着云骑的影子。可算归队了！
*sigh* It's been such a long journey, but now we're finally gonna meet some Cloud Knights! I'll be back with my unit!
我没骗你们吧？说把你们带到安全的地方，就言出必践！虽然…绕了点远路……
I didn't lie to you, right? I told you I'd bring you somewhere safe, and I did! Though... we did take a bit of a detour...
我去星槎海前，曾找一位卜者测算此次出行的吉凶。他说「随而有获」，让我不必在意去向，只要随波逐流，便能有所收获。

Before I arrived in Starskiff Haven, I had a diviner read my fortune for the journey ahead. He told me not to be concerned with the destination, but to seize my chances and travel with the current to reap the greatest harvest.
就是说，谢谢素裳姑娘了。
哦…好吧，我去向这儿的云骑长官报备了。
Oh... okay. Well, I'm gonna go report to the nearest captain.
你们在这附近转转吧，可别乱跑，一会儿会有云骑来送你们回去。有缘再见啦！
You guys can hang around here, but don't run off too far — there'll be Cloud Knights coming to escort you back soon. Bye for now!
这持明协助建造的丹炉中均存有云吟术，少主可借此多加体会……
All the elixir crucibles that the Vidyadhara helped to construct contain cloudhymn magic. You should take this chance to learn more, young master...
是么？我不借机关便可御水，体会又有何用？
Huh? But I don't need any sort of device to help me command water, what more is there to learn?
您是受选之人，资质不可限量，但云吟术毕竟是基础……
You are indeed the chosen one, with endless potential... yet cloudhymn magic is just the beginning.
持明蜃影…这些过去的影子还没有消散吗？
A Vidyadhara Mirage Echo... Have these shadows of the past yet to disperse?
…那些情绪出现了，卡芙卡，我感觉到了。又是这种感觉！这种……
...That feeling, Kafka — it's welling up within me. That feeling! I—It's...
Don't resist. Let the mara strike you...
该是偿还代价的时候了！时候到了！！
*laughing in madness* It's time to pay the price! It's time!!!
你以为变成这副样子就能逃得掉么？！逃得掉么……
You think changing form will help you escape!? Escape...
我已经和你，还有那个女人说过很多遍了…我是「丹恒」。
I have told you and that woman many times... I am Dan Heng.
我和你们的过去毫无瓜葛。
I have nothing to do with your past.
丹恒…你以为换上另一副面貌，改成另一个身份，往日的罪孽就能一笔勾销了？你…你甚至连「死」都没有经受过……
Dan Heng... You think another name and face can blot out the sin of your past? You... You didn't even experience death...
要让你感受这种痛苦，「丹恒」，我要让你知道「死」的痛苦！
I will force this suffering upon you, "Dan Heng." You will know the pain of death!
今天你谁也杀不了，通缉犯，因为你得跟我走。
You're not murdering anyone today, fugitive. You're coming with me.
景元的跟班小子…景元没教你审时度势么……
Jing Yuan's lapdog... Did the general not teach you to choose your battles wisely...?
喂，你快走远些。待会儿刀剑无眼——咦？
Hey, move back. Things are about to... Huh?
好了，各位，<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：住手吧。
All of you, <color=#dbc291ff>listen to me</color> — stop.
只是一点准备工作，好迎接大人物的大驾光临——总不能让堂堂罗浮将军，看我家阿刃和你们两个的笑话呀。
I'm just clearing the stage for the grand entrance — can't have you three misbehaving in front of the Luofu's hotshot general.
二位久别重回仙舟，却总是在些尴尬的场合。如念故人之交，应该早些通知我才是。

Many years have passed since the two of you departed the Xianzhou, and yet the circumstances of your return appear to be equally unhappy. If you still thought of me as a friend, you should've forewarned me.
你们帮了仙舟一个小忙，我很感谢。带这人走吧，这一次，我可以当做没看见。
Thank you for assisting the Xianzhou in this small matter. Take this person away — I will pretend I didn't see anything this time.
It has been a long time... old friend.
你还不能走，因为你的列车朋友们正在「鳞渊境」里等你呢。咱们一同去见见吧？
You cannot leave yet — your Astral Express friends are waiting for you in Scalegorge Waterscape. Shall we go and see them together?
现在不是说这个的时候。
「药王秘传」在丹鼎司发动叛乱，目前正处于云骑军的节制下。各处都不太安全，请暂时留在这儿。
